analysis.research_motivation: 传统CFD模拟复杂流体流动计算成本极高，亟需高效的数据驱动替代方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态、多保真度仿真数据，构建能准确预测流体流动时空演化并推断缺失场信息的模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用层次化Vision Transformer（SwinV2-UNet）架构，处理多模态流数据集，并通过辅助令牌显式编码数据模态和时间增量。
contributions: 提出基于SwinV2-UNet的多模态Transformer框架用于流体流动预测。
在高压气体喷射任务上验证了模型在时空推演和特征变换任务上的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定仿真数据，泛化到其他能源系统需验证。
自回归预测的误差累积可能影响长期预测精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于SwinV2-UNet的多模态视觉Transformer框架，用于预测能源系统中的流体流动，并在高压气体喷射任务中验证其跨分辨率和模态的泛化能力。

papers.title: Generating Satellite Imagery Data for Wildfire Detection through Mask-Conditioned Generative AI
papers.abstract: The scarcity of labeled satellite imagery remains a fundamental bottleneck for deep-learning (DL)-based wildfire monitoring systems. This paper investigates whether a diffusion-based foundation model for Earth Observation (EO), EarthSynth, can synthesize realistic post-wildfire Sentinel-2 RGB imagery conditioned on existing burn masks, without task-specific retraining. Using burn masks derived from the CalFireSeg-50 dataset (Martin et al., 2025), we design and evaluate six controlled experimental configurations that systematically vary: (i) pipeline architecture (mask-only full generation vs. inpainting with pre-fire context), (ii) prompt engineering strategy (three hand-crafted prompts and a VLM-generated prompt via Qwen2-VL), and (iii) a region-wise color-matching post-processing step. Quantitative assessment on 10 stratified test samples uses four complementary metrics: Burn IoU, burn-region color distance (ΔC_burn), Darkness Contrast, and Spectral Plausibility. Results show that inpainting-based pipelines consistently outperform full-tile generation across all metrics, with the structured inpainting prompt achieving the best spatial alignment (Burn IoU = 0.456) and burn saliency (Darkness Contrast = 20.44), while color matching produces the lowest color distance (ΔC_burn = 63.22) at the cost of reduced burn saliency. VLM-assisted inpainting is competitive with hand-crafted prompts. These findings provide a foundation for incorporating generative data augmentation into wildfire detection pipelines. Code and experiments are available at: https://www.kaggle.com/code/valeriamartinh/genai-all-runned

analysis.tldr: 利用扩散模型EarthSynth基于燃烧掩码生成野火后卫星图像，无需任务微调，并系统评估了不同管道和提示策略的效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 标注卫星图像稀缺是深度学习野火监测系统的根本瓶颈，需要探索无需任务特定训练的合成数据生成方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练的扩散基础模型，基于现有燃烧掩码生成逼真的野火后卫星图像，以缓解标注数据不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用EarthSynth扩散模型，设计六种配置：全图生成与修复两种管道，三种手工提示和一种VLM生成提示，以及区域颜色匹配后处理步骤。
contributions: 提出基于扩散模型的掩码条件卫星图像生成方法用于野火检测数据增强
系统比较了全图生成与修复管道、多种提示策略及颜色匹配后处理的效果
analysis.experiments: 在CalFireSeg-50数据集的10个分层测试样本上评估，使用Burn IoU、颜色距离、暗度对比和光谱合理性四个指标。
limitations: 仅评估了10个样本，规模较小
颜色匹配后处理降低了燃烧显著性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用扩散模型EarthSynth基于燃烧掩码生成野火后卫星图像，无需任务微调，并系统评估了不同管道和提示策略的效果。

papers.title: AIVV: Neuro-Symbolic LLM Agent-Integrated Verification and Validation for Trustworthy Autonomous Systems
papers.abstract: Deep learning models excel at detecting anomaly patterns in normal data. However, they do not provide a direct solution for anomaly classification and scalability across diverse control systems, frequently failing to distinguish genuine faults from nuisance faults caused by noise or the control system's large transient response. Consequently, because algorithmic fault validation remains unscalable, full Verification and Validation (V\&V) operations are still managed by Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) analysis, resulting in an unsustainable manual workload. To automate this essential oversight, we propose Agent-Integrated Verification and Validation (AIVV), a hybrid framework that deploys Large Language Models (LLMs) as a deliberative outer loop. Because rigorous system verification strictly depends on accurate validation, AIVV escalates mathematically flagged anomalies to a role-specialized LLM council. The council agents perform collaborative validation by semantically validating nuisance and true failures based on natural-language (NL) requirements to secure a high-fidelity system-verification baseline. Building on this foundation, the council then performs system verification by assessing post-fault responses against NL operational tolerances, ultimately generating actionable V\&V artifacts, such as gain-tuning proposals. Experiments on a time-series simulator for Unmanned Underwater Vehicles (UUVs) demonstrate that AIVV successfully digitizes the HITL V\&V process, overcoming the limitations of rule-based fault classification and offering a scalable blueprint for LLM-mediated oversight in time-series data domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出AIVV框架，利用LLM代理协作实现自主系统的自动化验证与确认，替代人工分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型在异常检测中无法区分真实故障与噪声/瞬态响应导致的干扰故障，且算法故障验证不可扩展，导致验证与确认（V&V）仍需人工参与，工作量大且不可持续。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化自主系统中的验证与确认（V&V）流程，特别是区分真实故障与干扰故障，并生成可操作的V&V产物。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Agent-Integrated Verification and Validation (AIVV)框架，将LLM作为深思熟虑的外循环，通过角色专业化的LLM委员会对数学标记的异常进行语义验证（区分干扰故障与真实故障），并基于自然语言需求进行系统验证，最终生成如增益调整建议等V&V产物。
contributions: 提出AIVV框架，将LLM代理集成到V&V流程中，实现自动化。
通过语义验证区分真实故障与干扰故障，克服基于规则的故障分类局限。
在无人水下航行器时间序列模拟器上验证了框架的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在无人水下航行器（UUV）的时间序列模拟器上进行实验，结果表明AIVV成功数字化了人工在环V&V过程。
limitations: 实验仅在模拟器上进行，未在真实系统中验证。
依赖LLM的语义理解能力，可能受限于LLM的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AIVV框架，利用LLM代理协作实现自主系统的自动化验证与确认，替代人工分析。

papers.title: Guideline2Graph: Profile-Aware Multimodal Parsing for Executable Clinical Decision Graphs
papers.abstract: Clinical practice guidelines are long, multimodal documents whose branching recommendations are difficult to convert into executable clinical decision support (CDS), and one-shot parsing often breaks cross-page continuity. Recent LLM/VLM extractors are mostly local or text-centric, under-specifying section interfaces and failing to consolidate cross-page control flow across full documents into one coherent decision graph. We present a decomposition-first pipeline that converts full-guideline evidence into an executable clinical decision graph through topology-aware chunking, interface-constrained chunk graph generation, and provenance-preserving global aggregation. Rather than relying on single-pass generation, the pipeline uses explicit entry/terminal interfaces and semantic deduplication to preserve cross-page continuity while keeping the induced control flow auditable and structurally consistent. We evaluate on an adjudicated prostate-guideline benchmark with matched inputs and the same underlying VLM backbone across compared methods. On the complete merged graph, our approach improves edge and triplet precision/recall from $19.6\%/16.1\%$ in existing models to $69.0\%/87.5\%$, while node recall rises from $78.1\%$ to $93.8\%$. These results support decomposition-first, auditable guideline-to-CDS conversion on this benchmark, while current evidence remains limited to one adjudicated prostate guideline and motivates broader multi-guideline validation.

analysis.tldr: 提出分解优先的管线，通过拓扑感知分块和接口约束图生成，将临床指南转为可执行决策图，在基准上显著提升边和三元组的精确率/召回率。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床实践指南是多模态长文档，其分支推荐难以转换为可执行的临床决策支持系统，现有单次解析方法常破坏跨页连续性，且局部或文本为中心的提取器无法整合全文档控制流。
analysis.problem: 如何将完整临床指南的循证证据转换为结构一致、可审计且可执行的临床决策图，同时保持跨页连续性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有LLM/VLM提取器多为局部或文本中心，未指定章节接口，无法合并跨页控制流；单次解析常破坏跨页连续性。
analysis.method: 分解优先管线：拓扑感知分块、接口约束块图生成、保留来源的全局聚合，使用显式入口/终端接口和语义去重保持跨页连续性。
contributions: 提出分解优先的管线，将完整指南转换为可执行临床决策图，通过拓扑感知分块和接口约束保持结构一致性。
在裁决的前列腺指南基准上，相比现有模型，边精确率从19.6%提升至69.0%，三元组召回率从16.1%提升至87.5%，节点召回率从78.1%提升至93.8%。
analysis.experiments: 在单个裁决的前列腺指南基准上，使用相同输入和VLM骨干进行比较，评估完整合并图的边/三元组精确率/召回率和节点召回率。
limitations: 当前证据仅限于一个裁决的前列腺指南，需要更广泛的多指南验证。
方法依赖VLM骨干，可能受限于基础模型能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分解优先的管线，通过拓扑感知分块和接口约束图生成，将临床指南转为可执行决策图，在基准上显著提升边和三元组的精确率/召回率。

papers.title: Understanding the Nature of Generative AI as Threshold Logic in High-Dimensional Space
papers.abstract: This paper examines the role of threshold logic in understanding generative artificial intelligence. Threshold functions, originally studied in the 1960s in digital circuit synthesis, provide a structurally transparent model of neural computation: a weighted sum of inputs compared to a threshold, geometrically realized as a hyperplane partitioning a space. The paper shows that this operation undergoes a qualitative transition as dimensionality increases. In low dimensions, the perceptron acts as a determinate logical classifier, separating classes when possible, as decided by linear programming. In high dimensions, however, a single hyperplane can separate almost any configuration of points (Cover, 1965); the space becomes saturated with potential classifiers, and the perceptron shifts from a logical device to a navigational one, functioning as an indexical indicator in the sense of Peirce. The limitations of the perceptron identified by Minsky and Papert (1969) were historically addressed by introducing multilayer architectures. This paper considers an alternative path: increasing dimensionality while retaining a single threshold element. It argues that this shift has equally significant implications for understanding neural computation. The role of depth is reinterpreted as a mechanism for the sequential deformation of data manifolds through iterated threshold operations, preparing them for linear separability already afforded by high-dimensional geometry. The resulting triadic account - threshold function as ontological unit, dimensionality as enabling condition, and depth as preparatory mechanism - provides a unified perspective on generative AI grounded in established mathematics.

analysis.tldr: 本文从高维空间中阈值逻辑的角度重新诠释生成式AI，认为高维性使单层感知机从逻辑分类器转变为索引指示器，而深度则是对数据流形进行顺序变形以利用高维线性可分性。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解生成式AI的底层计算原理，特别是高维空间中阈值逻辑的定性转变，以及这种转变如何为神经计算提供新的统一视角。
analysis.problem: 重新审视阈值逻辑在高维空间中的角色，解释生成式AI中深度网络的作用机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在低维空间中感知机作为确定性逻辑分类器，而在高维空间中单个超平面可以分离几乎任意点集，感知机从逻辑设备转变为导航设备（索引指示器）。
analysis.method: 通过理论分析，将阈值函数视为本体单元，高维性作为使能条件，深度作为准备机制，提出一个三元组统一视角。
contributions: 揭示了高维空间中阈值逻辑从逻辑分类到索引指示的定性转变。
重新诠释了深度网络的作用：对数据流形进行顺序变形以利用高维线性可分性。
提供了一个基于经典数学的生成式AI统一理论框架。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 纯理论分析，缺乏实验验证。
可能未考虑实际训练中的优化和泛化问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文从高维空间中阈值逻辑的角度重新诠释生成式AI，认为高维性使单层感知机从逻辑分类器转变为索引指示器，而深度则是对数据流形进行顺序变形以利用高维线性可分性。

papers.title: Hierarchical, Interpretable, Label-Free Concept Bottleneck Model
papers.abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) introduce interpretability to black-box deep learning models by predicting labels through human-understandable concepts. However, unlike humans, who identify objects at different levels of abstraction using both general and specific features, existing CBMs operate at a single semantic level in both concept and label space. We propose HIL-CBM, a Hierarchical Interpretable Label-Free Concept Bottleneck Model that extends CBMs into a hierarchical framework to enhance interpretability by more closely mirroring the human cognitive process. HIL-CBM enables classification and explanation across multiple semantic levels without requiring relational concept annotations. HIL-CBM aligns the abstraction level of concept-based explanations with that of model predictions, progressing from abstract to concrete. This is achieved by (i) introducing a gradient-based visual consistency loss that encourages abstraction layers to focus on similar spatial regions, and (ii) training dual classification heads, each operating on feature concepts at different abstraction levels. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that HIL-CBM outperforms state-of-the-art sparse CBMs in classification accuracy. Human evaluations further show that HIL-CBM provides more interpretable and accurate explanations, while maintaining a hierarchical and label-free approach to feature concepts.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层无标签概念瓶颈模型，通过多语义层级分类提升可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型仅在单一语义层级操作，与人类从抽象到具体的认知过程不符，限制了可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何让概念瓶颈模型在多个语义层级上进行分类和解释，且无需关系概念标注。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入基于梯度的视觉一致性损失，使抽象层关注相似空间区域；训练双分类头，在不同抽象层级上操作特征概念。
contributions: 提出分层无标签概念瓶颈模型，更贴近人类认知过程。
通过视觉一致性损失和双分类头实现多语义层级分类与解释。
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集上分类准确率优于最先进稀疏CBM，人工评估表明解释更可解释且准确。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视觉特征对齐假设。
分层结构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层无标签概念瓶颈模型，通过多语义层级分类提升可解释性。

papers.title: VERTIGO: Visual Preference Optimization for Cinematic Camera Trajectory Generation
papers.abstract: Cinematic camera control relies on a tight feedback loop between director and cinematographer, where camera motion and framing are continuously reviewed and refined. Recent generative camera systems can produce diverse, text-conditioned trajectories, but they lack this "director in the loop" and have no explicit supervision of whether a shot is visually desirable. This results in in-distribution camera motion but poor framing, off-screen characters, and undesirable visual aesthetics. In this paper, we introduce VERTIGO, the first framework for visual preference optimization of camera trajectory generators. Our framework leverages a real-time graphics engine (Unity) to render 2D visual previews from generated camera motion. A cinematically fine-tuned vision-language model then scores these previews using our proposed cyclic semantic similarity mechanism, which aligns renders with text prompts. This process provides the visual preference signals for Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) post-training. Both quantitative evaluations and user studies on Unity renders and diffusion-based Camera-to-Video pipelines show consistent gains in condition adherence, framing quality, and perceptual realism. Notably, VERTIGO reduces the character off-screen rate from 38% to nearly 0% while preserving the geometric fidelity of camera motion. User study participants further prefer VERTIGO over baselines across composition, consistency, prompt adherence, and aesthetic quality, confirming the perceptual benefits of our visual preference post-training.

analysis.tldr: VERTIGO 利用视觉偏好优化（DPO）和 VLM 评分，显著提升电影级相机轨迹生成的构图质量与角色可见性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式相机系统缺乏导演在环的视觉反馈，导致轨迹虽符合分布但构图差、角色出镜、视觉美学不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何将视觉偏好信号引入相机轨迹生成器的后训练，以改善构图、角色可见性和视觉美学。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：生成轨迹存在角色出镜率高达 38%、构图差、视觉美学不佳等问题，而现有方法缺乏显式的视觉监督。
analysis.method: 利用 Unity 渲染 2D 预览，通过微调后的 VLM 和循环语义相似度机制评分，为 DPO 提供视觉偏好信号，对相机轨迹生成器进行后训练。
contributions: 首个将视觉偏好优化（DPO）应用于相机轨迹生成的框架 VERTIGO。
提出循环语义相似度机制，利用 VLM 对齐渲染与文本提示，提供偏好信号。
analysis.experiments: 在 Unity 渲染和扩散 Camera-to-Video 管道上进行定量评估和用户研究，显示条件遵循、构图质量和感知真实感一致提升，角色出镜率从 38% 降至近 0%。
limitations: 依赖实时渲染引擎（Unity）和 VLM，可能增加计算开销。
偏好信号的有效性受限于 VLM 的细粒度视觉理解能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VERTIGO 利用视觉偏好优化（DPO）和 VLM 评分，显著提升电影级相机轨迹生成的构图质量与角色可见性。

papers.title: Epicure: Multidimensional Flavor Structure in Food Ingredient Embeddings
papers.abstract: A chef's intuition about flavor, texture, and cultural identity represents tacit knowledge that is difficult to articulate yet central to culinary practice. We show that this knowledge is already encoded in FlavorGraph's 300-dimensional ingredient embeddings, trained on recipe cooccurrence and food chemistry, and that it can be systematically recovered. An LLM-augmented curation pipeline consolidates 6,653 raw FlavorGraph ingredients into 1,032 canonical entries, substantially strengthening the recoverable structure. We identify at least fifteen independently classifiable dimensions spanning taste, texture, geography, food processing, and culture.

analysis.tldr: 从食品原料嵌入中系统恢复多维风味结构，揭示厨师隐性知识。
analysis.research_motivation: 厨师关于风味、质地和文化身份的直觉是难以言表的隐性知识，但却是烹饪实践的核心。现有方法未能系统地从数据中恢复这些知识。
analysis.problem: 如何从已有的食品原料嵌入（如FlavorGraph）中恢复并结构化多维风味信息（如味道、质地、地理、文化等）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要表明FlavorGraph的300维嵌入中已编码了风味、质地、文化等隐性知识，且通过LLM增强的整理流程可显著增强可恢复的结构。
analysis.method: 提出LLM增强的整理流程，将6,653个原始FlavorGraph原料合并为1,032个规范条目，并识别出至少15个独立可分类的维度。
contributions: 证明FlavorGraph嵌入中编码了厨师隐性知识，并可系统恢复。
提出LLM增强的原料整理流程，增强可恢复结构。
识别出至少15个独立可分类的风味维度（味道、质地、地理、加工、文化等）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖FlavorGraph嵌入的质量和覆盖范围。
LLM整理流程可能引入偏差或遗漏。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从食品原料嵌入中系统恢复多维风味结构，揭示厨师隐性知识。

papers.title: A Comparative Theoretical Analysis of Entropy Control Methods in Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a key approach for enhancing reasoning in large language models (LLMs), yet scalable training is often hindered by the rapid collapse of policy entropy, which leads to premature convergence and performance saturation. This paper provides a comparative theoretical analysis of two entropy control strategies: traditional entropy regularization and the recently proposed covariance-based mechanism. We establish a unified framework for entropy dynamics under softmax parameterization, showing that entropy change is governed by the covariance between log-probabilities and logit updates. Our analysis reveals that traditional entropy regularization introduces a dense, persistent bias that modifies the stationary condition, leading to suboptimal policies, while covariance-based methods selectively regularize a sparse subset of high-covariance tokens and achieve asymptotic unbiasedness when the regularization coefficient is annealed. These results provide principled guidelines for entropy control in LLM posttraining, with implications for scaling RL to larger models and more complex reasoning tasks.

analysis.tldr: 理论分析揭示协方差熵控制在LLM强化学习后训练中比传统熵正则化更优，可实现渐近无偏性。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习用于提升LLM推理能力时，策略熵快速崩溃导致过早收敛和性能饱和，亟需有效的熵控制方法。
analysis.problem: 比较分析传统熵正则化与协方差熵控制在RL中的理论性质，解释为何后者更适合LLM后训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统熵正则化引入密集持久偏差，修改平稳条件导致次优策略；协方差方法选择性正则化高协方差token子集，在系数退火时实现渐近无偏。
analysis.method: 建立softmax参数化下熵动力学的统一框架，证明熵变由log概率与logit更新的协方差控制，并对比两种策略的偏差与收敛性。
contributions: 提出熵动力学统一框架，揭示熵变与协方差的本质关系。
理论证明协方差熵控制相比传统正则化具有渐近无偏性，为LLM后训练提供设计准则。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析限于softmax参数化，可能不适用于其他策略表示。
未讨论协方差方法在实际LLM训练中的计算开销和实现细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 理论分析揭示协方差熵控制在LLM强化学习后训练中比传统熵正则化更优，可实现渐近无偏性。

papers.title: On the Geometric Structure of Layer Updates in Deep Language Models
papers.abstract: We study the geometric structure of layer updates in deep language models. Rather than analyzing what information is encoded in intermediate representations, we ask how representations change from one layer to the next. We show that layerwise updates admit a decomposition into a dominant tokenwise component and a residual that is not captured by restricted tokenwise function classes. Across multiple architectures, including Transformers and state-space models, we find that the full layer update is almost perfectly aligned with the tokenwise component, while the residual exhibits substantially weaker alignment, larger angular deviation, and significantly lower projection onto the dominant tokenwise subspace. This indicates that the residual is not merely a small correction, but a geometrically distinct component of the transformation. This geometric separation has functional consequences: approximation error under the restricted tokenwise model is strongly associated with output perturbation, with Spearman correlations often exceeding 0.7 and reaching up to 0.95 in larger models. Together, these results suggest that most layerwise updates behave like structured reparameterizations along a dominant direction, while functionally significant computation is concentrated in a geometrically distinct residual component. Our framework provides a simple, architecture-agnostic method for probing the geometric and functional structure of layer updates in modern language models.

analysis.tldr: 深度语言模型层更新可分解为占主导的逐token分量和几何上不同的残差分量，残差虽小但功能重要。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多关注中间表示编码了什么信息，但忽略了表示在层间如何变化，理解层更新的几何结构有助于揭示模型内部计算机制。
analysis.problem: 如何刻画深度语言模型中逐层更新的几何结构，并区分不同分量对模型功能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 层更新可分解为占主导的逐token分量和残差分量；残差与逐token分量在几何上显著不同（对齐弱、角度偏差大、投影低），且残差与输出扰动高度相关（Spearman相关系数>0.7，大模型达0.95）。
analysis.method: 提出一种架构无关的分解方法，将层更新投影到逐token函数类上，分离出主分量和残差分量，并分析其几何与功能特性。
contributions: 发现层更新中占主导的逐token分量与几何上不同的残差分量之间的分离现象
建立残差分量与输出扰动之间的强相关性，揭示其功能重要性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅分析了有限架构（Transformer和状态空间模型），可能不适用于其他架构
未探讨残差分量的具体计算角色或可解释性
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 深度语言模型层更新可分解为占主导的逐token分量和几何上不同的残差分量，残差虽小但功能重要。

papers.title: When simulations look right but causal effects go wrong: Large language models as behavioral simulators
papers.abstract: Behavioral simulation is increasingly used to anticipate responses to interventions. Large language models (LLMs) enable researchers to specify population characteristics and intervention context in natural language, but it remains unclear to what extent LLMs can use these inputs to infer intervention effects. We evaluated three LLMs on 11 climate-psychology interventions using a dataset of 59,508 participants from 62 countries, and replicated the main analysis in two additional datasets (12 and 27 countries). LLMs reproduced observed patterns in attitudinal outcomes (e.g., climate beliefs and policy support) reasonably well, and prompting refinements improved this descriptive fit. However, descriptive fit did not reliably translate into causal fidelity (i.e., accurate estimates of intervention effects), and these two dimensions of accuracy followed different error structures. This descriptive-causal divergence held across the three datasets, but varied across intervention logics, with larger errors for interventions that depended on evoking internal experience than on directly conveying reasons or social cues. It was more pronounced for behavioral outcomes, where LLMs imposed stronger attitude-behavior coupling than in human data. Countries and population groups appearing well captured descriptively were not necessarily those with lower causal errors. Relying on descriptive fit alone may therefore create unwarranted confidence in simulation results, misleading conclusions about intervention effects and masking population disparities that matter for fairness.

analysis.tldr: LLM能模拟态度分布，但因果效应估计不准，描述拟合好不等于因果保真度高。
analysis.research_motivation: 行为模拟常用于预测干预效果，LLM可通过自然语言指定人群特征和干预情境，但其推断干预效应的能力尚不清楚，若仅依赖描述拟合可能产生误导。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在行为模拟中能否准确估计干预的因果效应，并探究描述拟合与因果保真度之间的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出描述拟合与因果保真度存在系统性偏差：描述拟合好并不保证因果效应准确，两者误差结构不同；因果误差在依赖唤起内在体验的干预中更大，且对行为结果的因果误差更显著；描述拟合好的国家/群体因果误差不一定低。
analysis.method: 使用三个LLM对11个气候心理学干预进行模拟，基于59,508名来自62个国家参与者的数据集，并在两个额外数据集（12和27个国家）中复现主分析，通过提示优化改善描述拟合，并比较描述拟合与因果保真度。
contributions: 系统评估了LLM在行为模拟中描述拟合与因果保真度的差异，揭示了两者不同的误差结构。
发现因果误差因干预逻辑而异，且对行为结果更显著，提示仅依赖描述拟合可能误导干预效果评估。
analysis.experiments: 在三个数据集（分别包含62、12、27个国家）上评估三个LLM，使用11种气候心理学干预，比较描述拟合和因果保真度。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对气候心理学领域，可能不适用于其他领域。
未深入分析LLM内部机制导致因果误差的原因。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM能模拟态度分布，但因果效应估计不准，描述拟合好不等于因果保真度高。

papers.title: Street-Legal Physical-World Adversarial Rim for License Plates
papers.abstract: Automatic license plate reader (ALPR) systems are widely deployed to identify and track vehicles. While prior work has demonstrated vulnerabilities in ALPR systems, far less attention has been paid to their legality and physical-world practicality. We investigate whether low-resourced threat actors can engineer a successful adversarial attack against a modern open-source ALPR system. We introduce the Street-legal Physical Adversarial Rim (SPAR), a physically realizable white-box attack against the popular ALPR system fast-alpr. SPAR requires no access to ALPR infrastructure during attack deployment and does not alter or obscure the attacker's license plate. Based on prior legislation and case law, we argue that SPAR is street-legal in the state of Texas. Under optimal conditions, SPAR reduces ALPR accuracy by 60% and achieves an 18% targeted impersonation rate. SPAR can be produced for under $100, and it was implemented entirely by commercial agentic coding assistants. These results highlight practical vulnerabilities in modern ALPR systems under realistic physical-world conditions and suggest new directions for both attack and defense.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种低成本、物理可实现的对抗性轮辋攻击，在德州法律下合法，能显著降低车牌识别系统准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有车牌识别系统对抗攻击研究忽视合法性和物理世界实用性，缺乏低成本、可部署的攻击方法。
analysis.problem: 设计一种物理世界可实现的、合法的、低成本的对抗攻击，以暴露现代车牌识别系统的漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SPAR：一种物理可实现的对抗性轮辋，通过优化轮辋图案实现白盒攻击，不改变或遮挡车牌，且符合德州法律。
contributions: 提出SPAR攻击，在物理世界中对fast-alpr系统有效，且成本低于100美元。
论证了攻击在德州法律下的合法性，为物理世界对抗攻击提供了法律视角。
analysis.experiments: 在最优条件下，SPAR使ALPR准确率降低60%，实现18%的目标冒充率。
limitations: 仅针对特定ALPR系统（fast-alpr）和特定地区法律（德州）。
攻击效果受物理条件（如光照、角度）影响，摘要未提供鲁棒性分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种低成本、物理可实现的对抗性轮辋攻击，在德州法律下合法，能显著降低车牌识别系统准确率。

papers.title: Skeleton-based Coherence Modeling in Narratives
papers.abstract: Modeling coherence in text has been a task that has excited NLP researchers since a long time. It has applications in detecting incoherent structures and helping the author fix them. There has been recent work in using neural networks to extract a skeleton from one sentence, and then use that skeleton to generate the next sentence for coherent narrative story generation. In this project, we aim to study if the consistency of skeletons across subsequent sentences is a good metric to characterize the coherence of a given body of text. We propose a new Sentence/Skeleton Similarity Network (SSN) for modeling coherence across pairs of sentences, and show that this network performs much better than baseline similarity techniques like cosine similarity and Euclidean distance. Although skeletons appear to be promising candidates for modeling coherence, our results show that sentence-level models outperform those on skeletons for evaluating textual coherence, thus indicating that the current state-of-the-art coherence modeling techniques are going in the right direction by dealing with sentences rather than their sub-parts.

analysis.tldr: 提出骨架相似性网络（SSN）用于叙事文本连贯性建模，但发现句子级模型优于骨架级模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本连贯性建模对检测和修复不连贯结构有重要应用，现有工作利用神经网络从句子中提取骨架并生成后续句子，但骨架在连贯性评估中的有效性尚未充分研究。
analysis.problem: 研究句子间骨架一致性是否可作为衡量文本连贯性的有效指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出句子/骨架相似性网络（SSN），通过比较相邻句子的骨架表示来建模连贯性。
contributions: 提出骨架相似性网络（SSN）用于基于骨架的连贯性建模
实验表明句子级模型在连贯性评估上优于骨架级模型，验证了当前句子级方法的合理性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 骨架提取方法可能影响结果，摘要未说明具体骨架提取方式
仅在特定数据集上验证，泛化性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出骨架相似性网络（SSN）用于叙事文本连贯性建模，但发现句子级模型优于骨架级模型。

papers.title: Do We Need Frontier Models to Verify Mathematical Proofs?
papers.abstract: Advances in training, post-training, and inference-time methods have enabled frontier reasoning models to win gold medals in math competitions and settle challenging open problems. Gaining trust in the responses of these models requires that natural language proofs be checked for errors. LLM judges are increasingly being adopted to meet the growing demand for evaluating such proofs. While verification is considered easier than generation, what model capability does reliable verification actually require? We systematically evaluate four open-source and two frontier LLMs on datasets of human-graded natural language proofs of competition-level problems. We consider two key metrics: verifier accuracy and self-consistency (the rate of agreement across repeated judgments on the same proof). We observe that smaller open-source models are only up to ~10% behind frontier models in accuracy but they are up to ~25% more inconsistent. Furthermore, we see that verifier accuracy is sensitive to prompt choice across all models. We then demonstrate that the smaller models, in fact, do possess the mathematical capabilities to verify proofs at the level of frontier models, but they struggle to reliably elicit these capabilities with general judging prompts. Through an LLM-guided prompt search, we synthesize an ensemble of specialized prompts that overcome the specific failure modes of smaller models, boosting their performance by up to 9.1% in accuracy and 15.9% in self-consistency. These gains are realized across models and datasets, allowing models like Qwen3.5-35B to perform on par with frontier models such as Gemini 3.1 Pro for proof verification.

analysis.tldr: 小型开源模型在数学证明验证中准确率仅落后前沿模型约10%，但一致性差约25%，通过LLM引导的提示搜索可提升性能至与前沿模型相当。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着前沿推理模型在数学竞赛和开放问题中取得突破，验证其生成的自然语言证明的正确性变得至关重要。LLM裁判被广泛采用，但可靠验证所需的能力尚不明确，且小型模型与前沿模型在验证性能上的差距需要被理解和弥补。
analysis.problem: 评估不同规模LLM在数学证明验证中的准确性和自一致性，并探索如何提升小型模型的验证性能以匹配前沿模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 小型开源模型在验证准确率上仅落后前沿模型约10%，但自一致性（重复判断的一致性）落后约25%；所有模型的验证准确率对提示选择敏感；小型模型实际具备与前沿模型相当的数学验证能力，但难以通过通用评判提示可靠地激发这些能力。
analysis.method: 通过LLM引导的提示搜索，合成一组专门提示的集成，以克服小型模型的特定失败模式，提升其准确性和自一致性。
contributions: 系统评估了开源和前沿LLM在竞赛级数学证明验证中的准确性和自一致性，揭示了小型模型与前沿模型的差距模式。
提出LLM引导的提示搜索方法，合成专门提示集成，使小型模型（如Qwen3.5-35B）在证明验证上达到与前沿模型（如Gemini 3.1 Pro）相当的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在人类评分的竞赛级数学证明数据集上，评估了四个开源和两个前沿LLM，使用准确性和自一致性两个指标，并进行了提示搜索实验。摘要未提供具体实验结果数值。
limitations: 提示搜索可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅针对数学证明验证，其他领域的验证任务可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 小型开源模型在数学证明验证中准确率仅落后前沿模型约10%，但一致性差约25%，通过LLM引导的提示搜索可提升性能至与前沿模型相当。

papers.title: Managing Diabetic Retinopathy with Deep Learning: A Data Centric Overview
papers.abstract: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a serious microvascular complication of diabetes, and one of the leading causes of vision loss worldwide. Although automated detection and grading, with Deep Learning (DL), can reduce the burden on ophthalmologists, it is constrained by the limited availability of high-quality datasets. Existing repositories often remain geographically narrow, contain limited samples, and exhibit inconsistent annotations or variable image quality; thereby, restricting their clinical reliability. This paper presents a comprehensive review and comparative analysis of fundus image datasets used in the management of DR. The study evaluates their usability across key tasks, including binary classification, severity grading, lesion localization, and multi-disease screening. It also categorizes the datasets by size, accessibility, and annotation type (such as image-level, lesion-level, and multi-disease). Finally, a recently published dataset is presented as a case study to illustrate broader challenges in dataset curation and usage. The review consolidates current knowledge while highlighting persistent gaps such as the lack of standardized lesion-level annotations and longitudinal data. It also outlines recommendations for future dataset development to support clinically reliable and explainable solutions in DR screening.

analysis.tldr: 综述糖尿病视网膜病变眼底图像数据集，分析其可用性、局限性与未来方向。
analysis.research_motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变是导致失明的主要原因之一，深度学习自动检测可减轻眼科医生负担，但高质量数据集的缺乏限制了临床可靠性。
analysis.problem: 现有眼底图像数据集在地理覆盖、样本量、标注一致性和图像质量方面存在不足，需要系统评估和指导未来数据集构建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出数据集存在地理狭窄、样本有限、标注不一致、图像质量参差不齐等问题，且缺乏标准化病变级标注和纵向数据。
analysis.method: 对公开眼底图像数据集进行综述和比较分析，按任务（二分类、严重程度分级、病变定位、多病种筛查）评估可用性，并按规模、可访问性、标注类型分类，最后以新数据集为案例说明挑战。
contributions: 系统综述并比较了用于DR管理的眼底图像数据集，覆盖多种任务和标注类型。
识别了数据集中的关键空白（如标准化病变级标注、纵向数据），并提出未来开发建议。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述可能未涵盖所有最新数据集。
案例研究仅代表单一数据集，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述糖尿病视网膜病变眼底图像数据集，分析其可用性、局限性与未来方向。

papers.title: PlayGen-MoG: Framework for Diverse Multi-Agent Play Generation via Mixture-of-Gaussians Trajectory Prediction
papers.abstract: Multi-agent trajectory generation in team sports requires models that capture both the diversity of possible plays and realistic spatial coordination between players on plays. Standard generative approaches such as Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE) and diffusion models struggle with this task, exhibiting posterior collapse or convergence to the dataset mean. Moreover, most trajectory prediction methods operate in a forecasting regime that requires multiple frames of observed history, limiting their use for play design where only the initial formation is available. We present PlayGen-MoG, an extensible framework for formation-conditioned play generation that addresses these challenges through three design choices: 1/ a Mixture-of-Gaussians (MoG) output head with shared mixture weights across all agents, where a single set of weights selects a play scenario that couples all players' trajectories, 2/ relative spatial attention that encodes pairwise player positions and distances as learned attention biases, and 3/ non-autoregressive prediction of absolute displacements from the initial formation, eliminating cumulative error drift and removing the dependence on observed trajectory history, enabling realistic play generation from a single static formation alone. On American football tracking data, PlayGen-MoG achieves 1.68 yard ADE and 3.98 yard FDE while maintaining full utilization of all 8 mixture components with entropy of 2.06 out of 2.08, and qualitatively confirming diverse generation without mode collapse.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于混合高斯轨迹预测的多智能体运动战术生成框架，解决模式坍塌和依赖历史帧问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 团队运动中的多智能体轨迹生成需要模型同时捕捉可能战术的多样性和球员间的空间协调性，但标准生成方法（如CVAE和扩散模型）会出现后验坍塌或收敛到数据集均值，且现有轨迹预测方法依赖多帧历史观测，限制了仅初始阵型可用时的战术设计。
analysis.problem: 如何从单一初始阵型生成多样且空间协调的多智能体运动轨迹，避免模式坍塌和累积误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准生成方法（CVAE、扩散模型）在多智能体轨迹生成中易出现后验坍塌或收敛到均值，导致多样性不足；现有轨迹预测方法依赖历史帧，不适用于仅初始阵型可用的战术设计场景。
analysis.method: PlayGen-MoG框架，包含三个设计：1) 所有智能体共享混合权重的混合高斯输出头，单个权重集选择耦合所有球员轨迹的战术场景；2) 相对空间注意力，将成对球员位置和距离编码为学习到的注意力偏置；3) 从初始阵型非自回归预测绝对位移，消除累积误差漂移和对历史轨迹的依赖。
contributions: 提出PlayGen-MoG框架，实现从单一初始阵型生成多样且空间协调的多智能体轨迹。
引入共享混合权重的混合高斯输出头，确保所有智能体轨迹耦合于同一战术场景。
采用相对空间注意力和非自回归绝对位移预测，提升生成质量和多样性，避免模式坍塌。
analysis.experiments: 在美国橄榄球追踪数据上，PlayGen-MoG达到1.68码ADE和3.98码FDE，所有8个混合分量完全利用，熵为2.06（最大2.08），定性确认了多样生成且无模式坍塌。
limitations: 可能仅适用于团队运动场景，泛化到其他多智能体任务需验证。
混合高斯假设可能限制轨迹分布的复杂模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于混合高斯轨迹预测的多智能体运动战术生成框架，解决模式坍塌和依赖历史帧问题。

papers.title: From Elevation Maps To Contour Lines: SVM and Decision Trees to Detect Violin Width Reduction
papers.abstract: We explore the automatic detection of violin width reduction using 3D photogrammetric meshes. We compare SVM and Decision Trees applied to a geometry-based raw representation built from elevation maps with a more targeted, feature-engineered approach relying on parametric contour lines fitting. Although elevation maps occasionally achieve strong results, their performance does not surpass that of the contour-based inputs.

analysis.tldr: 比较SVM和决策树在基于高程图和等高线的小提琴宽度缩减检测中的表现，发现等高线方法更优。
analysis.research_motivation: 小提琴制造中宽度缩减的自动检测对质量控制重要，但现有方法依赖人工或简单几何测量，缺乏系统比较。
analysis.problem: 如何从3D摄影测量网格中自动检测小提琴宽度缩减，并比较不同输入表示（高程图 vs. 等高线）和分类器（SVM vs. 决策树）的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用SVM和决策树分类器，对比基于高程图的原始几何表示和基于参数化等高线拟合的特征工程表示。
contributions: 提出并比较了两种用于小提琴宽度缩减检测的输入表示方法：高程图和等高线。
实验表明基于等高线的特征工程方法优于高程图方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅比较了SVM和决策树，未探索其他分类器。
数据集规模可能有限，未提及泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 比较SVM和决策树在基于高程图和等高线的小提琴宽度缩减检测中的表现，发现等高线方法更优。

papers.title: Compositional Neuro-Symbolic Reasoning
papers.abstract: We study structured abstraction-based reasoning for the Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus (ARC) and compare its generalization to test-time approaches. Purely neural architectures lack reliable combinatorial generalization, while strictly symbolic systems struggle with perceptual grounding. We therefore propose a neuro-symbolic architecture that extracts object-level structure from grids, uses neural priors to propose candidate transformations from a fixed domain-specific language (DSL) of atomic patterns, and filters hypotheses using cross-example consistency. Instantiated as a compositional reasoning framework based on unit patterns inspired by human visual abstraction, the system augments large language models (LLMs) with object representations and transformation proposals. On ARC-AGI-2, it improves base LLM performance from 16% to 24.4% on the public evaluation set, and to 30.8% when combined with ARC Lang Solver via a meta-classifier. These results demonstrate that separating perception, neural-guided transformation proposal, and symbolic consistency filtering improves generalization without task-specific finetuning or reinforcement learning, while reducing reliance on brute-force search and sampling-based test-time scaling. We open-source the ARC-AGI-2 Reasoner code (https://github.com/CoreThink-AI/arc-agi-2-reasoner).

analysis.tldr: 提出组合神经符号推理框架，在ARC-AGI-2上将LLM准确率从16%提升至24.4%。
analysis.research_motivation: 纯神经架构缺乏可靠的组合泛化能力，而纯符号系统难以处理感知基础问题，因此需要结合两者优势。
analysis.problem: 解决抽象推理任务中的组合泛化问题，提升LLM在结构化推理上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建神经符号架构：从网格中提取对象级结构，使用神经先验从领域特定语言中提出候选变换，并通过跨示例一致性过滤假设。
contributions: 提出组合神经符号推理框架，分离感知、神经引导变换提议和符号一致性过滤。
在ARC-AGI-2上显著提升LLM性能，无需任务特定微调或强化学习。
analysis.experiments: 在ARC-AGI-2公开评估集上，将基础LLM准确率从16%提升至24.4%，结合元分类器后达30.8%。
limitations: 可能依赖领域特定语言的设计，泛化到其他任务需调整。
性能提升有限，仍低于人类水平。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出组合神经符号推理框架，在ARC-AGI-2上将LLM准确率从16%提升至24.4%。

papers.title: Self-Directed Task Identification
papers.abstract: In this work, we present a novel machine learning framework called Self-Directed Task Identification (SDTI), which enables models to autonomously identify the correct target variable for each dataset in a zero-shot setting without pre-training. SDTI is a minimal, interpretable framework demonstrating the feasibility of repurposing core machine learning concepts for a novel task structure. To our knowledge, no existing architectures have demonstrated this ability. Traditional approaches lack this capability, leaving data annotation as a time-consuming process that relies heavily on human effort. Using only standard neural network components, we show that SDTI can be achieved through appropriate problem formulation and architectural design. We evaluate the proposed framework on a range of benchmark tasks and demonstrate its effectiveness in reliably identifying the ground truth out of a set of potential target variables. SDTI outperformed baseline architectures by 14% in F1 score on synthetic task identification benchmarks. These proof-of-concept experiments highlight the future potential of SDTI to reduce dependence on manual annotation and to enhance the scalability of autonomous learning systems in real-world applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出自监督任务识别框架SDTI，无需预训练即可零样本识别数据集目标变量。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统数据标注依赖大量人工，耗时且成本高，现有方法无法自动识别目标变量。
analysis.problem: 如何让模型在零样本、无预训练条件下自主识别数据集中的正确目标变量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过适当的问题公式化和架构设计，仅使用标准神经网络组件实现自监督任务识别。
contributions: 提出SDTI框架，首次实现零样本无预训练的目标变量自主识别
在合成基准上F1分数比基线高14%，验证了框架有效性
analysis.experiments: 在合成任务识别基准上评估，SDTI的F1分数比基线高14%。
limitations: 仅在合成数据上验证，真实场景效果未知
框架可扩展性和鲁棒性未充分讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自监督任务识别框架SDTI，无需预训练即可零样本识别数据集目标变量。

papers.title: Mapping generative AI use in the human brain: divergent neural, academic, and mental health profiles of functional versus socio emotional AI use
papers.abstract: The widespread adoption of generative artificial intelligence conversational agents (AICAs) among university students constitutes a novel cognitive social environment whose impact on the maturing brain remains elusive. Combining surveys with high resolution structural MRI, we examined patterns of general, functional, and socio emotional AICA use, academic performance, mental health, and brain structural signatures in a comparatively large sample of 222 young individuals. Across computational anatomy, meta analytic network level, and behavioral decoding analyses, we observed use specific associations. Higher general and functional AICA use frequencies were linked to better academic outcomes (GPA), larger dorsolateral prefrontal and calcarine gray matter volume, and enhanced hippocampal network clustering and local efficiency. In contrast, more frequent socio emotional AICA use was associated with poorer mental health (depression, social anxiety) and lower volume of superior temporal and amygdalar regions central to social and affective processing. These findings indicate that the same class of AI tools exerts distinct effects depending on usage patterns and motivations, engaging prefrontal hippocampal systems that support cognition versus socio emotional systems that may track distress linked usage. These heterogeneities are crucial for designing environments that harness the educational benefits of AI while mitigating mental health risks.

analysis.tldr: 大学生使用生成式AI聊天机器人的方式不同，对大脑结构、学业成绩和心理健康产生截然不同的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI聊天机器人在大学生中广泛使用，但其对发育中大脑的影响尚不清楚，需要区分不同使用模式（功能性vs.社会情感性）的神经、学业和心理健康关联。
analysis.problem: 揭示不同使用模式（一般性、功能性、社会情感性）的生成式AI聊天机器人使用与大脑结构、学业成绩和心理健康之间的特异性关联。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：功能性AI使用与更好的学业成绩、更大的前额叶和枕叶灰质体积以及增强的海马网络效率相关；而社会情感性AI使用则与更差的心理健康（抑郁、社交焦虑）以及与社会情感处理相关脑区（颞上回、杏仁核）体积减小相关。
analysis.method: 结合问卷调查和高分辨率结构MRI，对222名年轻人进行一般性、功能性和社会情感性AI使用频率、学业成绩、心理健康和大脑结构特征的关联分析，采用计算解剖学、元分析网络水平和行为解码分析。
contributions: 首次在大样本中揭示生成式AI聊天机器人不同使用模式对大脑结构、学业和心理健康的分化影响。
发现功能性使用与前额叶-海马系统相关，而社会情感性使用与社会情感脑区及心理健康问题相关。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了样本量（222人）和分析方法（计算解剖学、元分析网络水平、行为解码）。
limitations: 横截面设计无法推断因果关系。
样本仅限于大学生，可能限制泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 大学生使用生成式AI聊天机器人的方式不同，对大脑结构、学业成绩和心理健康产生截然不同的影响。

papers.title: Generative models on phase space
papers.abstract: Deep generative models such as diffusion and flow matching are powerful machine learning tools capable of learning and sampling from high-dimensional distributions. They are particularly useful when the training data appears to be concentrated on a submanifold of the data embedding space. For high-energy physics data, consisting of collections of relativistic energy-momentum 4-vectors, this submanifold can enforce extremely strong physically-motivated priors, such as energy and momentum conservation. If these constraints are learned only approximately, rather than exactly, this can inhibit the interpretability and reliability of such generative models. To remedy this deficiency, we introduce generative models which are, by construction, confined at every step of their sampling trajectory to the manifold of massless N-particle Lorentz-invariant phase space in the center-of-momentum frame. In the case of diffusion models, the "pure noise" forward process endpoint corresponds to the uniform distribution on phase space, which provides a clear starting point from which to identify how correlations among the particles emerge during the reverse (de-noising) process. We demonstrate that our models are able to learn both few-particle and many-particle distributions with various singularity structures, paving the way for future interpretability studies using generative models trained on simulated jet data.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在相空间流形上严格约束的生成模型，确保能量动量守恒，提升高能物理数据生成的可靠性和可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 高能物理数据（如相对论性能量-动量4向量）受强物理先验（如能量动量守恒）约束，但现有生成模型仅近似学习这些约束，导致可解释性和可靠性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计生成模型，使其在采样轨迹的每一步都严格约束在无质量N粒子洛伦兹不变相空间流形上，从而精确满足能量动量守恒。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建扩散模型和流匹配模型，其正向过程终点为相空间上的均匀分布，反向过程每一步都保持在相空间流形上，从而严格满足物理约束。
contributions: 首次提出在相空间流形上严格约束的生成模型，确保能量动量守恒的精确满足。
证明了模型能够学习具有不同奇点结构的少粒子和多粒子分布，为未来基于生成模型的喷注数据可解释性研究铺平道路。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于无质量粒子且限于质心系，扩展至有质量粒子或不同参考系需额外工作。
未在真实高能物理实验数据上验证，仅提及模拟喷注数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在相空间流形上严格约束的生成模型，确保能量动量守恒，提升高能物理数据生成的可靠性和可解释性。

papers.title: EventHub: Data Factory for Generalizable Event-Based Stereo Networks without Active Sensors
papers.abstract: We propose EventHub, a novel framework for training deep-event stereo networks without ground truth annotations from costly active sensors, relying instead on standard color images. From these images, we derive either proxy annotations and proxy events through state-of-the-art novel view synthesis techniques, or simply proxy annotations when images are already paired with event data. Using the training set generated by our data factory, we repurpose state-of-the-art stereo models from RGB literature to process event data, obtaining new event stereo models with unprecedented generalization capabilities. Experiments on widely used event stereo datasets support the effectiveness of EventHub and show how the same data distillation mechanism can improve the accuracy of RGB stereo foundation models in challenging conditions such as nighttime scenes.

analysis.tldr: 提出EventHub框架，利用彩色图像生成代理标注和事件数据，无需主动传感器即可训练泛化能力强的深度事件立体网络。
analysis.research_motivation: 事件立体视觉网络训练依赖昂贵的主动传感器（如激光雷达）获取真实标注，成本高且数据获取困难，限制了模型的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有主动传感器标注的情况下，利用彩色图像训练出泛化能力强的事件立体网络。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从彩色图像出发，利用最新视图合成技术生成代理标注和代理事件，或仅生成代理标注（当图像与事件数据已配对时），构建训练集；然后使用该训练集将RGB立体模型适配为事件立体模型。
contributions: 提出EventHub框架，无需主动传感器即可生成事件立体训练数据。
通过数据蒸馏机制，将RGB立体模型迁移至事件域，获得泛化能力更强的事件立体模型。
analysis.experiments: 在广泛使用的事件立体数据集上验证了有效性，并展示了数据蒸馏机制可提升RGB立体基础模型在夜间等挑战场景下的精度。
limitations: 依赖视图合成技术，可能引入合成数据与真实数据之间的域差异。
未提及对动态场景或极端光照条件的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EventHub框架，利用彩色图像生成代理标注和事件数据，无需主动传感器即可训练泛化能力强的深度事件立体网络。

papers.title: ActionParty: Multi-Subject Action Binding in Generative Video Games
papers.abstract: Recent advances in video diffusion have enabled the development of "world models" capable of simulating interactive environments. However, these models are largely restricted to single-agent settings, failing to control multiple agents simultaneously in a scene. In this work, we tackle a fundamental issue of action binding in existing video diffusion models, which struggle to associate specific actions with their corresponding subjects. For this purpose, we propose ActionParty, an action controllable multi-subject world model for generative video games. It introduces subject state tokens, i.e. latent variables that persistently capture the state of each subject in the scene. By jointly modeling state tokens and video latents with a spatial biasing mechanism, we disentangle global video frame rendering from individual action-controlled subject updates. We evaluate ActionParty on the Melting Pot benchmark, demonstrating the first video world model capable of controlling up to seven players simultaneously across 46 diverse environments. Our results show significant improvements in action-following accuracy and identity consistency, while enabling robust autoregressive tracking of subjects through complex interactions.

analysis.tldr: 提出ActionParty，首个能同时控制多个智能体动作的视频世界模型，解决动作绑定问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频扩散模型仅支持单智能体控制，无法在场景中同时控制多个主体，限制了交互式环境模拟的应用。
analysis.problem: 视频扩散模型中的动作绑定问题：模型难以将特定动作与对应主体关联起来。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有模型在多主体场景下动作跟随准确性和身份一致性差，无法同时控制多个主体。
analysis.method: 引入主体状态令牌（subject state tokens）作为潜在变量，持续捕捉每个主体的状态；通过空间偏置机制联合建模状态令牌和视频潜在变量，解耦全局视频帧渲染与个体动作控制的主体更新。
contributions: 提出首个能同时控制多达7个玩家的视频世界模型，在46个多样化环境中验证。
引入主体状态令牌和空间偏置机制，有效解决多主体动作绑定问题。
analysis.experiments: 在Melting Pot基准上评估，显示动作跟随准确性和身份一致性显著提升，并实现复杂交互中主体的鲁棒自回归跟踪。
limitations: 可能依赖特定环境（Melting Pot），泛化性需进一步验证。
主体数量上限为7，扩展性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ActionParty，首个能同时控制多个智能体动作的视频世界模型，解决动作绑定问题。

papers.title: Generative World Renderer
papers.abstract: Scaling generative inverse and forward rendering to real-world scenarios is bottlenecked by the limited realism and temporal coherence of existing synthetic datasets. To bridge this persistent domain gap, we introduce a large-scale, dynamic dataset curated from visually complex AAA games. Using a novel dual-screen stitched capture method, we extracted 4M continuous frames (720p/30 FPS) of synchronized RGB and five G-buffer channels across diverse scenes, visual effects, and environments, including adverse weather and motion-blur variants. This dataset uniquely advances bidirectional rendering: enabling robust in-the-wild geometry and material decomposition, and facilitating high-fidelity G-buffer-guided video generation. Furthermore, to evaluate the real-world performance of inverse rendering without ground truth, we propose a novel VLM-based assessment protocol measuring semantic, spatial, and temporal consistency. Experiments demonstrate that inverse renderers fine-tuned on our data achieve superior cross-dataset generalization and controllable generation, while our VLM evaluation strongly correlates with human judgment. Combined with our toolkit, our forward renderer enables users to edit styles of AAA games from G-buffers using text prompts.

analysis.tldr: 通过AAA游戏数据构建大规模动态渲染数据集，实现双向渲染（逆渲染与正向渲染）的突破，并提出VLM评估协议。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有合成数据集在真实感和时间一致性上存在领域差距，限制了生成式逆/正向渲染在真实场景中的扩展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、高真实感、时间一致的动态渲染数据集，且逆渲染缺乏无真实标签的评估方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从AAA游戏中提取4M连续帧（RGB+5个G-buffer通道），采用双屏拼接捕获方法；提出基于VLM的评估协议。
contributions: 构建了大规模动态渲染数据集（4M帧，含多种场景和特效）
提出VLM评估协议，用于无真实标签的逆渲染性能评估
analysis.experiments: 逆渲染器微调后跨数据集泛化性和可控生成提升，VLM评估与人类判断高度相关。
limitations: 数据集依赖AAA游戏，可能无法完全覆盖所有真实场景
VLM评估协议可能受限于VLM本身的偏见
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过AAA游戏数据构建大规模动态渲染数据集，实现双向渲染（逆渲染与正向渲染）的突破，并提出VLM评估协议。

papers.title: Modulate-and-Map: Crossmodal Feature Mapping with Cross-View Modulation for 3D Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: We present ModMap, a natively multiview and multimodal framework for 3D anomaly detection and segmentation. Unlike existing methods that process views independently, our method draws inspiration from the crossmodal feature mapping paradigm to learn to map features across both modalities and views, while explicitly modelling view-dependent relationships through feature-wise modulation. We introduce a cross-view training strategy that leverages all possible view combinations, enabling effective anomaly scoring through multiview ensembling and aggregation. To process high-resolution 3D data, we train and publicly release a foundational depth encoder tailored to industrial datasets. Experiments on SiM3D, a recent benchmark that introduces the first multiview and multimodal setup for 3D anomaly detection and segmentation, demonstrate that ModMap attains state-of-the-art performance by surpassing previous methods by wide margins.

analysis.tldr: ModMap通过跨模态特征映射和跨视图调制，在多视图3D异常检测中实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D异常检测方法通常独立处理各视图，忽略了视图间的依赖关系，且缺乏原生多视图多模态框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个原生支持多视图和多模态的3D异常检测与分割框架，有效建模视图间关系并融合多视图信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ModMap框架，采用跨模态特征映射范式，通过特征级调制显式建模视图依赖关系，并引入跨视图训练策略利用所有视图组合，最后通过多视图集成和聚合进行异常评分。同时训练并公开了一个面向工业数据集的深度编码器。
contributions: 提出原生多视图多模态的3D异常检测框架ModMap，通过跨视图调制建模视图依赖关系。
引入跨视图训练策略，利用所有视图组合进行有效异常评分。
训练并公开了面向工业数据集的基础深度编码器，支持高分辨率3D数据处理。
analysis.experiments: 在SiM3D基准上评估，ModMap在3D异常检测和分割任务上以大幅优势超越先前方法，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工业数据集训练的深度编码器，泛化性需验证。
多视图集成策略可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ModMap通过跨模态特征映射和跨视图调制，在多视图3D异常检测中实现SOTA。

papers.title: Steerable Visual Representations
papers.abstract: Pretrained Vision Transformers (ViTs) such as DINOv2 and MAE provide generic image features that can be applied to a variety of downstream tasks such as retrieval, classification, and segmentation. However, such representations tend to focus on the most salient visual cues in the image, with no way to direct them toward less prominent concepts of interest. In contrast, Multimodal LLMs can be guided with textual prompts, but the resulting representations tend to be language-centric and lose their effectiveness for generic visual tasks. To address this, we introduce Steerable Visual Representations, a new class of visual representations, whose global and local features can be steered with natural language. While most vision-language models (e.g., CLIP) fuse text with visual features after encoding (late fusion), we inject text directly into the layers of the visual encoder (early fusion) via lightweight cross-attention. We introduce benchmarks for measuring representational steerability, and demonstrate that our steerable visual features can focus on any desired objects in an image while preserving the underlying representation quality. Our method also matches or outperforms dedicated approaches on anomaly detection and personalized object discrimination, exhibiting zero-shot generalization to out-of-distribution tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可通过自然语言引导的视觉表征方法，在保持通用视觉特征质量的同时实现关注目标的可控性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有预训练ViT（如DINOv2、MAE）提取的图像特征倾向于聚焦最显著的视觉线索，无法引导至不突出的概念；而多模态LLM虽可用文本引导，但表征偏向语言中心，在通用视觉任务上效果下降。
analysis.problem: 如何让视觉表征既能保持通用性，又能通过自然语言灵活地聚焦于图像中任意感兴趣的对象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在视觉编码器层中通过轻量级交叉注意力机制直接注入文本（早期融合），而非像CLIP那样在编码后融合（晚期融合）。
contributions: 提出可引导视觉表征（Steerable Visual Representations）的概念，使全局和局部特征可通过自然语言引导。
设计早期融合架构，将文本直接注入视觉编码器层。
构建表征可引导性基准，并在异常检测和个性化物体区分任务上匹配或超越专用方法，且零样本泛化到分布外任务。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量文本描述，对模糊或歧义文本的鲁棒性未知。
早期融合可能增加计算开销，轻量级交叉注意力的效率需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可通过自然语言引导的视觉表征方法，在保持通用视觉特征质量的同时实现关注目标的可控性。

papers.title: Grounded Token Initialization for New Vocabulary in LMs for Generative Recommendation
papers.abstract: Language models (LMs) are increasingly extended with new learnable vocabulary tokens for domain-specific tasks, such as Semantic-ID tokens in generative recommendation. The standard practice initializes these new tokens as the mean of existing vocabulary embeddings, then relies on supervised fine-tuning to learn their representations. We present a systematic analysis of this strategy: through spectral and geometric diagnostics, we show that mean initialization collapses all new tokens into a degenerate subspace, erasing inter-token distinctions that subsequent fine-tuning struggles to fully recover. These findings suggest that \emph{token initialization} is a key bottleneck when extending LMs with new vocabularies. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose the \emph{Grounded Token Initialization Hypothesis}: linguistically grounding novel tokens in the pretrained embedding space before fine-tuning better enables the model to leverage its general-purpose knowledge for novel-token domains. We operationalize this hypothesis as GTI (Grounded Token Initialization), a lightweight grounding stage that, prior to fine-tuning, maps new tokens to distinct, semantically meaningful locations in the pretrained embedding space using only paired linguistic supervision. Despite its simplicity, GTI outperforms both mean initialization and existing auxiliary-task adaptation methods in the majority of evaluation settings across multiple generative recommendation benchmarks, including industry-scale and public datasets. Further analyses show that grounded embeddings produce richer inter-token structure that persists through fine-tuning, corroborating the hypothesis that initialization quality is a key bottleneck in vocabulary extension.

analysis.tldr: 提出Grounded Token Initialization (GTI)方法，通过在预训练嵌入空间中语义化初始化新词汇token，解决生成式推荐中LM扩展新词汇时均值初始化导致的退化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型扩展新词汇（如生成式推荐中的语义ID token）时，标准均值初始化会导致新token嵌入退化到低维子空间，后续微调难以恢复区分性，成为性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何有效初始化LM中新添加的词汇token，使其在预训练嵌入空间中具有语义区分性，从而提升下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过谱分析和几何诊断发现，均值初始化使所有新token嵌入坍缩到退化子空间，消除token间差异，且后续微调无法完全恢复。
analysis.method: 提出Grounded Token Initialization (GTI)，在微调前增加一个轻量级grounding阶段，利用成对语言监督将新token映射到预训练嵌入空间中不同且语义有意义的位置。
contributions: 系统分析了LM扩展新词汇时均值初始化的退化问题，指出token初始化是关键瓶颈。
提出Grounded Token Initialization Hypothesis及其实例化GTI方法，简单有效。
在多个生成式推荐基准（包括工业级和公开数据集）上，GTI在多数评估设置中优于均值初始化和现有辅助任务适应方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个生成式推荐基准（包括工业级和公开数据集）上评估，GTI在多数设置中优于均值初始化和现有辅助任务适应方法。
limitations: 方法依赖成对语言监督数据，可能在某些场景下获取成本高。
仅验证了生成式推荐任务，其他领域扩展新词汇的有效性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Grounded Token Initialization (GTI)方法，通过在预训练嵌入空间中语义化初始化新词汇token，解决生成式推荐中LM扩展新词汇时均值初始化导致的退化问题。

papers.title: Beyond Referring Expressions: Scenario Comprehension Visual Grounding
papers.abstract: Existing visual grounding benchmarks primarily evaluate alignment between image regions and literal referring expressions, where models can often succeed by matching a prominent named category. We explore a complementary and more challenging setting of scenario-based visual grounding, where the target must be inferred from roles, intentions, and relational context rather than explicit naming. We introduce Referring Scenario Comprehension (RSC), a benchmark designed for this setting. The queries in this benchmark are paragraph-length texts that describe object roles, user goals, and contextual cues, including deliberate references to distractor objects that often require deep understanding to resolve. Each instance is annotated with interpretable difficulty tags for uniqueness, clutter, size, overlap, and position which expose distinct failure modes and support fine-grained analysis. RSC contains approximately 31k training examples, 4k in-domain test examples, and a 3k out-of-distribution split with unseen object categories. We further propose ScenGround, a curriculum reasoning method serving as a reference point for this setting, combining supervised warm-starting with difficulty-aware reinforcement learning. Experiments show that scenario-based queries expose systematic failures in current models that standard benchmarks do not reveal, and that curriculum training improves performance on challenging slices and transfers to standard benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出场景理解视觉定位基准RSC和课程推理方法ScenGround，揭示现有模型在基于角色、意图和关系上下文的定位任务中的系统性失败。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉定位基准主要评估图像区域与字面指代表达的对齐，模型常通过匹配显式类别名就能成功，缺乏对角色、意图和关系上下文等深层理解能力的评估。
analysis.problem: 现有基准无法评估模型在场景理解级别的视觉定位能力，即需要从角色、意图和关系上下文中推断目标，而非依赖显式命名。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，基于场景的查询暴露了当前模型在标准基准中未揭示的系统性失败模式，且每个实例带有可解释的难度标签（唯一性、杂乱度、大小、重叠、位置），可支持细粒度分析。
analysis.method: 提出ScenGround方法，结合监督预热启动和难度感知强化学习的课程推理方法，作为该设置的参考点。
contributions: 提出场景理解视觉定位任务（RSC），包含约31k训练样本、4k域内测试样本和3k分布外测试样本，并带有可解释难度标签。
提出ScenGround课程推理方法，结合监督预热和难度感知强化学习，在挑战性切片和标准基准上均提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明，基于场景的查询暴露了当前模型在标准基准中未揭示的系统性失败，课程训练提高了挑战性切片上的性能并迁移到标准基准。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定场景类型，泛化性需进一步验证。
课程推理方法可能对难度标签质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出场景理解视觉定位基准RSC和课程推理方法ScenGround，揭示现有模型在基于角色、意图和关系上下文的定位任务中的系统性失败。

papers.title: Batched Contextual Reinforcement: A Task-Scaling Law for Efficient Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large Language Models employing Chain-of-Thought reasoning achieve strong performance but suffer from excessive token consumption that inflates inference costs. Existing efficiency methods such as explicit length penalties, difficulty estimators, or multi-stage curricula either degrade reasoning quality or require complex training pipelines. We introduce Batched Contextual Reinforcement, a minimalist, single-stage training paradigm that unlocks efficient reasoning through a simple structural modification: training the model to solve N problems simultaneously within a shared context window, rewarded purely by per-instance accuracy. This formulation creates an implicit token budget that yields several key findings: (1) We identify a novel task-scaling law: as the number of concurrent problems N increases during inference, per-problem token usage decreases monotonically while accuracy degrades far more gracefully than baselines, establishing N as a controllable throughput dimension. (2) BCR challenges the traditional accuracy-efficiency trade-off by demonstrating a "free lunch" phenomenon at standard single-problem inference. Across both 1.5B and 4B model families, BCR reduces token usage by 15.8% to 62.6% while consistently maintaining or improving accuracy across five major mathematical benchmarks. (3) Qualitative analyses reveal emergent self-regulated efficiency, where models autonomously eliminate redundant metacognitive loops without explicit length supervision. (4) Crucially, we empirically demonstrate that implicit budget constraints successfully circumvent the adversarial gradients and catastrophic optimization collapse inherent to explicit length penalties, offering a highly stable, constraint-based alternative for length control. These results prove BCR practical, showing simple structural incentives unlock latent high-density reasoning in LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 通过批处理上下文强化学习，在共享上下文窗口中同时解决多个问题，实现隐式token预算，发现任务缩放定律并显著提升推理效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型使用思维链推理时性能强但token消耗大，现有效率方法如显式长度惩罚、难度估计或多阶段课程要么降低推理质量，要么需要复杂训练流程。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持或提升推理准确率的同时，显著降低推理过程中的token消耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现任务缩放定律：随着并发问题数N增加，每问题token使用单调递减，准确率下降比基线更平缓；存在“免费午餐”现象，在标准单问题推理下token减少15.8%-62.6%且准确率不变或提升；模型自主消除冗余元认知循环；隐式预算约束成功规避显式长度惩罚的对抗梯度和优化崩溃。
analysis.method: Batched Contextual Reinforcement (BCR)：单阶段训练范式，在共享上下文窗口中同时训练模型解决N个问题，仅以每个实例的准确率作为奖励。
contributions: 提出BCR训练范式，通过简单结构修改实现高效推理
发现任务缩放定律，将并发问题数N作为可控吞吐量维度
在1.5B和4B模型上，token使用减少15.8%-62.6%且准确率保持或提升
揭示隐式预算约束作为显式长度惩罚的稳定替代方案
analysis.experiments: 在五个主要数学基准上，使用1.5B和4B模型家族进行实验，报告了token使用减少和准确率变化。
limitations: 可能仅适用于数学推理等结构化任务
并发问题数N的选择可能影响性能，需要调参
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过批处理上下文强化学习，在共享上下文窗口中同时解决多个问题，实现隐式token预算，发现任务缩放定律并显著提升推理效率。

papers.title: Large-scale Codec Avatars: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Large-scale Avatar Pretraining
papers.abstract: High-quality 3D avatar modeling faces a critical trade-off between fidelity and generalization. On the one hand, multi-view studio data enables high-fidelity modeling of humans with precise control over expressions and poses, but it struggles to generalize to real-world data due to limited scale and the domain gap between the studio environment and the real world. On the other hand, recent large-scale avatar models trained on millions of in-the-wild samples show promise for generalization across a wide range of identities, yet the resulting avatars are often of low-quality due to inherent 3D ambiguities. To address this, we present Large-Scale Codec Avatars (LCA), a high-fidelity, full-body 3D avatar model that generalizes to world-scale populations in a feedforward manner, enabling efficient inference. Inspired by the success of large language models and vision foundation models, we present, for the first time, a pre/post-training paradigm for 3D avatar modeling at scale: we pretrain on 1M in-the-wild videos to learn broad priors over appearance and geometry, then post-train on high-quality curated data to enhance expressivity and fidelity. LCA generalizes across hair styles, clothing, and demographics while providing precise, fine-grained facial expressions and finger-level articulation control, with strong identity preservation. Notably, we observe emergent generalization to relightability and loose garment support to unconstrained inputs, and zero-shot robustness to stylized imagery, despite the absence of direct supervision.

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模编解码器虚拟人（LCA），通过预训练/后训练范式实现高保真、可泛化的3D虚拟人生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D虚拟人建模在保真度和泛化性之间存在权衡：多视角工作室数据保真度高但难以泛化到真实世界，而大规模野外数据泛化性好但质量低。
analysis.problem: 如何同时实现高保真度和跨身份、跨场景的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出预训练/后训练范式：先在100万野外视频上预训练学习外观和几何先验，再在高品质数据上后训练增强表现力和保真度。
contributions: 首次将预训练/后训练范式应用于大规模3D虚拟人建模
LCA模型在保真度、泛化性和控制精度上取得显著提升，并展现出可重光照、松散衣物支持和零样本鲁棒性等涌现能力
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模数据和计算资源
后训练阶段可能需要精心设计的高质量数据集
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模编解码器虚拟人（LCA），通过预训练/后训练范式实现高保真、可泛化的3D虚拟人生成。

papers.title: Stop Wandering: Efficient Vision-Language Navigation via Metacognitive Reasoning
papers.abstract: Training-free Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) agents powered by foundation models can follow instructions and explore 3D environments. However, existing approaches rely on greedy frontier selection and passive spatial memory, leading to inefficient behaviors such as local oscillation and redundant revisiting. We argue that this stems from a lack of metacognitive capabilities: the agent cannot monitor its exploration progress, diagnose strategy failures, or adapt accordingly. To address this, we propose MetaNav, a metacognitive navigation agent integrating spatial memory, history-aware planning, and reflective correction. Spatial memory builds a persistent 3D semantic map. History-aware planning penalizes revisiting to improve efficiency. Reflective correction detects stagnation and uses an LLM to generate corrective rules that guide future frontier selection. Experiments on GOAT-Bench, HM3D-OVON, and A-EQA show that MetaNav achieves state-of-the-art performance while reducing VLM queries by 20.7%, demonstrating that metacognitive reasoning significantly improves robustness and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出MetaNav，通过元认知推理（空间记忆、历史感知规划、反思修正）提升无训练视觉语言导航的效率与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无训练VLN智能体依赖贪婪前沿选择和被动空间记忆，导致局部振荡和重复访问等低效行为，缺乏元认知能力来监控进展、诊断失败并自适应调整。
analysis.problem: 解决无训练VLN智能体在3D环境导航中因缺乏元认知导致的低效（如振荡、重复访问）问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出贪婪前沿选择和被动空间记忆导致局部振荡和冗余重访，根源在于缺乏元认知能力。
analysis.method: MetaNav包含三个模块：空间记忆构建持久3D语义地图；历史感知规划惩罚重访以提高效率；反思修正检测停滞并用LLM生成修正规则指导后续前沿选择。
contributions: 提出元认知推理框架MetaNav，集成空间记忆、历史感知规划和反思修正，提升VLN效率。
在GOAT-Bench、HM3D-OVON和A-EQA上实现SOTA性能，同时减少20.7%的VLM查询。
analysis.experiments: 在GOAT-Bench、HM3D-OVON和A-EQA三个基准上评估，MetaNav达到SOTA性能，VLM查询减少20.7%。
limitations: 依赖LLM生成修正规则，可能引入额外延迟或成本。
未在真实机器人平台上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MetaNav，通过元认知推理（空间记忆、历史感知规划、反思修正）提升无训练视觉语言导航的效率与鲁棒性。

papers.title: LumiVideo: An Intelligent Agentic System for Video Color Grading
papers.abstract: Video color grading is a critical post-production process that transforms flat, log-encoded raw footage into emotionally resonant cinematic visuals. Existing automated methods act as static, black-box executors that directly output edited pixels, lacking both interpretability and the iterative control required by professionals. We introduce LumiVideo, an agentic system that mimics the cognitive workflow of professional colorists through four stages: Perception, Reasoning, Execution, and Reflection. Given only raw log video, LumiVideo autonomously produces a cinematic base grade by analyzing the scene's physical lighting and semantic content. Its Reasoning engine synergizes an LLM's internalized cinematic knowledge with a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework via a Tree of Thoughts (ToT) search to navigate the non-linear color parameter space. Rather than generating pixels, the system compiles the deduced parameters into industry-standard ASC-CDL configurations and a globally consistent 3D LUT, analytically guaranteeing temporal consistency. An optional Reflection loop then allows creators to refine the result via natural language feedback. We further introduce LumiGrade, the first log-encoded video benchmark for evaluating automated grading. Experiments show that LumiVideo approaches human expert quality in fully automatic mode while enabling precise iterative control when directed.

analysis.tldr: LumiVideo 是一个模拟专业调色师认知流程的智能体系统，通过感知、推理、执行和反思四个阶段实现视频自动调色，并支持自然语言迭代控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频调色是后期制作的关键环节，但现有自动化方法作为静态黑盒执行器直接输出编辑后的像素，缺乏可解释性和专业调色师所需的迭代控制能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可解释、可迭代控制的视频自动调色系统，使其能够像专业调色师一样分析场景并生成符合电影感的调色结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 LumiVideo 智能体系统，包含四个阶段：感知（分析物理光照和语义内容）、推理（结合 LLM 电影知识和 RAG 的 ToT 搜索）、执行（生成 ASC-CDL 配置和 3D LUT，保证时间一致性）、反思（可选，通过自然语言反馈优化）。
contributions: 提出首个模拟专业调色师认知流程的智能体系统 LumiVideo，实现可解释和可迭代控制的自动调色。
引入 LumiGrade，首个用于评估自动调色的 log 编码视频基准。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明，LumiVideo 在全自动模式下接近人类专家质量，并在定向控制下实现精确迭代。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 的推理能力，对复杂场景的泛化性有待验证。
基准 LumiGrade 的规模和多样性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LumiVideo 是一个模拟专业调色师认知流程的智能体系统，通过感知、推理、执行和反思四个阶段实现视频自动调色，并支持自然语言迭代控制。

papers.title: A Simple Baseline for Streaming Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Recent streaming video understanding methods increasingly rely on complex memory mechanisms to handle long video streams. We challenge this trend with a simple finding: a sliding-window baseline that feeds only the most recent N frames to an off-the-shelf VLM already matches or surpasses published streaming models. We formalize this baseline as SimpleStream and evaluate it against 13 major offline and online video LLM baselines on OVO-Bench and StreamingBench. Despite its simplicity, SimpleStream delivers consistently strong performance. With only 4 recent frames, it reaches 67.7% average accuracy on OVO-Bench and 80.59% on StreamingBench. Controlled ablations further show that the value of longer context is backbone-dependent rather than uniformly increasing with model scale, and reveal a consistent perception-memory trade-off: adding more historical context can improve recall, but often weakens real-time perception. This suggests that stronger memory, retrieval, or compression modules should not be taken as evidence of progress unless they clearly outperform SimpleStream under the same protocol. We therefore argue that future streaming benchmarks should separate recent-scene perception from long-range memory, so that performance improvements from added complexity can be evaluated more clearly.

analysis.tldr: SimpleStream 表明仅用最近 N 帧的滑动窗口基线即可匹配或超越复杂的流式视频理解模型，并揭示了感知-记忆权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式视频理解方法日益依赖复杂的记忆机制来处理长视频流，但复杂性的增加是否带来真正的进步尚不明确，需要简单基线来校准。
analysis.problem: 评估流式视频理解中复杂记忆机制的必要性，并揭示感知与记忆之间的权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长上下文的价值依赖于骨干网络而非随模型规模单调增加；增加历史上下文可提升回忆但削弱实时感知，存在一致的感知-记忆权衡。
analysis.method: SimpleStream：使用滑动窗口仅取最近 N 帧输入现成 VLM，无需额外记忆模块。
contributions: 提出 SimpleStream 简单基线，在 OVO-Bench 和 StreamingBench 上匹配或超越 13 个流式视频 LLM 基线。
揭示感知-记忆权衡：增加历史上下文提升回忆但削弱实时感知，长上下文价值骨干依赖。
建议未来基准分离近期场景感知与长期记忆，以清晰评估复杂模块的贡献。
analysis.experiments: 在 OVO-Bench 和 StreamingBench 上对比 13 个基线，SimpleStream 用 4 帧达到 67.7% 和 80.59% 平均准确率。
limitations: 仅评估了 VLM 作为骨干，可能不适用于其他架构。
未探索不同滑动窗口大小对权衡的具体影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SimpleStream 表明仅用最近 N 帧的滑动窗口基线即可匹配或超越复杂的流式视频理解模型，并揭示了感知-记忆权衡。

papers.title: Beyond the Assistant Turn: User Turn Generation as a Probe of Interaction Awareness in Language Models
papers.abstract: Standard LLM benchmarks evaluate the assistant turn: the model generates a response to an input, a verifier scores correctness, and the analysis ends. This paradigm leaves unmeasured whether the LLM encodes any awareness of what follows the assistant response. We propose user-turn generation as a probe of this gap: given a conversation context of user query and assistant response, we let a model generate under the user role. If the model's weights encode interaction awareness, the generated user turn will be a grounded follow-up that reacts to the preceding context. Through experiments across $11$ open-weight LLMs (Qwen3.5, gpt-oss, GLM) and $5$ datasets (math reasoning, instruction following, conversation), we show that interaction awareness is decoupled from task accuracy. In particular, within the Qwen3.5 family, GSM8K accuracy scales from $41\%$ ($0.8$B) to $96.8\%$ ($397$B-A$17$B), yet genuine follow-up rates under deterministic generation remain near zero. In contrast, higher temperature sampling reveals interaction awareness is latent with follow up rates reaching $22\%$. Controlled perturbations validate that the proposed probe measures a real property of the model, and collaboration-oriented post-training on Qwen3.5-2B demonstrates an increase in follow-up rates. Our results show that user-turn generation captures a dimension of LLM behavior, interaction awareness, that is unexplored and invisible with current assistant-only benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出用户轮次生成作为探针，揭示LLM的交互意识与任务准确率解耦。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM基准仅评估助手轮次，忽略了模型对后续交互的感知能力，导致交互意识这一维度未被测量。
analysis.problem: 如何探测语言模型是否编码了对助手响应之后用户轮次的交互意识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 交互意识与任务准确率解耦：Qwen3.5家族中GSM8K准确率从41%升至96.8%，但确定性生成下的真实后续率接近零；高温采样揭示潜在交互意识，后续率达22%。
analysis.method: 提出用户轮次生成作为探针：给定用户查询和助手响应的对话上下文，让模型以用户角色生成下一轮，通过后续率衡量交互意识。
contributions: 提出用户轮次生成作为测量LLM交互意识的新探针。
通过11个开源LLM和5个数据集实验，证明交互意识与任务准确率解耦。
发现交互意识在确定性生成中潜伏，高温采样可激发，且协作导向的后训练可提升后续率。
analysis.experiments: 在11个开源LLM（Qwen3.5, gpt-oss, GLM）和5个数据集（数学推理、指令遵循、对话）上实验，使用确定性生成和高温采样，并进行了受控扰动验证和协作后训练实验。
limitations: 仅评估了开源模型，闭源模型可能表现不同。
后续率指标可能受生成策略影响，需进一步标准化。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用户轮次生成作为探针，揭示LLM的交互意识与任务准确率解耦。

papers.title: Real-Time Voicemail Detection in Telephony Audio Using Temporal Speech Activity Features
papers.abstract: Outbound AI calling systems must distinguish voicemail greetings from live human answers in real time to avoid wasted agent interactions and dropped calls. We present a lightweight approach that extracts 15 temporal features from the speech activity pattern of a pre-trained neural voice activity detector (VAD), then classifies with a shallow tree-based ensemble. Across two evaluation sets totaling 764 telephony recordings, the system achieves a combined 96.1% accuracy (734/764), with 99.3% (139/140) on an expert-labeled test set and 95.4% (595/624) on a held-out production set. In production validation over 77,000 calls, it maintained a 0.3% false positive rate and 1.3% false negative rate. End-to-end inference completes in 46 ms on a commodity dual-core CPU with no GPU, supporting 380+ concurrent WebSocket calls. In our search over 3,780 model, feature, and threshold combinations, feature importance was concentrated in three temporal variables. Adding transcription keywords or beep-based features did not improve the best real-time configuration and increased latency substantially. Our results suggest that temporal speech patterns are a strong signal for distinguishing voicemail greetings from live human answers.

analysis.tldr: 基于语音活动时序特征的轻量级实时语音邮件检测方法，在电话音频中达到96.1%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 外呼AI系统需要实时区分语音邮件问候和真人接听，以避免浪费座席交互和掉线，现有方法可能依赖转录或蜂鸣音特征，导致延迟高或准确率不足。
analysis.problem: 在电话音频中实时、轻量地检测语音邮件，避免使用高延迟的转录或蜂鸣音特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 特征重要性集中在三个时序变量上，添加转录关键词或蜂鸣音特征未提升最佳实时配置的性能，反而显著增加延迟。
analysis.method: 从预训练神经语音活动检测器（VAD）的语音活动模式中提取15个时序特征，使用浅层树集成分类器进行分类。
contributions: 提出一种仅基于VAD时序特征的轻量级语音邮件检测方法，无需转录或蜂鸣音特征。
在764条电话录音上达到96.1%准确率，并在77,000次生产调用中保持低误报率（0.3%）和漏报率（1.3%）。
analysis.experiments: 在两个评估集（共764条录音）上测试，准确率96.1%；生产验证77,000次调用，误报率0.3%，漏报率1.3%；端到端推理在双核CPU上耗时46ms。
limitations: 方法依赖VAD的准确性，若VAD在噪声环境下性能下降可能影响结果。
仅针对英语电话音频，其他语言或场景未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于语音活动时序特征的轻量级实时语音邮件检测方法，在电话音频中达到96.1%准确率。

papers.title: VOID: Video Object and Interaction Deletion
papers.abstract: Existing video object removal methods excel at inpainting content "behind" the object and correcting appearance-level artifacts such as shadows and reflections. However, when the removed object has more significant interactions, such as collisions with other objects, current models fail to correct them and produce implausible results. We present VOID, a video object removal framework designed to perform physically-plausible inpainting in these complex scenarios. To train the model, we generate a new paired dataset of counterfactual object removals using Kubric and HUMOTO, where removing an object requires altering downstream physical interactions. During inference, a vision-language model identifies regions of the scene affected by the removed object. These regions are then used to guide a video diffusion model that generates physically consistent counterfactual outcomes. Experiments on both synthetic and real data show that our approach better preserves consistent scene dynamics after object removal compared to prior video object removal methods. We hope this framework sheds light on how to make video editing models better simulators of the world through high-level causal reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出VOID框架，通过因果推理和视频扩散模型实现物理合理的视频对象移除与交互修正。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频对象移除方法在对象与场景有显著物理交互（如碰撞）时无法修正下游动态，导致结果不真实。
analysis.problem: 视频对象移除后，如何修正因对象移除而改变的下游物理交互，实现物理合理的补全。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当移除对象与场景有碰撞等交互时，现有模型无法修正后续动态，产生不合理结果。
analysis.method: 使用Kubric和HUMOTO生成反事实对象移除配对数据集；推理时用视觉语言模型识别受影响区域，引导视频扩散模型生成物理一致的反事实结果。
contributions: 提出VOID框架，实现物理合理的视频对象移除与交互修正
构建反事实对象移除配对数据集
利用视觉语言模型和视频扩散模型实现因果推理驱动的视频编辑
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据上实验，相比先前方法更好地保持场景动态一致性。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据集的多样性
复杂交互场景的泛化能力待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VOID框架，通过因果推理和视频扩散模型实现物理合理的视频对象移除与交互修正。

papers.title: AdamFlow: Adam-based Wasserstein Gradient Flows for Surface Registration in Medical Imaging
papers.abstract: Surface registration plays an important role for anatomical shape analysis in medical imaging. Existing surface registration methods often face a trade-off between efficiency and robustness. Local point matching methods are computationally efficient, but vulnerable to noise and initialisation. Methods designed for global point set alignment tend to incur a high computational cost. To address the challenge, here we present a fast surface registration method, which formulates surface meshes as probability measures and surface registration as a distributional optimisation problem.
