Traditional empirical and deterministic models remain limited in balancing accuracy, generalization, and deployability, while the growing availability of onboard and roadside sensing devices offers a promising source of environmental priors. This paper proposes an environment-aware channel prediction framework based on multimodal visual feature fusion. Using GPS data and vehicle-side panoramic RGB images, together with semantic segmentation and depth estimation, the framework extracts semantic, depth, and position features through a three-branch architecture and performs adaptive multimodal fusion via a squeeze-excitation attention gating module. For 360-dimensional angular power spectrum (APS) prediction, a dedicated regression head and a composite multi-constraint loss are further designed. As a result, joint prediction of path loss (PL), delay spread (DS), azimuth spread of arrival (ASA), azimuth spread of departure (ASD), and APS is achieved. Experiments on a synchronized urban V2I measurement dataset yield the best root mean square error (RMSE) of 3.26 dB for PL, RMSEs of 37.66 ns, 5.05 degrees, and 5.08 degrees for DS, ASA, and ASD, respectively, and mean/median APS cosine similarities of 0.9342/0.9571, demonstrating strong accuracy, generalization, and practical potential for intelligent channel prediction in 6G vehicular communications.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态视觉特征融合框架，利用GPS、全景RGB图像及语义/深度特征实现6G车联网环境感知信道预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 6G车联网通信对信道预测的精度、泛化性和部署性要求极高，传统经验/确定性模型难以平衡三者，而车载/路侧传感设备提供了丰富的环境先验信息，如何有效融合多模态视觉特征实现高精度信道预测是亟待解决的问题。
analysis.problem: 在车联网通信中，如何利用GPS、全景RGB图像等多模态传感数据，通过视觉特征融合实现路径损耗、时延扩展、角度扩展及角功率谱的联合预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三分支架构分别提取语义、深度和位置特征，通过挤压激励注意力门控模块进行自适应多模态融合，并设计专用回归头和复合多约束损失用于360维角功率谱预测。
contributions: 提出一种基于多模态视觉特征融合的环境感知信道预测框架，融合GPS、全景RGB图像及语义/深度特征。
设计三分支特征提取架构和挤压激励注意力门控融合模块，实现自适应多模态融合。
在同步城市V2I测量数据集上实现PL、DS、ASA、ASD及APS的联合预测，并取得最优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在同步城市V2I测量数据集上，路径损耗RMSE为3.26 dB，时延扩展RMSE为37.66 ns，到达方位角扩展和离开方位角扩展RMSE分别为5.05度和5.08度，角功率谱平均/中位余弦相似度为0.9342/0.9571。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量GPS和全景图像数据，在遮挡或恶劣天气下性能可能下降。
框架复杂度较高，实时部署可能面临计算资源限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态视觉特征融合框架，利用GPS、全景RGB图像及语义/深度特征实现6G车联网环境感知信道预测。

papers.title: ATBench: A Diverse and Realistic Agent Trajectory Benchmark for Safety Evaluation and Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Evaluating the safety of LLM-based agents is increasingly important because risks in realistic deployments often emerge over multi-step interactions rather than isolated prompts or final responses. Existing trajectory-level benchmarks remain limited by insufficient interaction diversity, coarse observability of safety failures, and weak long-horizon realism. We introduce ATBench, a trajectory-level benchmark for structured, diverse, and realistic evaluation of agent safety. ATBench organizes agentic risk along three dimensions: risk source, failure mode, and real-world harm. Based on this taxonomy, we construct trajectories with heterogeneous tool pools and a long-context delayed-trigger protocol that captures realistic risk emergence across multiple stages. The benchmark contains 1,000 trajectories (503 safe and 497 unsafe), averaging 9.01 turns and 3.95k tokens, with 1,954 invoked tools drawn from pools spanning 2,084 available tools. Data quality is supported by rule-based and LLM-based filtering plus full human audit. Experiments on frontier LLMs, open-source models, and specialized guard systems show that ATBench is challenging even for strong evaluators, while enabling taxonomy-stratified analysis, cross-benchmark comparison, and diagnosis of long-horizon failure patterns.

analysis.tldr: ATBench是一个用于LLM Agent安全评估的多样化、真实轨迹基准，包含1000条轨迹，支持分层分析和长程故障诊断。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Agent安全评估缺乏多样化的交互轨迹、细粒度的安全故障观测和长程真实感，难以捕捉多步交互中的风险。
analysis.problem: 构建一个结构化、多样化且真实的轨迹级基准，用于评估LLM Agent的安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ATBench基准，基于风险源、故障模式和现实危害三维分类法构建轨迹，采用异构工具池和长上下文延迟触发协议，包含1000条轨迹（503安全、497不安全），平均9.01轮、3.95k tokens，涉及1954次工具调用，覆盖2084个可用工具。数据经规则和LLM过滤及人工审计。
contributions: 提出一个结构化、多样化且真实的轨迹级Agent安全评估基准ATBench。
构建了基于三维风险分类法的轨迹生成方法，支持分层分析和长程故障诊断。
analysis.experiments: 在前沿LLM、开源模型和专用防护系统上实验，显示ATBench对强评估器也具有挑战性，支持分类分层分析、跨基准比较和长程故障模式诊断。
limitations: 基准规模有限（1000条轨迹），可能无法覆盖所有风险场景。
依赖人工审计，扩展性受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ATBench是一个用于LLM Agent安全评估的多样化、真实轨迹基准，包含1000条轨迹，支持分层分析和长程故障诊断。

papers.title: Are VLMs Lost Between Sky and Space? LinkS$^2$Bench for UAV-Satellite Dynamic Cross-View Spatial Intelligence
papers.abstract: Synergistic spatial intelligence between UAVs and satellites is indispensable for emergency response and security operations, as it uniquely integrates macro-scale global coverage with dynamic, real-time local perception. However, the capacity of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to master this complex interplay remains largely unexplored. This gap persists primarily because existing benchmarks are confined to isolated Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) videos or static satellite imagery, failing to evaluate the dynamic local-to-global spatial mapping essential for comprehensive cross-view reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce LinkS$^2$Bench, the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate VLMs' wide-area, dynamic cross-view spatial intelligence. LinkS$^2$Bench links 1,022 minutes of dynamic UAV footage with high-resolution satellite imagery covering over 200 km$^2$. Through an LMM-assisted pipeline and rigorous human annotation, we constructed 17.9k high-quality question-answer pairs comprising 12 fine-grained tasks across four dimensions: perception, localization, relation, and reasoning. Evaluations of 18 representative VLMs reveal a substantial gap compared to human baselines, identifying accurate cross-view dynamic alignment as the critical bottleneck. To alleviate this, we design a Cross-View Alignment Adapter, demonstrating that explicit alignment significantly improves model performance. Furthermore, fine-tuning experiments underscore the potential of LinkS$^2$Bench in advancing VLM adaptation for complex spatial reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 首个评估VLM在无人机-卫星动态跨视角空间智能的基准LinkS²Bench，发现跨视角动态对齐是关键瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机与卫星协同空间智能对应急响应至关重要，但现有基准局限于孤立视角，无法评估动态局部到全局的空间映射能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估VLM在无人机-卫星动态跨视角空间推理能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 18个代表性VLM在LinkS²Bench上表现远低于人类基线，准确跨视角动态对齐是关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 构建LinkS²Bench基准，包含1022分钟无人机动态视频与高分辨率卫星图像，通过LMM辅助管道和人工标注生成17.9k问答对，涵盖感知、定位、关系、推理四个维度12个细粒度任务。设计跨视角对齐适配器（Cross-View Alignment Adapter）进行显式对齐。
contributions: 提出首个评估VLM动态跨视角空间智能的基准LinkS²Bench。
揭示VLM在跨视角动态对齐上的显著不足，并设计适配器缓解该问题。
analysis.experiments: 评估18个代表性VLM，与人类基线对比，并进行了微调实验。
limitations: 基准覆盖区域有限（200 km²），可能无法泛化到更大范围。
适配器设计简单，可能未充分挖掘跨视角对齐潜力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个评估VLM在无人机-卫星动态跨视角空间智能的基准LinkS²Bench，发现跨视角动态对齐是关键瓶颈。

papers.title: Optimizing Interventions for Agent-Based Infectious Disease Simulations
papers.abstract: Non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPIs) are commonly used tools for controlling infectious disease transmission when pharmaceutical options are unavailable. Yet, identifying effective interventions that minimize societal disruption remains challenging. Agent-based simulation is a popular tool for analyzing the impact of possible interventions in epidemiology. However, automatically optimizing NPIs using agent-based simulations poses a complex problem because, in agent-based epidemiological models, interventions can target individuals based on multiple attributes, affect hierarchical group structures (e.g., schools, workplaces, and families), and be combined arbitrarily, resulting in a very large or even infinite search space. We aim to support decision-makers with our Agent-based Infectious Disease Intervention Optimization System (ADIOS) that optimizes NPIs for infectious disease simulations using Grammar-Guided Genetic Programming (GGGP). The core of ADIOS is a domain-specific language for expressing NPIs in agent-based simulations that structures the intervention search space through a context-free grammar. To make optimization more efficient, the search space can be further reduced by defining constraints that prevent the generation of semantically invalid intervention patterns. Using this constrained language and an interface that enables coupling with agent-based simulations, ADIOS adopts the GGGP approach for simulation-based optimization. Using the German Epidemic Micro-Simulation System (GEMS) as a case study, we demonstrate the potential of our approach to generate optimal interventions for realistic epidemiological models

analysis.tldr: 提出ADIOS系统，利用语法引导遗传编程优化基于智能体的传染病模拟中的非药物干预措施。
analysis.research_motivation: 非药物干预措施（NPI）在缺乏药物时是控制传染病传播的常用工具，但如何找到最小化社会干扰的有效干预措施仍具挑战。基于智能体的模拟是分析干预措施影响的流行工具，但自动优化NPI面临搜索空间巨大甚至无限的问题。
analysis.problem: 自动优化基于智能体传染病模拟中的非药物干预措施，以支持决策者。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ADIOS系统，核心是领域特定语言（DSL）通过上下文无关文法结构化干预搜索空间，并利用约束减少无效模式，结合语法引导遗传编程（GGGP）进行仿真优化。
contributions: 提出ADIOS系统，用于优化基于智能体传染病模拟中的非药物干预措施。
设计领域特定语言和约束机制，有效缩减搜索空间。
analysis.experiments: 以德国流行病微观模拟系统（GEMS）为案例，展示了方法在现实流行病模型中生成最优干预措施的潜力。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模拟系统，泛化性需验证。
约束定义可能过于严格，遗漏潜在有效干预。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ADIOS系统，利用语法引导遗传编程优化基于智能体的传染病模拟中的非药物干预措施。

papers.title: Decouple and Rectify: Semantics-Preserving Structural Enhancement for Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Segmentation
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation in the remote sensing (RS) field requires both language-aligned recognition and fine-grained spatial delineation. Although CLIP offers robust semantic generalization, its global-aligned visual representations inherently struggle to capture structural details. Recent methods attempt to compensate for this by introducing RS-pretrained DINO features. However, these methods treat CLIP representations as a monolithic semantic space and cannot localize where structural enhancement is required, failing to effectively delineate boundaries while risking the disruption of CLIP's semantic integrity. To address this limitation, we propose DR-Seg, a novel decouple-and-rectify framework in this paper. Our method is motivated by the key observation that CLIP feature channels exhibit distinct functional heterogeneity rather than forming a uniform semantic space. Building on this insight, DR-Seg decouples CLIP features into semantics-dominated and structure-dominated subspaces, enabling targeted structural enhancement by DINO without distorting language-aligned semantics. Subsequently, a prior-driven graph rectification module injects high-fidelity structural priors under DINO guidance to form a refined branch, while an uncertainty-guided adaptive fusion module dynamically integrates this refined branch with the original CLIP branch for final prediction. Comprehensive experiments across eight benchmarks demonstrate that DR-Seg establishes a new state-of-the-art.

analysis.tldr: 提出DR-Seg框架，通过解耦CLIP特征通道为语义主导和结构主导子空间，实现遥感开放词汇分割的结构增强而不破坏语义完整性。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放词汇遥感语义分割需要语言对齐的识别和精细的空间描绘，但CLIP的全局对齐视觉表示难以捕捉结构细节，现有方法将CLIP视为整体语义空间，无法定位需要结构增强的区域，导致边界描绘不足或破坏语义完整性。
analysis.problem: 如何在增强CLIP结构细节的同时保持其语言对齐的语义完整性，实现遥感开放词汇分割的精细边界描绘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到CLIP特征通道表现出显著的功能异质性，而非形成统一的语义空间，即存在语义主导和结构主导的子空间。
analysis.method: 提出DR-Seg框架，首先将CLIP特征解耦为语义主导和结构主导子空间，利用DINO对结构子空间进行针对性增强；然后通过先验驱动图修正模块注入高保真结构先验形成精炼分支，最后用不确定性引导自适应融合模块动态整合精炼分支与原始CLIP分支。
contributions: 发现CLIP特征通道的功能异质性，并基于此提出解耦-修正框架DR-Seg。
设计先验驱动图修正模块和不确定性引导自适应融合模块，实现结构增强与语义保持的平衡。
在八个基准上取得新最优结果。
analysis.experiments: 在八个遥感分割基准上进行全面实验，达到新最优性能。
limitations: 依赖DINO特征的质量和可用性。
解耦策略可能对特定场景或类别不鲁棒。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DR-Seg框架，通过解耦CLIP特征通道为语义主导和结构主导子空间，实现遥感开放词汇分割的结构增强而不破坏语义完整性。

papers.title: Test-Time Adaptation for Height Completion via Self-Supervised ViT Features and Monocular Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Accurate digital surface models (DSMs) are essential for many geospatial applications, including urban monitoring, environmental analyses, infrastructure management, and change detection. However, large-scale DSMs frequently contain incomplete or outdated regions due to acquisition limitations, reconstruction artifacts, or changes in the built environment. Traditional height completion approaches primarily rely on spatial interpolation or which assume spatial continuity and therefore fail when objects are missing. Recent learning-based approaches improve reconstruction quality but typically require supervised training on sensor-specific datasets, limiting their generalization across domains and sensing conditions. We propose Prior2DSM, a training-free framework for metric DSM completion that operates entirely at test time by leveraging foundation models. Unlike previous height completion approaches that require task-specific training, the proposed method combines self-supervised Vision Transformer (ViT) features from DINOv3 with monocular depth foundation models to propagate metric information from incomplete height priors through semantic feature-space correspondence. Test-time adaptation (TTA) is performed using parameter-efficient low-rank adaptation (LoRA) together with a lightweight multilayer perceptron (MLP), which predicts spatially varying scale and shift parameters to convert relative depth estimates into metric heights. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements over interpolation based methods, prior-based rescaling height approaches, and state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation models. Prior2DSM reduces reconstruction error while preserving structural fidelity, achieving up to a 46% reduction in RMSE compared to linear fitting of MDE, and further enables DSM updating and coupled RGB-DSM generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的测试时自适应方法Prior2DSM，结合自监督ViT特征与单目深度基础模型完成数字表面模型高度补全。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模数字表面模型常因采集限制或环境变化存在缺失区域，传统插值方法在物体缺失时失效，现有学习方法依赖传感器特定数据集，泛化能力有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖任务特定训练的情况下，利用基础模型在测试时完成缺失区域的度量高度补全。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合DINOv3自监督ViT特征与单目深度基础模型，通过语义特征空间对应传播度量信息；使用LoRA和轻量MLP进行测试时自适应，预测空间变化的尺度和偏移参数将相对深度转换为度量高度。
contributions: 提出Prior2DSM，一种无需训练的测试时自适应框架，用于度量DSM补全。
结合自监督ViT特征与单目深度基础模型，通过语义对应传播高度先验。
使用LoRA和MLP实现测试时自适应，将相对深度转换为度量高度。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上对比插值方法、基于先验的缩放方法和SOTA单目深度估计模型，RMSE降低高达46%。
limitations: 依赖单目深度基础模型的质量，可能受限于其泛化能力。
测试时自适应可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的测试时自适应方法Prior2DSM，结合自监督ViT特征与单目深度基础模型完成数字表面模型高度补全。

papers.title: ProCeedRL: Process Critic with Exploratory Demonstration Reinforcement Learning for LLM Agentic Reasoning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) significantly enhances the reasoning abilities of large language models (LLMs), yet applying it to multi-turn agentic tasks remains challenging due to the long-horizon nature of interactions and the stochasticity of environmental feedback. We identify a structural failure mode in agentic exploration: suboptimal actions elicit noisy observations into misleading contexts, which further weaken subsequent decision-making, making recovery increasingly difficult. This cumulative feedback loop of errors renders standard exploration strategies ineffective and susceptible to the model's reasoning and the environment's randomness. To mitigate this issue, we propose ProCeedRL: Process Critic with Explorative Demonstration RL, shifting exploration from passive selection to active intervention. ProCeedRL employs a process-level critic to monitor interactions in real time, incorporating reflection-based demonstrations to guide agents in stopping the accumulation of errors. We find that this approach significantly exceeds the model's saturated exploration performance, demonstrating substantial exploratory benefits. By learning from exploratory demonstrations and on-policy samples, ProCeedRL significantly improves exploration efficiency and achieves superior performance on complex deep search and embodied tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出ProCeedRL，通过过程级评论家和反思式演示引导智能体在长程任务中主动干预错误累积，提升探索效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习能提升LLM推理能力，但应用于多轮智能体任务时，长程交互和环境反馈的随机性导致标准探索策略失效，错误会累积形成反馈循环。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM在多步智能体推理中因次优动作引发噪声观察、导致错误累积且难以恢复的探索失败问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 识别出智能体探索中的结构性失败模式：次优动作引入误导性上下文，进一步削弱后续决策，形成错误累积的反馈循环。
analysis.method: 提出ProCeedRL，使用过程级评论家实时监控交互，结合反思式演示来引导智能体停止错误累积，将探索从被动选择转为主动干预。
contributions: 识别了智能体探索中错误累积的反馈循环失败模式
提出ProCeedRL方法，结合过程评论家和反思演示实现主动干预探索
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到在复杂深度搜索和具身任务上取得优越性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量反思演示的获取
过程评论家的实时监控可能带来额外计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ProCeedRL，通过过程级评论家和反思式演示引导智能体在长程任务中主动干预错误累积，提升探索效率。

papers.title: ProDiG: Progressive Diffusion-Guided Gaussian Splatting for Aerial to Ground Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Generating ground-level views and coherent 3D site models from aerial-only imagery is challenging due to extreme viewpoint changes, missing intermediate observations, and large scale variations. Existing methods either refine renderings post-hoc, often producing geometrically inconsistent results, or rely on multi-altitude ground-truth, which is rarely available. Gaussian Splatting and diffusion-based refinements improve fidelity under small variations but fail under wide aerial-toground gaps. To address these limitations, we introduce ProDiG (Progressive Diffusion-Guided Gaussian Splatting for Aerial to Ground Reconstruction), a diffusionguided framework that progressively transforms aerial 3D representations toward ground-level fidelity. ProDiG synthesizes intermediate-altitude views and refines the Gaussian representation at each stage using a geometry-aware causal attention module that injects epipolar structure into reference-view diffusion. A distance-adaptive Gaussian module dynamically adjusts Gaussian scale and opacity based on camera distance, ensuring stable reconstruction across large viewpoint gaps. Together, these components enable progressive, geometrically grounded refinement without requiring additional ground-truth viewpoints. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that ProDiG produces visually realistic ground-level renderings and coherent 3D geometry, significantly outperforming existing approaches in terms of visual quality, geometric consistency, and robustness to extreme viewpoint changes. Project Page: https://sirsh07.github.io/research/prodig

analysis.tldr: ProDiG 通过渐进式扩散引导的高斯泼溅，从仅航拍图像生成地面级视图和一致3D模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 从航拍图像重建地面视图面临极端视角变化、缺失中间观测和尺度变化大的挑战，现有方法几何不一致或依赖罕见的多高度真值。
analysis.problem: 解决仅从航拍图像生成地面级视图和一致3D模型时，因视角差距大导致的几何不一致和渲染质量差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ProDiG 框架，包含：1) 渐进式合成中间高度视图并细化高斯表示；2) 几何感知因果注意力模块注入极线结构；3) 距离自适应高斯模块动态调整高斯尺度和不透明度。
contributions: 提出渐进式扩散引导框架，无需额外真值即可从航拍图像生成地面级视图。
设计几何感知因果注意力和距离自适应高斯模块，提升跨大视角差距的几何一致性和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上实验，ProDiG 在视觉质量、几何一致性和对极端视角变化的鲁棒性上显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量航拍图像，低质量输入下性能未知。
渐进式流程可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProDiG 通过渐进式扩散引导的高斯泼溅，从仅航拍图像生成地面级视图和一致3D模型。

papers.title: How and why does deep ensemble coupled with transfer learning increase performance in bipolar disorder and schizophrenia classification?
papers.abstract: Transfer learning (TL) and deep ensemble learning (DE) have recently been shown to outperform simple machine learning in classifying psychiatric disorders. However, there is still a lack of understanding as to why that is. This paper aims to understand how and why DE and TL reduce the variability of single-subject classification models in bipolar disorder (BD) and schizophrenia (SCZ). To this end, we investigated the training stability of TL and DE models. For the two classification tasks under consideration, we compared the results of multiple trainings with the same backbone but with different initializations. In this way, we take into account the epistemic uncertainty associated with the uncertainty in the estimation of the model parameters. It has been shown that the performance of classifiers can be significantly improved by using TL with DE. Based on these results, we investigate i) how many models are needed to benefit from the performance improvement of DE when classifying BD and SCZ from healthy controls, and ii) how TL induces better generalization, with and without DE. In the first case, we show that DE reaches a plateau when 10 models are included in the ensemble. In the second case, we find that using a pre-trained model constrains TL models with the same pre-training to stay in the same basin of the loss function. This is not the case for DL models with randomly initialized weights.

analysis.tldr: 探究迁移学习和深度集成如何提升双相障碍和精神分裂症分类性能，发现集成10个模型达到性能平台，且迁移学习使模型收敛到同一损失盆地。
analysis.research_motivation: 迁移学习和深度集成在精神疾病分类中表现优于简单机器学习，但其内在机制尚不明确，理解这些方法如何降低模型变异性对于提升可靠性和可解释性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 解释迁移学习和深度集成如何以及为何能提高双相障碍和精神分裂症单被试分类模型的性能，并减少训练变异性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 深度集成在包含10个模型时性能达到平台；迁移学习使具有相同预训练的模型收敛到损失函数的同一盆地，而随机初始化模型则不会。
analysis.method: 通过比较不同初始化下的多次训练结果，考虑模型参数估计的认知不确定性，分析迁移学习和深度集成对训练稳定性的影响。
contributions: 揭示了深度集成在双相障碍和精神分裂症分类中达到性能平台所需的模型数量（10个）。
发现迁移学习通过约束模型收敛到同一损失盆地来提升泛化能力，解释了其与深度集成结合效果更好的原因。
analysis.experiments: 在双相障碍和精神分裂症分类任务上，比较了不同初始化下的多次训练结果，评估了集成规模对性能的影响以及迁移学习对损失盆地的影响。
limitations: 仅针对双相障碍和精神分裂症两种疾病，泛化性有待验证。
未探讨不同预训练策略或数据集对结果的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探究迁移学习和深度集成如何提升双相障碍和精神分裂症分类性能，发现集成10个模型达到性能平台，且迁移学习使模型收敛到同一损失盆地。

papers.title: GenGait: A Transformer-Based Model for Human Gait Anomaly Detection and Normative Twin Generation
papers.abstract: Gait analysis provides an objective characterization of locomotor function and is widely used to support diagnosis and rehabilitation monitoring across neurological and orthopedic disorders. Deep learning has been increasingly applied to this domain, yet most approaches rely on supervised classifiers trained on disease-labeled data, limiting generalization to heterogeneous pathological presentations. This work proposes a label-free framework for joint-level anomaly detection and kinematic correction based on a Transformer masked autoencoder trained exclusively on normative gait sequences from 150 adults, acquired with a markerless multi-camera motion-capture system. At inference, a two-pass procedure is applied to potentially pathological input sequences, first it estimates joint inconsistency scores by occluding individual joints and measuring deviations from the learned normative prior. Then, it withholds the flagged joints from the encoder input and reconstructs the full skeleton from the remaining spatiotemporal context, yielding corrected kinematic trajectories at the flagged positions. Validation on 10 held-out normative participants, who mimicked seven simulated gait abnormalities, showed accurate localization of biomechanically inconsistent joints, a significant reduction in angular deviation across all analyzed joints with large effect sizes, and preservation of normative kinematics. The proposed approach enables interpretable, subject-specific localization of gait impairments without requiring disease labels. Video is available at https://youtu.be/Rcm3jqR5pN4.

analysis.tldr: 基于Transformer掩码自编码器的无标签步态异常检测与运动学修正框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有步态分析依赖有监督分类器，需要疾病标签，泛化性差，难以应对异质性病理表现。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用疾病标签的情况下，实现个体级别的步态异常定位与运动学修正。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用Transformer掩码自编码器在150名健康成人的步态序列上训练，推理时通过两阶段流程：先遮挡单个关节估计不一致性分数，再保留异常关节从剩余时空上下文重建完整骨架，得到修正轨迹。
contributions: 提出无标签的步态异常检测与运动学修正框架，无需疾病标签。
在模拟异常数据上验证了异常定位准确性和运动学修正效果。
analysis.experiments: 在10名模拟7种步态异常的健康受试者上验证，显示准确的关节不一致定位，所有关节角度偏差显著减小且效应量大，正常运动学得以保持。
limitations: 仅在模拟异常上验证，真实患者数据效果未知。
训练数据仅150名健康成人，多样性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于Transformer掩码自编码器的无标签步态异常检测与运动学修正框架。

papers.title: MTLSI-Net: A Linear Semantic Interaction Network for Parameter-Efficient Multi-Task Dense Prediction
papers.abstract: Multi-task dense prediction aims to perform multiple pixel-level tasks simultaneously. However, capturing global cross-task interactions remains non-trivial due to the quadratic complexity of standard self-attention on high-resolution features. To address this limitation, we propose a Multi-Task Linear Semantic Interaction Network (MTLSI-Net), which facilitates cross-task interaction through linear attention. Specifically, MTLSI-Net incorporates three key components: a Multi-Task Multi-scale Query Linear Fusion Block, which captures cross-task dependencies across multiple scales with linear complexity using a shared global context matrix; a Semantic Token Distiller that compresses redundant features into compact semantic tokens, distilling essential cross-task knowledge; and a Cross-Window Integrated attention Block that injects global semantics into local features via a dual-branch architecture, preserving both global consistency and spatial precision. These components collectively enable the network to capture comprehensive cross-task interactions at linear complexity with reduced parameters. Extensive experiments on NYUDv2 and PASCAL-Context demonstrate that MTLSI-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance, validating its effectiveness and efficiency in multi-task learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出线性注意力多任务密集预测网络MTLSI-Net，以线性复杂度实现跨任务交互，在NYUDv2和PASCAL-Context上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 多任务密集预测中，标准自注意力在高层特征上计算复杂度为二次方，难以高效捕获全局跨任务交互。
analysis.problem: 如何以线性复杂度实现多任务密集预测中的全局跨任务交互。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MTLSI-Net，包含多任务多尺度查询线性融合块（线性复杂度捕获跨尺度依赖）、语义标记蒸馏器（压缩冗余特征为紧凑语义标记）、跨窗口集成注意力块（双分支注入全局语义到局部特征）。
contributions: 提出线性注意力机制实现多任务密集预测中的全局跨任务交互，降低复杂度至线性。
设计三个核心组件协同工作，在NYUDv2和PASCAL-Context上达到SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在NYUDv2和PASCAL-Context数据集上进行了实验，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能仅在特定密集预测任务上验证，泛化性未知。
线性注意力可能在某些场景下精度不如标准注意力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出线性注意力多任务密集预测网络MTLSI-Net，以线性复杂度实现跨任务交互，在NYUDv2和PASCAL-Context上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Resonance4D: Frequency-Domain Motion Supervision for Preset-Free Physical Parameter Learning in 4D Dynamic Physical Scene Simulation
papers.abstract: Physics-driven 4D dynamic simulation from static 3D scenes remains constrained by an overlooked contradiction: reliable motion supervision often relies on online video diffusion or optical-flow pipelines whose computational cost exceeds that of the simulator itself. Existing methods further simplify inverse physical modeling by optimizing only partial material parameters, limiting realism in scenes with complex materials and dynamics. We present Resonance4D, a physics-driven 4D dynamic simulation framework that couples 3D Gaussian Splatting with the Material Point Method through lightweight yet physically expressive supervision. Our key insight is that dynamic consistency can be enforced without dense temporal generation by jointly constraining motion in complementary domains. To this end, we introduce Dual-domain Motion Supervision (DMS), which combines spatial structural consistency for local deformation with frequency-domain spectral consistency for oscillatory and global dynamic patterns, substantially reducing training cost and memory overhead while preserving physically meaningful motion cues. To enable stable full-parameter physical recovery, we further combine zero-shot text-prompted segmentation with simulation-guided initialization to automatically decompose Gaussians into object-part-level regions and support joint optimization of full material parameters. Experiments on both synthetic and real scenes show that Resonance4D achieves strong physical fidelity and motion consistency while reducing peak GPU memory from over 35\,GB to around 20\,GB, enabling high-fidelity physics-driven 4D simulation on a single consumer-grade GPU.

analysis.tldr: 提出频域运动监督方法，无需预设即可学习物理参数，实现高效4D动态场景仿真。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有物理驱动4D动态仿真依赖在线视频扩散或光流管道进行运动监督，计算成本超过仿真器本身，且仅优化部分材料参数，限制了复杂场景的真实感。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖密集时间生成和预设物理参数的情况下，实现高效、高保真的4D动态物理场景仿真。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出可靠运动监督的计算成本过高，且现有方法仅优化部分材料参数导致真实感不足。
analysis.method: 提出Resonance4D框架，将3D高斯泼溅与物质点法结合，通过双域运动监督（空间结构一致性与频域谱一致性）联合约束运动，并结合零样本文本提示分割与仿真引导初始化实现全参数物理恢复。
contributions: 提出双域运动监督（DMS），在空间域和频域联合约束动态一致性，降低训练成本和内存开销。
实现无需预设的全参数物理学习，通过自动分割和仿真引导初始化支持复杂材料场景。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实场景上验证，峰值GPU内存从35GB降至约20GB，可在单消费级GPU上运行。
limitations: 可能依赖文本提示分割的准确性。
频域监督对非周期性动态的适用性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频域运动监督方法，无需预设即可学习物理参数，实现高效4D动态场景仿真。

papers.title: SAFE: Stepwise Atomic Feedback for Error correction in Multi-hop Reasoning
papers.abstract: Multi-hop QA benchmarks frequently reward Large Language Models (LLMs) for spurious correctness, masking ungrounded or flawed reasoning steps. To shift toward rigorous reasoning, we propose SAFE, a dynamic benchmarking framework that replaces the ungrounded Chain-of-Thought (CoT) with a strictly verifiable sequence of grounded entities. Our framework operates across two phases: (1) train-time verification, where we establish an atomic error taxonomy and a Knowledge Graph (KG)-grounded verification pipeline to eliminate noisy supervision in standard benchmarks, identifying up to 14% of instances as unanswerable, and (2) inference-time verification, where a feedback model trained on this verified dataset dynamically detects ungrounded steps in real-time. Experimental results demonstrate that SAFE not only exposes the critical flaws of existing benchmarks at train-time, but also significantly outperforms standard baselines, achieving an average accuracy gain of 8.4 pp while guaranteeing verifiable trajectories at inference-time.

analysis.tldr: 提出SAFE框架，通过知识图谱原子验证替换无根基思维链，提升多跳推理的严谨性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多跳问答基准常因虚假正确性奖励LLM，掩盖无根基或有缺陷的推理步骤，亟需更严格的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 现有基准无法区分正确结果与有缺陷的推理过程，导致模型学习到虚假关联。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准基准中高达14%的实例被识别为不可回答，表明存在大量噪声监督。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：训练时通过原子错误分类和知识图谱验证消除噪声；推理时用训练好的反馈模型实时检测无根基步骤。
contributions: 提出原子错误分类法和知识图谱验证管线，用于训练时消除噪声监督。
构建推理时反馈模型，动态检测无根基推理步骤，平均准确率提升8.4个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在多个多跳QA基准上评估，SAFE平均准确率提升8.4个百分点，并保证可验证轨迹。
limitations: 依赖知识图谱的完备性，可能限制泛化性。
反馈模型训练需要大量标注数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SAFE框架，通过知识图谱原子验证替换无根基思维链，提升多跳推理的严谨性。

papers.title: Attention at Rest Stays at Rest: Breaking Visual Inertia for Cognitive Hallucination Mitigation
papers.abstract: Like a body at rest that stays at rest, we find that visual attention in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) exhibits pronounced inertia, remaining largely static once settled during early decoding steps and failing to support the compositional understanding required for cognitive inference. While existing hallucination mitigation methods mainly target perceptual hallucinations concerning object existence or attributes, they remain inadequate for such cognitive hallucinations that require inter-object relational deduction. Through token-wise attention analysis, we identify this visual inertia as a key factor: attention to semantically critical regions remains persistently focused and fails to dynamically support relational inference. We thereby propose a training-free Inertia-aware Visual Excitation (IVE) method that breaks this inertial pattern by modeling cognitive inference as the dynamic responsiveness of visual attention. Specifically, IVE selects visual tokens that are dynamically emerging relative to historical attention trends while distinguishing tokens exhibiting inertial behavior. To further facilitate compositional inference, IVE introduces an inertia-aware penalty that discourages over-concentration and limits the persistence of attention within localized regions. Extensive experiments show that IVE is effective across various base MLLMs and multiple hallucination benchmarks, particularly for cognitive hallucinations.

analysis.tldr: 提出无训练视觉惯性激发方法，通过打破多模态大模型中的视觉注意力惯性来缓解认知幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有幻觉缓解方法主要针对感知幻觉（物体存在或属性），但对需要对象间关系推理的认知幻觉效果不足；多模态大模型在早期解码步骤后视觉注意力呈现惯性，无法动态支持组合推理。
analysis.problem: 多模态大模型在认知推理任务中因视觉注意力惯性导致认知幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过逐token注意力分析发现视觉注意力存在惯性：一旦在早期解码步骤中聚焦于语义关键区域，后续步骤中注意力保持静态，无法动态支持关系推理。
analysis.method: 提出无训练惯性感知视觉激发方法，通过建模认知推理为视觉注意力的动态响应性，选择相对于历史注意力趋势动态出现的视觉token，并区分惯性行为token；引入惯性感知惩罚项，抑制局部区域过度集中和注意力持久性。
contributions: 发现多模态大模型中视觉注意力惯性现象，并指出其是认知幻觉的关键因素
提出无训练惯性感知视觉激发方法，有效缓解认知幻觉
analysis.experiments: 在多种基础多模态大模型和多个幻觉基准上验证有效性，尤其针对认知幻觉。
limitations: 方法为无训练，可能无法完全消除复杂场景下的认知幻觉
对注意力动态建模的泛化性可能受限于特定模型架构
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无训练视觉惯性激发方法，通过打破多模态大模型中的视觉注意力惯性来缓解认知幻觉。

papers.title: SenseMath: Do LLMs Have Number Sense? Evaluating Shortcut Use, Judgment, and Generation
papers.abstract: Large language models often default to step-by-step computation even when efficient numerical shortcuts are available. This raises a basic question: do they exhibit number sense in a human-like behavioral sense, i.e., the ability to recognize numerical structure, apply shortcuts when appropriate, and avoid them when they are not? We introduce SenseMath, a controlled benchmark for evaluating structure-sensitive numerical reasoning in LLMs. SenseMath contains 4,800 items spanning eight shortcut categories and four digit scales, with matched strong-shortcut, weak-shortcut, and control variants. It supports three evaluation settings of increasing cognitive demand: Shortcut Use (whether models can apply shortcuts on shortcut-amenable problems); Applicability Judgment (whether they can recognize when a shortcut is appropriate or misleading); and Problem Generation (whether they can generate new problem items that correctly admit a given type of shortcut). Our evaluation across five LLMs, ranging from GPT-4o-mini to Llama-3.1-8B, shows a consistent pattern: when explicitly prompted, models readily adopt shortcut strategies and achieve substantial accuracy gains on shortcut-amenable items (up to 15%), yet under standard chain-of-thought prompting they spontaneously employ such strategies in fewer than 40% of cases, even when they demonstrably possess the requisite capability. Moreover, this competence is confined to the Use level; models systematically over-generalise shortcuts to problems where they do not apply, and fail to generate valid shortcut-bearing problems from scratch. Together, these results suggest that current LLMs exhibit procedural shortcut fluency without the structural understanding of when and why shortcuts work that underlies human number sense.

analysis.tldr: LLMs 在数字推理中表现出程序性捷径流畅性，但缺乏人类数感的结构性理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM 在数值推理中常依赖逐步计算，即使存在高效捷径，这引发了对模型是否具备类似人类数感（即识别数值结构、恰当使用捷径）的疑问。
analysis.problem: 评估 LLM 在数值推理中是否具有结构敏感的捷径使用、判断和生成能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在显式提示下能使用捷径并提升准确率（最高15%），但在标准思维链提示下自发使用率低于40%；模型在适用性判断中过度泛化捷径，且无法从零生成有效的捷径问题。
analysis.method: 构建 SenseMath 基准，包含4800个条目，覆盖8种捷径类别和4种数字规模，设有强捷径、弱捷径和控制变体，支持捷径使用、适用性判断和问题生成三种评估设置。
contributions: 提出 SenseMath 基准，系统评估 LLM 的结构敏感数值推理能力。
揭示 LLM 在捷径使用、判断和生成上的能力差距：仅在使用层面表现良好，缺乏结构性理解。
analysis.experiments: 在5个LLM（GPT-4o-mini到Llama-3.1-8B）上评估，显示一致模式。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖8种捷径类别，可能不全面。
未深入分析模型内部机制或训练数据影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLMs 在数字推理中表现出程序性捷径流畅性，但缺乏人类数感的结构性理解。

papers.title: Curia-2: Scaling Self-Supervised Learning for Radiology Foundation Models
papers.abstract: The rapid growth of medical imaging has fueled the development of Foundation Models (FMs) to reduce the growing, unsustainable workload on radiologists. While recent FMs have shown the power of large-scale pre-training to CT and MRI analysis, there remains significant room to optimize how these models learn from complex radiological volumes. Building upon the Curia framework, this work introduces Curia-2, which significantly improves the original pre-training strategy and representation quality to better capture the specificities of radiological data. The proposed methodology enables scaling the architecture up to billion-parameter Vision Transformers, marking a first for multi-modal CT and MRI FMs. Furthermore, we formalize the evaluation of these models by extending and restructuring CuriaBench into two distinct tracks: a 2D track tailored for slice-based vision models and a 3D track for volumetric benchmarking. Our results demonstrate that Curia-2 outperforms all FMs on vision-focused tasks and fairs competitively to vision-language models on clinically complex tasks such as finding detection. Weights will be made publicly available to foster further research.

analysis.tldr: Curia-2通过改进自监督预训练策略，首次将CT/MRI基础模型扩展到十亿参数视觉Transformer，并在视觉任务上超越所有现有基础模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 放射科医生工作负荷持续增长且不可持续，现有医学影像基础模型在CT/MRI分析中仍有优化空间，尤其是如何从复杂放射学体积数据中更有效地学习。
analysis.problem: 如何优化自监督预训练策略以更好地捕获放射学数据的特异性，并实现模型架构的规模化扩展（十亿参数级），同时建立标准化的评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Curia框架改进预训练策略，提出Curia-2，支持将Vision Transformer扩展到十亿参数，并采用多模态CT/MRI预训练；同时重构CuriaBench为2D和3D两个评估轨道。
contributions: 提出Curia-2，显著改进预训练策略和表征质量，首次实现十亿参数级多模态CT/MRI基础模型。
重构CuriaBench为2D和3D两个评估轨道，标准化放射学基础模型评估。
在视觉任务上超越所有现有基础模型，在临床复杂任务（如病灶检测）上与视觉-语言模型竞争力相当。
analysis.experiments: 在视觉任务上Curia-2超越所有基础模型，在临床复杂任务（如病灶检测）上与视觉-语言模型竞争力相当。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在真实临床环境中的部署验证。
可能未充分讨论十亿参数模型的计算成本和可复现性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Curia-2通过改进自监督预训练策略，首次将CT/MRI基础模型扩展到十亿参数视觉Transformer，并在视觉任务上超越所有现有基础模型。

papers.title: World Action Verifier: Self-Improving World Models via Forward-Inverse Asymmetry
papers.abstract: General-purpose world models promise scalable policy evaluation, optimization, and planning, yet achieving the required level of robustness remains challenging. Unlike policy learning, which primarily focuses on optimal actions, a world model must be reliable over a much broader range of suboptimal actions, which are often insufficiently covered by action-labeled interaction data. To address this challenge, we propose World Action Verifier (WAV), a framework that enables world models to identify their own prediction errors and self-improve. The key idea is to decompose action-conditioned state prediction into two factors -- state plausibility and action reachability -- and verify each separately. We show that these verification problems can be substantially easier than predicting future states due to two underlying asymmetries: the broader availability of action-free data and the lower dimensionality of action-relevant features. Leveraging these asymmetries, we augment a world model with (i) a diverse subgoal generator obtained from video corpora and (ii) a sparse inverse model that infers actions from a subset of state features. By enforcing cycle consistency among generated subgoals, inferred actions, and forward rollouts, WAV provides an effective verification mechanism in under-explored regimes, where existing methods typically fail. Across nine tasks spanning MiniGrid, RoboMimic, and ManiSkill, our method achieves 2x higher sample efficiency while improving downstream policy performance by 18%.

analysis.tldr: 提出世界动作验证器（WAV），利用前向-逆不对称性让世界模型自我改进，在多个任务上实现2倍样本效率和18%策略性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用世界模型需要在大范围次优动作上保持鲁棒，但动作标记数据覆盖不足，导致预测错误难以识别和修正。
analysis.problem: 如何让世界模型在数据稀疏的次优动作区域自主发现预测错误并自我改进。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 动作条件状态预测可分解为状态合理性和动作可达性，且两者验证因无动作数据更丰富和动作相关特征维度更低而比直接预测未来状态更容易。
analysis.method: 将动作条件状态预测分解为状态合理性和动作可达性，分别用视频语料库生成的多样化子目标生成器和稀疏逆模型验证，并通过循环一致性约束实现自我改进。
contributions: 提出WAV框架，利用前向-逆不对称性实现世界模型的自我验证和改进
设计子目标生成器和稀疏逆模型，有效利用无动作数据和低维动作特征
在九个任务上验证了2倍样本效率和18%策略性能提升
analysis.experiments: 在MiniGrid、RoboMimic和ManiSkill的九个任务上评估，实现了2倍样本效率提升和18%下游策略性能改进。
limitations: 可能依赖视频语料库的质量和多样性
稀疏逆模型在复杂动作空间中的有效性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出世界动作验证器（WAV），利用前向-逆不对称性让世界模型自我改进，在多个任务上实现2倍样本效率和18%策略性能提升。

papers.title: RuleForge: Automated Generation and Validation for Web Vulnerability Detection at Scale
papers.abstract: Security teams face a challenge: the volume of newly disclosed Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) far exceeds the capacity to manually develop detection mechanisms. In 2025, the National Vulnerability Database published over 48,000 new vulnerabilities, motivating the need for automation. We present RuleForge, an AWS internal system that automatically generates detection rules--JSON-based patterns that identify malicious HTTP requests exploiting specific vulnerabilities--from structured Nuclei templates describing CVE details. Nuclei templates provide standardized, YAML-based vulnerability descriptions that serve as the structured input for our rule generation process. This paper focuses on RuleForge's architecture and operational deployment for CVE-related threat detection, with particular emphasis on our novel LLM-as-a-judge (Large Language Model as judge) confidence validation system and systematic feedback integration mechanism. This validation approach evaluates candidate rules across two dimensions--sensitivity (avoiding false negatives) and specificity (avoiding false positives)--achieving AUROC of 0.75 and reducing false positives by 67% compared to synthetic-test-only validation in production. Our 5x5 generation strategy (five parallel candidates with up to five refinement attempts each) combined with continuous feedback loops enables systematic quality improvement. We also present extensions enabling rule generation from unstructured data sources and demonstrate a proof-of-concept agentic workflow for multi-event-type detection. Our lessons learned highlight critical considerations for applying LLMs to cybersecurity tasks, including overconfidence mitigation and the importance of domain expertise in both prompt design and quality review of generated rules through human-in-the-loop validation.

analysis.tldr: RuleForge 是一个自动从 Nuclei 模板生成 Web 漏洞检测规则的系统，采用 LLM-as-a-judge 验证和反馈机制，在 AWS 内部部署并显著降低误报。
analysis.research_motivation: 新披露的 CVE 数量远超安全团队手动开发检测机制的能力，2025 年 NVD 发布超 48,000 个漏洞，亟需自动化方案。
analysis.problem: 如何从结构化漏洞描述（Nuclei 模板）自动生成高精度、低误报的 Web 漏洞检测规则。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: RuleForge 系统：从 Nuclei 模板生成 JSON 检测规则，采用 5x5 生成策略（5 个并行候选，每个最多 5 次精炼），结合 LLM-as-a-judge 在敏感性和特异性两个维度验证规则，并通过连续反馈循环和人工审核提升质量。
contributions: 提出 RuleForge 系统，实现从结构化漏洞描述到检测规则的自动化生成与验证。
设计 LLM-as-a-judge 置信度验证系统，在敏感性和特异性上评估规则，并在生产中减少 67% 误报。
展示从非结构化数据生成规则及多事件类型检测的 agentic 工作流概念验证。
analysis.experiments: 在生产环境中，AUROC 达到 0.75，误报率相比仅用合成测试验证降低 67%。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: AUROC 0.75 仍有提升空间，可能在高精度要求场景下不足。
依赖 Nuclei 模板质量，对非结构化数据扩展尚处概念验证阶段。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RuleForge 是一个自动从 Nuclei 模板生成 Web 漏洞检测规则的系统，采用 LLM-as-a-judge 验证和反馈机制，在 AWS 内部部署并显著降低误报。

papers.title: Interactive Tracking: A Human-in-the-Loop Paradigm with Memory-Augmented Adaptation
papers.abstract: Existing visual trackers mainly operate in a non-interactive, fire-and-forget manner, making them impractical for real-world scenarios that require human-in-the-loop adaptation. To overcome this limitation, we introduce Interactive Tracking, a new paradigm that allows users to guide the tracker at any time using natural language commands. To support research in this direction, we make three main contributions. First, we present InteractTrack, the first large-scale benchmark for interactive tracking, containing 150 videos with dense bounding box annotations and timestamped language instructions. Second, we propose a comprehensive evaluation protocol and evaluate 25 representative trackers, showing that state-of-the-art methods fail in interactive scenarios; strong performance on conventional benchmarks does not transfer. Third, we introduce Interactive Memory-Augmented Tracking (IMAT), a new baseline that employs a dynamic memory mechanism to learn from user feedback and update tracking behavior accordingly. Our benchmark, protocol, and baseline establish a foundation for developing more intelligent, adaptive, and collaborative tracking systems, bridging the gap between automated perception and human guidance. The full benchmark, tracking results, and analysis are available at https://github.com/NorahGreen/InteractTrack.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出交互式跟踪新范式，包含基准、评测协议和记忆增强基线方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉跟踪器以非交互方式运行，无法在真实场景中根据用户反馈进行在线适应，限制了人机协作的潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计支持人类自然语言指令实时引导的交互式跟踪范式，并建立相应的基准和基线方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在交互式场景下，传统SOTA跟踪器表现失败，强性能无法迁移。
analysis.method: 提出Interactive Memory-Augmented Tracking (IMAT)，采用动态记忆机制从用户反馈中学习并更新跟踪行为。
contributions: 构建了首个大规模交互式跟踪基准InteractTrack，包含150个视频、密集边界框标注和时间戳语言指令。
提出了全面的评测协议，评估了25个代表性跟踪器，揭示现有方法在交互场景下的不足。
提出了IMAT基线方法，利用动态记忆机制实现用户反馈驱动的在线适应。
analysis.experiments: 在InteractTrack基准上评估了25个跟踪器，并展示了IMAT的基线性能。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对单目标跟踪，未涉及多目标或复杂场景。
语言指令可能受限于简单命令，复杂交互有待探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出交互式跟踪新范式，包含基准、评测协议和记忆增强基线方法。

papers.title: NearID: Identity Representation Learning via Near-identity Distractors
papers.abstract: When evaluating identity-focused tasks such as personalized generation and image editing, existing vision encoders entangle object identity with background context, leading to unreliable representations and metrics. We introduce the first principled framework to address this vulnerability using Near-identity (NearID) distractors, where semantically similar but distinct instances are placed on the exact same background as a reference image, eliminating contextual shortcuts and isolating identity as the sole discriminative signal. Based on this principle, we present the NearID dataset (19K identities, 316K matched-context distractors) together with a strict margin-based evaluation protocol. Under this setting, pre-trained encoders perform poorly, achieving Sample Success Rates (SSR), a strict margin-based identity discrimination metric, as low as 30.7% and often ranking distractors above true cross-view matches. We address this by learning identity-aware representations on a frozen backbone using a two-tier contrastive objective enforcing the hierarchy: same identity > NearID distractor > random negative. This improves SSR to 99.2%, enhances part-level discrimination by 28.0%, and yields stronger alignment with human judgments on DreamBench++, a human-aligned benchmark for personalization. Project page: https://gorluxor.github.io/NearID/

analysis.tldr: 提出NearID框架，通过近身份干扰物学习身份表征，显著提升身份判别能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉编码器在身份相关任务中混淆对象身份与背景上下文，导致表征和评估不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何学习仅依赖身份信息、不受背景干扰的鲁棒身份表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预训练编码器在NearID评估中表现差，SSR低至30.7%，常将干扰物排在真实跨视图匹配之上。
analysis.method: 构建NearID数据集（19K身份，316K匹配上下文干扰物），提出严格基于边距的评估协议，并在冻结骨干上使用两层对比目标学习身份感知表征。
contributions: 首次提出利用近身份干扰物进行身份表征学习的框架。
构建大规模NearID数据集和严格评估协议。
提出两层对比学习方法，SSR提升至99.2%，部分级判别提升28.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在DreamBench++上验证与人类判断的一致性提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定干扰物生成方式，泛化性需进一步验证。
冻结骨干可能限制表征能力上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NearID框架，通过近身份干扰物学习身份表征，显著提升身份判别能力。

papers.title: SDesc3D: Towards Layout-Aware 3D Indoor Scene Generation from Short Descriptions
papers.abstract: 3D indoor scene generation conditioned on short textual descriptions provides a promising avenue for interactive 3D environment construction without the need for labor-intensive layout specification. Despite recent progress in text-conditioned 3D scene generation, existing works suffer from poor physical plausibility and insufficient detail richness in such semantic condensation cases, largely due to their reliance on explicit semantic cues about compositional objects and their spatial relationships. This limitation highlights the need for enhanced 3D reasoning capabilities, particularly in terms of prior integration and spatial anchoring. Motivated by this, we propose SDesc3D, a short-text conditioned 3D indoor scene generation framework, that leverages multi-view structural priors and regional functionality implications to enable 3D layout reasoning under sparse textual guidance. Specifically, we introduce a Multi-view scene prior augmentation that enriches underspecified textual inputs with aggregated multi-view structural knowledge, shifting from inaccessible semantic relation cues to multi-view relational prior aggregation. Building on this, we design a Functionality-aware layout grounding, employing regional functionality grounding for implicit spatial anchors and conducting hierarchical layout reasoning to enhance scene organization and semantic plausibility. Furthermore, an Iterative reflection-rectification scheme is employed for progressive structural plausibility refinement via self-rectification. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms existing approaches on short-text conditioned 3D indoor scene generation. Code will be publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出SDesc3D框架，利用多视图结构先验和功能感知布局推理，从短文本生成布局合理的3D室内场景。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有短文本条件3D场景生成方法依赖显式语义线索，导致物理合理性和细节丰富度不足，需要增强3D推理能力。
analysis.problem: 从短文本描述生成物理合理、细节丰富的3D室内场景布局。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在短文本条件下因缺乏显式语义线索（如物体组成和空间关系）而表现不佳。
analysis.method: 提出SDesc3D框架，包含多视图场景先验增强、功能感知布局接地和迭代反射-修正方案。
contributions: 提出多视图场景先验增强方法，将未充分指定的文本输入与聚合的多视图结构知识结合。
设计功能感知布局接地，利用区域功能接地进行隐式空间锚定，并执行层次化布局推理。
引入迭代反射-修正方案，通过自我修正逐步优化结构合理性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖多视图先验的获取质量。
短文本描述可能仍存在歧义，影响生成效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SDesc3D框架，利用多视图结构先验和功能感知布局推理，从短文本生成布局合理的3D室内场景。

papers.title: Ego-Grounding for Personalized Question-Answering in Egocentric Videos
papers.abstract: We present the first systematic analysis of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in personalized question-answering requiring ego-grounding - the ability to understand the camera-wearer in egocentric videos. To this end, we introduce MyEgo, the first egocentric VideoQA dataset designed to evaluate MLLMs' ability to understand, remember, and reason about the camera wearer. MyEgo comprises 541 long videos and 5K personalized questions asking about "my things", "my activities", and "my past". Benchmarking reveals that competitive MLLMs across variants, including open-source vs. proprietary, thinking vs. non-thinking, small vs. large scales all struggle on MyEgo. Top closed- and open-source models (e.g., GPT-5 and Qwen3-VL) achieve only~46% and 36% accuracy, trailing human performance by near 40% and 50% respectively. Surprisingly, neither explicit reasoning nor model scaling yield consistent improvements. Models improve when relevant evidence is explicitly provided, but gains drop over time, indicating limitations in tracking and remembering "me" and "my past". These findings collectively highlight the crucial role of ego-grounding and long-range memory in enabling personalized QA in egocentric videos. We hope MyEgo and our analyses catalyze further progress in these areas for egocentric personalized assistance. Data and code are available at https://github.com/Ryougetsu3606/MyEgo

analysis.tldr: 首个系统分析多模态大模型在自我中心视频中个性化问答的自我接地能力，并发布新数据集MyEgo。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM在自我中心视频中缺乏对佩戴者（自我）的理解、记忆和推理能力，而个性化问答需要这种自我接地能力。
analysis.problem: 评估和提升MLLM在自我中心视频中进行个性化问答时的自我接地能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有MLLM在MyEgo上表现不佳，顶级模型准确率仅约46%和36%，远低于人类；显式推理和模型缩放未带来一致提升；提供相关证据可改善但随时间增益下降。
analysis.method: 构建MyEgo数据集（541个长视频，5K个性化问题），涵盖“我的物品”、“我的活动”和“我的过去”三类问题，并系统评估多种MLLM。
contributions: 首次系统分析MLLM在自我中心视频中的自我接地能力。
发布首个针对自我接地评估的自我中心VideoQA数据集MyEgo。
揭示现有MLLM在自我接地和长程记忆方面的严重不足。
analysis.experiments: 在MyEgo上评估多种MLLM（开源vs闭源、思考vs非思考、小vs大），并与人类表现对比，同时进行证据提供和时间衰减分析。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（541个视频），可能不足以覆盖所有场景。
仅评估了问答任务，未涉及其他个性化交互形式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个系统分析多模态大模型在自我中心视频中个性化问答的自我接地能力，并发布新数据集MyEgo。

papers.title: Do We Need Bigger Models for Science? Task-Aware Retrieval with Small Language Models
papers.abstract: Scientific knowledge discovery increasingly relies on large language models, yet many existing scholarly assistants depend on proprietary systems with tens or hundreds of billions of parameters. Such reliance limits reproducibility and accessibility for the research community. In this work, we ask a simple question: do we need bigger models for scientific applications? Specifically, we investigate to what extent carefully designed retrieval pipelines can compensate for reduced model scale in scientific applications. We design a lightweight retrieval-augmented framework that performs task-aware routing to select specialized retrieval strategies based on the input query. The system further integrates evidence from full-text scientific papers and structured scholarly metadata, and employs compact instruction-tuned language models to generate responses with citations. We evaluate the framework across several scholarly tasks, focusing on scholarly question answering (QA), including single- and multi-document scenarios, as well as biomedical QA under domain shift and scientific text compression. Our findings demonstrate that retrieval and model scale are complementary rather than interchangeable. While retrieval design can partially compensate for smaller models, model capacity remains important for complex reasoning tasks. This work highlights retrieval and task-aware design as key factors for building practical and reproducible scholarly assistants.

analysis.tldr: 小型语言模型结合任务感知检索可部分替代大模型，但复杂推理仍需模型容量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有学术助手依赖大型专有模型，限制了可重复性和可访问性，亟需探索更轻量、可复现的方案。
analysis.problem: 研究检索设计能否以及能在多大程度上补偿模型规模缩减对科学任务性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 检索与模型规模是互补而非可互换的：检索设计可部分补偿小模型，但复杂推理任务仍需大模型容量。
analysis.method: 提出轻量级检索增强框架，包含任务感知路由选择专门检索策略，整合全文论文与结构化元数据，并使用紧凑指令微调模型生成带引用的回答。
contributions: 系统研究了检索设计与模型规模在科学任务中的互补关系。
提出了一个轻量级、可复现的任务感知检索增强框架，在多个学术QA任务上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在学术问答（单文档和多文档）、生物医学问答（域迁移）和科学文本压缩任务上评估。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供具体性能数据，难以量化补偿程度。
框架可能对特定领域或任务泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 小型语言模型结合任务感知检索可部分替代大模型，但复杂推理仍需模型容量。

papers.title: Automated Prostate Gland Segmentation in MRI Using nnU-Net
papers.abstract: Accurate segmentation of the prostate gland in multiparametric MRI (mpMRI) is a fundamental step for a wide range of clinical and research applications, including image registration, volume estimation, and radiomic analysis. However, manual delineation is time-consuming and subject to inter-observer variability, while general-purpose segmentation tools often fail to provide sufficient accuracy for prostate-specific tasks. In this work, we propose a dedicated deep learning-based approach for automatic prostate gland segmentation using the nnU-Net v2 framework. The model leverages multimodal mpMRI data, including T2-weighted imaging, diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI), and apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC) maps, to exploit complementary tissue information. Training was performed on 981 cases from the PI-CAI dataset using whole-gland annotations, and model performance was assessed through 5-fold cross-validation and external validation on an independent cohort of 54 patients from Hospital La Fe. The proposed model achieved a mean Dice score of 0.96 +/- 0.00 in cross-validation and 0.82 on the external test set, demonstrating strong generalization despite domain shift. In comparison, a general-purpose approach (TotalSegmentator) showed substantially lower performance, with a Dice score of 0.15, primarily due to under-segmentation of the gland. These results highlight the importance of task-specific, multimodal segmentation strategies and demonstrate the potential of the proposed approach for reliable integration into clinical research workflows. To facilitate reproducibility and deployment, the model has been fully containerized and is available as a ready-to-use inference tool.

analysis.tldr: 基于nnU-Net v2的多模态MRI前列腺自动分割方法，在PI-CAI数据集上达到0.96 Dice，外部验证0.82 Dice。
analysis.research_motivation: 手动分割前列腺耗时且存在观察者间差异，通用分割工具精度不足，亟需专用自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 实现多参数MRI中前列腺腺体的高精度自动分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用分割工具TotalSegmentator在前列腺任务上严重欠分割（Dice仅0.15），而专用多模态策略可显著提升性能。
analysis.method: 采用nnU-Net v2框架，融合T2加权、DWI和ADC多模态MRI数据，在981例PI-CAI数据集上训练，并容器化部署。
contributions: 提出基于nnU-Net v2的前列腺专用分割方法，利用多模态MRI信息。
在大型数据集上验证并公开容器化推理工具，促进可重复性和临床部署。
analysis.experiments: 在PI-CAI数据集上进行5折交叉验证（Dice 0.96），并在独立外部队列（54例）上验证（Dice 0.82），与TotalSegmentator对比。
limitations: 外部验证队列规模较小（54例），可能不足以全面评估泛化性。
仅针对前列腺腺体分割，未涉及病变或区域细分。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于nnU-Net v2的多模态MRI前列腺自动分割方法，在PI-CAI数据集上达到0.96 Dice，外部验证0.82 Dice。

papers.title: Abnormal Head Movements in Neurological Conditions: A Knowledge-Based Dataset with Application to Cervical Dystonia
papers.abstract: Abnormal head movements (AHMs) manifest across a broad spectrum of neurological disorders; however, the absence of a multi-condition resource integrating kinematic measurements, clinical severity scores, and patient demographics constitutes a persistent barrier to the development of AI-driven diagnostic tools. To address this gap, this study introduces NeuroPose-AHM, a knowledge-based dataset of neurologically induced AHMs constructed through a multi-LLM extraction framework applied to 1,430 peer-reviewed publications. The dataset contains 2,756 patient-group-level records spanning 57 neurological conditions, derived from 846 AHM-relevant papers. Inter-LLM reliability analysis confirms robust extraction performance, with study-level classification achieving strong agreement (kappa = 0.822). To demonstrate the dataset's analytical utility, a four-task framework is applied to cervical dystonia (CD), the condition most directly defined by pathological head movement. First, Task 1 performs multi-label AHM type classification (F1 = 0.856). Task 2 constructs the Head-Neck Severity Index (HNSI), a unified metric that normalizes heterogeneous clinical rating scales. The clinical relevance of this index is then evaluated in Task 3, where HNSI is validated against real-world CD patient data, with aligned severe-band proportions (6.7%) providing a preliminary plausibility indication for index calibration within the high severity range. Finally, Task 4 performs bridge analysis between movement-type probabilities and HNSI scores, producing significant correlations (p less than 0.001). These results demonstrate the analytical utility of NeuroPose-AHM as a structured, knowledge-based resource for neurological AHM research. The NeuroPose-AHM dataset is publicly available on Zenodo (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19386862).

analysis.tldr: 构建了包含57种神经系统疾病的异常头部运动知识库数据集NeuroPose-AHM，并应用于颈肌张力障碍分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 缺乏整合运动学测量、临床严重度评分和患者人口统计学的多疾病资源，阻碍了AI诊断工具的开发。
analysis.problem: 构建一个多条件、知识驱动的异常头部运动数据集，并验证其在颈肌张力障碍分析中的实用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过多LLM提取框架从1430篇论文中构建数据集，包含2756条患者组级记录，覆盖57种神经系统疾病；针对颈肌张力障碍设计了四任务分析框架。
contributions: 构建了首个多条件异常头部运动知识库数据集NeuroPose-AHM
提出了头颈严重度指数（HNSI）统一度量标准
验证了数据集在颈肌张力障碍分析中的实用性
analysis.experiments: 在颈肌张力障碍上进行了四任务实验：多标签AHM类型分类（F1=0.856）、HNSI构建、HNSI与真实患者数据验证（严重段比例6.7%）、运动类型概率与HNSI的相关性分析（p<0.001）。
limitations: 数据集基于文献提取，可能受限于文献质量和覆盖范围
HNSI的临床验证仅基于初步数据，需进一步大规模验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建了包含57种神经系统疾病的异常头部运动知识库数据集NeuroPose-AHM，并应用于颈肌张力障碍分析。

papers.title: MAVFusion: Efficient Infrared and Visible Video Fusion via Motion-Aware Sparse Interaction
papers.abstract: Infrared and visible video fusion combines the object saliency from infrared images with the texture details from visible images to produce semantically rich fusion results. However, most existing methods are designed for static image fusion and cannot effectively handle frame-to-frame motion in videos. Current video fusion methods improve temporal consistency by introducing interactions across frames, but they often require high computational cost. To mitigate these challenges, we propose MAVFusion, an end-to-end video fusion framework featuring a motion-aware sparse interaction mechanism that enhances efficiency while maintaining superior fusion quality. Specifically, we leverage optical flow to identify dynamic regions in multi-modal sequences, adaptively allocating computationally intensive cross-modal attention to these sparse areas to capture salient transitions and facilitate inter-modal information exchange. For static background regions, a lightweight weak interaction module is employed to maintain structural and appearance integrity. By decoupling the processing of dynamic and static regions, MAVFusion simultaneously preserves temporal consistency and fine-grained details while significantly accelerating inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MAVFusion achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple infrared and visible video benchmarks, achieving a speed of 14.16\,FPS at $640 \times 480$ resolution. The source code will be available at https://github.com/ixilai/MAVFusion.

analysis.tldr: 提出运动感知稀疏交互机制，实现高效红外-可见光视频融合。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有红外-可见光融合方法多针对静态图像设计，无法有效处理视频帧间运动；当前视频融合方法虽引入跨帧交互提升时间一致性，但计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何高效实现红外与可见光视频融合，在保持时间一致性和细节质量的同时降低计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 动态区域需要密集跨模态交互以捕捉显著变化，而静态背景区域只需轻量交互即可保持结构完整性。
analysis.method: 提出MAVFusion框架，利用光流识别多模态序列中的动态区域，对稀疏动态区域分配密集跨模态注意力，对静态背景区域使用轻量弱交互模块。
contributions: 提出运动感知稀疏交互机制，解耦动态与静态区域处理，提升效率。
在多个红外-可见光视频基准上达到SOTA性能，速度达14.16 FPS（640×480分辨率）。
analysis.experiments: 在多个红外和可见光视频基准上进行了实验，达到SOTA性能，速度14.16 FPS。
limitations: 依赖光流估计的准确性，可能受快速运动或遮挡影响。
未提及对长视频序列的稳定性或内存消耗。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出运动感知稀疏交互机制，实现高效红外-可见光视频融合。

papers.title: Qiana: A First-Order Formalism to Quantify over Contexts and Formulas with Temporality
papers.abstract: We introduce Qiana, a logic framework for reasoning on formulas that are true only in specific contexts. In Qiana, it is possible to quantify over both formulas and contexts to express, e.g., that ``everyone knows everything Alice says''. Qiana also permits paraconsistent logics within contexts, so that contexts can contain contradictions. Furthermore, Qiana is based on first-order logic, and is finitely axiomatizable, so that Qiana theories are compatible with pre-existing first-order logic theorem provers. We show how Qiana can be used to represent temporality, event calculus, and modal logic. We also discuss different design alternatives of Qiana.

analysis.tldr: Qiana 是一个一阶逻辑框架，支持对公式和上下文进行量化，并兼容时态推理与次协调逻辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有逻辑框架难以同时处理上下文相关的公式量化、时态推理和矛盾容忍，缺乏统一的、可公理化的一阶逻辑基础。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个基于一阶逻辑的、可公理化的形式系统，使其能够量化公式和上下文，并支持时态、事件演算和模态逻辑的表达。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出 Qiana 逻辑框架，基于一阶逻辑，通过引入上下文量词和公式量词，并允许上下文内使用次协调逻辑，实现时态、事件演算和模态逻辑的表示。
contributions: 提出 Qiana，一个可量化公式和上下文的一阶逻辑框架。
证明 Qiana 是有限可公理化的，兼容现有定理证明器。
展示 Qiana 在表示时态、事件演算和模态逻辑方面的能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模实际应用验证。
次协调逻辑的引入可能增加推理复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Qiana 是一个一阶逻辑框架，支持对公式和上下文进行量化，并兼容时态推理与次协调逻辑。

papers.title: A Self supervised learning framework for imbalanced medical imaging datasets
papers.abstract: Two problems often plague medical imaging analysis: 1) Non-availability of large quantities of labeled training data, and 2) Dealing with imbalanced data, i.e., abundant data are available for frequent classes, whereas data are highly limited for the rare class. Self supervised learning (SSL) methods have been proposed to deal with the first problem to a certain extent, but the issue of investigating the robustness of SSL to imbalanced data has rarely been addressed in the domain of medical image classification. In this work, we make the following contributions: 1) The MIMV method proposed by us in an earlier work is extended with a new augmentation strategy to construct asymmetric multi-image, multi-view (AMIMV) pairs to address both data scarcity and dataset imbalance in medical image classification. 2) We carry out a data analysis to evaluate the robustness of AMIMV under varying degrees of class imbalance in medical imaging . 3) We evaluate eight representative SSL methods in 11 medical imaging datasets (MedMNIST) under long-tailed distributions and limited supervision. Our experimental results on the MedMNIST dataset show an improvement of 4.25% on retinaMNIST, 1.88% on tissueMNIST, and 3.1% on DermaMNIST.

analysis.tldr: 提出AMIMV框架，通过非对称多图像多视图对比学习解决医学图像分类中的小样本和类别不平衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分析面临标注数据稀缺和类别不平衡两大挑战，现有自监督学习方法主要解决数据稀缺问题，但对不平衡数据的鲁棒性研究不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在自监督学习框架下同时应对医学图像分类中的小样本和类别不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 扩展先前MIMV方法，引入新的数据增强策略构建非对称多图像多视图（AMIMV）对，通过对比学习提升模型对不平衡数据的鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出AMIMV框架，结合非对称多图像多视图增强策略，同时解决数据稀缺和类别不平衡。
在11个医学图像数据集上评估8种SSL方法在长尾分布和有限监督下的表现，并分析AMIMV在不同不平衡程度下的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在MedMNIST数据集上实验，retinaMNIST提升4.25%，tissueMNIST提升1.88%，DermaMNIST提升3.1%。
limitations: 仅评估了MedMNIST数据集，泛化性有待验证。
未与其他非SSL方法比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AMIMV框架，通过非对称多图像多视图对比学习解决医学图像分类中的小样本和类别不平衡问题。

papers.title: Physics-Informed Transformer for Multi-Band Channel Frequency Response Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Wideband channel frequency response (CFR) estimation is challenging in multi-band wireless systems, especially when one or more sub-bands are temporarily blocked by co-channel interference. We present a physics-informed complex Transformer that reconstructs the full wideband CFR from such fragmented, partially observed spectrum snapshots. The interference pattern in each sub-band is modeled as an independent two-state discrete-time Markov chain, capturing realistic bursty occupancy behavior. Our model operates on the joint time-frequency grid of $T$ snapshots and $F$ frequency bins and uses a factored self-attention mechanism that separately attends along both axes, reducing the computational complexity to $O(TF^2 + FT^2)$. Complex-valued inputs and outputs are processed through a holomorphic linear layer that preserves phase relationships. Training uses a composite physics-informed loss combining spectral fidelity, power delay profile (PDP) reconstruction, channel impulse response (CIR) sparsity, and temporal smoothness. Mobility effects are incorporated through per-sample velocity randomization, enabling generalization across different mobility regimes. Evaluation against three classical baselines, namely, last-observation-carry-forward, zero-fill, and cubic-spline interpolation, shows that our approach achieves the highest PDP similarity with respect to the ground truth, reaching $ρ\geq 0.82$ compared to $ρ\geq 0.62$ for the best baseline at interference occupancy levels up to 50%. Furthermore, the model degrades smoothly across the full velocity range, consistently outperforming all other baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理信息Transformer，从部分观测的多频带频谱中重建宽带信道频率响应。
analysis.research_motivation: 多频带无线系统中，由于同信道干扰导致部分子带暂时阻塞，宽带信道频率响应（CFR）估计困难，现有方法精度不足。
analysis.problem: 从碎片化、部分观测的频谱快照中重建完整的宽带CFR。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出物理信息复数Transformer，采用分解自注意力机制降低复杂度，复数线性层保持相位关系，复合物理信息损失函数结合频谱保真度、PDP重建、CIR稀疏性和时间平滑性，并通过速度随机化处理移动性。
contributions: 提出物理信息复数Transformer用于多频带CFR重建
设计分解自注意力机制降低计算复杂度至O(TF^2+FT^2)
复合物理信息损失函数提升重建质量
analysis.experiments: 在干扰占用率高达50%时，PDP相似度ρ≥0.82，优于基线（ρ≥0.62），且在不同速度下性能稳定。
limitations: 仅与经典插值基线比较，未与深度学习方法对比
可能对高干扰率或极端移动性场景泛化能力有限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理信息Transformer，从部分观测的多频带频谱中重建宽带信道频率响应。

papers.title: Captioning Daily Activity Images in Early Childhood Education: Benchmark and Algorithm
papers.abstract: Image captioning for Early Childhood Education (ECE) is essential for automated activity understanding and educational assessment. However, existing methods face two key challenges. First, the lack of large-scale, domain-specific datasets limits the model's ability to capture fine-grained semantic concepts unique to ECE scenarios, resulting in generic and imprecise descriptions. Second, conventional training paradigms exhibit limitations in enhancing professional object description capability, as supervised learning tends to favor high-frequency expressions, while reinforcement learning may suffer from unstable optimization on difficult samples. To address these limitations, we introduce ECAC, a large-scale benchmark for ECE daily activity image captioning, comprising 256,121 real-world images annotated with expert-level captions and fine-grained labels. ECAC is further equipped with a domain-oriented evaluation protocol, the Teaching Toy Recognition Score (TTS), to explicitly measure professional object naming accuracy. Furthermore, we propose RSRS (Reward-Conditional Switch of Reinforcement Learning and Supervised Fine-Tuning), a hybrid training framework that dynamically alternates between RL and supervised optimization. By rerouting hard samples with zero rewards to supervised fine-tuning, RSRS effectively mitigates advantage collapse and enables stable optimization for fine-grained recognition. Leveraging ECAC and RSRS, we develop KinderMM-Cap-3B, a domain-adapted multimodal large language model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model achieves a TTS of 51.06, substantially outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while maintaining superior caption quality, highlighting its potential for specialized educational applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向幼儿教育日常活动图像描述的大规模基准ECAC和混合训练框架RSRS，显著提升专业物体命名准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 幼儿教育中的图像描述对自动化活动理解和教育评估至关重要，但现有方法因缺乏领域特定数据集和训练范式局限，难以捕捉细粒度语义概念且专业物体描述能力不足。
analysis.problem: 解决幼儿教育场景下图像描述中专业物体命名不准确和训练不稳定的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 监督学习偏向高频表达，强化学习在困难样本上优化不稳定，导致优势崩溃。
analysis.method: 构建包含256,121张真实图像及专家标注的ECAC基准，并提出RSRS混合训练框架，根据奖励动态切换强化学习和监督微调，将零奖励困难样本重路由至监督微调。
contributions: 提出ECAC，首个大规模幼儿教育日常活动图像描述基准，含专家级标注和领域评估协议TTS。
提出RSRS混合训练框架，缓解强化学习优势崩溃，实现稳定优化。
基于ECAC和RSRS开发KinderMM-Cap-3B模型，在TTS上达到51.06，显著优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在ECAC基准上评估，KinderMM-Cap-3B的TTS达51.06，显著优于现有基线，同时保持高质量描述。
limitations: 仅针对幼儿教育场景，泛化性未验证。
RSRS框架的切换阈值可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向幼儿教育日常活动图像描述的大规模基准ECAC和混合训练框架RSRS，显著提升专业物体命名准确率。

papers.title: Probabilistic classification from possibilistic data: computing Kullback-Leibler projection with a possibility distribution
papers.abstract: We consider learning with possibilistic supervision for multi-class classification. For each training instance, the supervision is a normalized possibility distribution that expresses graded plausibility over the classes. From this possibility distribution, we construct a non-empty closed convex set of admissible probability distributions by combining two requirements: probabilistic compatibility with the possibility and necessity measures induced by the possibility distribution, and linear shape constraints that must be satisfied to preserve the qualitative structure of the possibility distribution. Thus, classes with the same possibility degree receive equal probabilities, and if a class has a strictly larger possibility degree than another class, then it receives a strictly larger probability. Given a strictly positive probability vector output by a model for an instance, we compute its Kullback-Leibler projection onto the admissible set. This projection yields the closest admissible probability distribution in Kullback-Leibler sense. We can then train the model by minimizing the divergence between the prediction and its projection, which quantifies the smallest adjustment needed to satisfy the induced dominance and shape constraints. The projection is computed with Dykstra's algorithm using Bregman projections associated with the negative entropy, and we provide explicit formulas for the projections onto each constraint set. Experiments conducted on synthetic data and on a real-world natural language inference task, based on the ChaosNLI dataset, show that the proposed projection algorithm is efficient enough for practical use, and that the resulting projection-based learning objective can improve predictive performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种将可能性监督转化为概率约束的KL投影方法，用于多类分类学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统分类学习依赖精确概率标签，但实际中监督信息常以可能性分布形式存在（如人类标注的模糊偏好），缺乏有效利用这种弱监督信息的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从可能性分布监督中构造可用的概率约束集，并高效计算预测概率向量的KL投影以训练分类模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过可能性分布诱导的必然性和可能性测度，结合线性形状约束（相同可能性度类等概率、严格大可能性度类严格大概率）构造凸集；使用Dykstra算法和负熵Bregman投影计算KL投影。
contributions: 提出一种从可能性分布构造概率约束集的方法，保证定性结构保持。
给出基于Dykstra算法的KL投影显式公式，并验证其在合成数据和真实NLI任务上的效率与有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据和基于ChaosNLI数据集的自然语言推理任务上实验，表明投影算法高效且能提升预测性能。
limitations: 仅适用于多类分类，未扩展到回归或其他任务。
投影计算依赖线性约束，可能不适用于更复杂的可能性结构。
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种将可能性监督转化为概率约束的KL投影方法，用于多类分类学习。

papers.title: Reliable News or Propagandist News? A Neurosymbolic Model Using Genre, Topic, and Persuasion Techniques to Improve Robustness in Classification
papers.abstract: Among news disorders, propagandist news are particularly insidious, because they tend to mix oriented messages with factual reports intended to look like reliable news. To detect propaganda, extant approaches based on Language Models such as BERT are promising but often overfit their training datasets, due to biases in data collection. To enhance classification robustness and improve generalization to new sources, we propose a neurosymbolic approach combining non-contextual text embeddings (fastText) with symbolic conceptual features such as genre, topic, and persuasion techniques. Results show improvements over equivalent text-only methods, and ablation studies as well as explainability analyses confirm the benefits of the added features. Keywords: Information disorder, Fake news, Propaganda, Classification, Topic modeling, Hybrid method, Neurosymbolic model, Ablation, Robustness

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号模型结合非上下文嵌入与符号特征（体裁、主题、说服技巧）提升宣传新闻分类鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 宣传新闻混合事实与倾向性信息，难以检测；现有基于语言模型的方法因数据偏差易过拟合，泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 提升宣传新闻分类的鲁棒性和跨源泛化能力。

contributions: 提出结合非上下文嵌入与符号特征的神经符号模型，提升分类鲁棒性。
通过消融和可解释性分析验证符号特征的有效性。

papers.title: Rethinking Representations for Cross-Domain Infrared Small Target Detection: A Generalizable Perspective from the Frequency Domain
papers.abstract: The accurate target-background separation in infrared small target detection (IRSTD) highly depends on the discriminability of extracted representations. However, most existing methods are confined to domain-consistent settings, while overlooking whether such discriminability can generalize to unseen domains. In practice, distribution shifts between training and testing data are inevitable due to variations in observational conditions and environmental factors. Meanwhile, the intrinsic indistinctiveness of infrared small targets aggravates overfitting to domain-specific patterns. Consequently, the detection performance of models trained on source domains can be severely degraded when deployed in unseen domains. To address this challenge, we propose a spatial-spectral collaborative perception network (S$^2$CPNet) for cross-domain IRSTD. Moving beyond conventional spatial learning pipelines, we rethink IRSTD representations from a frequency perspective and reveal inconsistencies in spectral phase as the primary manifestation of domain discrepancies. Based on this insight, we develop a phase rectification module (PRM) to derive generalizable target awareness. Then, we employ an orthogonal attention mechanism (OAM) in skip connections to preserve positional information while refining informative representations. Moreover, the bias toward domain-specific patterns is further mitigated through selective style recomposition (SSR). Extensive experiments have been conducted on three IRSTD datasets, and the proposed method consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance under diverse cross-domain settings.

analysis.tldr: 从频域视角重新思考红外小目标检测的跨域表征，提出空间-频谱协同感知网络S²CPNet，通过相位校正和正交注意力机制实现域泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有红外小目标检测方法局限于域一致设定，忽略了表征在未见域上的泛化能力；实际中训练与测试数据分布偏移不可避免，且小目标的固有模糊性加剧了对域特定模式的过拟合。
analysis.problem: 解决红外小目标检测中因域偏移导致的性能严重下降问题，即如何学习可泛化的目标-背景分离表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示频谱相位的不一致性是域差异的主要表现。
analysis.method: 提出空间-频谱协同感知网络S²CPNet，包含相位校正模块（PRM）获取泛化目标感知、跳跃连接中的正交注意力机制（OAM）保留位置信息并精炼表征、以及选择性风格重组（SSR）缓解对域特定模式的偏置。
contributions: 从频域视角重新思考红外小目标检测表征，发现频谱相位不一致是域差异的主要表现。
提出S²CPNet，集成相位校正、正交注意力与选择性风格重组，实现跨域泛化。
在三个IRSTD数据集上取得跨域设定下的最优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在三个IRSTD数据集上进行广泛实验，在多种跨域设定下一致达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定频域假设，对极端域偏移的鲁棒性未知。
计算开销可能高于纯空间方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从频域视角重新思考红外小目标检测的跨域表征，提出空间-频谱协同感知网络S²CPNet，通过相位校正和正交注意力机制实现域泛化。

papers.title: BraiNCA: brain-inspired neural cellular automata and applications to morphogenesis and motor control
papers.abstract: Most of the Neural Cellular Automata (NCAs) defined in the literature have a common theme: they are based on regular grids with a Moore neighborhood (one-hop neighbour). They do not take into account long-range connections and more complex topologies as we can find in the brain. In this paper, we introduce BraiNCA, a brain-inspired NCA with an attention layer, long-range connections and complex topology. BraiNCAs shows better results in terms of robustness and speed of learning on the two tasks compared to Vanilla NCAs establishing that incorporating attention-based message selection together with explicit long-range edges can yield more sample-efficient and damage-tolerant self-organization than purely local, grid-based update rules. These results support the hypothesis that, for tasks requiring distributed coordination over extended spatial and temporal scales, the choice of interaction topology and the ability to dynamically route information will impact the robustness and speed of learning of an NCA.
