More broadly, BraiNCA provides brain-inspired NCA formulation that preserves the decentralized local update principle while better reflecting non-local connectivity patterns, making it a promising substrate for studying collective computation under biologically-realistic network structure and evolving cognitive substrates.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种受大脑启发的神经细胞自动机BraiNCA，通过注意力机制和长程连接提升鲁棒性与学习速度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经细胞自动机（NCA）基于规则网格和局部邻域，缺乏大脑中的长程连接和复杂拓扑，限制了其在需要分布式协调任务上的表现。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种NCA，使其既能保持局部更新原则，又能融入长程连接和动态信息路由，以提升样本效率和损伤容错性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在NCA中引入注意力层和显式长程边，实现基于注意力的消息选择和非局部连接，形成受大脑启发的NCA（BraiNCA）。
contributions: 提出BraiNCA，一种融合注意力机制和长程连接的脑启发神经细胞自动机。
在形态发生和运动控制任务上验证BraiNCA相比传统NCA在鲁棒性和学习速度上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定任务上验证，泛化性未知。
注意力机制和长程连接的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种受大脑启发的神经细胞自动机BraiNCA，通过注意力机制和长程连接提升鲁棒性与学习速度。

papers.title: Quantum-Inspired Geometric Classification with Correlation Group Structures and VQC Decision Modeling
papers.abstract: We propose a geometry-driven quantum-inspired classification framework that integrates Correlation Group Structures (CGR), compact SWAP-test-based overlap estimation, and selective variational quantum decision modelling. Rather than directly approximating class posteriors, the method adopts a geometry-first paradigm in which samples are evaluated relative to class medoids using overlap-derived Euclidean-like and angular similarity channels. CGR organizes features into anchor-centered correlation neighbourhoods, generating nonlinear, correlation-weighted representations that enhance robustness in heterogeneous tabular spaces. These geometric signals are fused through a non-probabilistic margin-based fusion score, serving as a lightweight and data-efficient primary classifier for small-to-moderate datasets. On Heart Disease, Breast Cancer, and Wine Quality datasets, the fusion-score classifier achieves 0.8478, 0.8881, and 0.9556 test accuracy respectively, with macro-F1 scores of 0.8463, 0.8703, and 0.9522, demonstrating competitive and stable performance relative to classical baselines. For large-scale and highly imbalanced regimes, we construct compact Delta-distance contrastive features and train a variational quantum classifier (VQC) as a nonlinear refinement layer. On the Credit Card Fraud dataset (0.17% prevalence), the Delta + VQC pipeline achieves approximately 0.85 minority recall at an alert rate of approximately 1.31%, with ROC-AUC 0.9249 and PR-AUC 0.3251 under full-dataset evaluation. These results highlight the importance of operating-point-aware assessment in rare-event detection and demonstrate that the proposed hybrid geometric-variational framework provides interpretable, scalable, and regime-adaptive classification across heterogeneous data settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出几何驱动的量子启发分类框架，结合相关组结构和变分量子分类器，在小数据集和高度不平衡数据上表现良好。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统分类方法在处理异构表格数据和小样本时鲁棒性不足，且量子机器学习方法往往直接逼近后验概率，缺乏几何可解释性。
analysis.problem: 设计一种几何优先、数据高效且可扩展的分类框架，同时适应小规模平衡数据集和大规模高度不平衡数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出几何驱动框架：使用相关组结构（CGR）组织特征，通过SWAP测试估计重叠度得到欧几里得和角度相似度通道，融合为非概率的基于边界的分数作为主分类器；对于大规模不平衡数据，构建Delta距离对比特征并训练变分量子分类器（VQC）作为非线性精化层。
contributions: 提出几何优先的量子启发分类范式，利用类中心点和重叠度量构建相似度通道。
引入相关组结构（CGR）增强特征表示鲁棒性。
设计混合几何-变分框架，通过融合分数分类器和Delta+VQC管道适应不同数据规模。
analysis.experiments: 在Heart Disease、Breast Cancer、Wine Quality数据集上，融合分数分类器测试准确率分别为0.8478、0.8881、0.9556，macro-F1分别为0.8463、0.8703、0.9522；在Credit Card Fraud数据集上，Delta+VQC管道在0.17%患病率下达到约0.85少数类召回率，告警率约1.31%，ROC-AUC 0.9249，PR-AUC 0.3251。
limitations: 量子启发方法可能依赖经典模拟，实际量子硬件部署效果未验证。
Delta+VQC管道在极端不平衡下的PR-AUC仍较低，可能需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出几何驱动的量子启发分类框架，结合相关组结构和变分量子分类器，在小数据集和高度不平衡数据上表现良好。

papers.title: Woosh: A Sound Effects Foundation Model
papers.abstract: The audio research community depends on open generative models as foundational tools for building novel approaches and establishing baselines. In this report, we present Woosh, Sony AI's publicly released sound effect foundation model, detailing its architecture, training process, and an evaluation against other popular open models. Being optimized for sound effects, we provide (1) a high-quality audio encoder/decoder model and (2) a text-audio alignment model for conditioning, together with (3) text-to-audio and (4) video-to-audio generative models. Distilled text-to-audio and video-to-audio models are also included in the release, allowing for low-resource operation and fast inference. Our evaluation on both public and private data shows competitive or better performance for each module when compared to existing open alternatives like StableAudio-Open and TangoFlux. Inference code and model weights are available at https://github.com/SonyResearch/Woosh. Demo samples can be found at https://sonyresearch.github.io/Woosh/.

analysis.tldr: Woosh 是索尼 AI 发布的音效基础模型，包含文本/视频到音频生成模块，性能优于现有开源模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 音频研究社区依赖开放生成模型作为基础工具，但现有模型在音效生成方面存在不足，需要更专业、高效的模型。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对音效生成优化的高质量开源基础模型，现有模型在音效任务上性能有限且推理效率低。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了音效基础模型 Woosh，包含高质量音频编解码器、文本-音频对齐模型、文本到音频和视频到音频生成模型，并提供了蒸馏版本以支持低资源快速推理。
contributions: 发布了针对音效优化的开源基础模型 Woosh，包含多个模块。
提供了蒸馏版本，实现低资源操作和快速推理。
在公开和私有数据上评估，性能优于 StableAudio-Open 和 TangoFlux 等现有开源模型。
analysis.experiments: 在公开和私有数据上评估了每个模块，与 StableAudio-Open 和 TangoFlux 对比，显示竞争或更优性能。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在复杂音效场景下的泛化能力。
蒸馏模型可能牺牲部分生成质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Woosh 是索尼 AI 发布的音效基础模型，包含文本/视频到音频生成模块，性能优于现有开源模型。

papers.title: ImplicitBBQ: Benchmarking Implicit Bias in Large Language Models through Characteristic Based Cues
papers.abstract: Large Language Models increasingly suppress biased outputs when demographic identity is stated explicitly, yet may still exhibit implicit biases when identity is conveyed indirectly. Existing benchmarks use name based proxies to detect implicit biases, which carry weak associations with many social demographics and cannot extend to dimensions like age or socioeconomic status. We introduce ImplicitBBQ, a QA benchmark that evaluates implicit bias through characteristic based cues, culturally associated attributes that signal implicitly, across age, gender, region, religion, caste, and socioeconomic status. Evaluating 11 models, we find that implicit bias in ambiguous contexts is over six times higher than explicit bias in open weight models. Safety prompting and chain-of-thought reasoning fail to substantially close this gap; even few-shot prompting, which reduces implicit bias by 84%, leaves caste bias at four times the level of any other dimension. These findings indicate that current alignment and prompting strategies address the surface of bias evaluation while leaving culturally grounded stereotypic associations largely unresolved. We publicly release our code and dataset for model providers and researchers to benchmark potential mitigation techniques.

analysis.tldr: 提出ImplicitBBQ基准，通过文化特征线索评估LLM的隐性偏见，发现隐性偏见远高于显性偏见且现有对齐策略效果有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有偏见基准依赖姓名代理，无法捕捉隐性偏见且难以扩展到年龄、社会经济地位等维度，而LLM在间接表达身份时仍可能表现出隐性偏见。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估LLM隐性偏见的有效基准，现有方法无法覆盖多种社会人口维度且难以检测间接表达的偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在开放权重模型中，模糊上下文中的隐性偏见比显性偏见高六倍以上；安全提示和思维链推理无法显著缩小差距；少样本提示虽减少84%隐性偏见，但种姓偏见仍比其他维度高四倍。
analysis.method: 构建基于文化特征线索的问答基准ImplicitBBQ，覆盖年龄、性别、地区、宗教、种姓和社会经济地位六个维度，通过间接暗示身份的特征线索评估隐性偏见。
contributions: 提出ImplicitBBQ基准，通过文化特征线索评估LLM的隐性偏见，覆盖六个社会人口维度。
系统评估11个模型，揭示隐性偏见远高于显性偏见，且现有对齐和提示策略无法有效缓解。
公开代码和数据集，供研究人员基准测试缓解技术。
analysis.experiments: 评估11个模型，比较隐性与显性偏见，测试安全提示、思维链和少样本提示的效果。
limitations: 基准可能受文化特征选择的主观性影响。
未评估模型在真实对话场景中的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ImplicitBBQ基准，通过文化特征线索评估LLM的隐性偏见，发现隐性偏见远高于显性偏见且现有对齐策略效果有限。

papers.title: Learning Spatial Structure from Pre-Beamforming Per-Antenna Range-Doppler Radar Data via Visibility-Aware Cross-Modal Supervision
papers.abstract: Automotive radar perception pipelines commonly construct angle-domain representations via beamforming before applying learning-based models. This work instead investigates a representational question: can meaningful spatial structure be learned directly from pre-beamforming per-antenna range-Doppler (RD) measurements? Experiments are conducted on a 6-TX x 8-RX (48 virtual antennas) commodity automotive radar employing an A/B chirp-sequence frequency-modulated continuous-wave (CS-FMCW) transmit scheme, in which the effective transmit aperture varies between chirps (single-TX vs. multi-TX), enabling controlled analysis of chirp-dependent transmit configurations. We operate on pre-beamforming per-antenna RD tensors using a dual-chirp shared-weight encoder trained in an end-to-end, fully data-driven manner, and evaluate spatial recoverability using bird's-eye-view (BEV) occupancy as a geometric probe rather than a performance-driven objective. Supervision is visibility-aware and cross-modal, derived from LiDAR with explicit modeling of the radar field-of-view and occlusion-aware LiDAR observability via ray-based visibility. Through chirp ablations (A-only, B-only, A+B), range-band analysis, and physics-aligned baselines, we assess how transmit configurations affect geometric recoverability. The results indicate that spatial structure can be learned directly from pre-beamforming per-antenna RD tensors without explicit angle-domain construction or hand-crafted signal-processing stages.

analysis.tldr: 从预波束成形的每天线距离-多普勒数据中直接学习空间结构，无需显式角度域构建。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统雷达感知流程依赖波束成形构建角度域表示，但这一步骤可能引入信息损失或计算开销，探索直接从原始每天线RD数据学习空间结构的可行性。
analysis.problem: 能否从预波束成形的每天线距离-多普勒张量中直接学习有意义的空间结构（如BEV占用）？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用双啁啾共享权重编码器，以端到端数据驱动方式处理预波束成形的每天线RD张量，并通过可见性感知的跨模态监督（来自LiDAR，含雷达视场和遮挡建模）训练，以BEV占用作为几何探针评估空间可恢复性。
contributions: 首次证明可从预波束成形的每天线RD张量直接学习空间结构，无需显式角度域构建或手工信号处理。
提出可见性感知的跨模态监督方法，利用LiDAR和射线可见性建模雷达视场与遮挡。
通过啁啾消融、距离带分析和物理对齐基线，系统评估不同发射配置对几何可恢复性的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在6-TX×8-RX（48虚拟天线）商用雷达上，采用A/B CS-FMCW发射方案，进行啁啾消融（A-only、B-only、A+B）、距离带分析和物理对齐基线实验。
limitations: 仅针对特定雷达硬件和发射方案，泛化性需验证。
依赖LiDAR作为跨模态监督，可能限制无LiDAR场景的应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从预波束成形的每天线距离-多普勒数据中直接学习空间结构，无需显式角度域构建。

papers.title: Enhancing Medical Visual Grounding via Knowledge-guided Spatial Prompts
papers.abstract: Medical Visual Grounding (MVG) aims to identify diagnostically relevant phrases from free-text radiology reports and localize their corresponding regions in medical images, providing interpretable visual evidence to support clinical decision-making. Although recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit promising multimodal reasoning ability, their grounding remains insufficient spatial precision, largely due to a lack of explicit localization priors when relying solely on latent embeddings. In this work, we analyze this limitation from an attention perspective and propose KnowMVG, a Knowledge-prior and global-local attention enhancement framework for MVG in VLMs that explicitly strengthens spatial awareness during decoding. Specifically, we present a knowledge-enhanced prompting strategy that encodes phrase related medical knowledge into compact embeddings, together with a global-local attention that jointly leverages coarse global information and refined local cues to guide precise region localization. localization. This design bridges high-level semantic understanding and fine-grained visual perception without introducing extra textual reasoning overhead. Extensive experiments on four MVG benchmarks demonstrate that our KnowMVG consistently outperforms existing approaches, achieving gains of 3.0% in AP50 and 2.6% in mIoU over prior state-of-the-art methods. Qualitative and ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of each component.

analysis.tldr: 提出KnowMVG框架，通过知识引导的空间提示和全局-局部注意力增强，提升医学视觉定位的空间精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学视觉定位（MVG）需要从放射学报告中定位诊断相关短语对应的图像区域，但现有VLM依赖隐式嵌入，缺乏显式定位先验，导致空间精度不足。
analysis.problem: 解决VLM在医学视觉定位中空间精度不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 从注意力角度分析，VLM仅依赖潜在嵌入时缺乏显式定位先验，导致空间定位不精确。
analysis.method: 提出KnowMVG框架，包含知识增强提示策略（将短语相关医学知识编码为紧凑嵌入）和全局-局部注意力机制（联合利用粗粒度全局信息和细粒度局部线索指导区域定位）。
contributions: 提出知识增强提示策略，将医学知识融入VLM解码过程。
设计全局-局部注意力机制，平衡全局语义和局部细节。
在四个MVG基准上取得SOTA，AP50提升3.0%，mIoU提升2.6%。
analysis.experiments: 在四个MVG基准上实验，KnowMVG优于现有方法，AP50提升3.0%，mIoU提升2.6%，并进行了消融研究验证各组件有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖外部医学知识库的质量和覆盖范围。
全局-局部注意力可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出KnowMVG框架，通过知识引导的空间提示和全局-局部注意力增强，提升医学视觉定位的空间精度。

papers.title: Night Eyes: A Reproducible Framework for Constellation-Based Corneal Reflection Matching
papers.abstract: Corneal reflection (glint) detection plays an important role in pupil-corneal reflection (P-CR) eye tracking, but in practice it is often handled as heuristics embedded within larger systems, making reproducibility difficult across hardware setups. We introduce a 2D geometry-driven, constellation-based pipeline for mulit-glint detection and matching, focusing on reproducibility and clear evaluation. Inspired by lost-in-space star identification, we treat glints as structured constellations rather than independent blobs. We propose a Similarity-Layout Alignment (SLA) procedure which adapts constellation matching to the specific constraints of multi-LED eye tracking. The framework brings together controlled over-detection, adaptive candidate fallback, appearance-aware scoring, and optional semantic layout priors while keeping detection and correspondence explicitly separated. Evaluated on a public multi-LED dataset, the system provides stable identity-preserving correspondence under noisy conditions. We release code, presets, and evaluation scripts to enable transparent replication, comparison, and dataset annotation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于星座匹配的角膜反射检测框架，提升眼动追踪的可复现性。
analysis.research_motivation: 角膜反射检测在眼动追踪中至关重要，但现有方法常作为启发式嵌入大系统，难以跨硬件复现。
analysis.problem: 解决多LED眼动追踪中角膜反射的稳定检测与匹配问题，确保可复现性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出2D几何驱动的星座匹配管道，包含相似性-布局对齐（SLA）过程，结合过检测、自适应候选回退、外观感知评分和语义布局先验。
contributions: 提出基于星座匹配的角膜反射检测框架，提升可复现性
引入相似性-布局对齐（SLA）过程适应多LED眼动追踪约束
开源代码、预设和评估脚本以促进透明复制和比较
analysis.experiments: 在公开多LED数据集上评估，系统在噪声条件下提供稳定的身份保持对应。
limitations: 仅针对多LED眼动追踪场景，可能不适用于单LED或非结构化光源
依赖预定义的星座模板，对LED布局变化适应性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于星座匹配的角膜反射检测框架，提升眼动追踪的可复现性。

papers.title: Lifting Unlabeled Internet-level Data for 3D Scene Understanding
papers.abstract: Annotated 3D scene data is scarce and expensive to acquire, while abundant unlabeled videos are readily available on the internet. In this paper, we demonstrate that carefully designed data engines can leverage web-curated, unlabeled videos to automatically generate training data, to facilitate end-to-end models in 3D scene understanding alongside human-annotated datasets. We identify and analyze bottlenecks in automated data generation, revealing critical factors that determine the efficiency and effectiveness of learning from unlabeled data. To validate our approach across different perception granularities, we evaluate on three tasks spanning low-level perception, i.e., 3D object detection and instance segmentation, to high-evel reasoning, i.e., 3D spatial Visual Question Answering (VQA) and Vision-Lanugage Navigation (VLN). Models trained on our generated data demonstrate strong zero-shot performance and show further improvement after finetuning. This demonstrates the viability of leveraging readily available web data as a path toward more capable scene understanding systems.

analysis.tldr: 利用互联网未标注视频自动生成训练数据，提升3D场景理解能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D场景标注数据稀缺且昂贵，而互联网上有大量未标注视频未被充分利用。
analysis.problem: 如何从互联网未标注视频中自动生成有效的训练数据，以辅助3D场景理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计数据引擎，从网络未标注视频自动生成训练数据，并与人工标注数据集结合训练端到端模型。
contributions: 提出利用互联网未标注视频自动生成训练数据的方法，降低对人工标注的依赖。
在多个3D任务上验证了生成数据的有效性，包括检测、分割、VQA和导航。
analysis.experiments: 在3D目标检测、实例分割、3D空间VQA和视觉语言导航任务上评估，模型在生成数据上训练后表现出强零样本性能，微调后进一步提升。
limitations: 自动生成数据可能存在噪声，影响模型性能。
方法可能依赖特定视频类型或场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用互联网未标注视频自动生成训练数据，提升3D场景理解能力。

papers.title: Combating Data Laundering in LLM Training
papers.abstract: Data rights owners can detect unauthorized data use in large language model (LLM) training by querying with proprietary samples. Often, superior performance (e.g., higher confidence or lower loss) on a sample relative to the untrained data implies it was part of the training corpus, as LLMs tend to perform better on data they have seen during training. However, this detection becomes fragile under data laundering, a practice of transforming the stylistic form of proprietary data, while preserving critical information to obfuscate data provenance. When an LLM is trained exclusively on such laundered variants, it no longer performs better on originals, erasing the signals that standard detections rely on. We counter this by inferring the unknown laundering transformation from black-box access to the target LLM and, via an auxiliary LLM, synthesizing queries that mimic the laundered data, even if rights owners have only the originals. As the search space of finding true laundering transformations is infinite, we abstract such a process into a high-level transformation goal (e.g., "lyrical rewriting") and concrete details (e.g., "with vivid imagery"), and introduce synthesis data reversion (SDR) that instantiates this abstraction. SDR first identifies the most probable goal for synthesis to narrow the search; it then iteratively refines details so that synthesized queries gradually elicit stronger detection signals from the target LLM. Evaluated on the MIMIR benchmark against diverse laundering practices and target LLM families (Pythia, Llama2, and Falcon), SDR consistently strengthens data misuse detection, providing a practical countermeasure to data laundering.

analysis.tldr: 提出SDR方法，通过推断数据清洗变换并合成查询，增强LLM训练数据盗用检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 数据清洗（data laundering）通过变换专有数据的形式来掩盖数据来源，使得标准检测方法失效，威胁数据权利保护。
analysis.problem: 如何检测经过数据清洗后的LLM训练数据盗用，即当LLM仅在清洗后的变体上训练时，原始样本不再表现出性能优势。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在训练过的数据上表现更好（如更高置信度或更低损失），但数据清洗会消除这一信号，使标准检测失效。
analysis.method: 提出合成数据反转（SDR）方法：从黑盒访问目标LLM推断未知清洗变换，通过辅助LLM合成模仿清洗数据的查询，将搜索抽象为高层变换目标和具体细节，先识别最可能的目标缩小搜索，再迭代细化细节以增强检测信号。
contributions: 形式化数据清洗问题并揭示其对检测的威胁
提出SDR方法，通过抽象变换目标和迭代细化合成查询来对抗数据清洗
在MIMIR基准上对多种清洗实践和目标LLM系列进行实验，验证SDR的有效性
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIR基准上评估，针对多种清洗实践和目标LLM系列（Pythia、Llama2、Falcon），SDR持续增强数据滥用检测。
limitations: 依赖辅助LLM的合成能力，可能受限于其生成质量
假设攻击者仅使用单一清洗变换，实际中可能组合多种变换
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SDR方法，通过推断数据清洗变换并合成查询，增强LLM训练数据盗用检测。

papers.title: Light-ResKAN: A Parameter-Sharing Lightweight KAN with Gram Polynomials for Efficient SAR Image Recognition
papers.abstract: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) image recognition is vital for disaster monitoring, military reconnaissance, and ocean observation. However, large SAR image sizes hinder deep learning deployment on resource-constrained edge devices, and existing lightweight models struggle to balance high-precision feature extraction with low computational requirements. The emerging Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) enhances fitting by replacing fixed activations with learnable ones, reducing parameters and computation. Inspired by KAN, we propose Light-ResKAN to achieve a better balance between precision and efficiency. First, Light-ResKAN modifies ResNet by replacing convolutions with KAN convolutions, enabling adaptive feature extraction for SAR images. Second, we use Gram Polynomials as activations, which are well-suited for SAR data to capture complex non-linear relationships. Third, we employ a parameter-sharing strategy: each kernel shares parameters per channel, preserving unique features while reducing parameters and FLOPs. Our model achieves 99.09%, 93.01%, and 97.26% accuracy on MSTAR, FUSAR-Ship, and SAR-ACD datasets, respectively. Experiments on MSTAR resized to $1024 \times 1024$ show that compared to VGG16, our model reduces FLOPs by $82.90 \times$ and parameters by $163.78 \times$. This work establishes an efficient solution for edge SAR image recognition.

analysis.tldr: 提出Light-ResKAN，用参数共享的Gram多项式KAN卷积替换ResNet卷积，在SAR图像识别上实现高精度与低计算量。
analysis.research_motivation: SAR图像尺寸大，深度学习模型难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上，现有轻量模型难以兼顾高精度特征提取和低计算需求。
analysis.problem: 如何在SAR图像识别中同时实现高精度和低计算开销，以适应边缘设备部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: KAN通过可学习激活函数减少参数和计算量，但直接应用于SAR图像仍需进一步优化。
analysis.method: 基于KAN改进ResNet：用KAN卷积替换标准卷积，采用Gram多项式作为激活函数，并引入参数共享策略（每个核按通道共享参数）。
contributions: 提出Light-ResKAN，将KAN卷积引入SAR图像识别，实现自适应特征提取。
采用Gram多项式激活函数，适合SAR数据非线性建模。
参数共享策略在保持独特特征的同时显著降低参数量和FLOPs。
analysis.experiments: 在MSTAR、FUSAR-Ship和SAR-ACD数据集上分别达到99.09%、93.01%和97.26%的准确率；在1024×1024的MSTAR上，相比VGG16，FLOPs降低82.90倍，参数量降低163.78倍。
limitations: 仅在SAR图像识别任务上验证，泛化性未知。
参数共享可能限制模型表达能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Light-ResKAN，用参数共享的Gram多项式KAN卷积替换ResNet卷积，在SAR图像识别上实现高精度与低计算量。

papers.title: FTPFusion: Frequency-Aware Infrared and Visible Video Fusion with Temporal Perturbation
papers.abstract: Infrared and visible video fusion plays a critical role in intelligent surveillance and low-light monitoring. However, maintaining temporal stability while preserving spatial detail remains a fundamental challenge. Existing methods either focus on frame-wise enhancement with limited temporal modeling or rely on heavy spatio-temporal aggregation that often sacrifices high-frequency details. In this paper, we propose FTPFusion, a frequency-aware infrared and visible video fusion method based on temporal perturbation and sparse cross-modal interaction. Specifically, FTPFusion decomposes the feature representations into high-frequency and low-frequency components for collaborative modeling. The high-frequency branch performs sparse cross-modal spatio-temporal interaction to capture motion-related context and complementary details. The low-frequency branch introduces a temporal perturbation strategy to enhance robustness against complex video variations, such as flickering, jitter, and local misalignment. Furthermore, we design an offset-aware temporal consistency constraint to explicitly stabilize cross-frame representations under temporal disturbances. Extensive experiments on multiple public benchmarks demonstrate that FTPFusion consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across multiple metrics in both spatial fidelity and temporal consistency. The source code will be available at https://github.com/ixilai/FTPFusion.

analysis.tldr: 提出频率感知的红外与可见光视频融合方法，通过时间扰动和稀疏跨模态交互提升时空一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 红外与可见光视频融合在智能监控和低光照监测中至关重要，但现有方法难以同时保持时间稳定性和空间细节，要么缺乏时间建模，要么依赖重时空聚合而丢失高频细节。
analysis.problem: 解决红外与可见光视频融合中时间稳定性与空间细节保持之间的权衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将特征分解为高频和低频分量，高频分支进行稀疏跨模态时空交互捕获运动上下文，低频分支引入时间扰动策略增强对闪烁、抖动等复杂变化的鲁棒性，并设计偏移感知时间一致性约束。
contributions: 提出频率感知的红外与可见光视频融合框架FTPFusion，结合时间扰动和稀疏跨模态交互。
设计偏移感知时间一致性约束，显式稳定跨帧表示。
analysis.experiments: 在多个公开基准上，FTPFusion在空间保真度和时间一致性指标上均优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能对极端运动或遮挡场景的鲁棒性有限。
计算复杂度可能较高，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频率感知的红外与可见光视频融合方法，通过时间扰动和稀疏跨模态交互提升时空一致性。

papers.title: Bayesian Elicitation with LLMs: Model Size Helps, Extra "Reasoning" Doesn't Always
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have been proposed as alternatives to human experts for estimating unknown quantities with associated uncertainty, a process known as Bayesian elicitation. We test this by asking eleven LLMs to estimate population statistics, such as health prevalence rates, personality trait distributions, and labor market figures, and to express their uncertainty as 95\% credible intervals. We vary each model's reasoning effort (low, medium, high) to test whether more "thinking" improves results. Our findings reveal three key results. First, larger, more capable models produce more accurate estimates, but increasing reasoning effort provides no consistent benefit. Second, all models are severely overconfident: their 95\% intervals contain the true value only 9--44\% of the time, far below the expected 95\%. Third, a statistical recalibration technique called conformal prediction can correct this overconfidence, expanding the intervals to achieve the intended coverage. In a preliminary experiment, giving models web search access degraded predictions for already-accurate models, while modestly improving predictions for weaker ones. Models performed well on commonly discussed topics but struggled with specialized health data. These results indicate that LLM uncertainty estimates require statistical correction before they can be used in decision-making.

analysis.tldr: LLM用于贝叶斯启发时，模型越大估计越准，但增加推理努力无一致收益，且所有模型严重过度自信，需用保形预测校准。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统贝叶斯启发依赖人类专家，成本高且主观；LLM作为替代方案具有潜力，但其不确定性估计的可靠性未知。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在贝叶斯启发任务中估计未知量及其不确定性的准确性、校准性，并探索改进方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型越大估计越准确，但增加推理努力（低/中/高）无一致收益；所有模型严重过度自信（95%区间实际覆盖率仅9-44%）；网络搜索对强模型有害、对弱模型略有帮助；模型在常见话题上表现好，但在专业健康数据上表现差。
analysis.method: 使用11个LLM估计人口统计量（健康患病率、人格特质分布、劳动力市场数据），以95%可信区间表达不确定性，并变化推理努力（低/中/高）；采用保形预测进行统计重校准。
contributions: 系统评估了不同规模LLM在贝叶斯启发任务中的表现，发现模型大小与准确性正相关但推理努力无益。
揭示了LLM不确定性估计的严重过度自信问题，并证明保形预测可有效校准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了初步实验：网络搜索对强模型有害、对弱模型略有帮助。
limitations: 仅测试了人口统计量估计，可能不适用于其他领域。
未深入分析不同推理努力设置对内部推理过程的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM用于贝叶斯启发时，模型越大估计越准，但增加推理努力无一致收益，且所有模型严重过度自信，需用保形预测校准。

papers.title: SHARC: Reference point driven Spherical Harmonic Representation for Complex Shapes
papers.abstract: We propose SHARC, a novel framework that synthesizes arbitrary, genus-agnostic shapes by means of a collection of Spherical Harmonic (SH) representations of distance fields. These distance fields are anchored at optimally placed reference points in the interior volume of the surface in a way that maximizes learning of the finer details of the surface. To achieve this, we employ a cost function that jointly maximizes sparsity and centrality in terms of positioning, as well as visibility of the surface from their location. For each selected reference point, we sample the visible distance field to the surface geometry via ray-casting and compute the SH coefficients using the Fast Spherical Harmonic Transform (FSHT). To enhance geometric fidelity, we apply a configurable low-pass filter to the coefficients and refine the output using a local consistency constraint based on proximity. Evaluation of SHARC against state-of-the-art methods demonstrates that the proposed method outperforms existing approaches in both reconstruction accuracy and time efficiency without sacrificing model parsimony. The source code is available at https://github.com/POSE-Lab/SHARC.

analysis.tldr: SHARC 通过锚定于最优参考点的球谐距离场集合，实现任意拓扑复杂形状的高效精确重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有形状表示方法在重建复杂拓扑或精细细节时往往精度不足或效率低下，需要一种既能保持模型简洁又能高效捕捉细节的表示方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用球谐函数高效表示任意拓扑的复杂形状，同时保证重建精度和计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SHARC 框架，在形状内部优化放置参考点，通过射线投射采样可见距离场，利用快速球谐变换计算系数，并应用可配置低通滤波和局部一致性约束来增强几何保真度。
contributions: 提出一种基于参考点驱动球谐表示的任意拓扑形状合成框架。
设计联合优化稀疏性、中心性和表面可见性的代价函数来选择参考点。
在重建精度和时间效率上超越现有方法，且保持模型简洁性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在重建精度和时间效率上优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能对高度非凸或自交形状的参考点优化存在困难。
低通滤波可能丢失极高频细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SHARC 通过锚定于最优参考点的球谐距离场集合，实现任意拓扑复杂形状的高效精确重建。

papers.title: ProVG: Progressive Visual Grounding via Language Decoupling for Remote Sensing Imagery
papers.abstract: Remote sensing visual grounding (RSVG) aims to localize objects in remote sensing imagery according to natural language expressions. Previous methods typically rely on sentence-level vision-language alignment, which struggles to exploit fine-grained linguistic cues, such as \textit{spatial relations} and \textit{object attributes}, that are crucial for distinguishing objects with similar characteristics. Importantly, these cues play distinct roles across different grounding stages and should be leveraged accordingly to provide more explicit guidance. In this work, we propose \textbf{ProVG}, a novel RSVG framework that improves localization accuracy by decoupling language expressions into global context, spatial relations, and object attributes. To integrate these linguistic cues, ProVG employs a simple yet effective progressive cross-modal modulator, which dynamically modulates visual attention through a \textit{survey-locate-verify} scheme, enabling coarse-to-fine vision-language alignment. In addition, ProVG incorporates a cross-scale fusion module to mitigate the large-scale variations in remote sensing imagery, along with a language-guided calibration decoder to refine cross-modal alignment during prediction. A unified multi-task head further enables ProVG to support both referring expression comprehension and segmentation tasks. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks, \textit{i.e.}, RRSIS-D and RISBench, demonstrate that ProVG consistently outperforms existing methods, achieving new state-of-the-art performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出ProVG框架，通过解耦语言表达为全局上下文、空间关系和物体属性，实现遥感图像的渐进式视觉定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RSVG方法依赖句子级视觉-语言对齐，难以利用细粒度语言线索（如空间关系和物体属性），而这些线索在不同定位阶段作用不同，需要针对性利用以提高定位精度。
analysis.problem: 如何有效解耦语言表达中的细粒度线索，并实现粗到细的视觉-语言对齐，以提升遥感图像中目标定位的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ProVG框架，包含渐进式跨模态调制器（采用survey-locate-verify方案）、跨尺度融合模块、语言引导校准解码器和统一多任务头。
contributions: 提出语言解耦策略，将表达分解为全局上下文、空间关系和物体属性。
设计渐进式跨模态调制器，实现粗到细的视觉-语言对齐。
在RRSIS-D和RISBench上达到新SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在RRSIS-D和RISBench两个基准上进行了实验，ProVG一致优于现有方法，达到新SOTA。
limitations: 可能对复杂语言表达的解耦效果有限。
渐进式方案可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ProVG框架，通过解耦语言表达为全局上下文、空间关系和物体属性，实现遥感图像的渐进式视觉定位。

papers.title: Low-Effort Jailbreak Attacks Against Text-to-Image Safety Filters
papers.abstract: Text-to-image generative models are widely deployed in creative tools and online platforms. To mitigate misuse, these systems rely on safety filters and moderation pipelines that aim to block harmful or policy violating content. In this work we show that modern text-to-image models remain vulnerable to low-effort jailbreak attacks that require only natural language prompts. We present a systematic study of prompt-based strategies that bypass safety filters without model access, optimization, or adversarial training. We introduce a taxonomy of visual jailbreak techniques including artistic reframing, material substitution, pseudo-educational framing, lifestyle aesthetic camouflage, and ambiguous action substitution. These strategies exploit weaknesses in prompt moderation and visual safety filtering by masking unsafe intent within benign semantic contexts. We evaluate these attacks across several state-of-the-art text-to-image systems and demonstrate that simple linguistic modifications can reliably evade existing safeguards and produce restricted imagery. Our findings highlight a critical gap between surface-level prompt filtering and the semantic understanding required to detect adversarial intent in generative media systems. Across all tested models and attack categories we observe an attack success rate (ASR) of up to 74.47%.

analysis.tldr: 通过自然语言提示绕过文本到图像模型安全过滤器的低难度越狱攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到图像模型广泛部署，但安全过滤器易被绕过，现有防御依赖模型访问或对抗训练，缺乏对简单语言攻击的系统研究。
analysis.problem: 揭示并系统评估仅需自然语言提示即可绕过文本到图像安全过滤器的低难度越狱攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出视觉越狱技术分类，包括艺术重构、材料替换、伪教育框架、生活方式美学伪装和模糊动作替换，通过将不安全意图隐藏在良性语义上下文中绕过安全过滤器。
contributions: 系统研究了仅需自然语言提示的低难度越狱攻击，无需模型访问或优化。
提出了视觉越狱技术分类，并展示了在多个先进系统上的攻击成功率高达74.47%。
analysis.experiments: 在多个最先进的文本到图像系统上评估，攻击成功率（ASR）高达74.47%。
limitations: 可能未考虑多模态或对抗性训练防御。
攻击策略可能随防御更新而失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过自然语言提示绕过文本到图像模型安全过滤器的低难度越狱攻击。

papers.title: GS^2: Graph-based Spatial Distribution Optimization for Compact 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has demonstrated breakthrough performance in novel view synthesis and real-time rendering. Nevertheless, its practicality is constrained by the high memory cost due to a huge number of Gaussian points. Many pruning-based 3DGS variants have been proposed for memory saving, but often compromise spatial consistency and may lead to rendering artifacts. To address this issue, we propose graph-based spatial distribution optimization for compact 3D Gaussian Splatting (GS\textasciicircum2), which enhances reconstruction quality by optimizing the spatial distribution of Gaussian points. Specifically, we introduce an evidence lower bound (ELBO)-based adaptive densification strategy that automatically controls the densification process. In addition, an opacity-aware progressive pruning strategy is proposed to further reduce memory consumption by dynamically removing low-opacity Gaussian points. Furthermore, we propose a graph-based feature encoding module to adjust the spatial distribution via feature-guided point shifting. Extensive experiments validate that GS\textasciicircum2 achieves a compact Gaussian representation while delivering superior rendering quality. Compared with 3DGS, it achieves higher PSNR with only about 12.5\% Gaussian points. Furthermore, it outperforms all compared baselines in both rendering quality and memory efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出图引导空间分布优化方法，在保持渲染质量的同时大幅压缩3D高斯点数量。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS在视图合成和实时渲染中表现优异，但大量高斯点导致高内存成本，现有剪枝方法常牺牲空间一致性并产生渲染伪影。
analysis.problem: 如何在减少高斯点数量的同时保持或提升渲染质量，避免空间不一致和伪影。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于图的紧凑3D高斯泼溅方法GS²，包括ELBO自适应稠密化策略、不透明度感知渐进剪枝策略和图特征编码模块，通过特征引导点移位优化空间分布。
contributions: 提出ELBO自适应稠密化策略自动控制稠密化过程
提出不透明度感知渐进剪枝策略动态移除低不透明度高斯点
提出图特征编码模块通过特征引导点移位调整空间分布
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上验证，GS²仅用约12.5%的高斯点即可达到比3DGS更高的PSNR，在渲染质量和内存效率上均优于所有基线。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景的泛化性需进一步验证
图特征编码模块的计算开销未在摘要中说明
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图引导空间分布优化方法，在保持渲染质量的同时大幅压缩3D高斯点数量。

papers.title: A3R: Agentic Affordance Reasoning via Cross-Dimensional Evidence in 3D Gaussian Scenes
papers.abstract: Affordance reasoning in 3D Gaussian scenes aims to identify the region that supports the action specified by a given text instruction in complex environments. Existing methods typically cast this problem as one-shot prediction from static scene observations, assuming sufficient evidence is already available for reasoning. However, in complex 3D scenes, many failure cases arise not from weak prediction capacity, but from incomplete task-relevant evidence under fixed observations. To address this limitation, we reformulate fine-grained affordance reasoning as a sequential evidence acquisition process, where ambiguity is progressively reduced through complementary 3D geometric and 2D semantic evidence. Building on this formulation, we propose A3R, an agentic affordance reasoning framework that enables an MLLM-based policy to iteratively select evidence acquisition actions and update the affordance belief through cross-dimensional evidence acquisition. To optimize such sequential decision making, we further introduce a GRPO-based policy learning strategy that improves evidence acquisition efficiency and reasoning accuracy. Extensive experiments on scene-level benchmarks show that A3R consistently surpasses static one-shot baselines, demonstrating the advantage of agentic cross-dimensional evidence acquisition for fine-grained affordance reasoning in complex 3D Gaussian scenes.

analysis.tldr: 提出A3R框架，通过智能体跨维度证据获取实现3D高斯场景中的细粒度可操作区域推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将可操作区域推理视为静态单次预测，但在复杂3D场景中，固定观测下任务相关证据不完整导致推理失败，需要动态证据获取。
analysis.problem: 解决3D高斯场景中因观测证据不完整导致的细粒度可操作区域推理失败问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 失败案例主要源于固定观测下任务相关证据不完整，而非预测能力不足。
analysis.method: 提出A3R框架，基于MLLM的策略智能体迭代选择证据获取动作，通过跨维度（3D几何和2D语义）证据更新可操作区域信念，并使用GRPO优化策略学习。
contributions: 将细粒度可操作区域推理重新定义为序列证据获取过程，通过跨维度证据逐步消除歧义。
提出A3R框架，结合MLLM策略和GRPO优化，实现高效的跨维度证据获取和推理。
analysis.experiments: 在场景级基准上，A3R一致超越静态单次基线方法，展示了智能体跨维度证据获取的优势。
limitations: 可能依赖MLLM的推理能力，对复杂指令理解有限。
GRPO策略学习可能需要大量交互数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出A3R框架，通过智能体跨维度证据获取实现3D高斯场景中的细粒度可操作区域推理。

papers.title: HieraVid: Hierarchical Token Pruning for Fast Video Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Video Large Language Models (VideoLLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in video understanding, yet the massive number of input video tokens incurs a significant computational burden for deployment. Existing methods mainly prune video tokens at input level while neglecting the inherent information structure embedded in videos and large language models (LLMs). To address this, we propose HieraVid, a hierarchical pruning framework that progressively and dynamically reduces visual redundancy. Based on two observations that videos possess the segment-frame structure and LLMs internally propagate multi-modal information unidirectionally, we decompose pruning into three levels: 1) segment-level, where video tokens are first temporally segmented and spatially merged; 2) frame-level, where similar frames within the same segment are jointly pruned to preserve diversity; 3) layer-level, redundancy gradually shrinks as LLM layer increases w/o compromising performance. We conduct extensive experiments on four widely used video understanding benchmarks to comprehensively evaluate the effectiveness of HieraVid. Remarkably, with only 30% of tokens retained, HieraVid achieves new state-of-the-art performance, while maintaining over 98% and 99% of the performance of LLaVA-Video-7B and LLaVA-OneVision-7B, respectively.

analysis.tldr: HieraVid通过层次化剪枝框架，仅保留30%视频token即可保持甚至提升VideoLLM性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频大模型输入token数量巨大，导致计算负担重，现有方法主要在输入层剪枝，忽略了视频内在结构（段-帧）和LLM内部信息单向传播特性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著牺牲性能的前提下，高效减少视频大模型中的冗余视觉token。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到视频具有段-帧结构，且LLM内部多模态信息单向传播，冗余随层数增加自然减少。
analysis.method: 提出HieraVid层次化剪枝框架，包含三个级别：段级（时间分段+空间合并）、帧级（段内相似帧联合剪枝）、层级（随层数增加逐步剪枝）。
contributions: 提出层次化剪枝框架，利用视频段-帧结构和LLM内部信息传播特性。
仅保留30%token即达到SOTA，且保持LLaVA-Video-7B和LLaVA-OneVision-7B的98%和99%性能。
analysis.experiments: 在四个广泛使用的视频理解基准上评估，保留30%token时达到新SOTA。
limitations: 可能对长视频或复杂场景的剪枝策略需要进一步验证。
层次化剪枝的阈值选择可能依赖经验或额外调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HieraVid通过层次化剪枝框架，仅保留30%视频token即可保持甚至提升VideoLLM性能。

papers.title: ASPECT: Node-Level Adaptive Spectral Fusion for Graph Contrastive Learning
papers.abstract: Spectral graph contrastive learning often constructs low- and high-frequency views to capture complementary graph signals, but these views are commonly combined by graph-level or node-agnostic fusion rules. We show that graph-level fusion can incur irreducible regret on mixed graphs with separated node-wise spectral preferences. Motivated by this result, we propose ASPECT, a spectral graph contrastive learning method that adaptively fuses low- and high-frequency views at the node level. ASPECT learns a node-wise spectral policy and regularizes it using channel-wise contrastive evidence, enabling different nodes to use different spectral mixtures. We further introduce ASPECT-S, an optional stability-aware extension that uses generated graph-structure and feature perturbations to obtain empirical channel-wise sensitivity estimates, together with a Rayleigh-based spectral search bias for producing informative perturbations. Experiments on homophilic and heterophilic benchmarks show that ASPECT improves representation quality over competitive spectral and graph contrastive baselines, while ASPECT-S further improves performance under joint graph-structure and feature perturbations.

analysis.tldr: 提出节点级自适应频谱融合方法ASPECT，通过学习节点级频谱策略和通道对比正则化，提升图对比学习在混合图上的表示质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有频谱图对比学习通常采用图级或节点无关的融合规则来组合低高频视图，但在节点频谱偏好分离的混合图上会导致不可约的遗憾，限制了表示质量。
analysis.problem: 如何实现节点级别的自适应频谱融合，以捕捉不同节点对低高频信号的差异化偏好，从而提升图对比学习的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 图级融合在混合图上会引入不可约的遗憾，因为不同节点具有分离的频谱偏好，统一融合规则无法适应这种异质性。
analysis.method: 提出ASPECT方法，学习节点级频谱策略，并通过通道对比证据进行正则化，实现节点自适应的低高频视图融合；扩展ASPECT-S利用图结构和特征扰动估计通道敏感性，并引入瑞利频谱搜索偏置生成信息性扰动。
contributions: 理论分析表明图级频谱融合在混合图上存在不可约遗憾，为节点级自适应融合提供动机。
提出ASPECT，一种节点级自适应频谱融合方法，通过可学习的频谱策略和通道对比正则化实现。
引入ASPECT-S，一种稳定性感知扩展，利用扰动和瑞利搜索偏置提升鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在同质性和异质性基准上，ASPECT优于竞争性的频谱和图对比基线，ASPECT-S在联合图结构和特征扰动下进一步提升性能。
limitations: 可能对大规模图的计算开销较高，因为需要学习节点级策略。
稳定性扩展ASPECT-S依赖于扰动生成，可能引入额外超参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出节点级自适应频谱融合方法ASPECT，通过学习节点级频谱策略和通道对比正则化，提升图对比学习在混合图上的表示质量。

papers.title: GeoAI Agency Primitives
papers.abstract: We present ongoing research on agency primitives for GeoAI assistants -- core capabilities that connect Foundation models to the artifact-centric, human-in-the-loop workflows where GIS practitioners actually work. Despite advances in satellite image captioning, visual question answering, and promptable segmentation, these capabilities have not translated into productivity gains for practitioners who spend most of their time producing vector layers, raster maps, and cartographic products. The gap is not model capability alone but the absence of an agency layer that supports iterative collaboration. We propose a vocabulary of $9$ primitives for such a layer -- including navigation, perception, geo-referenced memory, and dual modeling -- along with a benchmark that measures human productivity. Our goal is a vocabulary that makes agentic assistance in GIS implementable, testable, and comparable.

analysis.tldr: 提出GeoAI助手代理原语，连接基础模型与GIS实际工作流，并构建生产力基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管卫星图像描述、视觉问答和可提示分割等模型能力取得进展，但GIS从业者主要时间花在生成矢量图层、栅格地图和制图产品上，现有能力未能转化为生产力提升，原因是缺乏支持迭代协作的代理层。
analysis.problem: 现有GeoAI模型能力与GIS从业者实际工作流之间存在鸿沟，缺少一个可连接基础模型与人工参与工作流的代理原语层。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当前模型能力（如图像描述、VQA、分割）未带来生产力提升，瓶颈在于缺乏支持迭代协作的代理层，而非模型能力本身。
analysis.method: 提出9种代理原语（包括导航、感知、地理参考记忆、双建模等），并构建衡量人类生产力的基准。
contributions: 提出9种GeoAI代理原语词汇，使GIS中的代理辅助可实施、可测试、可比较。
构建衡量人类生产力的基准，用于评估代理原语的实际效果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 原语词汇可能不完整，需进一步扩展。
基准仅衡量生产力，未覆盖其他质量指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GeoAI助手代理原语，连接基础模型与GIS实际工作流，并构建生产力基准。

papers.title: MAR-MAER: Metric-Aware and Ambiguity-Adaptive Autoregressive Image Generation
papers.abstract: Autoregressive (AR) models have demonstrated significant success in the realm of text-to-image generation. However, they usually face two major challenges. Firstly, the generated images may not always meet the quality standards expected by humans. Furthermore, these models face difficulty when dealing with ambiguous prompts that could be interpreted in several valid ways. To address these issues, we introduce MAR-MAER, an innovative hierarchical autoregressive framework. It combines two main components. It is a metric-aware embedding regularization method. The other one is a probabilistic latent model used for handling ambiguous semantics. Our method utilizes a lightweight projection head, which is trained with an adaptive kernel regression loss function. This aligns the model's internal representations with human-preferred quality metrics, such as CLIPScore and HPSv2. As a result, the embedding space that is learned more accurately reflects human judgment. We are also introducing a conditional variational module. This approach incorporates an aspect of controlled randomness within the hierarchical token generation process. This capability allows the model to produce a diverse array of coherent images based on ambiguous or open-ended prompts. We conducted extensive experiments using COCO and a newly developed Ambiguous-Prompt Benchmark. The results show that MAR-MAER achieves excellent performance in both metric consistency and semantic flexibility. It exceeds the baseline Hi-MAR model's performance, showing an improvement of +1.6 in CLIPScore and +5.3 in HPSv2. For unclear inputs, it produces a notably wider range of outputs. These findings have been confirmed through both human evaluation and automated metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出度量感知与歧义自适应的自回归图像生成框架，通过嵌入正则化和条件变分模块提升图像质量与语义多样性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归文本到图像生成模型生成的图像质量可能不满足人类期望，且难以处理可多种解释的歧义提示。
analysis.problem: 解决自回归图像生成中图像质量与人类偏好不一致，以及歧义提示下生成多样性不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MAR-MAER框架，包含度量感知嵌入正则化（使用自适应核回归损失对齐CLIPScore和HPSv2）和条件变分模块（在层次化token生成中引入受控随机性）。
contributions: 提出度量感知嵌入正则化方法，使模型内部表示与人类偏好质量指标对齐。
引入条件变分模块，增强歧义提示下的生成多样性。
在COCO和新歧义提示基准上取得CLIPScore +1.6、HPSv2 +5.3的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在COCO和Ambiguous-Prompt Benchmark上进行实验，通过人类评估和自动指标验证，相比Hi-MAR基线在CLIPScore提升1.6，HPSv2提升5.3。
limitations: 可能依赖特定质量指标（CLIPScore、HPSv2），泛化性待验证。
歧义处理模块的随机性控制可能引入不稳定。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出度量感知与歧义自适应的自回归图像生成框架，通过嵌入正则化和条件变分模块提升图像质量与语义多样性。

papers.title: Combining Boundary Supervision and Segment-Level Regularization for Fine-Grained Action Segmentation
papers.abstract: Recent progress in Temporal Action Segmentation (TAS) has increasingly relied on complex architectures, which can hinder practical deployment. We present a lightweight dual-loss training framework that improves fine-grained segmentation quality with only one additional output channel and two auxiliary loss terms, requiring minimal architectural modification. Our approach combines a boundary-regression loss that promotes accurate temporal localization via a single-channel boundary prediction and a CDF-based segment-level regularization loss that encourages coherent within-segment structure by matching cumulative distributions over predicted and ground-truth segments. The framework is architecture-agnostic and can be integrated into existing TAS models (e.g., MS-TCN, C2F-TCN, FACT) as a training-time loss function. Across three benchmark datasets, the proposed method improves segment-level consistency and boundary quality, yielding higher F1 and Edit scores across three different models. Frame-wise accuracy remains largely unchanged, highlighting that precise segmentation can be achieved through simple loss design rather than heavier architectures or inference-time refinements.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级双损失训练框架，通过边界回归损失和分段级正则化损失提升时序动作分割的细粒度质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时序动作分割方法依赖复杂架构，阻碍实际部署，需要更轻量高效的方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持架构轻量的前提下提升细粒度动作分割的边界定位精度和分段内部一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合边界回归损失（单通道边界预测）和基于CDF的分段级正则化损失（匹配预测与真实分段累积分布），作为训练时损失函数集成到现有TAS模型中。
contributions: 提出架构无关的轻量级双损失训练框架，仅需额外一个输出通道和两个辅助损失项。
在三个基准数据集上，集成到MS-TCN、C2F-TCN、FACT等模型后，显著提升F1和Edit分数，同时保持帧级准确率不变。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准数据集上，使用MS-TCN、C2F-TCN、FACT三种模型进行实验，报告了F1和Edit分数的提升，帧级准确率基本不变。
limitations: 帧级准确率未提升，可能对需要高帧级精度的任务不够。
仅在有限模型和数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级双损失训练框架，通过边界回归损失和分段级正则化损失提升时序动作分割的细粒度质量。

papers.title: Enhanced Polarization Locking in VCSELs
papers.abstract: While optical injection locking (OIL) of vertical-cavity surface-emitting lasers (VCSELs) has been widely studied in the past, the polarization dynamics of OIL have received far less attention. Recent studies suggest that polarization locking via OIL could enable novel computational applications such as polarization-encoded Ising computers. However, the inherent polarization preference and limited polarization switchability of VCSELs hinder their use for such purposes. To address these challenges, we fabricate VCSELs with tailored oxide aperture designs and combine these with bias current tuning to study the overall impact on polarization locking. Experimental results demonstrate that this approach reduces the required injection power (to as low as 3.6 μW) and expands the locking range. To investigate the impact of the approach, the spin-flip model (SFM) is used to analyze the effects of amplitude anisotropy and bias current on polarization locking, demonstrating strong coherence with experimental results.

analysis.tldr: 通过定制氧化孔径设计和偏置电流调谐，增强VCSEL偏振锁定，降低注入功率并扩展锁定范围。
analysis.research_motivation: 偏振锁定在偏振编码伊辛计算机等新型计算应用中具有潜力，但VCSEL固有的偏振偏好和有限的偏振可切换性限制了其应用。
analysis.problem: VCSEL偏振锁定所需的注入功率高、锁定范围窄，且偏振切换能力不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 制造具有定制氧化孔径设计的VCSEL，并结合偏置电流调谐，研究其对偏振锁定的整体影响；使用自旋翻转模型分析振幅各向异性和偏置电流的影响。
contributions: 提出通过定制氧化孔径和偏置电流调谐增强VCSEL偏振锁定的方法
实验证明该方法可将所需注入功率降低至3.6 μW并扩展锁定范围
analysis.experiments: 实验结果表明该方法降低了所需注入功率（低至3.6 μW）并扩展了锁定范围；自旋翻转模型分析与实验结果高度一致。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定VCSEL设计
未讨论实际计算应用中的集成问题
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过定制氧化孔径设计和偏置电流调谐，增强VCSEL偏振锁定，降低注入功率并扩展锁定范围。

papers.title: Efficient Constraint Generation for Stochastic Shortest Path Problems
papers.abstract: Stochastic Shortest Path problems (SSPs) are traditionally solved by computing each state's cost-to-go by applying Bellman backups. A Bellman backup updates a state's cost-to-go by iterating through every applicable action, computing the cost-to-go after applying each one, and selecting a minimal action's cost-to-go. State-of-the-art algorithms use heuristic functions; these give an initial estimate of costs-to-go, and lets the algorithm apply Bellman backups only to promising states, determined by low estimated costs-to-go. However, each Bellman backup still considers all applicable actions, even if the heuristic tells us that some of these actions are too expensive, with the effect that such algorithms waste time on unhelpful actions. To address this gap we present a technique that uses the heuristic to avoid expensive actions, by reframing heuristic search in terms of linear programming and introducing an efficient implementation of constraint generation for SSPs. We present CG-iLAO*, a new algorithm that adapts iLAO* with our novel technique, and considers only 40% of iLAO*'s actions on many problems, and as few as 1% on some. Consequently, CG-iLAO* computes on average 3.5x fewer costs-to-go for actions than the state-of-the-art iLAO* and LRTDP, enabling it to solve problems faster an average of 2.8x and 3.7x faster, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 通过线性规划约束生成技术，在随机最短路径问题中仅考虑40%的动作，实现2.8-3.7倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统SSP算法在每次Bellman备份中需遍历所有动作，即使启发式函数表明某些动作成本过高，仍会浪费计算资源，导致求解效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何利用启发式信息避免在SSP求解中评估不必要的昂贵动作，从而减少计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将启发式搜索重新表述为线性规划问题，并引入高效的约束生成技术，在iLAO*基础上提出CG-iLAO*算法，动态生成约束以跳过昂贵动作。
contributions: 提出一种基于线性规划约束生成的启发式搜索框架，用于SSP问题。
设计CG-iLAO*算法，平均仅考虑iLAO* 40%的动作，部分问题低至1%，实现2.8-3.7倍加速。
analysis.experiments: 在多个SSP问题上测试，CG-iLAO*相比iLAO*和LRTDP平均加速2.8倍和3.7倍，动作评估量减少至40%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量启发式函数，否则约束生成效果有限。
线性规划求解可能引入额外开销，在特定问题中可能不显著。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过线性规划约束生成技术，在随机最短路径问题中仅考虑40%的动作，实现2.8-3.7倍加速。

papers.title: Beyond Detection: Ethical Foundations for Automated Dyslexic Error Attribution
papers.abstract: Dyslexic spelling errors exhibit systematic phonological and orthographic patterns that distinguish them from the errors produced by typically developing writers. While this observation has motivated dyslexic-specific spell-checking and assistive writing tools, prior work has focused predominantly on error correction rather than attribution, and has largely neglected the ethical risks. The risk of harmful labelling, covert screening, algorithmic bias, and institutional misuse that automated classification of learners entails requires the development of robust ethical and legal frameworks for research in this area. This paper addresses both gaps. We formulate dyslexic error attribution as a binary classification task. Given a misspelt word and its correct target form, determine whether the error pattern is characteristic of a dyslexic or non-dyslexic writer. We develop a comprehensive feature set capturing orthographic, phonological, and morphological properties of each error, and propose a twin-input neural model evaluated against traditional machine learning baselines under writer-independent conditions. The neural model achieves 93.01% accuracy and an F1-score of 94.01%, with phonetically plausible errors and vowel confusions emerging as the strongest attribution signals. We situate these technical results within an explicit ethics-first framework, analysing fairness across subgroups, the interpretability requirements of educational deployment, and the conditions, consent, transparency, human oversight, and recourse, under which a system could be responsibly used. We provide concrete guidelines for ethical deployment and an open discussion of the systems limitations and misuse potential. Our results demonstrate that dyslexic error attribution is feasible at high accuracy while underscoring that feasibility alone is insufficient for deployment in high-stakes educational contexts.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种高精度诵读困难错误归因模型，并强调伦理框架对教育部署的必要性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有辅助写作工具主要关注错误纠正而非归因，且忽视了自动化分类带来的伦理风险（如有害标签、隐性筛查、算法偏见和机构滥用），亟需建立鲁棒的伦理与法律框架。
analysis.problem: 将诵读困难错误归因形式化为二分类任务：给定拼写错误及其正确形式，判断错误模式是否具有诵读困难特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 诵读困难拼写错误表现出系统的语音和正字法模式，与典型发展写作者的错误不同；音位合理错误和元音混淆是最强的归因信号。
analysis.method: 开发了包含正字法、语音和形态学属性的综合特征集，并提出了双输入神经网络模型，在写作者独立条件下与传统机器学习基线进行比较。
contributions: 首次将诵读困难错误归因作为二分类任务系统研究，并达到93.01%准确率和94.01% F1分数。
提出了明确的伦理优先框架，分析了公平性、可解释性、知情同意、透明度、人类监督和补救措施等关键问题，并提供了伦理部署指南。
analysis.experiments: 在写作者独立条件下，神经网络模型达到93.01%准确率和94.01% F1分数，音位合理错误和元音混淆是最强归因信号。摘要未提供数据集规模、基线方法具体名称等细节。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在不同人口统计子组上的公平性具体结果。
伦理框架为定性分析，缺乏定量评估或用户研究验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种高精度诵读困难错误归因模型，并强调伦理框架对教育部署的必要性。

papers.title: Semantic Richness or Geometric Reasoning? The Fragility of VLM's Visual Invariance
papers.abstract: This work investigates the fundamental fragility of state-of-the-art Vision-Language Models (VLMs) under basic geometric transformations. While modern VLMs excel at semantic tasks such as recognizing objects in canonical orientations and describing complex scenes, they exhibit systematic failures at a more fundamental level: lack of robust spatial invariance and equivariance required to reliably determine object identity under simple rotations, scaling, and identity transformations. We demonstrate this limitation through a systematic evaluation across diverse visual domains, including symbolic sketches, natural photographs, and abstract art. Performance drops sharply as semantic content becomes sparse, and this behavior is observed across architectures, model capacities, and prompting strategies. Overall, our results reveal a systematic gap between semantic understanding and spatial reasoning in current VLMs, highlighting the need for stronger geometric grounding in future multimodal systems.

analysis.tldr: VLMs在基础几何变换下缺乏视觉不变性，语义理解与空间推理存在系统性差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前VLM在语义任务上表现优异，但在简单几何变换（如旋转、缩放）下鲁棒性不足，限制了其在需要空间推理的真实场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: VLM在基本几何变换下缺乏鲁棒的空间不变性和等变性，导致物体身份识别失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 性能在语义内容稀疏时急剧下降，且该行为跨架构、模型容量和提示策略一致。
analysis.method: 通过系统评估，在符号草图、自然照片和抽象艺术等视觉域中测试VLM在旋转、缩放和恒等变换下的表现。
contributions: 揭示了VLM在几何变换下的系统性脆弱性
指出语义理解与空间推理之间的差距
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提出缓解方法
评估可能限于特定变换类型
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLMs在基础几何变换下缺乏视觉不变性，语义理解与空间推理存在系统性差距。

papers.title: CANDI: Curated Test-Time Adaptation for Multivariate Time-Series Anomaly Detection Under Distribution Shift
papers.abstract: Multivariate time-series anomaly detection (MTSAD) aims to identify deviations from normality in multivariate time-series and is critical in real-world applications. However, in real-world deployments, distribution shifts are ubiquitous and cause severe performance degradation in pre-trained anomaly detector. Test-time adaptation (TTA) updates a pre-trained model on-the-fly using only unlabeled test data, making it promising for addressing this challenge. In this study, we propose CANDI (Curated test-time adaptation for multivariate time-series ANomaly detection under DIstribution shift), a novel TTA framework that selectively identifies and adapts to potential false positives while preserving pre-trained knowledge. CANDI introduces a False Positive Mining (FPM) strategy to curate adaptation samples based on anomaly scores and latent similarity, and incorporates a plug-and-play Spatiotemporally-Aware Normality Adaptation (SANA) module for structurally informed model updates. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CANDI significantly improves the performance of MTSAD under distribution shift, improving AUROC up to 14% while using fewer adaptation samples.

analysis.tldr: 提出CANDI框架，通过选择性适应假阳性样本来提升多变量时间序列异常检测在分布偏移下的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多变量时间序列异常检测在实际部署中常因分布偏移导致性能严重下降，而现有测试时自适应方法缺乏针对性，需要一种能有效应对分布偏移且保留预训练知识的方法。
analysis.problem: 解决预训练异常检测器在分布偏移下性能退化的问题，通过测试时自适应选择性识别和适应假阳性样本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分布偏移导致预训练异常检测器性能严重下降，且测试时自适应中无标签数据可能包含假阳性样本，影响适应效果。
analysis.method: 提出CANDI框架，包含假阳性挖掘策略（FPM）和即插即用的时空感知正态性适应模块（SANA）。FPM基于异常分数和潜在相似性筛选适应样本，SANA进行结构信息引导的模型更新。
contributions: 提出CANDI，首个针对多变量时间序列异常检测在分布偏移下的测试时自适应框架。
设计假阳性挖掘策略（FPM）和时空感知正态性适应模块（SANA），有效提升性能并减少适应样本数量。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，CANDI显著提升AUROC最高达14%，且使用更少的适应样本。
limitations: 可能依赖异常检测器的初始质量。
FPM策略的阈值选择可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CANDI框架，通过选择性适应假阳性样本来提升多变量时间序列异常检测在分布偏移下的性能。

papers.title: FaCT-GS: Fast and Scalable CT Reconstruction with Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Gaussian Splatting (GS) has emerged as a dominating technique for image rendering and has quickly been adapted for the X-ray Computed Tomography (CT) reconstruction task. However, despite being on par or better than many of its predecessors, the benefits of GS are typically not substantial enough to motivate a transition from well-established reconstruction algorithms. This paper addresses the most significant remaining limitations of the GS-based approach by introducing FaCT-GS, a framework for fast and flexible CT reconstruction. Enabled by an in-depth optimization of the voxelization and rasterization pipelines, our new method is significantly faster than its predecessors and scales well with projection and output volume size. Furthermore, the improved voxelization enables rapid fitting of Gaussians to pre-existing volumes, which can serve as a prior for warm-starting the reconstruction, or simply as an alternative, compressed representation. FaCT-GS is over 4X faster than the State of the Art GS CT reconstruction on standard 512x512 projections, and over 13X faster on 2k projections. Implementation available at: https://github.com/PaPieta/fact-gs.

analysis.tldr: FaCT-GS通过优化体素化和光栅化流程，实现了比现有高斯泼溅CT重建方法快4倍以上的速度。
analysis.research_motivation: 高斯泼溅在CT重建中虽表现不错，但速度优势不足以推动其替代传统算法，需要解决其计算效率瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 现有基于高斯泼溅的CT重建方法速度慢、可扩展性差，难以在实际中替代成熟的重建算法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对体素化和光栅化管线进行深度优化，并改进体素化以支持快速拟合预存体积作为先验。
contributions: 提出FaCT-GS框架，显著提升高斯泼溅CT重建的速度和可扩展性
实现超过4倍（标准投影）和13倍（高分辨率投影）的加速
analysis.experiments: 在标准512x512投影上比SOTA快4倍以上，在2k投影上快13倍以上。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定投影设置优化，泛化性未充分验证
未讨论噪声或稀疏投影等挑战场景下的表现
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FaCT-GS通过优化体素化和光栅化流程，实现了比现有高斯泼溅CT重建方法快4倍以上的速度。

papers.title: Investigating Permutation-Invariant Discrete Representation Learning for Spatially Aligned Images
papers.abstract: Vector quantization approaches (VQ-VAE, VQ-GAN) learn discrete neural representations of images, but these representations are inherently position-dependent: codes are spatially arranged and contextually entangled, requiring autoregressive or diffusion-based priors to model their dependencies at sample time. In this work, we ask whether positional information is necessary for discrete representations of spatially aligned data. We propose the permutation-invariant vector-quantized autoencoder (PI-VQ), in which latent codes are constrained to carry no positional information. We find that this constraint encourages codes to capture global, semantic features, and enables direct interpolation between images without a learned prior. To address the reduced information capacity of permutation-invariant representations, we introduce matching quantization, a vector quantization algorithm based on optimal bipartite matching that increases effective bottleneck capacity by $3.5\times$ relative to naive nearest-neighbour quantization. The compositional structure of the learned codes further enables interpolation-based sampling, allowing synthesis of novel images in a single forward pass. We evaluate PI-VQ on CelebA, CelebA-HQ and FFHQ, obtaining competitive precision, density and coverage metrics for images synthesised with our approach. We discuss the trade-offs inherent to position-free representations, including separability and interpretability of the latent codes, pointing to numerous directions for future work.

analysis.tldr: 提出排列不变向量量化自编码器（PI-VQ），通过去除位置信息学习全局语义离散表征，并引入匹配量化提升瓶颈容量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有离散表征（如VQ-VAE）依赖位置信息，导致编码空间排列依赖且上下文纠缠，需要自回归或扩散先验建模依赖关系，限制了表征的语义性和生成效率。
analysis.problem: 如何学习空间对齐图像的排列不变离散表征，使其携带全局语义信息且无需位置先验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 去除位置信息后，编码倾向于捕获全局语义特征，且可直接在图像间插值；但排列不变性会降低信息容量，需通过匹配量化补偿。
analysis.method: 提出排列不变向量量化自编码器（PI-VQ），约束潜码不携带位置信息；并设计基于最优二分图匹配的匹配量化算法，将瓶颈容量提升3.5倍。
contributions: 提出PI-VQ，实现排列不变的离散表征学习，编码全局语义特征。
引入匹配量化，通过最优二分图匹配显著提升有效瓶颈容量。
展示无先验的直接插值和单次前向生成新图像的能力。
analysis.experiments: 在CelebA、CelebA-HQ和FFHQ数据集上评估，生成图像在精度、密度和覆盖率指标上具有竞争力。
limitations: 排列不变表征可能损失局部细节信息。
匹配量化的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出排列不变向量量化自编码器（PI-VQ），通过去除位置信息学习全局语义离散表征，并引入匹配量化提升瓶颈容量。

papers.title: Retrieval-aligned Tabular Foundation Models Enable Robust Clinical Risk Prediction in Electronic Health Records Under Real-world Constraints
papers.abstract: Clinical prediction from structured electronic health records (EHRs) is challenging due to high dimensionality, heterogeneity, class imbalance, and distribution shift. While tabular in-context learning (TICL) and retrieval-augmented methods perform well on generic benchmarks, their behavior in clinical settings remains unclear. We present a multi-cohort EHR benchmark comparing classical, deep tabular, and TICL models across varying data scale, feature dimensionality, outcome rarity, and cross-cohort generalization. PFN-based TICL models are sample-efficient in low-data regimes but degrade under naive distance-based retrieval as heterogeneity and imbalance increase. We propose AWARE, a task-aligned retrieval framework using supervised embedding learning and lightweight adapters. AWARE improves AUPRC by up to 12.2% under extreme imbalance, with gains increasing with data complexity. Our results identify retrieval quality and retrieval-inference alignment as key bottlenecks for deploying tabular in-context learning in clinical prediction.

analysis.tldr: 提出任务对齐检索框架AWARE，提升表格基础模型在临床风险预测中的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 电子健康记录（EHR）的结构化数据预测面临高维、异质、类别不平衡和分布偏移等挑战，现有表格上下文学习（TICL）和检索增强方法在临床场景下的行为尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 解决TICL模型在临床EHR预测中因检索质量差和检索-推理未对齐导致的性能退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: PFN-based TICL模型在低数据场景下样本高效，但在异质性和不平衡增加时，基于朴素距离的检索会导致性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出AWARE框架，包括监督嵌入学习和轻量适配器，实现任务对齐的检索。
contributions: 构建多队列EHR基准，系统评估经典、深度表格和TICL模型在不同数据规模、特征维度、结果稀有性和跨队列泛化下的表现。
揭示检索质量和检索-推理对齐是临床预测中部署TICL的关键瓶颈。
提出AWARE框架，在极端不平衡下AUPRC提升高达12.2%。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定EHR数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
AWARE框架的额外计算开销未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出任务对齐检索框架AWARE，提升表格基础模型在临床风险预测中的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Not All Tokens See Equally: Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization for Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: While Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has advanced reasoning in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), prevailing frameworks suffer from a foundational methodological flaw: by distributing identical advantages across all generated tokens, these methods inherently dilute the learning signals essential for optimizing the critical, visually-grounded steps of multimodal reasoning. To bridge this gap, we formulate \textit{Token Visual Dependency}, quantifying the causal information gain of visual inputs via the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between visual-conditioned and text-only predictive distributions. Revealing that this dependency is highly sparse and semantically pivotal, we introduce Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization (PGPO), which is a novel fine-grained credit assignment framework that dynamically reshapes advantages at the token level. Through a threshold-gated, mass-conserving mechanism, PGPO actively amplifies learning signals for visually-dependent tokens while suppressing gradient noise from linguistic priors. Extensive experiments based on the Qwen2.5-VL series across seven challenging multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that PGPO boosts models by 18.7% on average. Both theoretical and empirical analyses confirm that PGPO effectively reduces gradient variance, prevents training collapse, and acts as a potent regularizer for robust, perception-grounded multimodal reasoning. Code will be released on https://github.com/Yzk1114/PGPO.

analysis.tldr: 提出感知锚定策略优化（PGPO），通过令牌级信用分配增强视觉依赖令牌的学习信号，显著提升多模态推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RLVR方法对所有生成令牌分配相同优势，稀释了多模态推理中关键视觉步骤的学习信号，导致模型无法充分优化视觉依赖的推理步骤。
analysis.problem: 如何在大视觉语言模型的多模态推理中，实现细粒度的令牌级信用分配，以强化视觉依赖令牌的优化并抑制语言先验的梯度噪声。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示令牌视觉依赖性高度稀疏且语义关键，即只有少数令牌对视觉输入敏感，而多数令牌依赖语言先验。
analysis.method: 提出感知锚定策略优化（PGPO），通过令牌视觉依赖性量化（基于KL散度）和阈值门控、质量守恒机制，动态重塑令牌级优势，放大视觉依赖令牌的学习信号。
contributions: 形式化令牌视觉依赖性概念，量化视觉输入的因果信息增益。
提出PGPO框架，实现令牌级细粒度信用分配，提升多模态推理性能。
analysis.experiments: 基于Qwen2.5-VL系列在七个多模态推理基准上平均提升18.7%，并验证了梯度方差降低、训练崩溃预防和正则化效果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定阈值设置，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅针对视觉-语言模型，未扩展到其他模态。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出感知锚定策略优化（PGPO），通过令牌级信用分配增强视觉依赖令牌的学习信号，显著提升多模态推理性能。

papers.title: Semantic Segmentation of Textured Non-manifold 3D Meshes using Transformers
papers.abstract: Textured 3D meshes jointly represent geometry, topology, and appearance, yet their irregular structure poses significant challenges for deep-learning-based semantic segmentation. While a few recent methods operate directly on meshes without imposing geometric constraints, they typically overlook the rich textural information also provided by such meshes. We introduce a texture-aware transformer that learns directly from raw pixels associated with each mesh face, coupled with a new hierarchical learning scheme for multi-scale feature aggregation. A texture branch summarizes all face-level pixels into a learnable token, which is fused with geometrical descriptors and processed by a stack of Two-Stage Transformer Blocks (TSTB), which allow for both a local and a global information flow. We evaluate our model on the Semantic Urban Meshes (SUM) benchmark and a newly curated cultural-heritage dataset comprising textured roof tiles with triangle-level annotations for damage types. Our method achieves 81.9\% mF1 and 94.3\% OA on SUM and 49.7\% mF1 and 72.8\% OA on the new dataset, substantially outperforming existing approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种纹理感知Transformer，直接处理3D网格的面级像素，结合分层学习实现多尺度特征聚合，在语义分割任务上显著超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 纹理3D网格同时包含几何、拓扑和外观信息，但其不规则结构给深度学习语义分割带来挑战；现有方法通常忽略丰富的纹理信息。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用纹理3D网格中的纹理信息进行语义分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出纹理感知Transformer，包含纹理分支将面级像素总结为可学习令牌，与几何描述符融合后通过两阶段Transformer块（TSTB）堆叠处理，实现局部和全局信息流；配合分层学习方案进行多尺度特征聚合。
contributions: 首次将Transformer应用于纹理非流形3D网格的语义分割，直接处理面级像素纹理。
提出两阶段Transformer块（TSTB）和分层学习方案，实现多尺度特征融合。
在SUM基准和新构建的文化遗产数据集上取得SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Semantic Urban Meshes (SUM)基准上达到81.9% mF1和94.3% OA，在新构建的文化遗产数据集上达到49.7% mF1和72.8% OA，显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能对高分辨率纹理或大规模网格计算开销较大。
新数据集规模较小，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种纹理感知Transformer，直接处理3D网格的面级像素，结合分层学习实现多尺度特征聚合，在语义分割任务上显著超越现有方法。

papers.title: Ranking-Guided Semi-Supervised Domain Adaptation for Severity Classification
papers.abstract: Semi-supervised domain adaptation leverages a few labeled and many unlabeled target samples, making it promising for addressing domain shifts in medical image analysis. However, existing methods struggle with severity classification due to unclear class boundaries. Severity classification involves naturally ordered class labels, complicating adaptation. We propose a novel method that aligns source and target domains using rank scores learned via ranking with class order. Specifically, Cross-Domain Ranking ranks sample pairs across domains, while Continuous Distribution Alignment aligns rank score distributions. Experiments on ulcerative colitis and diabetic retinopathy classification validate the effectiveness of our approach, demonstrating successful alignment of class-specific rank score distributions.

analysis.tldr: 利用排序学习对齐域间秩分布，解决医学图像严重程度分类中的半监督域适应问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 半监督域适应在医学图像分析中很有前景，但现有方法在处理严重程度分类时因类别边界模糊而效果不佳。严重程度分类的标签具有自然顺序，这增加了域适应的难度。
analysis.problem: 如何利用类别顺序信息，在半监督域适应中有效对齐源域和目标域，以提升严重程度分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 严重程度分类的类别边界不清晰，且标签具有自然顺序，导致现有域适应方法难以有效对齐。
analysis.method: 提出基于排序引导的半监督域适应方法，包括跨域排序（Cross-Domain Ranking）和连续分布对齐（Continuous Distribution Alignment），通过学习秩分数对齐源域和目标域的秩分数分布。
contributions: 提出利用排序学习对齐域间秩分布的新思路，适用于具有顺序标签的严重程度分类。
设计跨域排序和连续分布对齐两个模块，有效实现域适应。
analysis.experiments: 在溃疡性结肠炎和糖尿病视网膜病变分类任务上验证了方法的有效性，展示了类别特定秩分数分布的成功对齐。
limitations: 可能仅适用于标签具有自然顺序的分类任务。
未讨论对大规模或复杂域偏移的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用排序学习对齐域间秩分布，解决医学图像严重程度分类中的半监督域适应问题。

papers.title: Language-Pretraining-Induced Bias: A Strong Foundation for General Vision Tasks
papers.abstract: The ratio of outlier parameters in language pre-training models and vision pre-training models differs significantly, making cross-modality (language and vision) inherently more challenging than cross-domain adaptation. As a result, many prior studies have focused on cross-domain transfer rather than attempting to bridge language and vision modalities, assuming that language pre-trained models are unsuitable for downstream visual tasks due to disparate parameter spaces. Contrary to this assumption, we show that adding a bridge training stage as a modality adaptation learner can effectively align Large Language Model (LLM) parameters with vision tasks. Specifically, we propose a simple yet powerful solution random label bridge training that requires no manual labeling and helps LLM parameters adapt to vision foundation tasks. Moreover, our findings reveal that partial bridge training is often advantageous, as certain layers in LLMs exhibit strong foundational properties that remain beneficial even without fine-tuning for visual tasks. This surprising discovery opens up new avenues for leveraging language pre-trained parameters directly within vision models and highlights the potential of partial bridge training as a practical pathway to cross-modality adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 语言预训练模型通过随机标签桥接训练可有效适配视觉任务，且部分层无需微调即具视觉基础能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言与视觉预训练模型参数空间差异大，跨模态适配比跨域迁移更困难，现有研究多回避此问题。
analysis.problem: 如何使语言预训练模型（如LLM）有效适配通用视觉任务，克服模态间参数分布差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语言预训练模型与视觉预训练模型的离群参数比例显著不同，但通过桥接训练可对齐参数空间；部分LLM层无需微调即表现出视觉基础属性。
analysis.method: 提出随机标签桥接训练（Random Label Bridge Training），无需人工标注，作为模态适配学习器使LLM参数适应视觉任务。
contributions: 发现语言预训练模型通过桥接训练可有效用于视觉任务，挑战了传统假设。
提出随机标签桥接训练方法，无需标注即可实现跨模态适配。
揭示部分桥接训练的优势，即LLM某些层具有强基础属性，无需微调即可用于视觉任务。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未在多种视觉任务上验证泛化性。
未分析桥接训练对LLM原始语言能力的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 语言预训练模型通过随机标签桥接训练可有效适配视觉任务，且部分层无需微调即具视觉基础能力。

papers.title: SafeRoPE: Risk-specific Head-wise Embedding Rotation for Safe Generation in Rectified Flow Transformers
papers.abstract: Recent Text-to-Image (T2I) models based on rectified-flow transformers (e.g., SD3, FLUX) achieve high generative fidelity but remain vulnerable to unsafe semantics, especially when triggered by multi-token interactions. Existing mitigation methods largely rely on fine-tuning or attention modulation for concept unlearning; however, their expensive computational overhead and design tailored to U-Net-based denoisers hinder direct adaptation to transformer-based diffusion models (e.g., MMDiT). In this paper, we conduct an in-depth analysis of the attention mechanism in MMDiT and find that unsafe semantics concentrate within interpretable, low-dimensional subspaces at head level, where a finite set of safety-critical heads is responsible for unsafe feature extraction. We further observe that perturbing the Rotary Positional Embedding (RoPE) applied to the query and key vectors can effectively modify some specific concepts in the generated images. Motivated by these insights, we propose SafeRoPE, a lightweight and fine-grained safe generation framework for MMDiT. Specifically, SafeRoPE first constructs head-wise unsafe subspaces by decomposing unsafe embeddings within safety-critical heads, and computes a Latent Risk Score (LRS) for each input vector via projection onto these subspaces. We then introduce head-wise RoPE perturbations that can suppress unsafe semantics without degrading benign content or image quality. SafeRoPE combines both head-wise LRS and RoPE perturbations to perform risk-specific head-wise rotation on query and key vector embeddings, enabling precise suppression of unsafe outputs while maintaining generation fidelity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SafeRoPE achieves SOTA performance in balancing effective harmful content mitigation and utility preservation for safe generation of MMDiT. Codes are available at https://github.com/deng12yx/SafeRoPE.

analysis.tldr: SafeRoPE 通过头级 RoPE 旋转抑制不安全语义，实现 MMDiT 的安全文本到图像生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于整流流变压器的 T2I 模型（如 SD3、FLUX）易受不安全语义影响，而现有缓解方法（微调、注意力调制）计算开销大且难以适配 MMDiT 架构。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲生成质量和良性内容的前提下，高效抑制 MMDiT 中的不安全语义输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不安全语义集中在可解释的低维头级子空间，且扰动 RoPE 可有效修改特定概念。
analysis.method: SafeRoPE：1) 构建头级不安全子空间并计算潜在风险分数 (LRS)；2) 对查询和键向量进行头级 RoPE 旋转以抑制不安全语义。
contributions: 揭示了 MMDiT 中不安全语义集中在头级低维子空间，且 RoPE 扰动可修改概念。
提出 SafeRoPE，一种轻量级、细粒度的安全生成框架，无需微调。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称达到 SOTA 性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于 MMDiT 架构，泛化性未知。
LRS 计算可能引入额外延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SafeRoPE 通过头级 RoPE 旋转抑制不安全语义，实现 MMDiT 的安全文本到图像生成。

papers.title: STRIVE: Structured Spatiotemporal Exploration for Reinforcement Learning in Video Question Answering
papers.abstract: We introduce STRIVE (SpatioTemporal Reinforcement with Importance-aware Variant Exploration), a structured reinforcement learning framework for video question answering. While group-based policy optimization methods have shown promise in large multimodal models, they often suffer from low reward variance when responses exhibit similar correctness, leading to weak or unstable advantage estimates. STRIVE addresses this limitation by constructing multiple spatiotemporal variants of each input video and performing joint normalization across both textual generations and visual variants. By expanding group comparisons beyond linguistic diversity to structured visual perturbations, STRIVE enriches reward signals and promotes more stable and informative policy updates. To ensure exploration remains semantically grounded, we introduce an importance-aware sampling mechanism that prioritizes frames most relevant to the input question while preserving temporal coverage. This design encourages robust reasoning across complementary visual perspectives rather than overfitting to a single spatiotemporal configuration. Experiments on six challenging video reasoning benchmarks including VideoMME, TempCompass, VideoMMMU, MMVU, VSI-Bench, and PerceptionTest demonstrate consistent improvements over strong reinforcement learning baselines across multiple large multimodal models. Our results highlight the role of structured spatiotemporal exploration as a principled mechanism for stabilizing multimodal reinforcement learning and improving video reasoning performance.

analysis.tldr: STRIVE通过结构化时空探索增强视频问答中的强化学习，提升多模态模型推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于组的策略优化方法在视频问答中因响应相似导致奖励方差低，优势估计不稳定，限制了多模态模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何通过结构化时空探索增强奖励信号，稳定策略更新，提升视频问答推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出组策略优化中响应正确性相似时奖励方差低，导致优势估计弱或不稳定。
analysis.method: 构建输入视频的多个时空变体，联合归一化文本生成和视觉变体；引入重要性感知采样机制，优先选择与问题最相关的帧并保持时间覆盖。
contributions: 提出结构化时空探索框架STRIVE，通过视觉变体扩展组比较，丰富奖励信号。
设计重要性感知采样机制，确保探索语义基础，促进鲁棒推理。
analysis.experiments: 在VideoMME、TempCompass、VideoMMMU、MMVU、VSI-Bench、PerceptionTest六个基准上，STRIVE在多个大多模态模型上一致优于强强化学习基线。
limitations: 可能依赖视频帧重要性标注或计算开销。
未讨论对长视频或实时场景的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: STRIVE通过结构化时空探索增强视频问答中的强化学习，提升多模态模型推理性能。

papers.title: MolClaw: An Autonomous Agent with Hierarchical Skills for Drug Molecule Evaluation, Screening, and Optimization
papers.abstract: Computational drug discovery, particularly the complex workflows of drug molecule screening and optimization, requires orchestrating dozens of specialized tools in multi-step workflows, yet current AI agents struggle to maintain robust performance and consistently underperform in these high-complexity scenarios. Here we present MolClaw, an autonomous agent that leads drug molecule evaluation, screening, and optimization.
