It unifies over 30 specialized domain resources through a three-tier hierarchical skill architecture (70 skills in total) that facilitates agent long-term interaction at runtime: tool-level skills standardize atomic operations, workflow-level skills compose them into validated pipelines with quality check and reflection, and a discipline-level skill supplies scientific principles governing planning and verification across all scenarios in the field. Additionally, we introduce MolBench, a benchmark comprising molecular screening, optimization, and end-to-end discovery challenges spanning 8 to 50+ sequential tool calls. MolClaw achieves state-of-the-art performance across all metrics, and ablation studies confirm that gains concentrate on tasks that demand structured workflows while vanishing on those solvable with ad hoc scripting, establishing workflow orchestration competence as the primary capability bottleneck for AI-driven drug discovery.

analysis.tldr: MolClaw通过三级层次化技能架构统一30+领域工具，在药物分子评估、筛选和优化任务上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算药物发现中的分子筛选和优化工作流需要协调数十种专业工具，但现有AI智能体在多步复杂场景下性能不稳定且表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够稳健执行多步药物分子评估、筛选和优化工作流的自主智能体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 消融实验表明，性能提升集中在需要结构化工作流的任务上，而可通过临时脚本解决的任务上提升消失，说明工作流编排能力是AI驱动药物发现的主要能力瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出MolClaw，采用三级层次化技能架构：工具级技能标准化原子操作，工作流级技能组合成带质量检查和反思的验证流水线，学科级技能提供跨场景的规划与验证科学原理。
contributions: 提出MolClaw自主智能体，通过三级层次化技能架构统一30+领域资源（共70个技能），实现长期交互。
引入MolBench基准，包含分子筛选、优化和端到端发现挑战，涉及8到50+顺序工具调用。
MolClaw在所有指标上达到SOTA性能，并通过消融实验揭示工作流编排能力是主要瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在MolBench基准上评估，MolClaw在所有指标上达到SOTA，消融实验验证了层次化技能架构的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域工具集，泛化到其他药物发现场景需进一步验证。
层次化技能架构的构建和维护成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MolClaw通过三级层次化技能架构统一30+领域工具，在药物分子评估、筛选和优化任务上达到SOTA。

papers.title: VitaTouch: Property-Aware Vision-Tactile-Language Model for Robotic Quality Inspection in Manufacturing
papers.abstract: Quality inspection in smart manufacturing requires identifying intrinsic material and surface properties beyond visible geometry, yet vision-only methods remain vulnerable to occlusion and reflection. We propose VitaTouch, a property-aware vision-tactile-language model for material-property inference and natural-language attribute description. VitaTouch uses modality-specific encoders and a dual Q-Former to extract language-relevant visual and tactile features, which are compressed into prefix tokens for a large language model. We align each modality with text and explicitly couple vision and touch through contrastive learning. We also construct VitaSet, a multimodal dataset with 186 objects, 52k images, and 5.1k human-verified instruction-answer pairs. VitaTouch achieves the best performance on HCT and the overall TVL benchmark, while remaining competitive on SSVTP. On VitaSet, it reaches 88.89% hardness accuracy, 75.13% roughness accuracy, and 54.81% descriptor recall; the material-description task further achieves a peak semantic similarity of 0.9009. With LoRA-based fine-tuning, VitaTouch attains 100.0%, 96.0%, and 92.0% accuracy for 2-, 3-, and 5-category defect recognition, respectively, and delivers 94.0% closed-loop recognition accuracy and 94.0% end-to-end sorting success in 100 laboratory robotic trials. More details are available at the project page: https://vitatouch.github.io/

analysis.tldr: VitaTouch 提出一种属性感知的视觉-触觉-语言模型，用于制造中的质量检测，在多个基准上取得最优性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能制造中，仅依赖视觉的方法易受遮挡和反射影响，难以识别材料的内在属性（如硬度、粗糙度），需要融合触觉与语言信息。
analysis.problem: 如何结合视觉、触觉和语言模态，实现材料属性推断和自然语言属性描述，以提升机器人质量检测的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用模态特定编码器和双 Q-Former 提取语言相关的视觉和触觉特征，压缩为前缀令牌输入大语言模型；通过对比学习对齐各模态并显式耦合视觉与触觉。
contributions: 提出 VitaTouch，一种属性感知的视觉-触觉-语言模型，用于材料属性推断和自然语言描述。
构建 VitaSet 多模态数据集，包含 186 个物体、5.2 万张图像和 5.1k 人工验证的指令-答案对。
在 HCT、TVL 基准和 VitaSet 上取得最优或竞争性结果，并在机器人缺陷识别和分拣任务中达到高准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在 HCT、TVL、SSVTP 基准和自建 VitaSet 上评估；VitaSet 上硬度准确率 88.89%，粗糙度准确率 75.13%，描述符召回率 54.81%；材料描述任务语义相似度 0.9009；LoRA 微调后缺陷识别准确率 100%/96%/92%（2/3/5 类），机器人闭环识别准确率 94%，端到端分拣成功率 94%。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（186 个物体），可能限制泛化性。
触觉传感器依赖特定硬件，部署成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VitaTouch 提出一种属性感知的视觉-触觉-语言模型，用于制造中的质量检测，在多个基准上取得最优性能。

papers.title: Neural Network-Assisted Model Predictive Control for Implicit Balancing
papers.abstract: In Europe, balance responsible parties can deliberately take out-of-balance positions to support transmission system operators (TSOs) in maintaining grid stability and earn profit, a practice called implicit balancing. Model predictive control (MPC) is widely adopted as an effective approach for implicit balancing. The balancing market model accuracy in MPC is critical to decision quality. Previous studies modeled this market using either (i) a convex market clearing approximation, ignoring proactive manual actions by TSOs and the market sub-quarter-hour dynamics, or (ii) machine learning methods, which cannot be directly integrated into MPC. To address these shortcomings, we propose a data-driven balancing market model integrated into MPC using an input convex neural network to ensure convexity while capturing uncertainties. To keep the core network computationally efficient, we incorporate attention-based input gating mechanisms to remove irrelevant data. Evaluating on Belgian data shows that the proposed model both improves MPC decisions and reduces computational time.

analysis.tldr: 提出将输入凸神经网络集成到模型预测控制中，用于隐式平衡，提升决策质量并降低计算时间。
analysis.research_motivation: 欧洲平衡责任方通过隐式平衡支持电网稳定并获利，模型预测控制（MPC）是常用方法，但现有市场模型要么使用凸近似忽略TSO手动操作和子刻钟动态，要么使用机器学习方法无法直接集成到MPC中。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个既能捕捉市场不确定性又能直接集成到MPC中的数据驱动平衡市场模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用输入凸神经网络（ICNN）构建数据驱动的平衡市场模型，并集成到MPC中；通过基于注意力的输入门控机制去除无关数据以保持计算效率。
contributions: 提出一种将输入凸神经网络集成到MPC中的数据驱动平衡市场模型，确保凸性并捕捉不确定性。
引入注意力输入门控机制提高核心网络的计算效率。
analysis.experiments: 在比利时数据上评估，结果表明所提模型改进了MPC决策并减少了计算时间。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定市场规则（如欧洲），泛化性未验证。
注意力门控机制的有效性可能依赖数据特征。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将输入凸神经网络集成到模型预测控制中，用于隐式平衡，提升决策质量并降低计算时间。

papers.title: A deep learning pipeline for PAM50 subtype classification using histopathology images and multi-objective patch selection
papers.abstract: Breast cancer is a highly heterogeneous disease with diverse molecular profiles. The PAM50 gene signature is widely recognized as a standard for classifying breast cancer into intrinsic subtypes, enabling more personalized treatment strategies. In this study, we introduce a novel optimization-driven deep learning framework that aims to reduce reliance on costly molecular assays by directly predicting PAM50 subtypes from H&E-stained whole-slide images (WSIs). Our method jointly optimizes patch informativeness, spatial diversity, uncertainty, and patch count by combining the non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II) with Monte Carlo dropout-based uncertainty estimation. The proposed method can identify a small but highly informative patch subset for classification. We used a ResNet18 backbone for feature extraction and a custom CNN head for classification. For evaluation, we used the internal TCGA-BRCA dataset as the training cohort and the external CPTAC-BRCA dataset as the test cohort. On the internal dataset, an F1-score of 0.8812 and an AUC of 0.9841 using 627 WSIs from the TCGA-BRCA cohort were achieved. The performance of the proposed approach on the external validation dataset showed an F1-score of 0.7952 and an AUC of 0.9512. These findings indicate that the proposed optimization-guided, uncertainty-aware patch selection can achieve high performance and improve the computational efficiency of histopathology-based PAM50 classification compared to existing methods, suggesting a scalable imaging-based replacement that has the potential to support clinical decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合多目标优化和不确定性估计的深度学习流程，从H&E染色全切片图像中预测PAM50分子亚型，在TCGA和CPTAC数据集上取得高F1和AUC。
analysis.research_motivation: 乳腺癌分子亚型分类对个性化治疗至关重要，但PAM50基因检测成本高、耗时长，亟需基于常规H&E染色切片的低成本替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何从全切片图像中自动选择少量高信息量、空间多样且不确定性低的图像块，以实现准确的PAM50亚型分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合非支配排序遗传算法II（NSGA-II）和蒙特卡洛dropout不确定性估计，联合优化图像块的信息量、空间多样性、不确定性和块数量，使用ResNet18提取特征，自定义CNN头进行分类。
contributions: 提出一种优化驱动的、不确定性感知的图像块选择方法，可自动识别少量高信息量块用于分类。
在内部TCGA-BRCA和外部CPTAC-BRCA数据集上验证了方法的有效性，F1和AUC均较高。
analysis.experiments: 使用TCGA-BRCA（627张WSI）作为训练集，CPTAC-BRCA作为外部测试集，内部F1=0.8812，AUC=0.9841；外部F1=0.7952，AUC=0.9512。
limitations: 仅基于两个公开数据集，泛化性需更多验证。
方法依赖H&E染色质量，可能受染色差异影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合多目标优化和不确定性估计的深度学习流程，从H&E染色全切片图像中预测PAM50分子亚型，在TCGA和CPTAC数据集上取得高F1和AUC。

papers.title: PTC-Depth: Pose-Refined Monocular Depth Estimation with Temporal Consistency
papers.abstract: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) has been widely adopted in the perception systems of autonomous vehicles and mobile robots. However, existing approaches often struggle to maintain temporal consistency in depth estimation across consecutive frames. This inconsistency not only causes jitter but can also lead to estimation failures when the depth range changes abruptly. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a consistency-aware monocular depth estimation framework that leverages wheel odometry from a mobile robot to achieve stable and coherent depth predictions over time. Specifically, we estimate camera pose and sparse depth from triangulation using optical flow between consecutive frames. The sparse depth estimates are used to update a recursive Bayesian estimate of the metric scale, which is then applied to rescale the relative depth predicted by a pre-trained depth estimation foundation model. The proposed method is evaluated on the KITTI, TartanAir, MS2, and our own dataset, demonstrating robust and accurate depth estimation performance.

analysis.tldr: 利用轮式里程计和递归贝叶斯估计实现时序一致的深度估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 单目深度估计在自动驾驶和移动机器人中广泛应用，但现有方法在连续帧间难以保持时序一致性，导致抖动和深度范围突变时的估计失败。
analysis.problem: 解决单目深度估计在时序上的不一致性问题，实现稳定且连贯的深度预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在连续帧间深度估计不一致，引起抖动，且深度范围突变时可能失败。
analysis.method: 提出一致性感知框架，利用轮式里程计和光流三角化估计相机位姿和稀疏深度，通过递归贝叶斯估计更新度量尺度，并用于重缩放预训练基础模型预测的相对深度。
contributions: 提出利用轮式里程计和递归贝叶斯估计实现时序一致的单目深度估计框架。
在多个数据集上验证了方法的鲁棒性和准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在KITTI、TartanAir、MS2及自有数据集上评估，展示了鲁棒且准确的深度估计性能。
limitations: 依赖轮式里程计，可能不适用于无里程计的场景。
递归贝叶斯估计可能对初始尺度敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用轮式里程计和递归贝叶斯估计实现时序一致的深度估计。

papers.title: GardenDesigner: Encoding Aesthetic Principles into Jiangnan Garden Construction via a Chain of Agents
papers.abstract: Jiangnan gardens, a prominent style of Chinese classical gardens, hold great potential as digital assets for film and game production and digital tourism. However, manual modeling of Jiangnan gardens heavily relies on expert experience for layout design and asset creation, making the process time-consuming. To address this gap, we propose GardenDesigner, a novel framework that encodes aesthetic principles for Jiangnan garden construction and integrates a chain of agents based on procedural modeling. The water-centric terrain and explorative pathway rules are applied by terrain distribution and road generation agents. Selection and spatial layout of garden assets follow the aesthetic and cultural constraints. Consequently, we propose asset selection and layout optimization agents to select and arrange objects for each area in the garden. Additionally, we introduce GardenVerse for Jiangnan garden construction, including expert-annotated garden knowledge to enhance the asset arrangement process. To enable interaction and editing, we develop an interactive interface and tools in Unity, in which non-expert users can construct Jiangnan gardens via text input within one minute. Experiments and human evaluations demonstrate that GardenDesigner can generate diverse and aesthetically pleasing Jiangnan gardens. Project page is available at https://monad-cube.github.io/GardenDesigner.

analysis.tldr: 提出GardenDesigner框架，通过链式智能体将美学原则编码到江南园林的自动构建中。
analysis.research_motivation: 江南园林作为数字资产在影视、游戏和数字旅游中有巨大潜力，但手工建模依赖专家经验，耗时且门槛高。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成符合美学和文化约束的江南园林布局与资产。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于程序化建模的链式智能体框架，包含地形分布、道路生成、资产选择和布局优化等智能体，并引入专家标注的园林知识库GardenVerse。
contributions: 提出GardenDesigner框架，将美学原则编码到江南园林自动构建中。
引入GardenVerse专家标注知识库，增强资产排列过程。
开发Unity交互界面，非专家用户可通过文本输入在一分钟内构建园林。
analysis.experiments: 实验和人工评估表明GardenDesigner能生成多样且美观的江南园林。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能局限于江南园林风格，泛化到其他园林风格需调整。
依赖专家知识库的覆盖范围和质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GardenDesigner框架，通过链式智能体将美学原则编码到江南园林的自动构建中。

papers.title: Domain-constrained knowledge representation: A modal framework
papers.abstract: Knowledge graphs store large numbers of relations efficiently, but they remain weak at representing a quieter difficulty: the meaning of a concept often shifts with the domain in which it is used. A triple such as Apple, instance-of, Company may be acceptable in one setting while being misleading or unusable in another. In most current systems, domain information is attached as metadata, qualifiers, or graph-level organization. These mechanisms help with filtering and provenance, but they usually do not alter the formal status of the assertion itself. This paper argues that domain should be treated as part of knowledge representation rather than as supplementary annotation. It introduces the Domain-Contextualized Concept Graph (DCG), a framework in which domain is written into the relation and interpreted as a modal world constraint. In the DCG form (C, R at D, C'), the marker at D identifies the world in which the relation holds. Formally, the relation is interpreted through a domain-indexed necessity operator, so that truth, inference, and conflict checking are all scoped to the relevant world. This move has three consequences: ambiguous concepts can be disambiguated at the point of representation; invalid assertions can be challenged against their domain; cross-domain relations can be connected through explicit predicates. The paper develops this claim through a Kripke-style semantics, a compact predicate system, a Prolog implementation, and mappings to RDF, OWL, and relational databases. The contribution is a representational reinterpretation of domain itself. The central claim is that many practical failures in knowledge systems begin when domain is treated as external to the assertion. DCG addresses that by giving domain a structural and computable role inside the representation.

analysis.tldr: 提出域约束概念图（DCG），将领域作为模态世界约束内嵌于知识表示中，以解决概念跨域歧义问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有知识图谱将领域信息作为元数据或注释，未改变断言的形式状态，导致概念跨域使用时出现歧义和推理错误。
analysis.problem: 如何将领域信息从外部注释转变为知识表示的内在组成部分，以实现域感知的推理和冲突检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当领域被视为断言外部时，知识系统会出现实际失败；概念含义随使用领域变化，但当前系统无法在表示层面处理这种变化。
analysis.method: 提出Domain-Contextualized Concept Graph (DCG)，通过域索引的必然性算子将领域作为模态世界约束写入关系，并基于Kripke语义、紧凑谓词系统、Prolog实现及到RDF/OWL/关系数据库的映射来形式化。
contributions: 提出DCG框架，将领域作为知识表示的结构性组成部分而非外部注释。
开发了基于模态逻辑的域约束语义，支持域内推理和跨域连接。
提供了Prolog实现及到标准知识表示格式的映射，验证了可行性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能增加知识表示的复杂性和存储开销。
跨域连接需要显式谓词，可能增加建模负担。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出域约束概念图（DCG），将领域作为模态世界约束内嵌于知识表示中，以解决概念跨域歧义问题。

papers.title: FSKD: Monocular Forest Structure Inference via LiDAR-to-RGBI Knowledge Distillation
papers.abstract: Very High Resolution (VHR) forest structure data at individual-tree scale is essential for carbon, biodiversity, and ecosystem monitoring. Still, airborne LiDAR remains costly and infrequent despite being the reference for forest structure metrics like Canopy Height Model (CHM), Plant Area Index (PAI), and Foliage Height Diversity (FHD). We propose FSKD: a LiDAR-to-RGB-Infrared (RGBI) knowledge distillation (KD) framework in which a multi-modal teacher fuses RGBI imagery with LiDAR-derived planar metrics and vertical profiles via cross-attention, and an RGBI-only SegFormer student learns to reproduce these outputs. Trained on 384 $km^2$ of forests in Saxony, Germany (20 cm ground sampling distance (GSD)) and evaluated on eight geographically distinct test tiles, the student achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) zero-shot CHM performance (MedAE 4.17 m, $R^2$=0.51, IoU 0.87), outperforming HRCHM/DAC baselines by 29--46% in MAE (5.81 m vs. 8.14--10.84 m) with stronger correlation coefficients (0.713 vs. 0.166--0.652). Ablations show that multi-modal fusion improves performance by 10--26% over RGBI-only training, and that asymmetric distillation with appropriate model capacity is critical. The method jointly predicts CHM, PAI, and FHD, a multi-metric capability not provided by current monocular CHM estimators, although PAI/FHD transfer remains region-dependent and benefits from local calibration. The framework also remains effective under temporal mismatch (winter LiDAR, summer RGBI), removing strict co-acquisition constraints and enabling scalable 20 cm operational monitoring for workflows such as Digital Twin Germany and national Digital Orthophoto programs.

analysis.tldr: 提出FSKD框架，通过LiDAR到RGBI的知识蒸馏实现单目森林结构推断，在CHM预测上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 机载LiDAR成本高、频率低，难以大规模获取高分辨率森林结构数据，而RGBI影像易获取但缺乏垂直结构信息。
analysis.problem: 如何利用易获取的RGBI影像，通过知识蒸馏从LiDAR数据中学习，实现单目森林结构参数（CHM、PAI、FHD）的准确推断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多模态融合比纯RGBI训练提升10-26%；非对称蒸馏需合适模型容量；PAI/FHD迁移存在区域依赖性，需局部校准；时间错配下仍有效。
analysis.method: 多模态教师模型通过交叉注意力融合RGBI与LiDAR平面/垂直特征，RGBI-only SegFormer学生模型蒸馏学习，联合预测CHM、PAI、FHD。
contributions: 提出首个LiDAR-to-RGBI知识蒸馏框架FSKD，实现单目森林结构多指标联合预测。
在384 km²德国森林数据集上，CHM零样本预测达到SOTA，MAE比基线低29-46%。
验证了时间错配下的鲁棒性，消除严格共采集约束，支持大规模20 cm分辨率监测。
analysis.experiments: 在德国萨克森州384 km²森林（20 cm GSD）上训练，8个地理分布测试块评估，CHM零样本MedAE 4.17 m，R²=0.51，IoU 0.87，MAE 5.81 m，优于HRCHM/DAC基线（MAE 8.14-10.84 m）。
limitations: PAI/FHD迁移存在区域依赖性，需局部校准。
仅验证了德国森林场景，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FSKD框架，通过LiDAR到RGBI的知识蒸馏实现单目森林结构推断，在CHM预测上达到SOTA。

papers.title: DriveDreamer-Policy: A Geometry-Grounded World-Action Model for Unified Generation and Planning
papers.abstract: Recently, world-action models (WAM) have emerged to bridge vision-language-action (VLA) models and world models, unifying their reasoning and instruction-following capabilities and spatio-temporal world modeling. However, existing WAM approaches often focus on modeling 2D appearance or latent representations, with limited geometric grounding-an essential element for embodied systems operating in the physical world. We present DriveDreamer-Policy, a unified driving world-action model that integrates depth generation, future video generation, and motion planning within a single modular architecture. The model employs a large language model to process language instructions, multi-view images, and actions, followed by three lightweight generators that produce depth, future video, and actions. By learning a geometry-aware world representation and using it to guide both future prediction and planning within a unified framework, the proposed model produces more coherent imagined futures and more informed driving actions, while maintaining modularity and controllable latency. Experiments on the Navsim v1 and v2 benchmarks demonstrate that DriveDreamer-Policy achieves strong performance on both closed-loop planning and world generation tasks. In particular, our model reaches 89.2 PDMS on Navsim v1 and 88.7 EPDMS on Navsim v2, outperforming existing world-model-based approaches while producing higher-quality future video and depth predictions. Ablation studies further show that explicit depth learning provides complementary benefits to video imagination and improves planning robustness.

analysis.tldr: DriveDreamer-Policy 提出一种几何感知的世界-动作模型，统一了深度生成、未来视频生成和运动规划，在 Navsim 基准上取得领先性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界-动作模型（WAM）主要关注 2D 外观或潜在表示，缺乏几何基础，这对于物理世界中的具身系统至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何将几何信息（如深度）融入世界-动作模型，以统一生成和规划任务，并提升未来预测和规划的一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 DriveDreamer-Policy，使用大语言模型处理语言指令、多视图图像和动作，然后通过三个轻量级生成器分别生成深度、未来视频和动作；通过几何感知的世界表示统一引导未来预测和规划。
contributions: 提出一种几何感知的世界-动作模型，统一了深度生成、未来视频生成和运动规划。
在 Navsim v1 和 v2 基准上，闭环规划和世界生成任务均达到领先性能，同时生成更高质量的未来视频和深度预测。
analysis.experiments: 在 Navsim v1 和 v2 基准上进行实验，模型在 Navsim v1 上达到 89.2 PDMS，在 Navsim v2 上达到 88.7 EPDMS，优于现有基于世界模型的方法；消融实验表明显式深度学习对视频想象和规划鲁棒性有互补益处。
limitations: 可能依赖特定驾驶场景数据集，泛化性有待验证。
模块化架构可能引入额外延迟，实时性需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DriveDreamer-Policy 提出一种几何感知的世界-动作模型，统一了深度生成、未来视频生成和运动规划，在 Navsim 基准上取得领先性能。

papers.title: Hidden Meanings in Plain Sight: RebusBench for Evaluating Cognitive Visual Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable proficiency in explicit visual recognition, effectively describing what is directly visible in an image. However, a critical cognitive gap emerges when the visual input serves only as a clue rather than the answer. We identify that current models struggle with the complex, multi-step reasoning required to solve problems where information is not explicitly depicted. Successfully solving a rebus puzzle requires a distinct cognitive workflow: the model must extract visual and textual attributes, retrieve linguistic prior knowledge (such as idioms), and perform abstract mapping to synthesize these elements into a meaning that exists outside the pixel space. To evaluate this neurosymbolic capability, we introduce RebusBench, a benchmark of 1,164 puzzles designed to test this specific integration of perception and knowledge. Our evaluation of state-of-the-art models (including Qwen, InternVL, and LLaVA) shows a severe deficiency: performance saturates below 10% Exact Match and 20% semantic accuracy, with no significant improvement observed from model scaling or In-Context Learning (ICL). These findings suggest that while models possess the necessary visual and linguistic components, they lack the cognitive reasoning glue to connect them. Project page available at https://amirkasaei.com/rebusbench/.

analysis.tldr: RebusBench基准测试揭示当前LVLM在需要多步抽象推理的谜题任务上性能极低，表明模型缺乏连接视觉与语言组件的认知推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LVLM在显式视觉识别上表现优异，但面对视觉输入仅为线索而非答案的复杂推理任务时存在严重不足，亟需评估其神经符号推理能力。
analysis.problem: 当前LVLM无法有效解决需要提取视觉/文本属性、检索语言先验知识（如习语）并进行抽象映射的谜题推理问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：模型在RebusBench上精确匹配率低于10%，语义准确率低于20%，且模型规模扩展和上下文学习均未带来显著提升，表明模型缺乏认知推理的“胶水”来连接视觉与语言组件。
analysis.method: 构建包含1,164个谜题的RebusBench基准，要求模型完成从视觉/文本属性提取、语言先验知识检索到抽象映射的多步推理。
contributions: 识别了LVLM在需要多步抽象推理的谜题任务上的认知鸿沟
发布了RebusBench基准，用于评估视觉-语言模型的神经符号推理能力
系统评估了多个SOTA模型，揭示了其在该任务上的严重缺陷
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen、InternVL、LLaVA等SOTA模型上评估，结果显示精确匹配率低于10%，语义准确率低于20%，且模型缩放和上下文学习无显著改善。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖谜题类型，可能无法泛化到其他抽象推理任务
未提供模型失败的具体错误类型分析
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RebusBench基准测试揭示当前LVLM在需要多步抽象推理的谜题任务上性能极低，表明模型缺乏连接视觉与语言组件的认知推理能力。

papers.title: Cosine-Normalized Attention for Hyperspectral Image Classification
papers.abstract: Transformer-based methods have improved hyperspectral image classification (HSIC) by modeling long-range spatial-spectral dependencies; however, their attention mechanisms typically rely on dot-product similarity, which mixes feature magnitude and orientation and may be suboptimal for hyperspectral data. This work revisits attention scoring from a geometric perspective and introduces a cosine-normalized attention formulation that aligns similarity computation with the angular structure of hyperspectral signatures. By projecting query and key embeddings onto a unit hypersphere and applying a squared cosine similarity, the proposed method emphasizes angular relationships while reducing sensitivity to magnitude variations. The formulation is integrated into a spatial-spectral Transformer and evaluated under extremely limited supervision. Experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently achieves higher performance, outperforming several recent Transformer- and Mamba-based models despite using a lightweight backbone. In addition, a controlled analysis of multiple attention score functions shows that cosine-based scoring provides a reliable inductive bias for hyperspectral representation learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出余弦归一化注意力机制，通过强调角度关系提升高光谱图像分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer在高光谱图像分类中依赖点积相似度，混合了特征幅度和方向，可能不适合高光谱数据的几何结构。
analysis.problem: 现有注意力机制的点积相似度对幅度变化敏感，未能充分利用高光谱签名中的角度信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 点积相似度混合幅度和方向，在高光谱数据中可能次优；余弦相似度提供可靠的归纳偏置。
analysis.method: 将查询和键嵌入投影到单位超球面，使用平方余弦相似度计算注意力分数，并集成到空间-光谱Transformer中。
contributions: 从几何角度重新审视注意力评分，提出余弦归一化注意力公式。
在三个基准数据集上，轻量级骨干下超越多种Transformer和Mamba模型。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准数据集上评估，与多种最新Transformer和Mamba模型对比，在极有限监督下取得更高性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于高光谱图像等具有强角度结构的数据。
未在更大规模或更多样化的数据集上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出余弦归一化注意力机制，通过强调角度关系提升高光谱图像分类性能。

papers.title: FourierMoE: Fourier Mixture-of-Experts Adaptation of Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) has emerged as a crucial paradigm for adapting large language models (LLMs) under constrained computational budgets. However, standard PEFT methods often struggle in multi-task fine-tuning settings, where diverse optimization objectives induce task interference and limited parameter budgets lead to representational deficiency. While recent approaches incorporate mixture-of-experts (MoE) to alleviate these issues, they predominantly operate in the spatial domain, which may introduce structural redundancy and parameter overhead. To overcome these limitations, we reformulate adaptation in the spectral domain. Our spectral analysis reveals that different tasks exhibit distinct frequency energy distributions, and that LLM layers display heterogeneous frequency sensitivities. Motivated by these insights, we propose FourierMoE, which integrates the MoE architecture with the inverse discrete Fourier transform (IDFT) for frequency-aware adaptation. Specifically, FourierMoE employs a frequency-adaptive router to dispatch tokens to experts specialized in distinct frequency bands. Each expert learns a set of conjugate-symmetric complex coefficients, preserving complete phase and amplitude information while theoretically guaranteeing lossless IDFT reconstruction into real-valued spatial weights. Extensive evaluations across 28 benchmarks, multiple model architectures, and scales demonstrate that FourierMoE consistently outperforms competitive baselines in both single-task and multi-task settings while using significantly fewer trainable parameters. These results highlight the promise of spectral-domain expert adaptation as an effective and parameter-efficient paradigm for LLM fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: 提出FourierMoE，在频域进行MoE适配，通过频率感知路由和IDFT重构实现高效多任务微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准PEFT方法在多任务微调中面临任务干扰和参数预算有限导致的表征不足问题，而现有MoE方法在空间域操作可能引入结构冗余和参数开销。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种参数高效的微调方法，在多任务场景下减少任务干扰并提升表征能力，同时避免空间域MoE的结构冗余。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 频谱分析发现不同任务具有不同的频率能量分布，且LLM层对频率敏感度存在异质性。
analysis.method: FourierMoE：结合MoE架构与逆离散傅里叶变换（IDFT），使用频率自适应路由器将token分派到不同频带专家，每个专家学习共轭对称复数系数，通过IDFT无损重构为实值空间权重。
contributions: 提出频域MoE适配范式，利用频率能量分布差异缓解任务干扰。
设计频率自适应路由器和复数系数专家，保证IDFT无损重构，参数效率高。
在28个基准、多种模型架构和规模上验证了单任务和多任务场景下的优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在28个基准上，使用多种模型架构和规模进行实验，结果显示FourierMoE在单任务和多任务设置中均优于竞争基线，且可训练参数更少。
limitations: 可能对频带划分和专家数量敏感，需要进一步调优。
仅适用于可微调的预训练模型，对从头训练的模型适用性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FourierMoE，在频域进行MoE适配，通过频率感知路由和IDFT重构实现高效多任务微调。

papers.title: Beyond Fixed Inference: Quantitative Flow Matching for Adaptive Image Denoising
papers.abstract: Diffusion and flow-based generative models have shown strong potential for image restoration. However, image denoising under unknown and varying noise conditions remains challenging, because the learned vector fields may become inconsistent across different noise levels, leading to degraded restoration quality under mismatch between training and inference. To address this issue, we propose a quantitative flow matching framework for adaptive image denoising. The method first estimates the input noise level from local pixel statistics, and then uses this quantitative estimate to adapt the inference trajectory, including the starting point, the number of integration steps, and the step-size schedule. In this way, the denoising process is better aligned with the actual corruption level of each input, reducing unnecessary computation for lightly corrupted images while providing sufficient refinement for heavily degraded ones. By coupling quantitative noise estimation with noise-adaptive flow inference, the proposed method improves both restoration accuracy and inference efficiency. Extensive experiments on natural, medical, and microscopy images demonstrate its robustness and strong generalization across diverse noise levels and imaging conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出定量流匹配框架，通过噪声估计自适应调整推理轨迹，实现高效鲁棒的图像去噪。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散/流模型在未知和变化噪声条件下去噪时，训练与推理间的噪声水平不匹配会导致向量场不一致，降低恢复质量。
analysis.problem: 解决图像去噪中噪声水平未知且变化时，固定推理策略导致的恢复质量下降和计算浪费问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当训练与推理噪声水平不匹配时，学习到的向量场会变得不一致，导致恢复质量下降。
analysis.method: 提出定量流匹配框架：先通过局部像素统计估计输入噪声水平，再根据估计值自适应调整推理起点、积分步数和步长调度。
contributions: 提出噪声自适应推理轨迹调整机制，使去噪过程与输入实际退化程度对齐。
在自然、医学和显微镜图像上验证了方法的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在自然、医学和显微镜图像上进行了实验，展示了方法在不同噪声水平和成像条件下的鲁棒性和强泛化能力。
limitations: 噪声估计依赖局部像素统计，可能对纹理复杂区域不准确。
自适应步数调度可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出定量流匹配框架，通过噪声估计自适应调整推理轨迹，实现高效鲁棒的图像去噪。

papers.title: Control-DINO: Feature Space Conditioning for Controllable Image-to-Video Diffusion
papers.abstract: Video models have recently been applied with success to problems in content generation, novel view synthesis, and, more broadly, world simulation. Many applications in generation and transfer rely on conditioning these models, typically through perceptual, geometric, or simple semantic signals, fundamentally using them as generative renderers. At the same time, high-dimensional features obtained from large-scale self-supervised learning on images or point clouds are increasingly used as a general-purpose interface for vision models. The connection between the two has been explored for subject specific editing, aligning and training video diffusion models, but not in the role of a more general conditioning signal for pretrained video diffusion models. Features obtained through self-supervised learning like DINO, contain a lot of entangled information about style, lighting and semantics of the scene. This makes them great at reconstruction tasks but limits their generative capabilities. In this paper, we show how we can use the features for tasks such as video domain transfer and video-from-3D generation. We introduce a lightweight architecture and training strategy that decouples appearance from other features that we wish to preserve, enabling robust control for appearance changes such as stylization and relighting. Furthermore, we show that low spatial resolution can be compensated by higher feature dimensionality, improving controllability in generative rendering from explicit spatial representations.

analysis.tldr: 提出Control-DINO，利用自监督特征（DINO）作为条件信号控制图像到视频扩散模型，解耦外观与语义实现风格化与重光照。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频扩散模型在内容生成和世界模拟中表现优异，但现有条件控制方法多依赖感知、几何或简单语义信号，缺乏利用高维自监督特征作为通用条件信号的研究，而这些特征（如DINO）虽富含风格、光照和语义信息，却因信息纠缠限制了生成可控性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用自监督特征（如DINO）作为预训练视频扩散模型的通用条件信号，同时解耦外观与语义信息以实现可控生成（如风格迁移、重光照）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自监督特征（如DINO）包含风格、光照和语义的纠缠信息，使其在重建任务中表现良好，但直接用于生成任务时可控性不足；低空间分辨率可通过更高特征维度补偿，提升显式空间表示下的生成可控性。
analysis.method: 提出轻量级架构和训练策略，将外观特征与其他需保留的特征（如语义）解耦，通过特征空间条件化实现视频域迁移和3D生成视频。
contributions: 首次将自监督特征（DINO）作为通用条件信号用于预训练视频扩散模型，实现视频域迁移和3D生成视频。
提出解耦外观与语义的轻量级架构和训练策略，支持风格化、重光照等外观变化控制。
发现低空间分辨率可通过高特征维度补偿，提升显式空间表示下的可控性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定预训练特征（DINO），泛化性需验证。
解耦外观与语义的效果可能受特征质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Control-DINO，利用自监督特征（DINO）作为条件信号控制图像到视频扩散模型，解耦外观与语义实现风格化与重光照。

papers.title: LiveMathematicianBench: A Live Benchmark for Mathematician-Level Reasoning with Proof Sketches
papers.abstract: Mathematical reasoning is a hallmark of human intelligence, and whether large language models (LLMs) can meaningfully perform it remains a central question in artificial intelligence and cognitive science. As LLMs are increasingly integrated into scientific workflows, rigorous evaluation of their mathematical capabilities becomes a practical necessity. Existing benchmarks are limited by synthetic settings and data contamination. We present LiveMathematicianBench, a dynamic multiple-choice benchmark for research-level mathematical reasoning built from recent arXiv papers published after model training cutoffs. By grounding evaluation in newly published theorems, it provides a realistic testbed beyond memorized patterns. The benchmark introduces a thirteen-category logical taxonomy of theorem types (e.g., implication, equivalence, existence, uniqueness), enabling fine-grained evaluation across reasoning forms. It employs a proof-sketch-guided distractor pipeline that uses high-level proof strategies to construct plausible but invalid answer choices reflecting misleading proof directions, increasing sensitivity to genuine understanding over surface-level matching. We also introduce a substitution-resistant mechanism to distinguish answer recognition from substantive reasoning. Evaluation shows the benchmark is far from saturated: Gemini-3.1-pro-preview, the best model, achieves only 43.5%. Under substitution-resistant evaluation, accuracy drops sharply: GPT-5.4 scores highest at 30.6%, while Gemini-3.1-pro-preview falls to 17.6%, below the 20% random baseline. A dual-mode protocol reveals that proof-sketch access yields consistent accuracy gains, suggesting models can leverage high-level proof strategies for reasoning. Overall, LiveMathematicianBench offers a scalable, contamination-resistant testbed for studying research-level mathematical reasoning in LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于最新arXiv论文的动态数学推理基准，通过证明草图引导的干扰项和替换抵抗机制评估LLM的研究级数学推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数学推理基准受限于合成设置和数据污染，无法真实评估LLM的研究级数学推理能力，而LLM正被越来越多地用于科学工作流，亟需更严格的评测。
analysis.problem: 构建一个抗污染、可扩展的基准，用于评估LLM在最新研究级数学定理上的推理能力，并区分真正的理解与表面匹配或答案识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出替换抵抗评估下准确率大幅下降（如Gemini-3.1-pro-preview从43.5%降至17.6%），表明模型存在答案识别而非实质推理的问题。
analysis.method: 从模型训练截止日期后发表的arXiv论文中构建动态多选题基准，引入13类定理类型逻辑分类法，使用证明草图引导的干扰项生成管道，并设计替换抵抗机制。
contributions: 提出LiveMathematicianBench，一个基于最新arXiv论文的动态、抗污染的研究级数学推理基准。
引入13类定理类型逻辑分类法和证明草图引导的干扰项生成管道，提高对真实理解的敏感性。
设计替换抵抗机制和双模式协议，揭示模型在证明草图辅助下的推理增益。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM上评估，最佳模型Gemini-3.1-pro-preview达到43.5%准确率；替换抵抗评估下GPT-5.4最高30.6%，Gemini-3.1-pro-preview降至17.6%（低于随机基线20%）。
limitations: 仅基于arXiv论文，可能覆盖不全所有数学子领域。
替换抵抗机制可能过于严格，低估模型实际推理能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于最新arXiv论文的动态数学推理基准，通过证明草图引导的干扰项和替换抵抗机制评估LLM的研究级数学推理能力。

papers.title: Active Inference with a Self-Prior in the Mirror-Mark Task
papers.abstract: The mirror self-recognition test evaluates whether a subject touches a mark on its own body that is visible only in a mirror, and is widely used as an indicator of self-awareness. In this study, we present a computational model in which this behavior emerges spontaneously through a single mechanism, the self-prior, without any external reward. The self-prior, implemented with a Transformer, learns the density of familiar multisensory experiences; when a novel mark appears, the discrepancy from this learned distribution drives mark-directed behavior through active inference. A simulated infant, relying solely on vision and proprioception without tactile input, discovered a sticker placed on its own face in the mirror and removed it in approximately 70% of cases without any explicit instruction. Expected free energy decreased significantly after sticker removal, confirming that the self-prior operates as an internal criterion for distinguishing self from non-self. Cross-modal sampling further demonstrated that the self-prior captures visual--proprioceptive associations, functioning as a probabilistic body schema. These results provide a concise computational account of the key behavior observed in the mirror test and suggest that the free energy principle can serve as a unifying hypothesis for investigating the developmental origins of self-awareness. Code is available at: https://github.com/kim135797531/self-prior-mirror

analysis.tldr: 提出自先验机制，使智能体在无外部奖励下通过主动推理自发产生镜像自我识别行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 镜像自我识别测试是衡量自我意识的重要指标，但缺乏计算模型解释其自发涌现机制。
analysis.problem: 如何让智能体在没有外部奖励的情况下，仅通过内部驱动自发产生镜像标记导向行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用Transformer学习多感官经验密度作为自先验，通过主动推理最小化自由能驱动标记导向行为。
contributions: 提出自先验机制，无需外部奖励即可实现镜像自我识别行为。
通过模拟婴儿实验验证了自先验的有效性，并展示了自由能原理在自我意识研究中的应用。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟婴儿任务中，约70%的案例成功移除面部贴纸，且移除后预期自由能显著下降。
limitations: 仅依赖视觉和本体感觉，未考虑触觉输入。
模拟环境与真实婴儿行为可能存在差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自先验机制，使智能体在无外部奖励下通过主动推理自发产生镜像自我识别行为。

papers.title: Ultrasound-CLIP: Semantic-Aware Contrastive Pre-training for Ultrasound Image-Text Understanding
papers.abstract: Ultrasound imaging is widely used in clinical diagnostics due to its real-time capability and radiation-free nature. However, existing vision-language pre-training models, such as CLIP, are primarily designed for other modalities, and are difficult to directly apply to ultrasound data, which exhibit heterogeneous anatomical structures and diverse diagnostic attributes. To bridge this gap, we construct US-365K, a large-scale ultrasound image-text dataset containing 365k paired samples across 52 anatomical categories. We establish Ultrasonographic Diagnostic Taxonomy (UDT) containing two hierarchical knowledge frameworks. Ultrasonographic Hierarchical Anatomical Taxonomy standardizes anatomical organization, and Ultrasonographic Diagnostic Attribute Framework formalizes nine diagnostic dimensions, including body system, organ, diagnosis, shape, margins, echogenicity, internal characteristics, posterior acoustic phenomena, and vascularity. Building upon these foundations, we propose Ultrasound-CLIP, a semantic-aware contrastive learning framework that introduces semantic soft labels and semantic loss to refine sample discrimination. Moreover, we construct a heterogeneous graph modality derived from UDAF's textual representations, enabling structured reasoning over lesion-attribute relations. Extensive experiments with patient-level data splitting demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on classification and retrieval benchmarks, while also delivering strong generalization to zero-shot, linear probing, and fine-tuning tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出超声专用CLIP模型，通过语义软标签和异构图模态提升超声图文理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉-语言预训练模型（如CLIP）主要针对其他模态设计，难以直接应用于超声数据，因为超声图像具有异质性解剖结构和多样化诊断属性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建适用于超声图像的语义感知对比学习框架，以提升图文理解性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建大规模超声图文数据集US-365K，提出超声诊断分类体系UDT（包含层次化解剖分类和九维诊断属性框架），在此基础上设计语义感知对比学习框架Ultrasound-CLIP，引入语义软标签和语义损失，并利用UDT文本表示构建异构图模态进行结构化推理。
contributions: 构建了包含365k样本、52个解剖类别的超声图文数据集US-365K。
提出了超声诊断分类体系UDT，包含层次化解剖分类和九维诊断属性框架。
设计了语义感知对比学习框架Ultrasound-CLIP，引入语义软标签和语义损失，并利用异构图模态增强推理。
analysis.experiments: 在分类和检索基准上达到最先进性能，并在零样本、线性探测和微调任务上展现强泛化能力。
limitations: 数据集仅涵盖52个解剖类别，可能无法覆盖所有超声应用场景。
方法依赖UDT分类体系，构建成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出超声专用CLIP模型，通过语义软标签和异构图模态提升超声图文理解。

papers.title: Unifying UAV Cross-View Geo-Localization via 3D Geometric Perception
papers.abstract: Cross-view geo-localization for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) operating in GNSS-denied environments remains challenging due to the severe geometric discrepancy between oblique UAV imagery and orthogonal satellite maps. Most existing methods address this problem through a decoupled pipeline of place retrieval and pose estimation, implicitly treating perspective distortion as appearance noise rather than an explicit geometric transformation. In this work, we propose a geometry-aware UAV geo-localization framework that explicitly models the 3D scene geometry to unify coarse place recognition and fine-grained pose estimation within a single inference pipeline. Our approach reconstructs a local 3D scene from multi-view UAV image sequences using a Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT), and renders a virtual Bird's-Eye View (BEV) representation that orthorectifies the UAV perspective to align with satellite imagery. This BEV serves as a geometric intermediary that enables robust cross-view retrieval and provides spatial priors for accurate 3 Degrees of Freedom (3-DoF) pose regression. To efficiently handle multiple location hypotheses, we introduce a Satellite-wise Attention Block that isolates the interaction between each satellite candidate and the reconstructed UAV scene, preventing inter-candidate interference while maintaining linear computational complexity. In addition, we release a recalibrated version of the University-1652 dataset with precise coordinate annotations and spatial overlap analysis, enabling rigorous evaluation of end-to-end localization accuracy. Extensive experiments on the refined University-1652 benchmark and SUES-200 demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving robust meter-level localization accuracy and improved generalization in complex urban environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出3D几何感知框架，通过重建局部3D场景并渲染鸟瞰图统一无人机跨视角地理定位中的检索与位姿估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机在GNSS拒止环境下的跨视角地理定位面临严重几何畸变，现有方法将透视畸变视为外观噪声而非显式几何变换，且通常采用解耦的检索-位姿估计流程，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模3D场景几何，将粗粒度地点检索与细粒度位姿估计统一到单一推理流程中，以提升无人机跨视角地理定位的精度和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用VGGT从多视角无人机图像序列重建局部3D场景，渲染虚拟鸟瞰图（BEV）作为几何中介，对齐卫星图像；引入卫星注意力块（Satellite-wise Attention Block）高效处理多位置假设，实现3自由度位姿回归。
contributions: 提出几何感知的无人机地理定位框架，通过显式3D场景建模统一检索与位姿估计。
引入卫星注意力块，以线性复杂度隔离卫星候选与重建场景的交互，避免候选间干扰。
发布重新校准的University-1652数据集，提供精确坐标标注和空间重叠分析，支持端到端定位精度评估。
analysis.experiments: 在精炼的University-1652基准和SUES-200上实验，方法显著优于现有基线，实现米级定位精度和更好的泛化性。
limitations: 依赖多视角图像序列进行3D重建，单张图像场景可能受限。
未提及在极端天气或光照变化下的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出3D几何感知框架，通过重建局部3D场景并渲染鸟瞰图统一无人机跨视角地理定位中的检索与位姿估计。

papers.title: Dense Point-to-Mask Optimization with Reinforced Point Selection for Crowd Instance Segmentation
papers.abstract: Crowd instance segmentation is a crucial task with a wide range of applications, including surveillance and transportation. Currently, point labels are common in crowd datasets, while region labels (e.g., boxes) are rare and inaccurate. The masks obtained through segmentation help to improve the accuracy of region labels and resolve the correspondence between individual location coordinates and crowd density maps. However, directly applying currently popular large foundation models such as SAM does not yield ideal results in dense crowds. To this end, we first propose Dense Point-to-Mask Optimization (DPMO), which integrates SAM with the Nearest Neighbor Exclusive Circle (NNEC) constraint to generate dense instance segmentation from point annotations. With DPMO and manual correction, we obtain mask annotations from the existing point annotations for traditional crowd datasets. Then, to predict instance segmentation in dense crowds, we propose a Reinforced Point Selection (RPS) framework trained with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), which selects the best predicted point from a sampling of the initial point prediction. Through extensive experiments, we achieve state-of-the-art crowd instance segmentation performance on ShanghaiTech, UCF-QNRF, JHU-CROWD++, and NWPU-Crowd datasets. Furthermore, we design new loss functions supervised by masks that boost counting performance across different models, demonstrating the significant role of mask annotations in enhancing counting accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出密集点转掩码优化与强化点选择框架，在四个拥挤场景数据集上实现最先进实例分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 拥挤场景实例分割在监控和交通等领域有广泛应用，但现有数据集多只有点标签，缺乏准确的区域标签，且大型基础模型（如SAM）在密集人群中效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何从点标注生成高质量的密集人群实例分割掩码，并提升分割和计数性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出直接应用SAM等大模型在密集人群中效果不理想，点标注难以直接生成准确掩码。
analysis.method: 提出Dense Point-to-Mask Optimization (DPMO) 结合SAM与最近邻互斥圆约束生成密集实例分割掩码，并基于GRPO训练Reinforced Point Selection (RPS)框架从初始点预测中选取最佳点。
contributions: 提出DPMO方法，利用点标注和SAM生成密集人群实例分割掩码。
提出RPS框架，通过强化学习优化点选择，提升预测性能。
在四个数据集上取得最先进结果，并证明掩码监督可提升计数精度。
analysis.experiments: 在ShanghaiTech、UCF-QNRF、JHU-CROWD++和NWPU-Crowd数据集上进行了实验，取得了最先进的实例分割性能，并验证了掩码损失对计数任务的提升作用。
limitations: 依赖SAM模型，可能受限于SAM在极端密集场景下的表现。
强化学习训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出密集点转掩码优化与强化点选择框架，在四个拥挤场景数据集上实现最先进实例分割性能。

papers.title: AeroTherm-GPT: A Verification-Centered LLM Framework for Thermal Protection System Engineering Workflows
papers.abstract: Integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) into hypersonic thermal protection system (TPS) design is bottlenecked by cascading constraint violations when generating executable simulation artifacts. General-purpose LLMs, treating generation as single-pass text completion, fail to satisfy the sequential, multi-gate constraints inherent in safety-critical engineering workflows. To address this, we propose AeroTherm-GPT, the first TPS-specialized LLM Agent, instantiated through a Constraint-Closed-Loop Generation (CCLG) framework. CCLG organizes TPS artifact generation as an iterative workflow comprising generation, validation, CDG-guided repair, execution, and audit. The Constraint Dependency Graph (CDG) encodes empirical co-resolution structure among constraint categories, directing repair toward upstream fault candidates based on lifecycle ordering priors and empirical co-resolution probabilities. This upstream-priority mechanism resolves multiple downstream violations per action, achieving a Root-Cause Fix Efficiency of 4.16 versus 1.76 for flat-checklist repair. Evaluated on HyTPS-Bench and validated against external benchmarks, AeroTherm-GPT achieves 88.7% End-to-End Success Rate (95% CI: 87.5-89.9), a gain of +12.5 pp over the matched non-CDG ablation baseline, without catastrophic forgetting on scientific reasoning and code generation tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个热防护系统专用LLM Agent，通过约束闭环生成框架实现88.7%端到端成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 将LLM集成到高超声速热防护系统设计中，因生成可执行仿真工件时级联约束违规而受阻，通用LLM无法满足安全关键工程工作流中的顺序多门约束。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM在安全关键工程工作流中生成可执行仿真工件时，因忽略顺序多门约束导致的级联约束违规问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用LLM将生成视为单次文本补全，无法满足安全关键工程工作流中固有的顺序多门约束，导致级联约束违规。
analysis.method: 提出AeroTherm-GPT，基于约束闭环生成框架，包含生成、验证、CDG引导修复、执行和审计的迭代工作流，利用约束依赖图编码约束间的经验共解结构，优先修复上游故障候选。
contributions: 首个热防护系统专用LLM Agent，实现约束闭环生成框架
提出约束依赖图，编码约束类别间的经验共解结构，实现上游优先修复机制
analysis.experiments: 在HyTPS-Bench上评估，并与外部基准验证，AeroTherm-GPT达到88.7%端到端成功率（95% CI: 87.5-89.9），比非CDG消融基线高12.5个百分点，且未在科学推理和代码生成任务上出现灾难性遗忘。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域知识库的完备性
CDG的构建需要专家经验，可能难以迁移到其他领域
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个热防护系统专用LLM Agent，通过约束闭环生成框架实现88.7%端到端成功率。

papers.title: Setup-Independent Full Projector Compensation
papers.abstract: Projector compensation seeks to correct geometric and photometric distortions that occur when images are projected onto nonplanar or textured surfaces. However, most existing methods are highly setup-dependent, requiring fine-tuning or retraining whenever the surface, lighting, or projector-camera pose changes. Progress has been limited by two key challenges: (1) the absence of large, diverse training datasets and (2) existing geometric correction models are typically constrained by specific spatial setups; without further retraining or fine-tuning, they often fail to generalize directly to novel geometric configurations. We introduce SIComp, the first Setup-Independent framework for full projector Compensation, capable of generalizing to unseen setups without fine-tuning or retraining. To enable this, we construct a large-scale real-world dataset spanning 277 distinct projector-camera setups. SIComp adopts a co-adaptive design that decouples geometry and photometry: A carefully tailored optical flow module performs online geometric correction, while a novel photometric network handles photometric compensation. To further enhance robustness under varying illumination, we integrate intensity-varying surface priors into the network design. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SIComp consistently produces high-quality compensation across diverse unseen setups, substantially outperforming existing methods in terms of generalization ability and establishing the first generalizable solution to projector compensation. The code and dataset are available on our project page: https://hai-bo-li.github.io/SIComp/

analysis.tldr: 提出首个无需微调即可泛化到新投影设置的补偿框架SIComp，并构建大规模数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有投影补偿方法高度依赖特定设置，每次更换表面、光照或投影仪-相机位姿都需要重新微调或训练，缺乏泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何实现无需重新训练或微调、能直接泛化到未见过的投影几何和光度设置的投影补偿。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两个关键瓶颈：缺乏大规模多样化训练数据集，以及现有几何校正模型受限于特定空间设置，无法直接泛化到新几何配置。
analysis.method: SIComp采用协同自适应设计，解耦几何与光度：光流模块在线几何校正，光度网络处理光度补偿，并集成强度变化表面先验增强鲁棒性。
contributions: 首个无需微调即可泛化到新投影设置的补偿框架SIComp。
构建包含277种不同投影仪-相机设置的大规模真实世界数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在多种未见过的设置上进行实验，SIComp持续产生高质量补偿，泛化能力显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能对极端几何变形或复杂光照条件仍有挑战。
数据集虽大但可能未覆盖所有实际场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个无需微调即可泛化到新投影设置的补偿框架SIComp，并构建大规模数据集。

papers.title: Solving the Two-dimensional single stock size Cutting Stock Problem with SAT and MaxSAT
papers.abstract: Cutting rectangular items from stock sheets to satisfy demands while minimizing waste is a central manufacturing task. The Two-Dimensional Single Stock Size Cutting Stock Problem (2D-CSSP) generalizes bin packing by requiring multiple copies of each item type, which causes a strong combinatorial blow-up. We present a SAT-based framework where item types are expanded by demand, each copy has a sheet-assignment variable and non-overlap constraints are activated only for copies assigned to the same sheet. We also introduce an infeasible-orientation elimination rule that fixes rotation variables when only one orientation can fit the sheet. For minimizing the number of sheets, we compare three approaches: non-incremental SAT with binary search, incremental SAT with clause reuse across iterations and weighted partial MaxSAT. On the Cui--Zhao benchmark suite, our best SAT configurations certify two to three times more instances as provably optimal and achieve lower optimality gaps than OR-Tools, CPLEX and Gurobi. The relative ranking among SAT approaches depends on rotation: incremental SAT is strongest without rotation, while non-incremental SAT is more effective when rotation increases formula size.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于SAT/MaxSAT的二维单规格板材切割问题求解框架，在Cui-Zhao基准上优于OR-Tools、CPLEX和Gurobi。
analysis.research_motivation: 二维切割下料问题在制造业中至关重要，但需求副本导致组合爆炸，现有精确求解器（如OR-Tools、CPLEX、Gurobi）在大规模实例上最优性证明能力不足。
analysis.problem: 求解二维单规格板材切割问题（2D-CSSP），最小化板材使用数量，并证明最优性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于SAT的框架：按需求展开物品类型，为每个副本分配板材变量，仅对同板材副本激活非重叠约束；引入不可行方向消除规则固定旋转变量；采用三种SAT方法（非增量二分搜索SAT、增量SAT复用子句、加权部分MaxSAT）最小化板材数。
contributions: 提出首个基于SAT/MaxSAT的2D-CSSP求解框架，包含需求展开、非重叠约束激活和方向消除规则。
在Cui-Zhao基准上，最佳SAT配置比OR-Tools、CPLEX和Gurobi证明更多实例的最优性，并降低最优性间隙。
analysis.experiments: 在Cui-Zhao基准套件上测试，比较非增量SAT、增量SAT和加权部分MaxSAT，并与OR-Tools、CPLEX、Gurobi对比。
limitations: 方法可能对旋转变量敏感，不同旋转设置下最优SAT策略不同。
未讨论更大规模实例或实际生产约束（如切割工艺限制）。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于SAT/MaxSAT的二维单规格板材切割问题求解框架，在Cui-Zhao基准上优于OR-Tools、CPLEX和Gurobi。

papers.title: The AnIML Ontology: Enabling Semantic Interoperability for Large-Scale Experimental Data in Interconnected Scientific Labs
papers.abstract: Achieving semantic interoperability across heterogeneous experimental data systems remains a major barrier to data-driven scientific discovery. The Analytical Information Markup Language (AnIML), a flexible XML-based standard for analytical chemistry and biology, is increasingly used in industrial R&D labs for managing and exchanging experimental data. However, the expressivity of the XML schema permits divergent interpretations across stakeholders, introducing inconsistencies that undermine the interoperability the AnIML schema was designed to support. In this paper, we present the AnIML Ontology, an OWL 2 ontology that formalises the semantics of AnIML and aligns it with the Allotrope Data Format to support future cross-system and cross-lab interoperability. The ontology was developed using an expert-in-the-loop approach combining LLM-assisted requirement elicitation with collaborative ontology engineering. We validate the ontology through a multi-layered approach: data-driven transformation of real-world AnIML files into knowledge graphs, competency question verification via SPARQL, and a novel validation protocol based on adversarial negative competency questions mapped to established ontological anti-patterns and enforced via SHACL constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出AnIML本体，通过OWL 2形式化语义并集成专家与LLM方法，解决实验数据语义互操作性问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 异构实验数据系统间缺乏语义互操作性，阻碍数据驱动科学发现；现有AnIML标准因XML模式表达力过强导致解释不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化AnIML的语义并消除其XML模式带来的歧义，实现跨系统/跨实验室的语义互操作性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AnIML的XML模式允许不同利益相关者产生不同解释，导致不一致性，削弱了互操作性。
analysis.method: 采用专家参与结合LLM辅助需求获取与协作本体工程的方法，构建OWL 2本体，并与Allotrope Data Format对齐。
contributions: 提出了AnIML Ontology，一个形式化AnIML语义的OWL 2本体
设计了基于对抗性负能力问题与SHACL约束的新颖验证协议
analysis.experiments: 通过数据驱动转换真实AnIML文件为知识图谱、能力问题SPARQL验证以及基于对抗性负能力问题的验证协议进行多层面验证。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域专家参与，可扩展性待验证
验证仅基于真实AnIML文件，未提及大规模跨实验室测试
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AnIML本体，通过OWL 2形式化语义并集成专家与LLM方法，解决实验数据语义互操作性问题。

papers.title: LiteInception: A Lightweight and Interpretable Deep Learning Framework for General Aviation Fault Diagnosis
papers.abstract: General aviation fault diagnosis and efficient maintenance are critical to flight safety; however, deploying deep learning models on resource-constrained edge devices poses dual challenges in computational capacity and interpretability. This paper proposes LiteInception--a lightweight interpretable fault diagnosis framework designed for edge deployment. The framework adopts a two-stage cascaded architecture aligned with standard maintenance workflows: Stage 1 performs high-recall fault detection, and Stage 2 conducts fine-grained fault classification on anomalous samples, thereby decoupling optimization objectives and enabling on-demand allocation of computational resources. For model compression, a multi-method fusion strategy based on mutual information, gradient analysis, and SE attention weights is proposed to reduce the input sensor channels from 23 to 15, and a 1+1 branch LiteInception architecture is introduced that compresses InceptionTime parameters by 70%, accelerates CPU inference by over 8x, with less than 3% F1 loss. Furthermore, knowledge distillation is introduced as a precision-recall regulation mechanism, enabling the same lightweight model to adapt to different scenarios--such as safety-critical and auxiliary diagnosis--by switching training strategies. Finally, a dual-layer interpretability framework integrating four attribution methods is constructed, providing traceable evidence chains of "which sensor x which time period." Experiments on the NGAFID dataset demonstrate a fault detection accuracy of 81.92% with 83.24% recall, and a fault identification accuracy of 77.00%, validating the framework's favorable balance among efficiency, accuracy, and interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量可解释故障诊断框架LiteInception，通过级联架构、多方法融合压缩和知识蒸馏，在NGAFID数据集上实现高效准确诊断。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用航空故障诊断对飞行安全至关重要，但深度学习模型在资源受限的边缘设备上面临计算能力和可解释性的双重挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何在边缘设备上实现轻量、高效且可解释的通用航空故障诊断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用两阶段级联架构（高召回检测+细粒度分类），基于互信息、梯度分析和SE注意力权重的多方法融合策略压缩输入通道，提出1+1分支LiteInception架构压缩参数，引入知识蒸馏作为精度-召回调节机制，并构建集成四种归因方法的双层可解释性框架。
contributions: 提出LiteInception轻量可解释故障诊断框架，适用于边缘部署。
设计多方法融合压缩策略和1+1分支架构，实现70%参数压缩和8倍CPU加速。
引入知识蒸馏作为精度-召回调节机制，适应不同场景。
构建双层可解释性框架，提供传感器-时间维度的可追溯证据链。
analysis.experiments: 在NGAFID数据集上，故障检测准确率81.92%，召回率83.24%，故障识别准确率77.00%。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未与其他轻量方法进行详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量可解释故障诊断框架LiteInception，通过级联架构、多方法融合压缩和知识蒸馏，在NGAFID数据集上实现高效准确诊断。

papers.title: Causal Scene Narration with Runtime Safety Supervision for Vision-Language-Action Driving
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for autonomous driving must integrate diverse textual inputs, including navigation commands, hazard warnings, and traffic state descriptions, yet current systems often present these as disconnected fragments, forcing the model to discover on its own which environmental constraints are relevant to the current maneuver. We introduce Causal Scene Narration (CSN), which restructures VLA text inputs through intent-constraint alignment, quantitative grounding, and structured separation, at inference time with zero GPU cost. We complement CSN with Simplex-based runtime safety supervision and training-time alignment via Plackett-Luce DPO with negative log-likelihood (NLL) regularization. A multi-town closed-loop CARLA evaluation shows that CSN improves Driving Score by +31.1% on original LMDrive and +24.5% on the preference-aligned variant. A controlled ablation reveals that causal structure accounts for 39.1% of this gain, with the remainder attributable to information content alone. A perception noise ablation confirms that CSN's benefit is robust to realistic sensing errors. Semantic safety supervision improves Infraction Score, while reactive Time-To-Collision monitoring degrades performance, demonstrating that intent-aware monitoring is needed for VLA systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果场景叙述（CSN）方法，通过意图-约束对齐和运行时安全监督提升VLA驾驶模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA驾驶模型将导航命令、危险警告等文本输入视为孤立片段，迫使模型自行发现与环境约束的关联，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何结构化整合多源文本输入并实现运行时安全监督，以提升VLA驾驶模型的决策质量和安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出因果场景叙述（CSN），包含意图-约束对齐、定量基础化和结构化分离，推理时零GPU成本；结合Simplex运行时安全监督和Plackett-Luce DPO训练时对齐。
contributions: 提出CSN方法，通过因果结构重组VLA文本输入，显著提升驾驶分数。
引入Simplex运行时安全监督和偏好对齐训练，改善安全指标。
analysis.experiments: 在CARLA多城镇闭环评估中，CSN在原始LMDrive上提升驾驶分数31.1%，在偏好对齐变体上提升24.5%；消融实验显示因果结构贡献39.1%增益；感知噪声实验验证鲁棒性。
limitations: 仅在仿真环境CARLA中验证，真实场景效果未知。
安全监督依赖Simplex方法，可能不适用于所有驾驶场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果场景叙述（CSN）方法，通过意图-约束对齐和运行时安全监督提升VLA驾驶模型性能。

papers.title: Reliability-Aware Geometric Fusion for Robust Audio-Visual Navigation
papers.abstract: Audio-Visual Navigation (AVN) requires an embodied agent to navigate toward a sound source by utilizing both vision and binaural audio. A core challenge arises in complex acoustic environments, where binaural cues become intermittently unreliable, particularly when generalizing to previously unheard sound categories. To address this, we propose RAVN (Reliability-Aware Audio-Visual Navigation), a framework that conditions cross-modal fusion on audio-derived reliability cues, dynamically calibrating the integration of audio and visual inputs. RAVN introduces an Acoustic Geometry Reasoner (AGR) that is trained with geometric proxy supervision. Using a heteroscedastic Gaussian NLL objective, AGR learns observation-dependent dispersion as a practical reliability cue, eliminating the need for geometric labels during inference. Additionally, we introduce Reliability-Aware Geometric Modulation (RAGM), which converts the learned cue into a soft gate to modulate visual features, thereby mitigating cross-modal conflicts. We evaluate RAVN on SoundSpaces using both Replica and Matterport3D environments, and the results show consistent improvements in navigation performance, with notable robustness in the challenging unheard sound setting.

analysis.tldr: 提出可靠性感知几何融合框架RAVN，通过音频可靠性线索动态校准视听融合，提升复杂声学环境下的导航鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 视听导航中双耳线索在复杂声学环境下间歇性不可靠，尤其泛化到未听过声音类别时性能下降，现有方法缺乏对跨模态融合可靠性的动态校准。
analysis.problem: 如何利用音频可靠性线索动态调节视听融合，以应对复杂声学环境和未见声音类别的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RAVN框架，包含声学几何推理器（AGR）和可靠性感知几何调制（RAGM）。AGR通过异方差高斯NLL损失训练，学习观测依赖的分散度作为可靠性线索；RAGM将可靠性线索转换为软门控调制视觉特征，缓解跨模态冲突。
contributions: 提出可靠性感知融合框架RAVN，利用音频可靠性线索动态校准视听融合。
设计声学几何推理器（AGR），通过几何代理监督和异方差NLL损失学习可靠性线索，无需推理时几何标签。
引入可靠性感知几何调制（RAGM），将可靠性线索转换为软门控以缓解跨模态冲突。
analysis.experiments: 在SoundSpaces的Replica和Matterport3D环境上评估，导航性能一致提升，尤其在未见声音设置中表现出鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定声学环境假设，泛化到极端噪声场景需验证。
可靠性线索的准确性可能受限于代理监督的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可靠性感知几何融合框架RAVN，通过音频可靠性线索动态校准视听融合，提升复杂声学环境下的导航鲁棒性。

papers.title: SteerFlow: Steering Rectified Flows for Faithful Inversion-Based Image Editing
papers.abstract: Recent advances in flow-based generative models have enabled training-free, text-guided image editing by inverting an image into its latent noise and regenerating it under a new target conditional guidance. However, existing methods struggle to preserve source fidelity: higher-order solvers incur additional model inferences, truncated inversion constrains editability, and feature injection methods lack architectural transferability. To address these limitations, we propose SteerFlow, a model-agnostic editing framework with strong theoretical guarantees on source fidelity. In the forward process, we introduce an Amortized Fixed-Point Solver that implicitly straightens the forward trajectory by enforcing velocity consistency across consecutive timesteps, yielding a high-fidelity inverted latent. In the backward process, we introduce Trajectory Interpolation, which adaptively blends target-editing and source-reconstruction velocities to keep the editing trajectory anchored to the source. To further improve background preservation, we introduce an Adaptive Masking mechanism that spatially constrains the editing signal with concept-guided segmentation and source-target velocity differences. Extensive experiments on FLUX.1-dev and Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium demonstrate that SteerFlow consistently achieves better editing quality than existing methods. Finally, we show that SteerFlow extends naturally to a complex multi-turn editing paradigm without accumulating drift.

analysis.tldr: 提出SteerFlow框架，通过固定点求解器和轨迹插值实现高保真图像编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于流的图像编辑方法在保持源图像保真度方面存在困难，高阶求解器计算成本高、截断反演限制可编辑性、特征注入方法缺乏架构迁移性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲编辑灵活性的前提下，实现高保真度的源图像保持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SteerFlow框架，包含三个组件：1) 前向过程中的摊销固定点求解器，通过强制连续时间步的速度一致性隐式拉直前向轨迹；2) 后向过程中的轨迹插值，自适应混合目标编辑和源重建速度；3) 自适应掩码机制，利用概念引导分割和源-目标速度差异空间约束编辑信号。
contributions: 提出模型无关的编辑框架SteerFlow，具有强理论保真度保证。
引入摊销固定点求解器和轨迹插值方法，提升编辑质量。
在FLUX.1-dev和Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium上验证了优于现有方法的编辑质量，并扩展到多轮编辑场景。
analysis.experiments: 在FLUX.1-dev和Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium上进行实验，结果表明SteerFlow在编辑质量上一致优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练的分割模型进行掩码生成。
多轮编辑的长期漂移问题虽被缓解但未完全消除。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SteerFlow框架，通过固定点求解器和轨迹插值实现高保真图像编辑。

papers.title: End-to-End Shared Attention Estimation via Group Detection with Feedback Refinement
papers.abstract: This paper proposes an end-to-end shared attention estimation method via group detection. Most previous methods estimate shared attention (SA) without detecting the actual group of people focusing on it, or assume that there is a single SA point in a given image. These issues limit the applicability of SA detection in practice and impact performance. To address them, we propose to simultaneously achieve group detection and shared attention estimation using a two step process: (i) the generation of SA heatmaps relying on individual gaze attention heatmaps and group membership scalars estimated in a group inference; (ii) a refinement of the initial group memberships allowing to account for the initial SA heatmaps, and the final prediction of the SA heatmap. Experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms other methods in group detection and shared attention estimation. Additional analyses validate the effectiveness of the proposed components. Code: https://github.com/chihina/sagd-CVPRW2026.

analysis.tldr: 提出端到端共享注意力估计方法，通过组检测和反馈细化同时预测群体和注意力点。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法要么不检测实际关注群体，要么假设图像中只有一个共享注意力点，限制了实际应用和性能。
analysis.problem: 同时进行群体检测和共享注意力估计，解决多群体多注意力点的场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两步过程：首先生成共享注意力热图（基于个体注视热图和组隶属度），然后通过反馈细化初始组隶属度并最终预测共享注意力热图。
contributions: 提出端到端框架同时进行群体检测和共享注意力估计
引入反馈细化机制改进组隶属度预测
analysis.experiments: 实验表明方法在群体检测和共享注意力估计上优于其他方法，组件有效性通过额外分析验证。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量个体注视热图

papers.title: Transformer self-attention encoder-decoder with multimodal deep learning for response time series forecasting and digital twin support in wind structural health monitoring
papers.abstract: The wind-induced structural response forecasting capabilities of a novel transformer methodology are examined here. The model also provides a digital twin component for bridge structural health monitoring. Firstly, the approach uses the temporal characteristics of the system to train a forecasting model. Secondly, the vibration predictions are compared to the measured ones to detect large deviations. Finally, the identified cases are used as an early-warning indicator of structural change. The artificial intelligence-based model outperforms approaches for response forecasting as no assumption on wind stationarity or on structural normal vibration behavior is needed. Specifically, wind-excited dynamic behavior suffers from uncertainty related to obtaining poor predictions when the environmental or traffic conditions change. This results in a hard distinction of what constitutes normal vibration behavior. To this end, a framework is rigorously examined on real-world measurements from the Hardanger Bridge monitored by the Norwegian University of Science and Technology. The approach captures accurate structural behavior in realistic conditions, and with respect to the changes in the system excitation. The results, importantly, highlight the potential of transformer-based digital twin components to serve as next-generation tools for resilient infrastructure management, continuous learning, and adaptive monitoring over the system's lifecycle with respect to temporal characteristics.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于Transformer自注意力编码器-解码器的多模态深度学习框架，用于风致结构响应预测和数字孪生支持，在桥梁健康监测中优于传统方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 风致结构响应预测面临非平稳风环境和交通条件变化带来的不确定性，传统方法难以区分正常振动行为，亟需无需假设风平稳性或结构正常振动行为的智能预测方法。
analysis.problem: 解决风致结构响应预测中因环境或交通条件变化导致的预测精度下降问题，并实现基于数字孪生的结构健康监测早期预警。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用Transformer自注意力编码器-解码器架构，结合多模态深度学习，利用系统时间特征训练预测模型，将振动预测值与实测值对比检测偏差，并将识别案例作为结构变化的早期预警指标。
contributions: 提出一种无需风平稳性或结构正常振动行为假设的Transformer预测方法。
构建了基于数字孪生的桥梁结构健康监测框架，实现连续学习和自适应监测。
analysis.experiments: 在挪威科技大学监测的Hardanger Bridge真实数据上验证，结果表明该方法能准确捕捉实际条件下的结构行为，并优于其他预测方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的多模态传感器数据。
数字孪生组件的长期适应性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于Transformer自注意力编码器-解码器的多模态深度学习框架，用于风致结构响应预测和数字孪生支持，在桥梁健康监测中优于传统方法。

papers.title: Bias mitigation in graph diffusion models
papers.abstract: Most existing graph diffusion models have significant bias problems. We observe that the forward diffusion's maximum perturbation distribution in most models deviates from the standard Gaussian distribution, while reverse sampling consistently starts from a standard Gaussian distribution, which results in a reverse-starting bias. Together with the inherent exposure bias of diffusion models, this results in degraded generation quality. This paper proposes a comprehensive approach to mitigate both biases. To mitigate reverse-starting bias, we employ a newly designed Langevin sampling algorithm to align with the forward maximum perturbation distribution, establishing a new reverse-starting point. To address the exposure bias, we introduce a score correction mechanism based on a newly defined score difference. Our approach, which requires no network modifications, is validated across multiple models, datasets, and tasks, achieving state-of-the-art results.Code is at https://github.com/kunzhan/spp

analysis.tldr: 提出无网络修改的偏置缓解方法，通过Langevin采样对齐前向最大扰动分布和分数校正机制，提升图扩散模型生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图扩散模型存在显著偏置问题，导致生成质量下降，亟需系统性缓解方法。
analysis.problem: 图扩散模型中的反向起始偏置（前向最大扰动分布偏离标准高斯）和暴露偏置（扩散模型固有）导致生成质量退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到多数模型前向扩散的最大扰动分布偏离标准高斯分布，而反向采样始终从标准高斯开始，造成反向起始偏置；同时存在暴露偏置。
analysis.method: 1) 使用新设计的Langevin采样算法对齐前向最大扰动分布，建立新的反向起始点；2) 基于新定义的分数差异引入分数校正机制缓解暴露偏置。无需修改网络结构。
contributions: 识别并形式化了图扩散模型中的反向起始偏置问题
提出无需网络修改的偏置缓解方法，包含Langevin采样对齐和分数校正机制
在多个模型、数据集和任务上取得最先进结果
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型、数据集和任务上验证，达到最先进结果。摘要未提供具体实验细节。
limitations: 可能增加采样计算开销
对分数差异的定义可能依赖特定假设
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无网络修改的偏置缓解方法，通过Langevin采样对齐前向最大扰动分布和分数校正机制，提升图扩散模型生成质量。

papers.title: Spatial-Aware Conditioned Fusion for Audio-Visual Navigation
papers.abstract: Audio-visual navigation tasks require agents to locate and navigate toward continuously vocalizing targets using only visual observations and acoustic cues. However, existing methods mainly rely on simple feature concatenation or late fusion, and lack an explicit discrete representation of the target's relative position, which limits learning efficiency and generalization. We propose Spatial-Aware Conditioned Fusion (SACF). SACF first discretizes the target's relative direction and distance from audio-visual cues, predicts their distributions, and encodes them as a compact descriptor for policy conditioning and state modeling. Then, SACF uses audio embeddings and spatial descriptors to generate channel-wise scaling and bias to modulate visual features via conditional linear transformation, producing target-oriented fused representations. SACF improves navigation efficiency with lower computational overhead and generalizes well to unheard target sounds.

analysis.tldr: 提出空间感知条件融合（SACF）方法，通过离散化目标相对位置并利用条件线性变换调制视觉特征，提升视听导航效率与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视听导航方法主要依赖简单的特征拼接或晚期融合，缺乏对目标相对位置的显式离散表示，导致学习效率低、泛化能力差。
analysis.problem: 如何利用音频和视觉线索显式建模目标的相对位置，并生成目标导向的融合表示以提升导航效率与泛化性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SACF首先从视听线索中离散化目标的相对方向和距离，预测其分布并编码为紧凑描述符用于策略条件与状态建模；然后利用音频嵌入和空间描述符生成通道级缩放与偏置，通过条件线性变换调制视觉特征，产生目标导向的融合表示。
contributions: 提出空间感知条件融合（SACF）方法，显式建模目标相对位置并用于策略条件化。
通过条件线性变换实现音频-视觉特征的目标导向融合，提升导航效率并降低计算开销。
在未见过的目标声音上表现出良好的泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量音频-视觉对齐数据。
离散化位置表示的分辨率可能影响细粒度导航精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出空间感知条件融合（SACF）方法，通过离散化目标相对位置并利用条件线性变换调制视觉特征，提升视听导航效率与泛化能力。

papers.title: OpenGo: An OpenClaw-Based Robotic Dog with Real-Time Skill Switching
papers.abstract: Adaptation to complex tasks and multiple scenarios remains a significant challenge for a single robot agent. The ability to acquire organize, and switch between a wide range of skills in real time, particularly in dynamic environments, has become a fundamental requirement for embodied intelligence. We introduce OpenGo, an OpenClaw-powered embodied robotic dog capable of switching skills in real time according to the scene and task instructions. Specifically, the agent is equipped with (1) a customizable skill library with easy skill import and autonomous skill validation, (2) a dispatcher that selects and invokes different skills according to task prompts or language instructions, and (3) a self-learning framework that fine-tunes skills based on task completion and human feedback. We deploy the agent in Unitree's Go2 robotic dog and validate its capabilities in self-checking and switching of skills autonomously. In addition, by integrating Feishu-platform communication, we enable natural-language guidance and human feedback, allowing inexperienced users to control the robotic dog through simple instructions.

analysis.tldr: OpenGo 是一个基于 OpenClaw 的机器狗，支持实时技能切换和自然语言指令控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 单一机器人难以适应复杂任务和多场景，需要实时获取、组织和切换多种技能，尤其是在动态环境中。
analysis.problem: 如何让机器人在动态环境中根据场景和任务指令实时切换技能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建可定制的技能库、调度器（根据任务提示或语言指令选择技能）和基于任务完成与人类反馈的自我学习框架，并集成飞书平台实现自然语言交互。
contributions: 提出 OpenGo 系统，包含可定制技能库、调度器和自我学习框架。
在 Unitree Go2 机器狗上验证了自主技能检查和切换能力。
集成飞书平台，支持自然语言指令和人类反馈，降低用户使用门槛。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未在多种真实复杂环境中充分验证。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning

papers.title: Audio Spatially-Guided Fusion for Audio-Visual Navigation
papers.abstract: Audio-visual Navigation refers to an agent utilizing visual and auditory information in complex 3D environments to accomplish target localization and path planning, thereby achieving autonomous navigation. The core challenge of this task lies in the following: how the agent can break free from the dependence on training data and achieve autonomous navigation with good generalization performance when facing changes in environments and sound sources. To address this challenge, we propose an Audio Spatially-Guided Fusion for Audio-Visual Navigation method. First, we design an audio spatial feature encoder, which adaptively extracts target-related spatial state information through an audio intensity attention mechanism; based on this, we introduce an Audio Spatial State Guided Fusion (ASGF) to achieve dynamic alignment and adaptive fusion of multimodal features, effectively alleviating noise interference caused by perceptual uncertainty. Experimental results on the Replica and Matterport3D datasets indicate that our method is particularly effective on unheard tasks, demonstrating improved generalization under unknown sound source distributions.

analysis.tldr: 提出音频空间引导融合方法，提升视听导航在未知声音源下的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 视听导航中，智能体依赖训练数据，面对环境和声源变化时泛化性能差，现有方法难以摆脱数据依赖。
analysis.problem: 如何实现视听导航在未知环境和声源下的自主导航与良好泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计音频空间特征编码器（音频强度注意力机制提取空间状态信息），并引入音频空间状态引导融合（ASGF）实现多模态特征动态对齐与自适应融合。
contributions: 提出音频空间特征编码器，通过音频强度注意力机制自适应提取目标相关空间状态信息。
提出音频空间状态引导融合方法，实现多模态特征动态对齐与自适应融合，缓解感知不确定性噪声干扰。
analysis.experiments: 在Replica和Matterport3D数据集上实验，在未听过任务上表现有效，泛化性提升。
limitations: 可能仅在特定仿真环境验证，真实场景效果未知。
未与其他先进方法进行详细对比分析。

papers.title: Development and multi-center evaluation of domain-adapted speech recognition for human-AI teaming in real-world gastrointestinal endoscopy
papers.abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) is a critical interface for human-AI interaction in gastrointestinal endoscopy, yet its reliability in real-world clinical settings is limited by domain-specific terminology and complex acoustic conditions. Here, we present EndoASR, a domain-adapted ASR system designed for real-time deployment in endoscopic workflows. We develop a two-stage adaptation strategy based on synthetic endoscopy reports, targeting domain-specific language modeling and noise robustness. In retrospective evaluation across six endoscopists, EndoASR substantially improves both transcription accuracy and clinical usability, reducing character error rate (CER) from 20.52% to 14.14% and increasing medical term accuracy (Med ACC) from 54.30% to 87.59%. In a prospective multi-center study spanning five independent endoscopy centers, EndoASR demonstrates consistent generalization under heterogeneous real-world conditions. Compared with the baseline Paraformer model, CER is reduced from 16.20% to 14.97%, while Med ACC is improved from 61.63% to 84.16%, confirming its robustness in practical deployment scenarios. Notably, EndoASR achieves a real-time factor (RTF) of 0.005, significantly faster than Whisper-large-v3 (RTF 0.055), while maintaining a compact model size of 220M parameters, enabling efficient edge deployment. Furthermore, integration with large language models demonstrates that improved ASR quality directly enhances downstream structured information extraction and clinician-AI interaction. These results demonstrate that domain-adapted ASR can serve as a reliable interface for human-AI teaming in gastrointestinal endoscopy, with consistent performance validated across multi-center real-world clinical settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出领域自适应语音识别系统EndoASR，通过两阶段适应策略显著提升内镜场景下的转录准确率和临床可用性，并在多中心前瞻性研究中验证了泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动语音识别（ASR）是胃肠内镜中人机交互的关键接口，但领域特定术语和复杂声学条件导致其在真实临床环境中可靠性不足。
analysis.problem: 解决通用ASR在内镜工作流中因领域术语和噪声导致的低准确率问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于合成内镜报告的两阶段适应策略，分别针对领域语言建模和噪声鲁棒性进行优化。
contributions: 提出EndoASR，一个面向内镜工作流的领域自适应ASR系统，采用两阶段适应策略。
在回顾性评估和多中心前瞻性研究中验证了EndoASR在转录准确率、医疗术语准确率和实时性上的显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 回顾性评估（6名内镜医师）显示CER从20.52%降至14.14%，Med ACC从54.30%提升至87.59%；多中心前瞻性研究（5个中心）显示CER从16.20%降至14.97%，Med ACC从61.63%提升至84.16%，RTF为0.005，模型大小220M参数。
limitations: 可能依赖合成报告的质量和多样性。
