analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出领域自适应语音识别系统EndoASR，通过两阶段适应策略显著提升内镜场景下的转录准确率和临床可用性，并在多中心前瞻性研究中验证了泛化能力。

papers.title: Can Video Diffusion Models Predict Past Frames? Bidirectional Cycle Consistency for Reversible Interpolation
papers.abstract: Video frame interpolation aims to synthesize realistic intermediate frames between given endpoints while adhering to specific motion semantics. While recent generative models have improved visual fidelity, they predominantly operate in a unidirectional manner, lacking mechanisms to self-verify temporal consistency. This often leads to motion drift, directional ambiguity, and boundary misalignment, especially in long-range sequences. Inspired by the principle of temporal cycle-consistency in self-supervised learning, we propose a novel bidirectional framework that enforces symmetry between forward and backward generation trajectories. Our approach introduces learnable directional tokens to explicitly condition a shared backbone on temporal orientation, enabling the model to jointly optimize forward synthesis and backward reconstruction within a single unified architecture. This cycle-consistent supervision acts as a powerful regularizer, ensuring that generated motion paths are logically reversible. Furthermore, we employ a curriculum learning strategy that progressively trains the model from short to long sequences, stabilizing dynamics across varying durations. Crucially, our cyclic constraints are applied only during training; inference requires a single forward pass, maintaining the high efficiency of the base model. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in imaging quality, motion smoothness, and dynamic control on both 37-frame and 73-frame tasks, outperforming strong baselines while incurring no additional computational overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出双向循环一致性框架，通过可学习方向令牌和课程学习提升视频插帧的时序一致性和运动平滑性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频插帧方法多为单向生成，缺乏时序自验证机制，导致长序列中运动漂移、方向模糊和边界错位。
analysis.problem: 视频插帧中单向生成无法保证时序一致性，尤其在长序列中运动路径不可逆。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双向循环一致性框架，包含可学习方向令牌以条件化共享骨干网络，联合优化前向合成与后向重建；采用课程学习从短序列到长序列渐进训练。
contributions: 提出双向循环一致性框架，通过对称前向-后向生成轨迹实现时序自验证。
引入可学习方向令牌和课程学习策略，提升长序列插帧的稳定性和效率。
analysis.experiments: 在37帧和73帧任务上达到SOTA，成像质量、运动平滑度和动态控制均优于强基线，且无额外计算开销。
limitations: 可能对极端运动或遮挡场景敏感。

analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双向循环一致性框架，通过可学习方向令牌和课程学习提升视频插帧的时序一致性和运动平滑性。

papers.title: MiCA Learns More Knowledge Than LoRA and Full Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Minor Component Adaptation (MiCA) is a novel parameter-efficient fine-tuning method for large language models that focuses on adapting underutilized subspaces of model representations. Unlike conventional methods such as Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), which target dominant subspaces, MiCA leverages Singular Value Decomposition to identify subspaces related to minor singular vectors associated with the least significant singular values and constrains the update of parameters during fine-tuning to those directions. This strategy leads to up to 5.9x improvement in knowledge acquisition under optimized training hyperparameters and a minimal parameter footprint of 6-60% compared to LoRA. These results suggest that constraining adaptation to minor singular directions provides a more efficient and stable mechanism for integrating new knowledge into pre-trained language models.

analysis.tldr: MiCA通过约束微调参数到最小奇异方向，比LoRA和全微调更高效地获取新知识。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法如LoRA主要关注模型表示的主导子空间，可能限制了新知识的有效整合，需要探索更高效的微调策略。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种参数高效微调方法，在极小参数开销下更有效地向预训练语言模型注入新知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Minor Component Adaptation (MiCA)，利用奇异值分解识别与最小奇异值对应的子空间，并将微调参数更新约束在这些方向上。
contributions: 提出MiCA方法，通过约束微调到最小奇异方向实现高效知识获取。
在优化超参数下，知识获取提升高达5.9倍，参数开销仅为LoRA的6-60%。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的知识或模型架构。
未讨论与全微调在多种任务上的全面对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MiCA通过约束微调参数到最小奇异方向，比LoRA和全微调更高效地获取新知识。

papers.title: From Understanding to Erasing: Towards Complete and Stable Video Object Removal
papers.abstract: Video object removal aims to eliminate target objects from videos while plausibly completing missing regions and preserving spatio-temporal consistency. Although diffusion models have recently advanced this task, it remains challenging to remove object-induced side effects (e.g., shadows, reflections, and illumination changes) without compromising overall coherence. This limitation stems from the insufficient physical and semantic understanding of the target object and its interactions with the scene. In this paper, we propose to introduce understanding into erasing from two complementary perspectives. Externally, we introduce a distillation scheme that transfers the relationships between objects and their induced effects from vision foundation models to video diffusion models. Internally, we propose a framewise context cross-attention mechanism that grounds each denoising block in informative, unmasked context surrounding the target region. External and internal guidance jointly enable our model to understand the target object, its induced effects, and the global background context, resulting in clear and coherent object removal. Extensive experiments demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance, and we establish the first real-world benchmark for video object removal to facilitate future research and community progress. Our code, data, and models are available at: https://github.com/WeChatCV/UnderEraser.

analysis.tldr: 提出外部蒸馏与内部上下文交叉注意力机制，实现视频物体完整稳定去除。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频物体去除中，现有扩散模型难以消除物体引起的阴影、反射等副作用，且缺乏对物体与场景交互的物理和语义理解。
analysis.problem: 如何实现视频物体去除时既消除目标物体及其副作用，又保持时空一致性和整体连贯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法因对目标物体及其与场景交互的理解不足，导致无法有效去除物体引起的阴影、反射和光照变化等副作用。
analysis.method: 提出外部蒸馏（从视觉基础模型迁移物体与副作用关系）和内部帧级上下文交叉注意力（利用未掩码上下文信息引导去噪）相结合的方法。
contributions: 提出外部蒸馏和内部上下文交叉注意力机制，增强模型对目标物体及其副作用的语义理解。
建立首个真实世界视频物体去除基准，并开源代码、数据和模型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖外部视觉基础模型的质量和泛化能力。
帧级上下文交叉注意力可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出外部蒸馏与内部上下文交叉注意力机制，实现视频物体完整稳定去除。

papers.title: Scale over Preference: The Impact of AI-Generated Content on Online Content Ecology
papers.abstract: The rapid proliferation of Artificial Intelligence-Generated Content (AIGC) is fundamentally restructuring online content ecologies, necessitating a rigorous examination of its behavioral and distributional implications. Leveraging a comprehensive longitudinal dataset comprising tens of millions of users from a leading Chinese video-sharing platform, this study elucidated the distinct creation and consumption behaviors characterizing AIGC versus Human-Generated Content (HGC). We identified a prevalent scale-over-preference dynamic, wherein AIGC creators achieve aggregate engagement comparable to HGC creators through high-volume production, despite a marked consumer preference for HGC. Deeper analysis uncovered the ability of the algorithmic content distribution mechanism in moderating these competing interests regarding AIGC. These findings advocated for the implementation of AIGC-sensitive distribution algorithms and precise governance frameworks to ensure the long-term health of the online content platforms.

analysis.tldr: AIGC通过高产量策略在总互动量上追赶HGC，但消费者更偏好人类创作内容。
analysis.research_motivation: AIGC的快速增长正在重塑在线内容生态，但其对创作者行为和内容消费模式的具体影响尚不明确，需要系统性的实证研究。
analysis.problem: 量化AIGC与HGC在创作和消费行为上的差异，并揭示平台算法在调节两者竞争中的作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现AIGC创作者通过高产量策略（scale-over-preference）实现与HGC创作者相当的总互动量，但消费者明显更偏好HGC；算法分发机制可调节这种竞争。
analysis.method: 基于某中国视频分享平台千万级用户纵向数据集，对比分析AIGC与HGC的创作和消费行为。
contributions: 首次在大规模真实平台上实证揭示AIGC与HGC的行为差异及消费者偏好。
提出“规模优先于偏好”的动态，并指出算法在调节AIGC影响中的关键作用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于单一平台数据，结论可能受平台特性影响。
未深入分析AIGC内容质量或长期生态影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AIGC通过高产量策略在总互动量上追赶HGC，但消费者更偏好人类创作内容。

papers.title: CoEvoSkills: Self-Evolving Agent Skills via Co-Evolutionary Verification
papers.abstract: Anthropic proposes the concept of skills for LLM agents to tackle multi-step professional tasks that simple tool invocations cannot address. A tool is a single, self-contained function, whereas a skill is a structured bundle of interdependent multi-file artifacts. Currently, skill generation is not only label-intensive due to manual authoring, but also may suffer from human--machine cognitive misalignment, which can lead to degraded agent performance, as evidenced by evaluations on SkillsBench. Therefore, we aim to enable agents to autonomously generate skills. However, existing self-evolving methods designed for tools cannot be directly applied to skills due to their increased complexity. To address these issues, we propose CoEvoSkills, a self-evolving skills framework that enables agents to autonomously construct complex, multi-file skill packages. Specifically, CoEvoSkills couples a Skill Generator that iteratively refines skills with a Surrogate Verifier that co-evolves to provide informative and actionable feedback without access to ground-truth test content. On SkillsBench, CoEvoSkills achieves the highest pass rate among five baselines on both Claude Code and Codex, and also exhibits strong generalization capabilities to six additional LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoEvoSkills框架，通过协同进化验证器让LLM Agent自主生成和优化多文件技能包，在SkillsBench上取得最高通过率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有技能生成依赖人工标注，成本高且存在人机认知偏差，导致Agent性能下降；而面向工具的自我进化方法无法直接应用于更复杂的技能场景。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM Agent在没有真实测试内容的情况下，自主生成并迭代优化多文件技能包。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出技能生成存在人机认知不匹配，且现有工具级自进化方法因技能复杂性而失效。
analysis.method: 提出CoEvoSkills框架，包含技能生成器（Skill Generator）和替代验证器（Surrogate Verifier），两者协同进化：生成器迭代优化技能，验证器提供信息性反馈，无需真实测试内容。
contributions: 提出CoEvoSkills框架，实现Agent自主构建复杂多文件技能包。
设计协同进化验证机制，无需真实测试内容即可提供有效反馈。
在SkillsBench上超越多个基线，并在多种LLM上展现强泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在SkillsBench上，CoEvoSkills在Claude Code和Codex上均取得最高通过率，并在额外6种LLM上展现强泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖特定验证器设计，泛化到其他任务域需验证。
协同进化过程可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoEvoSkills框架，通过协同进化验证器让LLM Agent自主生成和优化多文件技能包，在SkillsBench上取得最高通过率。

papers.title: Bridging Large-Model Reasoning and Real-Time Control via Agentic Fast-Slow Planning
papers.abstract: Large foundation models enable powerful reasoning for autonomous systems, but mapping semantic intent to reliable real-time control remains challenging. Existing approaches either (i) let Large Language Models (LLMs) generate trajectories directly - brittle, hard to verify, and latency-prone - or (ii) adjust Model Predictive Control (MPC) objectives online - mixing slow deliberation with fast control and blurring interfaces. We propose Agentic Fast-Slow Planning, a hierarchical framework that decouples perception, reasoning, planning, and control across natural timescales. The framework contains two bridges. Perception2Decision compresses scenes into ego-centric topologies using an on-vehicle Vision-Language Model (VLM) detector, then maps them to symbolic driving directives in the cloud with an LLM decision maker - reducing bandwidth and delay while preserving interpretability. Decision2Trajectory converts directives into executable paths: Semantic-Guided A* embeds language-derived soft costs into classical search to bias solutions toward feasible trajectories, while an Agentic Refinement Module adapts planner hyperparameters using feedback and memory. Finally, MPC tracks the trajectories in real time, with optional cloud-guided references for difficult cases. Experiments in CARLA show that Agentic Fast-Slow Planning improves robustness under perturbations, reducing lateral deviation by up to 45% and completion time by over 12% compared to pure MPC and an A*-guided MPC baseline. Code is available at https://github.com/cjychenjiayi/icra2026_AFSP.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种分层框架，将大模型推理与实时控制解耦，通过快慢规划提升自动驾驶鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大模型在自动驾驶中直接生成轨迹存在脆弱、延迟高、难验证等问题，而在线调整MPC目标会模糊慢速推理与快速控制的接口，需要一种解耦的分层方案。
analysis.problem: 如何将大模型的语义推理可靠地映射到实时控制，同时保持低延迟、可解释性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Agentic Fast-Slow Planning分层框架，包含两个桥梁：Perception2Decision（车载VLM检测+云端LLM决策）和Decision2Trajectory（语义引导A*搜索+智能体超参数调整），最后由MPC实时跟踪。
contributions: 提出快慢规划分层框架，解耦感知、推理、规划与控制。
设计Perception2Decision和Decision2Trajectory两个桥梁，实现语义到轨迹的转换。
在CARLA实验中验证了鲁棒性提升，横向偏差降低45%，完成时间减少12%。
analysis.experiments: 在CARLA仿真环境中进行实验，与纯MPC和A*引导MPC基线对比，显示横向偏差降低45%，完成时间减少12%。
limitations: 仅在仿真环境CARLA中验证，未在真实车辆上测试。
依赖车载VLM和云端LLM，通信延迟可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种分层框架，将大模型推理与实时控制解耦，通过快慢规划提升自动驾驶鲁棒性。

papers.title: BTS-rPPG: Orthogonal Butterfly Temporal Shifting for Remote Photoplethysmography
papers.abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables contactless physiological sensing from facial videos by analyzing subtle appearance variations induced by blood circulation. However, modeling the temporal dynamics of these signals remains challenging, as many deep learning methods rely on temporal shifting or convolutional operators that aggregate information primarily from neighboring frames, resulting in predominantly local temporal modeling and limited temporal receptive fields. To address this limitation, we propose BTS-rPPG, a temporal modeling framework based on Orthogonal Butterfly Temporal Shifting (BTS). Inspired by the butterfly communication pattern in the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT), BTS establishes structured frame interactions via an XOR-based butterfly pairing schedule, progressively expanding the temporal receptive field and enabling efficient propagation of information across distant frames. Furthermore, we introduce an orthogonal feature transfer mechanism (OFT) that filters the source feature with respect to the target context before temporal shifting, retaining only the orthogonal component for cross-frame transmission. This reduces redundant feature propagation and encourages complementary temporal interaction. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that BTS-rPPG improves long-range temporal modeling of physiological dynamics and consistently outperforms existing temporal modeling strategies for rPPG estimation.

analysis.tldr: 提出正交蝴蝶时间移位框架BTS-rPPG，通过FFT启发的配对调度和正交特征传输增强远程心率估计的远程时间建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有rPPG深度学习方法主要依赖局部时间移位或卷积算子，导致时间感受野有限，难以捕捉远程生理信号的时间动态。
analysis.problem: 如何有效扩展rPPG模型的时间感受野，实现远程帧间信息的高效传播。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出正交蝴蝶时间移位（BTS）框架，包括基于XOR的蝴蝶配对调度逐步扩展时间感受野，以及正交特征传输机制（OFT）在移位前过滤源特征，保留正交分量以减少冗余传播。
contributions: 提出BTS-rPPG框架，利用FFT启发的蝴蝶配对实现结构化帧交互，扩大时间感受野。
引入正交特征传输机制，通过保留正交分量促进互补时间交互。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上实验，BTS-rPPG优于现有时间建模策略。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对光照和运动噪声敏感。
计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出正交蝴蝶时间移位框架BTS-rPPG，通过FFT启发的配对调度和正交特征传输增强远程心率估计的远程时间建模。

papers.title: Director: Instance-aware Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Scene Modeling and Understanding
papers.abstract: Volumetric video seeks to model dynamic scenes as temporally coherent 4D representations. While recent Gaussian-based approaches achieve impressive rendering fidelity, they primarily emphasize appearance but are largely agnostic to instance-level structure, limiting stable tracking and semantic reasoning in highly dynamic scenarios. In this paper, we present Director, a unified spatio-temporal Gaussian representation that jointly models human performance, high-fidelity rendering, and instance-level semantics. Our key insight is that embedding instance-consistent semantics naturally complements 4D modeling, enabling more accurate scene decomposition while supporting robust dynamic scene understanding. To this end, we leverage temporally aligned instance masks and sentence embeddings derived from Multimodal Large Language Models to supervise the learnable semantic features of each Gaussian via two MLP decoders, enabling language-aligned 4D representations and enforcing identity consistency over time. To enhance temporal stability, we bridge 2D optical flow with 4D Gaussians and finetune their motions, yielding reliable initialization and reducing drift. For the training, we further introduce a geometry-aware SDF constraints, along with regularization terms that enforces surface continuity, enhancing temporal coherence in dynamic foreground modeling. Experiments demonstrate that Director achieves temporally coherent 4D reconstructions while simultaneously enabling instance segmentation and open-vocabulary querying.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一时空高斯表示Director，联合建模动态场景的外观、实例语义与时间一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有高斯泼溅方法侧重渲染质量，缺乏实例级结构信息，导致高度动态场景中跟踪不稳定、语义推理受限。
analysis.problem: 如何同时实现动态场景的高保真渲染、实例级语义分割与时间一致性建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用多模态大语言模型生成时间对齐的实例掩码和句子嵌入，通过两个MLP解码器监督每个高斯的可学习语义特征，实现语言对齐的4D表示；将2D光流与4D高斯桥接并微调运动以增强时间稳定性；引入几何感知SDF约束和表面连续性正则化项。
contributions: 提出统一时空高斯表示，联合建模外观、实例语义和时间一致性。
利用多模态大语言模型监督语义特征，实现语言对齐的4D表示和身份一致性。
通过光流引导和几何约束增强动态前景的时间连贯性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖多模态大语言模型生成的掩码和嵌入，可能受限于模型质量。
SDF约束和光流引导可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一时空高斯表示Director，联合建模动态场景的外观、实例语义与时间一致性。

papers.title: GPA: Learning GUI Process Automation from Demonstrations
papers.abstract: GUI Process Automation (GPA) is a lightweight but general vision-based Robotic Process Automation (RPA), which enables fast and stable process replay with only a single demo. Addressing the fragility of traditional RPA and the non-deterministic risks of current vision language model-based GUI agents, GPA introduces three core benefits: (1) Robustness via Sequential Monte Carlo-based localization to handle rescaling and detection uncertainty; (2) Deterministic and Reliability safeguarded by readiness calibration; and (3) Privacy through fast, fully local execution. This approach delivers the adaptability, robustness, and security required for enterprise workflows. It can also be used as an MCP/CLI tool by other agents with coding capabilities so that the agent only reasons and orchestrates while GPA handles the GUI execution. We conducted a pilot experiment to compare GPA with Gemini 3 Pro (with CUA tools) and found that GPA achieves higher success rate with 10 times faster execution speed in finishing long-horizon GUI tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于单次演示的轻量级GUI流程自动化方法GPA，通过SMC定位和就绪校准实现鲁棒、确定且隐私的流程回放。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统RPA脆弱且难以适应界面变化，而基于VLM的GUI代理存在非确定性风险和隐私问题，企业工作流需要一种既鲁棒又安全高效的自动化方案。
analysis.problem: 如何从单次演示中学习并稳定回放GUI流程，同时克服界面缩放、检测不确定性以及非确定性执行带来的可靠性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GPA框架，采用基于序贯蒙特卡洛（SMC）的定位方法处理缩放和检测不确定性，并通过就绪校准（readiness calibration）确保执行确定性和可靠性，所有处理均在本地完成以保护隐私。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级、基于视觉的RPA方法GPA，仅需单次演示即可实现快速稳定的流程回放。
通过SMC定位和就绪校准分别提升了鲁棒性和确定性，同时本地执行保障隐私。
实验表明GPA在长程GUI任务中成功率更高且执行速度比Gemini 3 Pro（带CUA工具）快10倍。
analysis.experiments: 进行了初步实验，将GPA与Gemini 3 Pro（带CUA工具）对比，在长程GUI任务中GPA成功率更高且执行速度快10倍。
limitations: 仅进行了初步实验，可能缺乏大规模或多样化的基准测试。
方法依赖单次演示，可能对复杂多变的界面泛化能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于单次演示的轻量级GUI流程自动化方法GPA，通过SMC定位和就绪校准实现鲁棒、确定且隐私的流程回放。

papers.title: HOT: Harmonic-Constrained Optimal Transport for Remote Photoplethysmography Domain Adaptation
papers.abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables non-contact physiological measurement from facial videos; however, its practical deployment is often hindered by substantial performance degradation under domain shift. While recent deep learning-based rPPG methods have achieved strong performance on individual datasets, they frequently overfit to appearance-related factors, such as illumination, camera characteristics, and color response, that vary significantly across domains. To address this limitation, we introduce frequency domain adaptation (FDA) as a principled strategy for modeling appearance variation in rPPG. By transferring low-frequency spectral components that encode domain-dependent appearance characteristics, FDA encourages rPPG models to learn invariance to appearance variations while retaining cardiac-induced signals. To further support physiologically consistent alignment under such appearance variation, we propose Harmonic-Constrained Optimal Transport (HOT), which leverages the harmonic property of cardiac signals to guide alignment between original and FDA-transferred representations. Extensive cross-dataset experiments demonstrate that the proposed FDA and HOT framework effectively enhances the robustness and generalization of rPPG models across diverse datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出谐波约束最优传输（HOT）和频率域自适应（FDA）框架，提升远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）的跨域泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: rPPG在实际部署中因域偏移（如光照、相机特性等外观因素变化）导致性能严重下降，现有深度学习方法在单个数据集上表现良好但容易过拟合外观相关特征。
analysis.problem: 解决rPPG模型在跨域场景下因外观变化导致的性能退化问题，实现生理信号不变性学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出rPPG模型过拟合外观因素（光照、相机特性、颜色响应），这些因素在不同域间变化显著，导致域偏移时性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出频率域自适应（FDA）策略，通过迁移低频频谱成分（编码域相关外观特征）鼓励模型学习外观不变性；并进一步提出谐波约束最优传输（HOT），利用心脏信号的谐波特性指导原始表示与FDA转换表示之间的对齐。
contributions: 提出频率域自适应（FDA）作为rPPG域适应的原则性策略，通过低频成分迁移建模外观变化。
提出谐波约束最优传输（HOT），利用心脏信号谐波特性实现生理一致的对齐。
跨数据集实验验证了FDA和HOT框架有效提升rPPG模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到进行了广泛的跨数据集实验，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖心脏信号的谐波假设，对非典型心律或噪声场景的适应性未知。
FDA仅迁移低频成分，可能丢失部分高频生理信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出谐波约束最优传输（HOT）和频率域自适应（FDA）框架，提升远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）的跨域泛化能力。

papers.title: Can Heterogeneous Language Models Be Fused?
papers.abstract: Model merging aims to integrate multiple expert models into a single model that inherits their complementary strengths without incurring the inference-time cost of ensembling. Recent progress has shown that merging can be highly effective when all source models are \emph{homogeneous}, i.e., derived from the same pretrained backbone and therefore share aligned parameter coordinates or compatible task vectors. Yet this assumption is increasingly unrealistic in open model ecosystems, where useful experts are often built on different families such as Llama, Qwen, and Mistral. In such \emph{heterogeneous} settings, direct weight-space fusion becomes ill-posed due to architectural mismatch, latent basis misalignment, and amplified cross-source conflict. We address this problem with \texttt{HeteroFusion} for heterogeneous language model fusion, which consists of two key components: topology-based alignment that transfers knowledge across heterogeneous backbones by matching functional module structures instead of raw tensor coordinates, and conflict-aware denoising that suppresses incompatible or noisy transfer signals during fusion. We further provide analytical justification showing that preserving the target adapter basis while predicting structured updates leads to a stable and well-conditioned transfer process. Across heterogeneous transfer, multi-source fusion, noisy-source robustness, and cross-family generalization settings, \texttt{HeteroFusion} consistently outperforms strong merging, fusion, and ensemble baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出HeteroFusion方法，通过拓扑对齐和冲突感知去噪实现异构语言模型的有效融合。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模型融合方法假设源模型同构（如基于同一预训练骨干），但在开放生态中，有用专家常来自不同模型家族（如Llama、Qwen、Mistral），直接权重空间融合因架构不匹配、潜在基不对齐和跨源冲突加剧而不可行。
analysis.problem: 如何融合异构语言模型（不同架构、不同预训练骨干），使其继承互补优势且避免集成推理成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 异构模型融合时，直接权重空间融合因架构不匹配、潜在基不对齐和跨源冲突加剧而效果差。
analysis.method: 提出HeteroFusion，包含两个关键组件：基于拓扑的对齐（通过匹配功能模块结构而非原始张量坐标来跨异构骨干传递知识）和冲突感知去噪（在融合过程中抑制不兼容或噪声传递信号）。
contributions: 提出HeteroFusion方法，解决异构语言模型融合问题。
提供理论分析，证明保留目标适配器基同时预测结构化更新可产生稳定且条件良好的传递过程。
在异构迁移、多源融合、噪声源鲁棒性和跨家族泛化设置中，HeteroFusion一致优于强基线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖模块结构匹配的准确性。
对极端异构或大规模模型融合的扩展性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HeteroFusion方法，通过拓扑对齐和冲突感知去噪实现异构语言模型的有效融合。

papers.title: Hierarchical Memory Orchestration for Personalized Persistent Agents
papers.abstract: While long-term memory is essential for intelligent agents to maintain consistent historical awareness, the accumulation of extensive interaction data often leads to performance bottlenecks. Naive storage expansion increases retrieval noise and computational latency, overwhelming the reasoning capacity of models deployed on constrained personal devices. To address this, we propose Hierarchical Memory Orchestration (HMO), a framework that organizes interaction history into a three-tiered directory driven by user-centric contextual relevance. Our system maintains a compact primary cache, coupling recent and pivotal memories with an evolving user profile to ensure agent reasoning remains aligned with individual behavioral traits. This primary cache is complemented by a high-priority secondary layer, both of which are managed within a global archive of the full interaction history. Crucially, the user persona dictates memory redistribution across this hierarchy, promoting records mapped to long-term patterns toward more active tiers while relegating less relevant information. This targeted orchestration surfaces historical knowledge precisely when needed while maintaining a lean and efficient active search space. Evaluations on multiple benchmarks achieve state-of-the-art performance. Real-world deployments in ecosystems like OpenClaw demonstrate that HMO significantly enhances agent fluidity and personalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层记忆编排框架HMO，通过用户画像驱动的三级记忆层级提升个性化持久Agent的效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 长期记忆对智能Agent至关重要，但交互数据积累会导致检索噪声和计算延迟，尤其在资源受限的个人设备上，现有方法难以平衡记忆容量与推理效率。
analysis.problem: 如何在大规模交互历史中高效组织记忆，减少检索噪声和延迟，同时保持Agent对用户行为模式的个性化对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，简单扩展存储会增加检索噪声和计算延迟，淹没模型推理能力；用户画像驱动的记忆重分配可提升相关记忆的活跃度。
analysis.method: 提出分层记忆编排（HMO），将交互历史组织为三级目录：紧凑主缓存（近期+关键记忆+用户画像）、高优先级二级层、全局存档；用户画像决定记忆在层级间的重分配，将长期模式映射到更活跃层级。
contributions: 提出HMO框架，通过用户画像驱动的三级记忆层级实现高效个性化记忆管理。
在多个基准上取得最先进性能，并在OpenClaw等真实部署中验证了Agent流畅性和个性化提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上取得最先进性能，并在OpenClaw生态系统中真实部署，显示显著提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的用户画像初始化。
三级层级的管理开销在极端大规模场景下仍需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层记忆编排框架HMO，通过用户画像驱动的三级记忆层级提升个性化持久Agent的效率与性能。

papers.title: Robust Embodied Perception in Dynamic Environments via Disentangled Weight Fusion
papers.abstract: Embodied perception systems face severe challenges of dynamic environment distribution drift when they continuously interact in open physical spaces. However, the existing domain incremental awareness methods often rely on the domain id obtained in advance during the testing phase, which limits their practicability in unknown interaction scenarios. At the same time, the model often overfits to the context-specific perceptual noise, which leads to insufficient generalization ability and catastrophic forgetting. To address these limitations, we propose a domain-id and exemplar-free incremental learning framework for embodied multimedia systems, which aims to achieve robust continuous environment adaptation. This method designs a disentangled representation mechanism to remove non-essential environmental style interference, and guide the model to focus on extracting semantic intrinsic features shared across scenes, thereby eliminating perceptual uncertainty and improving generalization. We further use the weight fusion strategy to dynamically integrate the old and new environment knowledge in the parameter space, so as to ensure that the model adapts to the new distribution without storing historical data and maximally retains the discrimination ability of the old environment. Extensive experiments on multiple standard benchmark datasets show that the proposed method significantly reduces catastrophic forgetting in a completely exemplar-free and domain-id free setting, and its accuracy is better than the existing state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出无域ID和无样本的增量学习框架，通过解耦表征和权重融合实现动态环境下的鲁棒具身感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 具身感知系统在开放物理空间中持续交互时面临动态环境分布漂移的严重挑战，现有域增量方法依赖测试阶段预先获取的域ID，限制了其在未知交互场景中的实用性，且模型容易过拟合到上下文特定的感知噪声，导致泛化能力不足和灾难性遗忘。
analysis.problem: 解决具身感知系统在动态环境中无需域ID和样本存储的连续环境适应问题，同时缓解灾难性遗忘并提升泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出无域ID和无样本的增量学习框架，包含解耦表征机制（去除非必要环境风格干扰，提取跨场景语义内在特征）和权重融合策略（在参数空间动态整合新旧环境知识，无需存储历史数据）。
contributions: 提出一种无域ID和无样本的增量学习框架，实现鲁棒的连续环境适应。
设计解耦表征机制和权重融合策略，有效减少灾难性遗忘并提升泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个标准基准数据集上实验，所提方法在完全无样本和无域ID设置下显著降低灾难性遗忘，准确率优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定解耦表征假设，在复杂环境中的适用性需进一步验证。
权重融合策略可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无域ID和无样本的增量学习框架，通过解耦表征和权重融合实现动态环境下的鲁棒具身感知。

papers.title: M3D-BFS: a Multi-stage Dynamic Fusion Strategy for Sample-Adaptive Multi-Modal Brain Network Analysis
papers.abstract: Multi-modal fusion is of great significance in neuroscience which integrates information from different modalities and can achieve better performance than uni-modal methods in downstream tasks. Current multi-modal fusion methods in brain networks, which mainly focus on structural connectivity (SC) and functional connectivity (FC) modalities, are static in nature. They feed different samples into the same model with identical computation, ignoring inherent difference between input samples. This lack of sample adaptation hinders model's further performance. To this end, we innovatively propose a multi-stage dynamic fusion strategy (M3D-BFS) for sample-adaptive multi-modal brain network analysis. Unlike other static fusion methods, we design different mixture-of-experts (MoEs) for uni- and multi-modal representations where modules can adaptively change as input sample changes during inference. To alleviate issue of MoE where training of experts may be collapsed, we divide our method into 3 stages. We first train uni-modal encoders respectively, then pretrain single experts of MoEs before finally finetuning the whole model. A multi-modal disentanglement loss is designed to enhance the final representations. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work for dynamic fusion for multi-modal brain network analysis. Extensive experiments on different real-world datasets demonstrates the superiority of M3D-BFS.

analysis.tldr: 提出多阶段动态融合策略M3D-BFS，通过混合专家模型实现样本自适应的多模态脑网络分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有脑网络多模态融合方法（如SC与FC）是静态的，对所有样本使用相同计算，忽略了样本间差异，限制了模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何实现样本自适应的多模态脑网络融合，以提升下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态融合方法无法适应样本差异，混合专家模型训练中可能出现专家崩溃问题。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段动态融合策略：先分别训练单模态编码器，再预训练混合专家模型中的单个专家，最后微调整个模型；并设计多模态解耦损失增强表征。
contributions: 首次提出用于多模态脑网络分析的动态融合方法
设计多阶段训练策略缓解混合专家模型中的专家崩溃问题
提出多模态解耦损失以增强表征
analysis.experiments: 在多个真实世界数据集上进行了实验，结果表明M3D-BFS优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于SC和FC两种模态，未验证更多模态
三阶段训练流程可能增加训练复杂度
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多阶段动态融合策略M3D-BFS，通过混合专家模型实现样本自适应的多模态脑网络分析。

papers.title: DynaVid: Learning to Generate Highly Dynamic Videos using Synthetic Motion Data
papers.abstract: Despite recent progress, video diffusion models still struggle to synthesize realistic videos involving highly dynamic motions or requiring fine-grained motion controllability. A central limitation lies in the scarcity of such examples in commonly used training datasets. To address this, we introduce DynaVid, a video synthesis framework that leverages synthetic motion data in training, which is represented as optical flow and rendered using computer graphics pipelines. This approach offers two key advantages. First, synthetic motion offers diverse motion patterns and precise control signals that are difficult to obtain from real data. Second, unlike rendered videos with artificial appearances, rendered optical flow encodes only motion and is decoupled from appearance, thereby preventing models from reproducing the unnatural look of synthetic videos. Building on this idea, DynaVid adopts a two-stage generation framework: a motion generator first synthesizes motion, and then a motion-guided video generator produces video frames conditioned on that motion. This decoupled formulation enables the model to learn dynamic motion patterns from synthetic data while preserving visual realism from real-world videos. We validate our framework on two challenging scenarios, vigorous human motion generation and extreme camera motion control, where existing datasets are particularly limited. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DynaVid improves the realism and controllability in dynamic motion generation and camera motion control.

analysis.tldr: DynaVid利用合成光流数据训练视频扩散模型，实现高动态运动生成与精细运动控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在处理高动态运动或精细运动控制时表现不佳，主要原因是训练数据中缺乏此类样本。
analysis.problem: 如何让视频扩散模型学会生成高动态运动并具备精细运动控制能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，常用训练数据集中高动态运动样本稀缺，且合成视频外观不自然，但合成光流仅编码运动信息，可解耦外观。
analysis.method: 两阶段生成框架：运动生成器先合成光流，再由运动引导的视频生成器基于光流生成视频帧。
contributions: 提出利用合成光流数据训练视频扩散模型，解决高动态运动数据稀缺问题。
设计两阶段解耦生成框架，实现运动与外观分离，提升动态运动生成的真实感和可控性。
analysis.experiments: 在剧烈人体运动生成和极端相机运动控制两个挑战性场景上验证，实验表明DynaVid提升了动态运动生成的真实感和可控性。
limitations: 依赖计算机图形学渲染光流，可能引入特定渲染偏差。
两阶段框架可能增加计算开销和累积误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DynaVid利用合成光流数据训练视频扩散模型，实现高动态运动生成与精细运动控制。

papers.title: ContextBudget: Budget-Aware Context Management for Long-Horizon Search Agents
papers.abstract: LLM-based agents show strong potential for long-horizon reasoning, yet their context size is limited by deployment factors (e.g., memory, latency, and cost), yielding a constrained context budget. As interaction histories grow, this induces a trade-off between retaining past information and staying within the context limit. To address this challenge, we propose Budget-Aware Context Management (BACM), which formulates context management as a sequential decision problem with a context budget constraint. It enables agents to assess the available budget before incorporating new observations and decide when and how much of the interaction history to compress. We further develop BACM-RL, an end-to-end curriculum-based reinforcement learning approach that learns compression strategies under varying context budgets. Experiments on compositional multi-objective QA and long-horizon web browsing benchmarks show that BACM-RL consistently outperforms prior methods across model scales and task complexities, achieving over $1.6\times$ gains over strong baselines in high-complexity settings, while maintaining strong advantages as budgets shrink, where most methods exhibit a downward performance trend.

analysis.tldr: 提出预算感知上下文管理方法BACM-RL，通过强化学习学习压缩策略，在长程搜索任务中显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM代理在长程推理中受限于上下文预算（内存、延迟、成本），历史交互增长导致保留信息与预算约束之间的权衡，现有方法缺乏对预算的动态感知。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限上下文预算下，动态决定何时压缩以及压缩多少交互历史，以最大化长程搜索代理的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随着预算缩小，大多数方法性能下降，而BACM-RL保持优势。
analysis.method: 提出预算感知上下文管理（BACM），将上下文管理建模为带预算约束的序列决策问题；并开发BACM-RL，一种基于课程学习的端到端强化学习方法，学习不同预算下的压缩策略。
contributions: 形式化上下文管理为带预算约束的序列决策问题
提出BACM-RL，一种基于课程学习的强化学习方法，学习自适应压缩策略
在组合多目标QA和长程网页浏览基准上，BACM-RL一致优于先前方法，高复杂度设置下增益超过1.6倍
analysis.experiments: 在组合多目标QA和长程网页浏览基准上评估，BACM-RL在不同模型规模和任务复杂度下一致优于先前方法，高复杂度设置下增益超过1.6倍，预算缩小时保持优势。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务格式，泛化性需进一步验证
强化学习训练可能对超参数敏感
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出预算感知上下文管理方法BACM-RL，通过强化学习学习压缩策略，在长程搜索任务中显著提升性能。

papers.title: Ontology-Aware Design Patterns for Clinical AI Systems: Translating Reification Theory into Software Architecture
papers.abstract: Clinical AI systems routinely train on health data structurally distorted by documentation workflows, billing incentives, and terminology fragmentation. Prior work has characterised the mechanisms of this distortion: the three-forces model of documentary enactment, the reification feedback loop through which AI may amplify coding artefacts, and terminology governance failures that allow semantic drift to accumulate. Yet translating these insights into implementable software architecture remains an open problem. This paper proposes seven ontology-aware design patterns in Gang-of-Four pattern language for building clinical AI pipelines resilient to ontological distortion. The patterns address data ingestion validation (Ontological Checkpoint), low-frequency signal preservation (Dormancy-Aware Pipeline), continuous drift monitoring (Drift Sentinel), parallel representation maintenance (Dual-Ontology Layer), feedback loop interruption (Reification Circuit Breaker), terminology evolution management (Terminology Version Gate), and pluggable regulatory compliance (Regulatory Compliance Adapter). Each pattern is specified with Problem, Forces, Solution, Consequences, Known Uses, and Related Patterns. We illustrate their composition in a reference architecture for a primary care AI system and provide a walkthrough tracing all seven patterns through a diabetes risk prediction scenario. This paper does not report empirical validation; it offers a design vocabulary grounded in theoretical analysis, subject to future evaluation in production systems. Three patterns have partial precedent in existing systems; the remaining four have not been formally described. Limitations include the absence of runtime benchmarks and restriction to the German and EU regulatory context.

analysis.tldr: 提出七种本体感知设计模式，将临床AI系统中的本体扭曲理论转化为可实现的软件架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床AI系统常因文档流程、计费激励和术语碎片化导致数据结构性扭曲，现有理论已刻画其机制，但缺乏可落地的软件架构指导。
analysis.problem: 如何将临床AI系统中本体扭曲的理论洞察转化为具体、可复用的软件设计模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但基于理论分析了数据扭曲的三种机制：文档执行的三力模型、再物化反馈循环、术语治理失败导致的语义漂移。
analysis.method: 借鉴GoF模式语言，提出七种本体感知设计模式（如本体检查点、休眠感知管道、漂移哨兵等），每种模式包含问题、力、解决方案、后果、已知用途和相关模式，并组合成参考架构。
contributions: 提出了七种本体感知设计模式，覆盖数据验证、信号保存、漂移监控、并行本体、反馈中断、术语演化和合规适配。
通过糖尿病风险预测场景展示了所有模式的组合应用，并提供了参考架构。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明未进行实证验证。
limitations: 缺乏运行时基准测试和实证验证。
仅适用于德国和欧盟监管环境。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出七种本体感知设计模式，将临床AI系统中的本体扭曲理论转化为可实现的软件架构。

papers.title: CORAL: Towards Autonomous Multi-Agent Evolution for Open-Ended Discovery
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based evolution is a promising approach for open-ended discovery, where progress requires sustained search and knowledge accumulation. Existing methods still rely heavily on fixed heuristics and hard-coded exploration rules, which limit the autonomy of LLM agents. We present CORAL, the first framework for autonomous multi-agent evolution on open-ended problems. CORAL replaces rigid control with long-running agents that explore, reflect, and collaborate through shared persistent memory, asynchronous multi-agent execution, and heartbeat-based interventions. It also provides practical safeguards, including isolated workspaces, evaluator separation, resource management, and agent session and health management. Evaluated on diverse mathematical, algorithmic, and systems optimization tasks, CORAL sets new state-of-the-art results on 10 tasks, achieving 3-10 times higher improvement rates with far fewer evaluations than fixed evolutionary search baselines across tasks. On Anthropic's kernel engineering task, four co-evolving agents improve the best known score from 1363 to 1103 cycles. Mechanistic analyses further show how these gains arise from knowledge reuse and multi-agent exploration and communication. Together, these results suggest that greater agent autonomy and multi-agent evolution can substantially improve open-ended discovery. Code is available at https://github.com/Human-Agent-Society/CORAL.

analysis.tldr: CORAL 提出首个自主多智能体进化框架，通过共享记忆、异步执行和心跳干预实现开放式发现，在10个任务上取得新SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的进化方法依赖固定启发式和硬编码探索规则，限制了智能体的自主性，难以实现持续的开放式发现。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个自主的多智能体进化框架，使LLM智能体能够通过探索、反思和协作实现开放式发现，而无需人工干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出多智能体协作和知识复用能显著提升改进率。
analysis.method: CORAL框架包含长期运行的智能体，通过共享持久内存、异步多智能体执行和基于心跳的干预进行探索、反思和协作，并提供隔离工作区、评估器分离、资源管理等安全机制。
contributions: 首个自主多智能体进化框架，用于开放式问题发现
在10个数学、算法和系统优化任务上取得新SOTA，改进率比固定进化搜索基线高3-10倍
analysis.experiments: 在数学、算法和系统优化任务上评估，包括Anthropic内核工程任务，四个协同进化智能体将最佳分数从1363改进到1103周期。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM能力，在弱模型上效果未知
多智能体通信开销可能随智能体数量增加而增长
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CORAL 提出首个自主多智能体进化框架，通过共享记忆、异步执行和心跳干预实现开放式发现，在10个任务上取得新SOTA。

papers.title: Moiré Video Authentication: A Physical Signature Against AI Video Generation
papers.abstract: Recent advances in video generation have made AI-synthesized content increasingly difficult to distinguish from real footage. We propose a physics-based authentication signature that real cameras produce naturally, but that generative models cannot faithfully reproduce. Our approach exploits the Moiré effect: the interference fringes formed when a camera views a compact two-layer grating structure. We derive the Moiré motion invariant, showing that fringe phase and grating image displacement are linearly coupled by optical geometry, independent of viewing distance and grating structure. A verifier extracts both signals from video and tests their correlation. We validate the invariant on both real-captured and AI-generated videos from multiple state-of-the-art generators, and find that real and AI-generated videos produce significantly different correlation signatures, suggesting a robust means of differentiating them. Our work demonstrates that deterministic optical phenomena can serve as physically grounded, verifiable signatures against AI-generated video.

analysis.tldr: 利用莫尔条纹的物理运动不变性作为视频真伪鉴别签名，有效区分真实拍摄与AI生成视频。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成视频越来越逼真，传统鉴别方法难以区分，需要一种基于物理原理的鲁棒认证手段。
analysis.problem: 如何利用真实相机拍摄时自然产生的物理现象（莫尔效应）来设计不可伪造的视频认证签名。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 莫尔条纹的相位与光栅图像位移之间存在线性耦合关系，该关系由光学几何决定，与观察距离和光栅结构无关；真实视频中该相关性显著，而AI生成视频无法忠实复现。
analysis.method: 推导莫尔运动不变性，从视频中提取条纹相位和光栅位移信号，计算其相关性作为认证签名。
contributions: 提出基于莫尔效应的物理签名用于视频认证，利用光学几何不变性区分真实与AI生成视频。
在多个SOTA视频生成器上验证了该方法的有效性，显示真实与生成视频的相关性签名存在显著差异。
analysis.experiments: 在真实拍摄视频和多个SOTA视频生成器生成的视频上验证了莫尔运动不变性，发现真实与AI生成视频的相关性签名显著不同。
limitations: 需要视频中包含特定的莫尔条纹图案，可能不适用于所有场景。
未讨论对抗性攻击下签名的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用莫尔条纹的物理运动不变性作为视频真伪鉴别签名，有效区分真实拍摄与AI生成视频。

papers.title: ThinknCheck: Grounded Claim Verification with Compact, Reasoning-Driven, and Interpretable Models
papers.abstract: We present ThinknCheck, a 1B-parameter verifier for grounded claim verification that first produces a short, structured rationale and then a binary verdict. We construct LLMAggreFact-Think, a 24.1k reasoning-augmented training set derived from LLMAggreFact, and fine-tune a 4-bit Gemma3 model to follow this format. On LLMAggreFact, ThinknCheck attains 78.1 balanced accuracy (BAcc), surpassing MiniCheck-7B (77.4) with 7x fewer parameters; removing the reasoning step reduces BAcc to 57.5. On SciFact, ThinknCheck reaches 64.7 BAcc, a +14.7 absolute gain over MiniCheck-7B. By contrast, zero-shot chain-of-thought on the base Gemma3-1B harms accuracy relative to direct answers, and preference optimization with a simple format+accuracy reward underperforms supervised reasoning. To probe the latter, we introduce GSMClaims and a domain-specialized variant, ThinknCheck-Science, which improves across benchmarks, including 61.0\% accuracy on GSMClaims. Overall, explicit, supervised reasoning enables compact verifiers that are competitive while remaining resource-efficient and interpretable.

analysis.tldr: 提出1B参数的可解释事实验证器ThinknCheck，通过结构化推理步骤实现高效验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有事实验证模型要么参数量大、资源消耗高，要么缺乏可解释性，难以在资源受限场景下兼顾准确性与推理透明性。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持紧凑模型（1B参数）的同时，通过显式推理步骤提升事实验证的准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零样本思维链会损害基础模型的准确率；基于偏好优化（简单格式+准确率奖励）的效果不如监督式推理训练。
analysis.method: 构建24.1k推理增强数据集LLMAggreFact-Think，对4-bit量化的Gemma3-1B模型进行监督微调，使其首先生成结构化推理（rationale）再输出二元判定。
contributions: 提出ThinknCheck，1B参数的事实验证器，在LLMAggreFact上以78.1 BAcc超越MiniCheck-7B（77.4），参数量减少7倍。
构建LLMAggreFact-Think数据集和GSMClaims基准，验证显式监督推理对紧凑模型的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在LLMAggreFact、SciFact和GSMClaims上评估，ThinknCheck在SciFact上达到64.7 BAcc，比MiniCheck-7B提升14.7个绝对点。
limitations: 仅在1B参数规模上验证，更大模型下的效果未知。
推理步骤的格式可能对特定领域泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出1B参数的可解释事实验证器ThinknCheck，通过结构化推理步骤实现高效验证。

papers.title: AromaGen: Interactive Generation of Rich Olfactory Experiences with Multimodal Language Models
papers.abstract: Smell's deep connection with food, memory, and social experience has long motivated researchers to bring olfaction into interactive systems. Yet most olfactory interfaces remain limited to fixed scent cartridges and pre-defined generation patterns, and the scarcity of large-scale olfactory datasets has further constrained AI-based approaches. We present AromaGen, an AI-powered wearable interface capable of real-time, general-purpose aroma generation from free-form text or visual inputs. AromaGen is powered by a multimodal LLM that leverages latent olfactory knowledge to map semantic inputs to structured mixtures of 12 carefully selected base odorants, released through a neck-worn dispenser. Users can iteratively refine generated aromas through natural language feedback via in-context learning. Through a controlled user study ($N = 26$), AromaGen matches human-composed mixtures in zero-shot generation and significantly surpasses them after iterative refinement, achieving a median similarity of 8/10 to real food aromas and reducing perceived artificiality to levels comparable to real food. AromaGen is a step towards real-world interactive aroma generation, opening new possibilities for communication, wellbeing, and immersive technologies.

analysis.tldr: AromaGen 利用多模态大模型实现实时、通用的气味生成，支持文本或图像输入，并通过用户反馈迭代优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 气味与食物、记忆和社会体验密切相关，但现有嗅觉接口受限于固定气味盒和预定义模式，且缺乏大规模数据集，限制了 AI 方法的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何实现从自由文本或视觉输入实时生成通用气味，并允许用户通过自然语言反馈进行迭代优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于多模态大模型，利用潜在嗅觉知识将语义输入映射到 12 种基础气味剂的混合配方，通过颈戴式设备释放，并支持上下文学习实现用户反馈迭代。
contributions: 提出 AromaGen，一种由多模态大模型驱动的可穿戴气味生成接口，支持实时、通用气味生成。
通过用户研究证明零样本生成匹配人工配方，迭代优化后显著超越，中位相似度达 8/10，人工感接近真实食物。
analysis.experiments: 受控用户研究（N=26），评估零样本生成和迭代优化后的气味相似度与人工感。
limitations: 仅使用 12 种基础气味剂，可能限制气味多样性。
用户研究规模较小，且未提及长期使用效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AromaGen 利用多模态大模型实现实时、通用的气味生成，支持文本或图像输入，并通过用户反馈迭代优化。

papers.title: Exploring Robust Multi-Agent Workflows for Environmental Data Management
papers.abstract: Embedding LLM-driven agents into environmental FAIR data management is compelling - they can externalize operational knowledge and scale curation across heterogeneous data and evolving conventions. However, replacing deterministic components with probabilistic workflows changes the failure mode: LLM pipelines may generate plausible but incorrect outputs that pass superficial checks and propagate into irreversible actions such as DOI minting and public release. We introduce EnviSmart, a production data management system deployed on campus-wide storage infrastructure for environmental research. EnviSmart treats reliability as an architectural property through two mechanisms: a three-track knowledge architecture that externalizes behaviors (governance constraints), domain knowledge (retrievable context), and skills (tool-using procedures) as persistent, interlocking artifacts; and a role-separated multi-agent design where deterministic validators and audited handoffs restore fail-stop semantics at trust boundaries before irreversible steps. We compare two production deployments. The University's GIS Center Ecological Archive (849 curated datasets) serves as a single-agent baseline. SF2Bench, a compound flooding benchmark comprising 2,452 monitoring stations and 8,557 published files spanning 39 years, validates the multi-agent workflow. The multi-agent approach improved both efficiency - completed by a single operator in two days with repeated artifact reuse across deployments - and reliability: audited handoffs detected and blocked a coordinate transformation error affecting all 2,452 stations before publication. A representative incident (ISS-004) demonstrated boundary-based containment with 10-minute detection latency, zero user exposure, and 80-minute resolution. This paper has been accepted at PEARC 2026.

analysis.tldr: 提出EnviSmart多智能体系统，通过角色分离和知识架构提升环境数据管理可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM驱动的智能体在环境FAIR数据管理中具有潜力，但概率性工作流可能产生看似正确实则错误的输出，导致不可逆操作（如DOI注册）的风险。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可靠的多智能体工作流，在环境数据管理中防止LLM生成的错误传播到关键操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM管道可能生成通过表面检查但实际错误的输出，并传播到不可逆操作中。
analysis.method: EnviSmart系统采用三轨知识架构（行为约束、领域知识、工具技能）和角色分离的多智能体设计，通过确定性验证器和审计交接在信任边界恢复故障停止语义。
contributions: 提出EnviSmart系统，将可靠性作为架构属性，通过知识架构和角色分离设计实现。
在真实生产环境（SF2Bench基准）中验证，多智能体方法相比单智能体基线提升了效率和可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在GIS中心生态档案（849个数据集）和SF2Bench基准（2452个监测站、8557个文件）上比较单智能体与多智能体部署，多智能体方法由单操作员两天完成，审计交接检测并阻止了影响所有站点的坐标转换错误。
limitations: 系统依赖特定领域知识库的构建，可能难以迁移到其他领域。
审计交接机制可能增加系统复杂性和延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EnviSmart多智能体系统，通过角色分离和知识架构提升环境数据管理可靠性。

papers.title: MonoSAOD: Monocular 3D Object Detection with Sparsely Annotated Label
papers.abstract: Monocular 3D object detection has achieved impressive performance on densely annotated datasets. However, it struggles when only a fraction of objects are labeled due to the high cost of 3D annotation. This sparsely annotated setting is common in real-world scenarios where annotating every object is impractical. To address this, we propose a novel framework for sparsely annotated monocular 3D object detection with two key modules. First, we propose Road-Aware Patch Augmentation (RAPA), which leverages sparse annotations by augmenting segmented object patches onto road regions while preserving 3D geometric consistency. Second, we propose Prototype-Based Filtering (PBF), which generates high-quality pseudo-labels by filtering predictions through prototype similarity and depth uncertainty. It maintains global 2D RoI feature prototypes and selects pseudo-labels that are both feature-consistent with learned prototypes and have reliable depth estimates. Our training strategy combines geometry-preserving augmentation with prototype-guided pseudo-labeling to achieve robust detection under sparse supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The source code is available at https://github.com/VisualAIKHU/MonoSAOD .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合道路感知补丁增强和原型过滤的框架，解决稀疏标注下的单目3D目标检测问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D标注成本高昂，实际场景中难以对所有物体进行标注，导致稀疏标注场景普遍存在，而现有方法依赖密集标注，性能下降严重。
analysis.problem: 在只有部分物体被标注的稀疏标注条件下，如何实现鲁棒的单目3D目标检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MonoSAOD框架，包含两个核心模块：1) Road-Aware Patch Augmentation (RAPA)，通过将分割的物体补丁增强到道路区域并保持3D几何一致性；2) Prototype-Based Filtering (PBF)，利用全局2D RoI特征原型和深度不确定性生成高质量伪标签。
contributions: 提出RAPA模块，利用稀疏标注进行几何一致的补丁增强。
提出PBF模块，通过原型相似性和深度不确定性过滤伪标签。
在稀疏标注设置下实现鲁棒的单目3D检测，代码开源。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖道路区域先验，泛化到非道路场景受限。
原型过滤可能对类别不平衡敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合道路感知补丁增强和原型过滤的框架，解决稀疏标注下的单目3D目标检测问题。

papers.title: TOL: Textual Localization with OpenStreetMap
papers.abstract: Natural language provides an intuitive way to express spatial intent in geospatial applications. While existing localization methods often rely on dense point cloud maps or high-resolution imagery, OpenStreetMap (OSM) offers a compact and freely available map representation that encodes rich semantic and structural information, making it well-suited for large-scale localization. However, text-to-OSM (T2O) localization remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we formulate the T2O localization task, which aims to estimate accurate 2D positions in urban environments from textual scene descriptions without relying on geometric observations or GNSS-based initial location. To support the proposed task, we introduce TOL, a large-scale benchmark spanning multiple continents and diverse urban environments. TOL contains approximately 121K textual queries paired with OSM map tiles and covers about 316 km of road trajectories across Boston, Karlsruhe, and Singapore. We further propose TOLoc, a coarse-to-fine localization framework that explicitly models the semantics of surrounding objects and their directional information. In the coarse stage, direction-aware features are extracted from both textual descriptions and OSM tiles to construct global descriptors, which are used to retrieve candidate locations for the query. In the fine stage, the query text and top-1 retrieved tile are jointly processed, where a dedicated alignment module fuses the textual descriptor and local map features to regress the 2-DoF pose. Experimental results demonstrate that TOLoc achieves strong localization performance, outperforming the best existing method by 6.53\%, 9.93\%, and 8.32\% at 5 m, 10 m, and 25 m thresholds, respectively, and shows strong generalization to unseen environments. Dataset, code and models will be publicly available at: https://github.com/WHU-USI3DV/TOL.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于OpenStreetMap的文本定位任务、基准和粗到细定位框架TOLoc，在三个城市数据集上显著优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有定位方法依赖密集点云或高分辨率图像，而OpenStreetMap作为紧凑、免费且语义丰富的全球地图表示，更适合大规模定位，但文本到OSM定位尚未被探索。
analysis.problem: 如何仅凭自然语言场景描述，在没有几何观测或GNSS初始位置的情况下，在城市场景中估计精确的2D位置。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TOLoc粗到细定位框架：粗阶段提取方向感知特征构建全局描述子进行候选位置检索；细阶段通过对齐模块融合文本描述子和局部地图特征回归2自由度位姿。
contributions: 首次定义文本到OSM（T2O）定位任务，并构建大规模跨洲基准TOL（约121K查询，覆盖316公里道路轨迹）。
提出TOLoc粗到细定位框架，显式建模周围物体语义和方向信息，在三个城市数据集上显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在波士顿、卡尔斯鲁厄和新加坡三个城市数据集上评估，TOLoc在5m、10m、25m阈值上分别比最佳现有方法提升6.53%、9.93%、8.32%，并展现出强泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖OSM数据的完整性和时效性。
粗到细框架的计算效率可能受检索规模影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于OpenStreetMap的文本定位任务、基准和粗到细定位框架TOLoc，在三个城市数据集上显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: LivingWorld: Interactive 4D World Generation with Environmental Dynamics
papers.abstract: We introduce LivingWorld, an interactive framework for generating 4D worlds with environmental dynamics from a single image. While recent advances in 3D scene generation enable large-scale environment creation, most approaches focus primarily on reconstructing static geometry, leaving scene-scale environmental dynamics such as clouds, water, or smoke largely unexplored. Modeling such dynamics is challenging because motion must remain coherent across an expanding scene while supporting low-latency user feedback. LivingWorld addresses this challenge by progressively constructing a globally coherent motion field as the scene expands. To maintain global consistency during expansion, we introduce a geometry-aware alignment module that resolves directional and scale ambiguities across views. We further represent motion using a compact hash-based motion field, enabling efficient querying and stable propagation of dynamics throughout the scene. This representation also supports bidirectional motion propagation during rendering, producing long and temporally coherent 4D sequences without relying on expensive video-based refinement. On a single RTX 5090 GPU, generating each new scene expansion step requires 9 seconds, followed by 3 seconds for motion alignment and motion field updates, enabling interactive 4D world generation with globally coherent environmental dynamics. Video demonstrations are available at cvsp-lab.github.io/LivingWorld.

analysis.tldr: 从单张图像交互式生成具有环境动态（云、水、烟）的4D世界，通过渐进式运动场构建和几何感知对齐实现全局一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D场景生成主要关注静态几何重建，缺乏对场景级环境动态（如云、水、烟）的建模，而动态建模需要在大范围场景中保持运动连贯性并支持低延迟用户交互。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张图像生成具有全局一致环境动态的4D世界，并支持交互式扩展和低延迟反馈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 环境动态（如云、水、烟）在场景扩展时难以保持运动连贯性，且存在跨视图的方向和尺度歧义。
analysis.method: 渐进式构建全局一致运动场，包括几何感知对齐模块解决跨视图歧义，以及紧凑哈希运动场实现高效查询和稳定传播，支持渲染时的双向运动传播。
contributions: 提出LivingWorld框架，从单张图像生成具有环境动态的交互式4D世界。
引入几何感知对齐模块和紧凑哈希运动场，实现全局一致的运动场构建和高效动态传播。
analysis.experiments: 在单张RTX 5090 GPU上，每个新场景扩展步骤需9秒生成，3秒运动对齐和更新，实现交互式4D世界生成。摘要未提供定量对比或消融实验。
limitations: 可能依赖特定GPU硬件（RTX 5090），泛化性未知。
未提及对复杂动态（如多物体交互）的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从单张图像交互式生成具有环境动态（云、水、烟）的4D世界，通过渐进式运动场构建和几何感知对齐实现全局一致性。

papers.title: Seclens: Role-specific Evaluation of LLM's for security vulnerablity detection
papers.abstract: Existing benchmarks for LLM-based vulnerability detection compress model performance into a single metric, which fails to reflect the distinct priorities of different stakeholders. For example, a CISO may emphasize high recall of critical vulnerabilities, an engineering leader may prioritize minimizing false positives, and an AI officer may balance capability against cost. To address this limitation, we introduce SecLens-R, a multi-stakeholder evaluation framework structured around 35 shared dimensions grouped into 7 measurement categories. The framework defines five role-specific weighting profiles: CISO, Chief AI Officer, Security Researcher, Head of Engineering, and AI-as-Actor. Each profile selects 12 to 16 dimensions with weights summing to 80, yielding a composite Decision Score between 0 and 100. We apply SecLens-R to evaluate 12 frontier models on a dataset of 406 tasks derived from 93 open-source projects, covering 10 programming languages and 8 OWASP-aligned vulnerability categories. Evaluations are conducted across two settings: Code-in-Prompt (CIP) and Tool-Use (TU). Results show substantial variation across stakeholder perspectives, with Decision Scores differing by as much as 31 points for the same model. For instance, Qwen3-Coder achieves an A (76.3) under the Head of Engineering profile but a D (45.2) under the CISO profile, while GPT-5.4 shows a similar disparity. These findings demonstrate that vulnerability detection is inherently a multi-objective problem and that stakeholder-aware evaluation provides insights that single aggregated metrics obscure.

analysis.tldr: 提出多利益相关方评估框架SecLens-R，揭示LLM在漏洞检测中因角色权重不同导致的评分差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM漏洞检测基准使用单一指标评估模型性能，无法反映不同利益相关方（如CISO、工程主管）的差异化优先级，导致评估结果缺乏实际决策参考价值。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能体现不同角色（如安全、工程、AI管理）对漏洞检测不同需求的多维度评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同一模型在不同角色权重配置下决策分数差异可达31分，例如Qwen3-Coder在工程主管配置下得A（76.3），在CISO配置下仅得D（45.2），表明漏洞检测本质是多目标问题。
analysis.method: 构建包含35个共享维度、7个测量类别的评估框架，定义5种角色权重配置（CISO、首席AI官、安全研究员、工程主管、AI作为行动者），每个配置选择12-16个维度且权重和为80，计算综合决策分数（0-100）。
contributions: 提出SecLens-R多利益相关方评估框架，包含35个维度和5种角色权重配置。
在406个任务（93个开源项目、10种编程语言、8种OWASP漏洞类别）上评估12个前沿模型，揭示单指标评估的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在Code-in-Prompt和Tool-Use两种设置下，对12个前沿模型在406个任务上进行评估，结果显示不同角色配置下决策分数差异显著。
limitations: 框架维度选择和权重分配可能依赖专家判断，主观性较强。
仅评估了12个模型，覆盖范围有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多利益相关方评估框架SecLens-R，揭示LLM在漏洞检测中因角色权重不同导致的评分差异。

papers.title: General Explicit Network (GEN): A novel deep learning architecture for solving partial differential equations
papers.abstract: Machine learning, especially physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) and their neural network variants, has been widely used to solve problems involving partial differential equations (PDEs). The successful deployment of such methods beyond academic research remains limited. For example, PINN methods primarily consider discrete point-to-point fitting and fail to account for the potential properties of real solutions. The adoption of continuous activation functions in these approaches leads to local characteristics that align with the equation solutions while resulting in poor extensibility and robustness. A general explicit network (GEN) that implements point-to-function PDE solving is proposed in this paper. The "function" component can be constructed based on our prior knowledge of the original PDEs through corresponding basis functions for fitting. The experimental results demonstrate that this approach enables solutions with high robustness and strong extensibility to be obtained.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种点对函数求解PDE的通用显式网络GEN，通过先验基函数提升鲁棒性和可扩展性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有PINN方法仅考虑离散点对点拟合，忽略真实解的潜在性质，且连续激活函数导致可扩展性和鲁棒性差，限制了其在学术研究之外的部署。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种能利用先验知识、实现点对函数映射的PDE求解网络，以提升解的鲁棒性和可扩展性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出PINN方法因离散拟合和连续激活函数导致局部特性与方程解对齐，但可扩展性和鲁棒性不足。
analysis.method: 提出通用显式网络GEN，通过基于原始PDE先验知识构建的基函数实现点对函数求解。
contributions: 提出一种点对函数的PDE求解范式GEN，替代传统点对点拟合。
利用先验基函数构建函数组件，提升解的鲁棒性和可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基函数的选择依赖先验知识，可能限制通用性。
未在复杂高维PDE上验证，实际性能未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种点对函数求解PDE的通用显式网络GEN，通过先验基函数提升鲁棒性和可扩展性。

papers.title: RefinementEngine: Automating Intent-to-Device Filtering Policy Deployment under Network Constraints
papers.abstract: Translating security intent into deployable network enforcement rules and maintaining their effectiveness despite evolving cyber threats remains a largely manual process in most Security Operations Centers (SOCs). In large and heterogeneous networks, this challenge is complicated by topology-dependent reachability constraints and device-specific security control capabilities, making the process slow, error-prone, and a recurring source of misconfigurations. This paper presents RefinementEngine, an engine that automates the refinement of high-level security intents into low-level, deployment-ready configurations. Given a network topology, devices, and available security controls, along with high-level intents and Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI) reports, RefinementEngine automatically generates settings that implement the desired intent, counter reported threats, and can be directly deployed on target security controls. The proposed approach is validated through real-world use cases on packet and web filtering policies derived from actual CTI reports, demonstrating both correctness, practical applicability, and adaptability to new data.

analysis.tldr: RefinementEngine自动将安全意图转化为可部署的网络过滤策略，并适应网络约束和威胁变化。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全运营中心将安全意图转化为可部署的网络规则主要依赖人工，过程缓慢、易出错且易导致配置错误，尤其在大型异构网络中受拓扑可达性和设备能力约束。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化地将高层安全意图（如安全策略）转化为低层、可直接部署的设备配置，同时满足网络拓扑约束和威胁情报要求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RefinementEngine，输入网络拓扑、设备、安全控制、高层意图和网络威胁情报，自动生成可直接部署的配置。
contributions: 提出自动化安全意图到设备配置的细化引擎RefinementEngine
通过真实用例验证了正确性、实用性和适应性
analysis.experiments: 基于真实网络威胁情报报告中的包过滤和Web过滤策略进行验证，展示了正确性、实用性和对新数据的适应性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的网络设备和安全控制
未讨论大规模网络下的性能扩展性
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RefinementEngine自动将安全意图转化为可部署的网络过滤策略，并适应网络约束和威胁变化。

papers.title: OSCAR: Orchestrated Self-verification and Cross-path Refinement
papers.abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) expose their denoising trajectories, offering a natural handle for inference-time control; accordingly, an ideal hallucination mitigation framework should intervene during generation using this model-native signal rather than relying on an externally trained hallucination classifier. Toward this, we formulate commitment uncertainty localization: given a denoising trajectory, identify token positions whose cross-chain entropy exceeds an unsupervised threshold before factually unreliable commitments propagate into self-consistent but incorrect outputs. We introduce a suite of trajectory-level assessments, including a cross-chain divergence-at-hallucination (CDH) metric, for principled comparison of localization methods. We also introduce OSCAR, a training-free inference-time framework operationalizing this formulation. OSCAR runs N parallel denoising chains with randomized reveal orders, computes cross-chain Shannon entropy to detect high-uncertainty positions, and then performs targeted remasking conditioned on retrieved evidence. Ablations confirm that localization and correction contribute complementary gains, robust across N in {4, 8, 16}. On TriviaQA, HotpotQA, RAGTruth, and CommonsenseQA using LLaDA-8B and Dream-7B, OSCAR enhances generation quality by significantly reducing hallucinated content and improving factual accuracy through uncertainty-guided remasking, which also facilitates more effective integration of retrieved evidence. Its native entropy-based uncertainty signal surpasses that of specialized trained detectors, highlighting an inherent capacity of diffusion language models to identify factual uncertainty that is not present in the sequential token commitment structure of autoregressive models.

analysis.tldr: OSCAR利用扩散语言模型的去噪轨迹进行无训练推理时幻觉缓解，通过交叉链熵定位高不确定位置并重掩码修正。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散语言模型在生成过程中暴露去噪轨迹，为推理时控制提供了天然信号，但现有幻觉缓解方法依赖外部训练的分类器，未能充分利用模型自身的不确定性信号。
analysis.problem: 如何在扩散语言模型生成过程中，利用其内在的交叉链熵信号定位并修正幻觉，而不依赖外部训练的分类器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散语言模型的去噪轨迹中，高不确定性的token位置可通过交叉链熵检测，且其不确定性信号优于自回归模型。
analysis.method: OSCAR框架：并行运行N条去噪链（随机揭示顺序），计算交叉链香农熵定位高不确定性位置，然后基于检索证据进行针对性重掩码修正。
contributions: 提出承诺不确定性定位公式，利用交叉链熵无监督阈值检测高不确定性token位置。
引入轨迹级评估指标CDH（交叉链幻觉发散度）用于比较定位方法。
提出无训练推理时框架OSCAR，通过并行链和重掩码有效减少幻觉并提高事实准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在TriviaQA、HotpotQA、RAGTruth和CommonsenseQA上使用LLaDA-8B和Dream-7B评估，OSCAR显著减少幻觉内容并提高事实准确性，消融实验证实定位和修正贡献互补，且对N∈{4,8,16}鲁棒。
limitations: 可能依赖检索证据的质量，若证据不准确则修正效果受限。
并行链的计算开销可能较大，未在摘要中讨论效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OSCAR利用扩散语言模型的去噪轨迹进行无训练推理时幻觉缓解，通过交叉链熵定位高不确定位置并重掩码修正。

papers.title: DWDP: Distributed Weight Data Parallelism for High-Performance LLM Inference on NVL72
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) inference increasingly depends on multi-GPU execution, yet existing inference parallelization strategies require layer-wise inter-rank synchronization, making end-to-end performance sensitive to workload imbalance. We present DWDP (Distributed Weight Data Parallelism), an inference parallelization strategy that preserves data-parallel execution while offloading MoE weights across peer GPUs and fetching missing experts on demand. By removing collective inter-rank synchronization, DWDP allows each GPU to progress independently. We further address the practical overheads of this design with two optimizations for split-weight management and asynchronous remote-weight prefetch. Implemented in TensorRT-LLM and evaluated with DeepSeek-R1 on GB200 NVL72, DWDP improves end-to-end output TPS/GPU by 8.8% at comparable TPS/user in the 20-100 TPS/user serving range under 8K input sequence length and 1K output sequence length.

analysis.tldr: 提出分布式权重数据并行（DWDP）策略，通过去中心化MoE权重存储和按需获取缺失专家，消除层间同步，提升LLM推理吞吐量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM推理并行化策略需要层间同步，导致端到端性能受负载不均衡影响，亟需一种消除同步开销的高效并行方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种无需层间同步的推理并行化策略，以提升多GPU环境下LLM推理的吞吐量和负载均衡性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DWDP策略，将MoE权重分布到对等GPU上，按需获取缺失专家，并采用分割权重管理和异步远程权重预取两种优化来降低实际开销。
contributions: 提出DWDP并行化策略，消除层间同步，允许每个GPU独立执行。
设计分割权重管理和异步远程权重预取优化，解决分布式权重获取的额外开销。
在TensorRT-LLM中实现，并在GB200 NVL72上使用DeepSeek-R1评估，验证了性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在GB200 NVL72上使用DeepSeek-R1模型，在8K输入序列长度和1K输出序列长度下，20-100 TPS/user服务范围内，DWDP相比基线提升8.8%的端到端输出TPS/GPU，同时保持可比的TPS/user。
limitations: 仅针对MoE模型设计，不适用于非MoE架构。
评估仅在特定硬件（GB200 NVL72）和模型（DeepSeek-R1）上进行，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分布式权重数据并行（DWDP）策略，通过去中心化MoE权重存储和按需获取缺失专家，消除层间同步，提升LLM推理吞吐量。

papers.title: Automatic Image-Level Morphological Trait Annotation for Organismal Images
papers.abstract: Morphological traits are physical characteristics of biological organisms that provide vital clues on how organisms interact with their environment. Yet extracting these traits remains a slow, expert-driven process, limiting their use in large-scale ecological studies. A major bottleneck is the absence of high-quality datasets linking biological images to trait-level annotations. In this work, we demonstrate that sparse autoencoders trained on foundation-model features yield monosemantic, spatially grounded neurons that consistently activate on meaningful morphological parts. Leveraging this property, we introduce a trait annotation pipeline that localizes salient regions and uses vision-language prompting to generate interpretable trait descriptions. Using this approach, we construct Bioscan-Traits, a dataset of 80K trait annotations spanning 19K insect images from BIOSCAN-5M. Human evaluation confirms the biological plausibility of the generated morphological descriptions. We assess design sensitivity through a comprehensive ablation study, systematically varying key design choices and measuring their impact on the quality of the resulting trait descriptions. By annotating traits with a modular pipeline rather than prohibitively expensive manual efforts, we offer a scalable way to inject biologically meaningful supervision into foundation models, enable large-scale morphological analyses, and bridge the gap between ecological relevance and machine-learning practicality.

analysis.tldr: 利用稀疏自编码器从基础模型特征中提取有意义的形态学特征，构建大规模昆虫图像性状标注数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 形态学性状是生物与环境互动的关键线索，但提取过程依赖专家、耗时费力，缺乏高质量标注数据集限制了大规模生态研究。
analysis.problem: 如何自动、可扩展地为生物图像生成细粒度的形态学性状标注。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 稀疏自编码器在基础模型特征上训练后，能产生单语义、空间定位的神经元，一致地激活于有意义的形态学部位。
analysis.method: 利用稀疏自编码器从基础模型特征中提取单语义神经元，定位显著区域，再通过视觉-语言提示生成可解释的性状描述。
contributions: 提出一种模块化的自动性状标注流程，结合稀疏自编码器和视觉-语言模型。
构建Bioscan-Traits数据集，包含80K条性状标注，覆盖19K张昆虫图像。
analysis.experiments: 通过人工评估验证生成描述的生物学合理性，并通过消融实验系统分析关键设计选择对性状描述质量的影响。
limitations: 可能仅适用于昆虫等特定生物类群，泛化性待验证。
性状描述质量依赖基础模型和视觉-语言模型的能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用稀疏自编码器从基础模型特征中提取有意义的形态学特征，构建大规模昆虫图像性状标注数据集。

papers.title: Tex3D: Objects as Attack Surfaces via Adversarial 3D Textures for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown strong performance in robotic manipulation, yet their robustness to physically realizable adversarial attacks remains underexplored. Existing studies reveal vulnerabilities through language perturbations and 2D visual attacks, but these attack surfaces are either less representative of real deployment or limited in physical realism. In contrast, adversarial 3D textures pose a more physically plausible and damaging threat, as they are naturally attached to manipulated objects and are easier to deploy in physical environments. Bringing adversarial 3D textures to VLA systems is nevertheless nontrivial. A central obstacle is that standard 3D simulators do not provide a differentiable optimization path from the VLA objective function back to object appearance, making it difficult to optimize through an end-to-end manner. To address this, we introduce Foreground-Background Decoupling (FBD), which enables differentiable texture optimization through dual-renderer alignment while preserving the original simulation environment. To further ensure that the attack remains effective across long-horizon and diverse viewpoints in the physical world, we propose Trajectory-Aware Adversarial Optimization (TAAO), which prioritizes behaviorally critical frames and stabilizes optimization with a vertex-based parameterization. Built on these designs, we present Tex3D, the first framework for end-to-end optimization of 3D adversarial textures directly within the VLA simulation environment. Experiments in both simulation and real-robot settings show that Tex3D significantly degrades VLA performance across multiple manipulation tasks, achieving task failure rates of up to 96.7\%. Our empirical results expose critical vulnerabilities of VLA systems to physically grounded 3D adversarial attacks and highlight the need for robustness-aware training.

analysis.tldr: Tex3D首次在VLA仿真环境中端到端优化3D对抗纹理，实现高达96.7%的任务失败率。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型在机器人操作中表现优异，但其对物理可实现对抗攻击的鲁棒性尚未充分探索，现有攻击方法（语言扰动、2D视觉攻击）物理真实性不足或部署受限。
analysis.problem: 如何生成物理上更真实、更易部署的3D对抗纹理，以有效攻击VLA模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准3D模拟器无法提供从VLA目标函数到物体外观的可微优化路径，导致难以端到端优化纹理。
analysis.method: 提出前景-背景解耦（FBD）实现双渲染器对齐的可微纹理优化，以及轨迹感知对抗优化（TAAO）优先处理行为关键帧并稳定优化。
contributions: 首个在VLA仿真环境中端到端优化3D对抗纹理的框架Tex3D
提出FBD和TAAO方法解决可微优化和长程视角攻击问题
analysis.experiments: 在仿真和真实机器人设置中，Tex3D在多个操作任务上显著降低VLA性能，任务失败率高达96.7%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定VLA架构或任务
真实世界部署的物理一致性未充分验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Tex3D首次在VLA仿真环境中端到端优化3D对抗纹理，实现高达96.7%的任务失败率。

papers.title: Analysis of LLM Performance on AWS Bedrock: Receipt-item Categorisation Case Study
papers.abstract: This paper presents a systematic, cost-aware evaluation of large language models (LLMs) for receipt-item categorisation within a production-oriented classification framework. We compare four instruction-tuned models available through AWS Bedrock: Claude 3.7 Sonnet, Claude 4 Sonnet, Mixtral 8x7B Instruct, and Mistral 7B Instruct. The aim of the study was (1) to assess performance across accuracy, response stability, and token-level cost, and (2) to investigate what prompting methods, zero-shot or few-shot, are especially appropriate both in terms of accuracy and in terms of incurred costs. Results of our experiments demonstrated that Claude 3.7 Sonnet achieves the most favourable balance between classification accuracy and cost efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 在AWS Bedrock上比较四种LLM用于收据项目分类，Claude 3.7 Sonnet在准确率和成本间取得最佳平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 实际生产环境中需要将收据项目自动分类，但不同LLM在准确率、稳定性和成本上差异大，缺乏系统性的成本感知评估。
analysis.problem: 如何选择最适合收据项目分类任务的LLM，并确定最优的提示方法（零样本或少样本）以平衡准确率和成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在AWS Bedrock上对四种指令微调LLM（Claude 3.7 Sonnet、Claude 4 Sonnet、Mixtral 8x7B Instruct、Mistral 7B Instruct）进行系统评估，比较零样本和少样本提示方法下的准确率、响应稳定性和token级成本。
contributions: 提供了LLM在收据项目分类任务上的成本感知评估框架。
实验表明Claude 3.7 Sonnet在准确率和成本效率之间取得最佳平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在收据项目分类数据集上比较四种LLM的准确率、响应稳定性和token级成本，并对比零样本和少样本提示方法。
limitations: 仅评估了AWS Bedrock上的四种模型，可能不适用于其他平台或模型。
未讨论分类错误的类型或对下游任务的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在AWS Bedrock上比较四种LLM用于收据项目分类，Claude 3.7 Sonnet在准确率和成本间取得最佳平衡。

papers.title: NEMESIS: Noise-suppressed Efficient MAE with Enhanced Superpatch Integration Strategy
papers.abstract: Volumetric CT imaging is essential for clinical diagnosis, yet annotating 3D volumes is expensive and time-consuming, motivating self-supervised learning (SSL) from unlabeled data. However, applying SSL to 3D CT remains challenging due to the high memory cost of full-volume transformers and the anisotropic spatial structure of CT data, which is not well captured by conventional masking strategies. We propose NEMESIS, a masked autoencoder (MAE) framework that operates on local 128x128x128 superpatches, enabling memory-efficient training while preserving anatomical detail. NEMESIS introduces three key components: (i) noise-enhanced reconstruction as a pretext task, (ii) Masked Anatomical Transformer Blocks (MATB) that perform dual-masking through parallel plane-wise and axis-wise token removal, and (iii) NEMESIS Tokens (NT) for cross-scale context aggregation. On the BTCV multi-organ classification benchmark, NEMESIS with a frozen backbone and a linear classifier achieves a mean AUROC of 0.9633, surpassing fully fine-tuned SuPreM (0.9493) and VoCo (0.9387). Under a low-label regime with only 10% of available annotations, it retains an AUROC of 0.9075, demonstrating strong label efficiency. Furthermore, the superpatch-based design reduces computational cost to 31.0 GFLOPs per forward pass, compared to 985.8 GFLOPs for the full-volume baseline, providing a scalable and robust foundation for 3D medical imaging.

analysis.tldr: 提出NEMESIS框架，通过超块策略和噪声增强重建实现高效3D CT自监督学习，在BTCV基准上以线性分类器达到0.9633 AUROC。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D CT体积标注昂贵且耗时，自监督学习可缓解标注依赖，但全体积Transformer内存成本高，且CT数据的各向异性结构难以被传统掩码策略有效捕获。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个内存高效且能适应CT各向异性结构的自监督MAE框架，以学习鲁棒的3D医学影像表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出NEMESIS框架，基于局部128x128x128超块进行MAE训练；引入噪声增强重建作为预文本任务；设计掩码解剖Transformer块（MATB），通过并行平面和轴令牌移除实现双重掩码；使用NEMESIS令牌（NT）进行跨尺度上下文聚合。
contributions: 提出超块策略，将全体积MAE分解为局部超块，大幅降低计算成本（31.0 GFLOPs vs 985.8 GFLOPs）。
引入噪声增强重建和双重掩码机制，提升对CT各向异性结构的表示能力。
在BTCV多器官分类基准上，冻结骨干+线性分类器达到0.9633 AUROC，超越全微调方法，且低标注（10%）下仍保持0.9075 AUROC。
analysis.experiments: 在BTCV多器官分类基准上评估，使用冻结骨干和线性分类器，与SuPreM和VoCo对比，并报告了低标注（10%）下的性能。
limitations: 超块大小（128x128x128）可能不适用于更大或各向异性更强的数据集。
噪声增强重建的有效性可能依赖于噪声类型和强度，需进一步调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NEMESIS框架，通过超块策略和噪声增强重建实现高效3D CT自监督学习，在BTCV基准上以线性分类器达到0.9633 AUROC。

papers.title: GraphWalk: Enabling Reasoning in Large Language Models through Tool-Based Graph Navigation
papers.abstract: The use of knowledge graphs for grounding agents in real-world Q&A applications has become increasingly common. Answering complex queries often requires multi-hop reasoning and the ability to navigate vast relational structures. Standard approaches rely on prompting techniques that steer large language models to reason over raw graph context, or retrieval-augmented generation pipelines where relevant subgraphs are injected into the context. These, however, face severe limitations with enterprise-scale KGs that cannot fit in even the largest context windows available today. We present GraphWalk, a problem-agnostic, training-free, tool-based framework that allows off-the-shelf LLMs to reason through sequential graph navigation, dramatically increasing performance across different tasks. Unlike task-specific agent frameworks that encode domain knowledge into specialized tools, GraphWalk equips the LLM with a minimal set of orthogonal graph operations sufficient to traverse any graph structure. We evaluate whether models equipped with GraphWalk can compose these operations into correct multi-step reasoning chains, where each tool call represents a verifiable step creating a transparent execution trace. We first demonstrate our approach on maze traversal, a problem non-reasoning models are completely unable to solve, then present results on graphs resembling real-world enterprise knowledge graphs. To isolate structural reasoning from world knowledge, we evaluate on entirely synthetic graphs with random, non-semantic labels. Our benchmark spans 12 query templates from basic retrieval to compound first-order logic queries. Results show that tool-based traversal yields substantial and consistent gains over in-context baselines across all model families tested, with gains becoming more pronounced as scale increases, precisely where in-context approaches fail catastrophically.
