papers.title: Is Clinical Text Enough? A Multimodal Study on Mortality Prediction in Heart Failure Patients
papers.abstract: Accurate short-term mortality prediction in heart failure (HF) remains challenging, particularly when relying on structured electronic health record (EHR) data alone. We evaluate transformer-based models on a French HF cohort, comparing text-only, structured-only, multimodal, and LLM-based approaches. Our results show that enriching clinical text with entity-level representations improves prediction over CLS embeddings alone, and that supervised multimodal fusion of text and structured variables achieves the best overall performance. In contrast, large language models perform inconsistently across modalities and decoding strategies, with text-only prompts outperforming structured or multimodal inputs. These findings highlight that entity-aware multimodal transformers offer the most reliable solution for short-term HF outcome prediction, while current LLM prompting remains limited for clinical decision support.

analysis.tldr: 针对心衰患者短期死亡率预测，实体感知多模态Transformer优于纯文本或结构化数据，而LLM表现不稳定。
analysis.research_motivation: 结构化EHR数据对心衰短期死亡率预测精度有限，需探索文本与结构化数据的多模态融合。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合临床文本和结构化变量以提高心衰患者短期死亡率预测的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实体级文本表示优于CLS嵌入，多模态融合效果最佳；LLM在文本提示下表现较好，但结构化或多模态输入不稳定。
analysis.main_method: 比较文本-only、结构化-only、多模态Transformer及LLM方法，采用实体感知表示和监督融合策略。
analysis.key_experiments: 在法国心衰队列上评估多种模型，对比不同模态和解码策略的性能。
analysis.contributions: 证明实体感知多模态Transformer是短期心衰预测最可靠方案，揭示LLM在临床决策支持中的局限性。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于单一法语队列，未验证跨语言或跨医院泛化性；LLM提示策略未深入优化。

papers.title: The Rank and Gradient Lost in Non-stationarity: Sample Weight Decay for Mitigating Plasticity Loss in Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) suffers from plasticity loss severely due to the nature of non-stationarity, which impairs the ability to adapt to new data and learn continually. Unfortunately, our understanding of how plasticity loss arises, dissipates, and can be dissolved remains limited to empirical findings, leaving the theoretical end underexplored.To address this gap, we study the plasticity loss problem from the theoretical perspective of network optimization. By formally characterizing the two culprit factors in online RL process: the non-stationarity of data distributions and the non-stationarity of targets induced by bootstrapping, our theory attributes the loss of plasticity to two mechanisms: the rank collapse of the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) Gram matrix and the $\Theta(\frac{1}{k})$ decay of gradient magnitude. The first mechanism echoes prior empirical findings from the theoretical perspective and sheds light on the effects of existing methods, e.g., network reset, neuron recycle, and noise injection. Against this backdrop, we focus primarily on the second mechanism and aim to alleviate plasticity loss by addressing the gradient attenuation issue, which is orthogonal to existing methods. We propose Sample Weight Decay -- a lightweight method to restore gradient magnitude, as a general remedy to plasticity loss for deep RL methods based on experience replay. In experiments, we evaluate the efficacy of \methodName upon TD3, \myadded{Double DQN} and SAC with SimBa architecture in MuJoCo, \myadded{ALE} and DeepMind Control Suite tasks. The results demonstrate that \methodName effectively alleviates plasticity loss and consistently improves learning performance across various configurations of deep RL algorithms, UTD, network architectures, and environments, achieving SOTA performance on challenging DMC Humanoid tasks.

analysis.tldr: 从理论上揭示了强化学习中塑性损失的两个机制：NTK秩坍缩和梯度衰减，并提出样本权重衰减方法缓解梯度衰减问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对塑性损失的理解主要基于经验发现，缺乏理论分析，需要从网络优化角度深入理解其产生和消散机制。
analysis.problem: 深度强化学习中的塑性损失问题，即网络适应新数据和持续学习的能力下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 塑性损失源于在线RL过程中的两种非平稳性：数据分布的非平稳性和自举法导致的目标非平稳性，分别引发NTK Gram矩阵秩坍缩和梯度幅值衰减。
analysis.main_method: 提出样本权重衰减（Sample Weight Decay）方法，通过恢复梯度幅值来缓解塑性损失，是一种轻量级且与现有方法正交的通用解决方案。
analysis.key_experiments: 在MuJoCo、ALE和DeepMind Control Suite任务上，基于TD3、Double DQN和SAC算法进行实验，验证了方法在多种配置下的有效性。
analysis.contributions: 首次从理论上形式化塑性损失的两个机制，并提出一种简单有效的样本权重衰减方法，在多个基准任务上达到SOTA性能。
analysis.limitations: 方法主要针对梯度衰减机制，对NTK秩坍缩机制的处理依赖现有方法；理论分析可能未覆盖所有实际场景。

papers.title: LI-DSN: A Layer-wise Interactive Dual-Stream Network for EEG Decoding
papers.abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) provides a non-invasive window into brain activity, offering high temporal resolution crucial for understanding and interacting with neural processes through brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). Current dual-stream neural networks for EEG often process temporal and spatial features independently through parallel branches, delaying their integration until a final, late-stage fusion. This design inherently leads to an "information silo" problem, precluding intermediate cross-stream refinement and hindering spatial-temporal decompositions essential for full feature utilization. We propose LI-DSN, a layer-wise interactive dual-stream network that facilitates progressive, cross-stream communication at each layer, thereby overcoming the limitations of late-fusion paradigms. LI-DSN introduces a novel Temporal-Spatial Integration Attention (TSIA) mechanism, which constructs a Spatial Affinity Correlation Matrix (SACM) to capture inter-electrode spatial structural relationships and a Temporal Channel Aggregation Matrix (TCAM) to integrate cosine-gated temporal dynamics under spatial guidance. Furthermore, we employ an adaptive fusion strategy with learnable channel weights to optimize the integration of dual-stream features. Extensive experiments across eight diverse EEG datasets, encompassing motor imagery (MI) classification, emotion recognition, and steady-state visual evoked potentials (SSVEP), consistently demonstrate that LI-DSN significantly outperforms 13 state-of-the-art (SOTA) baseline models, showcasing its superior robustness and decoding performance. The code will be publicized after acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出LI-DSN，一种逐层交互的双流网络，通过TSIA机制实现时空特征渐进融合，在8个EEG数据集上超越13个SOTA模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有双流网络在晚期才融合时空特征，导致信息孤岛问题，限制了特征利用效率。
analysis.problem: 解决双流网络中时空特征独立处理、缺乏中间交互导致的特征利用不充分问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 晚期融合范式阻碍了跨流中间细化，无法充分利用时空分解特征，影响解码性能。
analysis.main_method: 提出逐层交互双流网络LI-DSN，包含TSIA机制（SACM捕捉电极空间关系，TCAM整合余弦门控时序动态）和自适应融合策略。
analysis.key_experiments: 在8个EEG数据集（运动想象、情绪识别、SSVEP）上对比13个SOTA模型，LI-DSN均显著领先。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出逐层交互的双流架构，设计TSIA机制实现时空特征渐进融合，并在多任务上验证鲁棒性。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论计算复杂度或实时性，且代码尚未公开，可复现性待验证。

papers.title: DDCL-INCRT: A Self-Organising Transformer with Hierarchical Prototype Structure (Theoretical Foundations)
papers.abstract: Modern neural networks of the transformer family require the practitioner to decide, before training begins, how many attention heads to use, how deep the network should be, and how wide each component should be. These decisions are made without knowledge of the task, producing architectures that are systematically larger than necessary: empirical studies find that a substantial fraction of heads and layers can be removed after training without performance loss. This paper introduces DDCL-INCRT, an architecture that determines its own structure during training. Two complementary ideas are combined. The first, DDCL (Deep Dual Competitive Learning), replaces the feedforward block with a dictionary of learned prototype vectors representing the most informative directions in the data. The prototypes spread apart automatically, driven by the training objective, without explicit regularisation. The second, INCRT (Incremental Transformer), controls the number of heads: starting from one, it adds a new head only when the directional information uncaptured by existing heads exceeds a threshold. The main theoretical finding is that these two mechanisms reinforce each other: each new head amplifies prototype separation, which in turn raises the signal triggering the next addition. At convergence, the network self-organises into a hierarchy of heads ordered by representational granularity. This hierarchical structure is proved to be unique and minimal, the smallest architecture sufficient for the task, under the stated conditions. Formal guarantees of stability, convergence, and pruning safety are established throughout. The architecture is not something one designs. It is something one derives.

analysis.tldr: 提出DDCL-INCRT架构，通过竞争学习和增量机制在训练中自动确定网络结构，形成最小且唯一的层次化原型结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代Transformer需要预先设定头数、深度和宽度，导致架构过大且冗余，需自动确定结构的方法。
analysis.problem: 解决Transformer架构中注意力头数和前馈层大小需手动预设且存在冗余的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 经验研究表明训练后可移除大量头和层而不损失性能，说明预设架构系统性过大。
analysis.main_method: 结合DDCL（用原型向量字典替代前馈块）和INCRT（从单头开始，根据未捕获方向信息阈值增量添加头）。
analysis.key_experiments: 论文为理论分析，未提供具体实验，但给出了稳定性、收敛性和剪枝安全性的形式化保证。
analysis.contributions: 提出自组织Transformer架构，证明其层次化头结构唯一且最小，并提供理论保证。
analysis.limitations: 缺乏实验验证，仅停留在理论推导，实际应用效果未知。

papers.title: From Guessing to Placeholding: A Cost-Theoretic Framework for Uncertainty-Aware Code Completion
papers.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated exceptional proficiency in code completion, they typically adhere to a Hard Completion (HC) paradigm, compelling the generation of fully concrete code even amidst insufficient context. Our analysis of 3 million real-world interactions exposes the limitations of this strategy: 61% of the generated suggestions were either edited after acceptance or rejected despite exhibiting over 80% similarity to the user's subsequent code, suggesting that models frequently make erroneous predictions at specific token positions. Motivated by this observation, we propose Adaptive Placeholder Completion (APC), a collaborative framework that extends HC by strategically outputting explicit placeholders at high-entropy positions, allowing users to fill directly via IDE navigation. Theoretically, we formulate code completion as a cost-minimization problem under uncertainty. Premised on the observation that filling placeholders incurs lower cost than correcting errors, we prove the existence of a critical entropy threshold above which APC achieves strictly lower expected cost than HC. We instantiate this framework by constructing training data from filtered real-world edit logs and design a cost-based reward function for reinforcement learning. Extensive evaluations across 1.5B--14B parameter models demonstrate that APC reduces expected editing costs from 19% to 50% while preserving standard HC performance. Our work provides both a theoretical foundation and a practical training framework for uncertainty-aware code completion, demonstrating that adaptive abstention can be learned end-to-end without sacrificing conventional completion quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应占位符补全（APC）框架，在高熵位置输出占位符以降低代码补全的编辑成本，理论证明其优于硬补全。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在代码补全中强制生成具体代码，但实际中61%的生成建议被编辑或拒绝，表明模型在不确定位置常出错。
analysis.problem: 解决硬补全范式在上下文不足时生成错误代码导致用户编辑成本高的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析300万真实交互发现，即使生成代码与用户后续代码相似度超80%，仍被大量编辑或拒绝，说明模型在特定token位置预测不可靠。
analysis.main_method: 提出APC框架，通过在高熵位置输出占位符让用户直接填充，并基于成本最小化理论推导临界熵阈值，使用强化学习训练。
analysis.key_experiments: 在1.5B-14B参数模型上评估，APC将预期编辑成本降低19%-50%，同时保持标准补全性能。
analysis.contributions: 提供了不确定性感知代码补全的理论基础和实践训练框架，证明自适应放弃可端到端学习而不牺牲补全质量。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论占位符对用户认知负荷的影响，以及在不同编程语言和IDE中的泛化性。

papers.title: Physics Informed Reinforcement Learning with Gibbs Priors for Topology Control in Power Grids
papers.abstract: Topology control for power grid operation is a challenging sequential decision making problem because the action space grows combinatorially with the size of the grid and action evaluation through simulation is computationally expensive. We propose a physics-informed Reinforcement Learning framework that combines semi-Markov control with a Gibbs prior, that encodes the system's physics, over the action space. The decision is only taken when the grid enters a hazardous regime, while a graph neural network surrogate predicts the post action overload risk of feasible topology actions. These predictions are used to construct a physics-informed Gibbs prior that both selects a small state-dependent candidate set and reweights policy logits before action selection. In this way, our method reduces exploration difficulty and online simulation cost while preserving the flexibility of a learned policy. We evaluate the approach in three realistic benchmark environments of increasing difficulty. Across all settings, the proposed method achieves a strong balance between control quality and computational efficiency: it matches oracle-level performance while being approximately $6\times$ faster on the first benchmark, reaches $94.6\%$ of oracle reward with roughly $200\times$ lower decision time on the second one, and on the most challenging benchmark improves over a PPO baseline by up to $255\%$ in reward and $284\%$ in survived steps while remaining about $2.5\times$ faster than a strong specialized engineering baseline. These results show that our method provides an effective mechanism for topology control in power grids.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理信息强化学习框架，结合半马尔可夫控制与吉布斯先验，高效解决电网拓扑控制问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 电网拓扑控制动作空间组合爆炸且仿真评估昂贵，现有方法难以平衡控制质量与计算效率。
analysis.problem: 如何在大规模电网中高效选择拓扑动作，降低探索难度和在线仿真成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 电网拓扑控制中，仅在危险状态时决策可减少动作频率，且物理先验能有效筛选候选动作。
analysis.main_method: 采用半马尔可夫控制仅在危险状态决策，用图神经网络预测过载风险构建吉布斯先验，筛选候选集并重加权策略logits。
analysis.key_experiments: 在三个难度递增的基准环境中测试，与PPO和工程基线对比，评估奖励、决策时间和存活步数。
analysis.contributions: 提出物理信息强化学习框架，显著降低计算开销同时保持或超越最优性能，在复杂场景中提升奖励255%。
analysis.limitations: 依赖图神经网络代理的预测准确性，且吉布斯先验设计可能需针对不同电网调整。

papers.title: PLOT: Enhancing Preference Learning via Optimal Transport
papers.abstract: Preference learning in Large Language Models (LLMs) has advanced significantly, yet existing methods remain limited by modest performance gains, high computational costs, hyperparameter sensitivity, and insufficient modeling of global token-level relationships. We introduce PLOT, which enhances Preference Learning in fine-tuning-based alignment through a token-level loss derived from Optimal Transport. By formulating preference learning as an Optimal Transport Problem, PLOT aligns model outputs with human preferences while preserving the original distribution of LLMs, ensuring stability and robustness. Furthermore, PLOT leverages token embeddings to capture semantic relationships, enabling globally informed optimization. Experiments across two preference categories - Human Values and Logic & Problem Solving - spanning seven subpreferences demonstrate that PLOT consistently improves alignment performance while maintaining fluency and coherence. These results substantiate optimal transport as a principled methodology for preference learning, establishing a theoretically grounded framework that provides new insights for preference learning of LLMs.

analysis.tldr: PLOT 通过最优传输理论优化大语言模型的偏好学习，在保持流畅性的同时提升对齐性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有偏好学习方法存在性能提升有限、计算成本高、超参数敏感及缺乏全局 token 级关系建模等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在大语言模型微调对齐中，高效且稳定地建模全局 token 级偏好关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 偏好学习需要平衡模型输出与人类偏好，但局部优化易忽略语义关联，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.main_method: 将偏好学习形式化为最优传输问题，通过 token 级损失函数对齐模型输出与人类偏好，并利用 token 嵌入捕获语义关系。
analysis.key_experiments: 在人类价值观和逻辑与问题解决两类偏好（共七个子偏好）上测试，PLOT 持续提升对齐性能且保持流畅性。
analysis.contributions: 提出基于最优传输的偏好学习框架，提供理论支撑并实现全局优化，显著改善对齐效果。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论大规模模型或复杂场景下的计算效率，以及最优传输求解的潜在近似误差。

papers.title: Dual-Attention Based 3D Channel Estimation
papers.abstract: For multi-input and multi-output (MIMO) channels, the optimal channel estimation (CE) based on linear minimum mean square error (LMMSE) requires three-dimensional (3D) filtering. However, the complexity is often prohibitive due to large matrix dimensions. Suboptimal estimators approximate 3DCE by decomposing it into time, frequency, and spatial domains, while yields noticeable performance degradation under correlated MIMO channels. On the other hand, recent advances in deep learning (DL) can explore channel correlations in all domains via attention mechanisms. Building on this capability, we propose a dual attention mechanism based 3DCE network (3DCENet) that can achieve accurate estimates.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于双注意力机制的3D信道估计网络，在MIMO系统中实现低复杂度高精度估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统LMMSE的3D信道估计复杂度高，而分解方法在相关信道下性能下降，需更优方案。
analysis.problem: MIMO信道中3D滤波的复杂度高，且现有分解方法在相关信道下性能损失大。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 深度学习注意力机制能有效探索时域、频域和空域的信道相关性，提升估计精度。
analysis.main_method: 设计双注意力机制的3DCENet，通过注意力机制联合处理三维信道相关性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在相关MIMO信道下评估，与LMMSE和分解方法对比，验证精度和复杂度优势。
analysis.contributions: 首次将双注意力机制用于3D信道估计，实现低复杂度高精度估计。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论网络训练开销及实际部署中的实时性要求。

papers.title: Graph Neural Operator Towards Edge Deployability and Portability for Sparse-to-Dense, Real-Time Virtual Sensing on Irregular Grids
papers.abstract: Accurate sensing of spatially distributed physical fields typically requires dense instrumentation, which is often infeasible in real-world systems due to cost, accessibility, and environmental constraints. Physics-based solvers address this through direct numerical integration of governing equations, but their computational latency and power requirements preclude real-time use in resource-constrained monitoring and control systems. Here we introduce VIRSO (Virtual Irregular Real-Time Sparse Operator), a graph-based neural operator for sparse-to-dense reconstruction on irregular geometries, and a variable-connectivity algorithm, Variable KNN (V-KNN), for mesh-informed graph construction. Unlike prior neural operators that treat hardware deployability as secondary, VIRSO reframes inference as measurement: the combination of both spectral and spatial analysis provides accurate reconstruction without the high latency and power consumption of previous graph-based methodologies with poor scalability, presenting VIRSO as a potential candidate for edge-constrained, real-time virtual sensing. We evaluate VIRSO on three nuclear thermal-hydraulic benchmarks of increasing geometric and multiphysics complexity, across reconstruction ratios from 47:1 to 156:1. VIRSO achieves mean relative $L_2$ errors below 1%, outperforming other benchmark operators while using fewer parameters. The full 10-layer configuration reduces the energy-delay product (EDP) from ${\approx}206$ J$\cdot$ms for the graph operator baseline to $10.1$ J$\cdot$ms on an NVIDIA H200. Implemented on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, all configurations of VIRSO provide sub-10 W power consumption and sub-second latency. These results establish the edge-feasibility and hardware-portability of VIRSO and present compute-aware operator learning as a new paradigm for real-time sensing in inaccessible and resource-constrained environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出图神经算子VIRSO，实现不规则网格上稀疏到稠密的实时虚拟传感，支持边缘部署，在核热工基准上误差低于1%。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理场密集传感成本高且不可行，现有物理求解器延迟和功耗大，无法用于资源受限的实时监控系统。
analysis.problem: 在不规则几何上实现稀疏到稠密的实时重建，同时满足边缘设备的低延迟和低功耗要求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有图方法因可扩展性差导致高延迟和高功耗，而VIRSO通过谱与空间分析结合实现低延迟重建。
analysis.main_method: 提出VIRSO图神经算子，结合可变连接度算法V-KNN构建网格感知图，将推理视为测量过程。
analysis.key_experiments: 在三个核热工基准上测试，重建比47:1至156:1，VIRSO平均相对L2误差低于1%，参数更少；在NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上功耗低于10W，延迟低于1秒。
analysis.contributions: 提出边缘可部署的图神经算子VIRSO及V-KNN算法，实现实时虚拟传感，并建立计算感知算子学习新范式。
analysis.limitations: 仅在核热工领域验证，未在更广泛物理场或极端稀疏场景测试；V-KNN的通用性需进一步评估。

papers.title: DEFT: Distribution-guided Efficient Fine-Tuning for Human Alignment
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF), using algorithms like Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), aligns Large Language Models (LLMs) with human values but is costly and unstable. Alternatives have been proposed to replace PPO or integrate Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and contrastive learning for direct fine-tuning and value alignment. However, these methods still require voluminous data to learn preferences and may weaken the generalization ability of LLMs. To further enhance alignment efficiency and performance while mitigating the loss of generalization ability, this paper introduces Distribution-guided Efficient Fine-Tuning (DEFT), an efficient alignment framework incorporating data filtering and distributional guidance by calculating the differential distribution reward based on the output distribution of language model and the discrepancy distribution of preference data. A small yet high-quality subset is filtered from the raw data using a differential distribution reward, which is then incorporated into existing alignment methods to guide the model's output distribution. Experimental results demonstrate that the methods enhanced by DEFT outperform the original methods in both alignment capability and generalization ability, with significantly reduced training time.

analysis.tldr: 提出DEFT框架，通过分布引导和数据过滤提升人类对齐效率，减少训练时间并保持泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RLHF方法（如PPO）成本高且不稳定，替代方法仍需大量数据且可能削弱泛化能力，因此需要更高效的微调方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在减少数据量和训练时间的同时，提升大语言模型与人类价值的对齐效果并保持泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有对齐方法依赖大量偏好数据，导致训练效率低且模型泛化能力下降，而高质量子集可有效引导输出分布。
analysis.main_method: 通过计算差分分布奖励（基于语言模型输出分布和偏好数据差异分布）过滤出高质量子集，并将其融入现有对齐方法以引导输出分布。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个对齐任务上测试，DEFT增强的方法在对齐能力和泛化能力上均优于原始方法，且训练时间显著减少。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种高效对齐框架DEFT，结合数据过滤和分布引导，提升对齐性能并降低计算成本。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论对极端偏好或噪声数据的鲁棒性，以及在不同模型规模上的扩展性。

papers.title: Learning in Prophet Inequalities with Noisy Observations
papers.abstract: We study the prophet inequality, a fundamental problem in online decision-making and optimal stopping, in a practical setting where rewards are observed only through noisy realizations and reward distributions are unknown. At each stage, the decision-maker receives a noisy reward whose true value follows a linear model with an unknown latent parameter, and observes a feature vector drawn from a distribution. To address this challenge, we propose algorithms that integrate learning and decision-making via lower-confidence-bound (LCB) thresholding. In the i.i.d.\ setting, we establish that both an Explore-then-Decide strategy and an $\varepsilon$-Greedy variant achieve the sharp competitive ratio of $1 - 1/e$, under a mild condition on the optimal value. For non-identical distributions, we show that a competitive ratio of $1/2$ can be guaranteed against a relaxed benchmark. Moreover, with limited window access to past rewards, the tight ratio of $1/2$ against the optimal benchmark is achieved.

analysis.tldr: 在噪声观测下，通过LCB阈值算法实现先知不等式问题中1-1/e的竞争比，并扩展到非相同分布场景。
analysis.research_motivation: 实际在线决策中奖励常通过噪声观测获得且分布未知，现有先知不等式研究多假设完美观测或已知分布。
analysis.problem: 如何在奖励仅通过噪声观测且分布未知的情况下，设计在线决策算法以逼近最优停止策略的竞争比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 噪声观测导致真实奖励不可直接获取，但通过线性模型和特征向量可部分恢复信息，LCB阈值能平衡探索与利用。
analysis.main_method: 提出基于LCB阈值的算法，包括Explore-then-Decide和ε-Greedy变体，在i.i.d.和非相同分布场景下分析竞争比。
analysis.key_experiments: 在i.i.d.设置下证明两种算法在最优值温和条件下达到1-1/e的竞争比；非相同分布下对松弛基准保证1/2竞争比。
analysis.contributions: 首次在噪声观测和未知分布下建立先知不等式的理论竞争比，并扩展至非相同分布和有限窗口访问场景。
analysis.limitations: 依赖线性模型假设和最优值条件，实际中特征分布和噪声模型可能更复杂。

papers.title: Bridging Deep Learning and Integer Linear Programming: A Predictive-to-Prescriptive Framework for Supply Chain Analytics
authors: Khai Banh Nghiep and Duc Nguyen Minh and Lan Hoang Thi
papers.abstract: Although demand forecasting is a critical component of supply chain planning, actual retail data can exhibit irreconcilable seasonality, irregular spikes, and noise, rendering precise projections nearly unattainable. This paper proposes a three-step analytical framework that combines forecasting and operational analytics. The first stage consists of exploratory data analysis, where delivery-tracked data from 180,519 transactions are partitioned, and long-term trends, seasonality, and delivery-related attributes are examined. Secondly, the forecasting performance of a statistical time series decomposition model N-BEATS MSTL and a recent deep learning architecture N-HiTS were compared. N-BEATS and N-HiTS were both statistically, and hence were N-BEATS's and N-HiTS's statistically selected. Most recent time series deep learning models, N-HiTS, N-BEATS. N-HiTS and N-BEATS N-HiTS and N-HiTS outperformed the statistical benchmark to a large extent. N-BEATS was selected to be the most optimized model, as the one with the lowest forecasting error, in the 3rd and final stage forecasting values of the next 4 weeks of 1918 units, and provided those as a model with a set of deterministically integer linear program outcomes that are aimed to minimize the total delivery time with a set of bound budget, capacity, and service constraints. The solution allocation provided a feasible and cost-optimal shipping plan. Overall, the study provides a compelling example of the practical impact of precise forecasting and simple, highly interpretable model optimization in logistics.

analysis.tldr: 提出预测到规划的框架，结合N-BEATS深度学习预测与整数线性规划，优化供应链配送计划。
analysis.research_motivation: 零售数据存在不可调和的季节性、异常尖峰和噪声，精确预测困难，需要将预测与运营决策结合。
analysis.problem: 如何将深度学习时间序列预测与整数线性规划有效结合，以在预算、容量和服务约束下最小化总配送时间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: N-HiTS和N-BEATS等深度学习模型在预测上显著优于统计基准，但预测误差仍存在，需通过优化框架转化为可行决策。
analysis.main_method: 三阶段框架：探索性数据分析、比较N-BEATS MSTL和N-HiTS的预测性能、将最优预测（N-BEATS）输入整数线性规划求解配送方案。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用180,519笔交易数据，预测未来4周1918个单位，比较N-BEATS和N-HiTS，N-BEATS误差最低。
analysis.contributions: 展示了深度学习预测与可解释线性规划结合的实际物流优化效果，提供了成本最优的可行配送计划。
analysis.limitations: 仅使用单一数据集，未讨论模型泛化性；整数线性规划假设确定性，未考虑预测不确定性。

papers.title: Taming CATS: Controllable Automatic Text Simplification through Instruction Fine-Tuning with Control Tokens
papers.abstract: Controllable Automatic Text Simplification (CATS) produces user-tailored outputs, yet controllability is often treated as a decoding problem and evaluated with metrics that are not reflective to the measure of control. We observe that controllability in ATS is significantly constrained by data and evaluation. To this end, we introduce a domain-agnostic CATS framework based on instruction fine-tuning with discrete control tokens, steering open-source models to target readability levels and compression rates. Across three model families with different model sizes (Llama, Mistral, Qwen; 1-14B) and four domains (medicine, public administration, news, encyclopedic text), we find that smaller models (1-3B) can be competitive, but reliable controllability strongly depends on whether the training data encodes sufficient variation in the target attribute. Readability control (FKGL, ARI, Dale-Chall) is learned consistently, whereas compression control underperforms due to limited signal variability in the existing corpora. We further show that standard simplification and similarity metrics are insufficient for measuring control, motivating error-based measures for target-output alignment. Finally, our sampling and stratification experiments demonstrate that naive splits can introduce distributional mismatch that undermines both training and evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 通过指令微调与离散控制令牌，实现可控文本简化，发现小模型在可读性控制上表现良好，但压缩控制受限于数据信号变异性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可控文本简化方法多将可控性视为解码问题，且评估指标无法有效衡量控制效果，需要更系统的框架。
analysis.problem: 自动文本简化中的可控性受限于数据质量和评估指标，缺乏领域无关且可靠的控制方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 可读性控制（如FKGL）可被一致学习，而压缩控制因训练数据中信号变异性不足而表现不佳；标准简化指标不足以衡量控制效果。
analysis.main_method: 提出基于指令微调与离散控制令牌的领域无关框架，引导开源模型（Llama、Mistral、Qwen，1-14B）生成目标可读性水平和压缩率。
analysis.key_experiments: 在四个领域（医学、公共管理、新闻、百科）和三种模型家族上评估，发现小模型（1-3B）具有竞争力，但可控性依赖训练数据中目标属性的变异性。
analysis.contributions: 引入基于错误的目标-输出对齐度量，揭示数据划分中的分布不匹配问题，并验证小模型在可控简化中的潜力。
analysis.limitations: 压缩控制效果有限，且框架依赖训练数据的属性变异性，可能限制在低资源领域的应用。

papers.title: Detecting Toxic Language: Ontology and BERT-based Approaches for Bulgarian Text
papers.abstract: Toxic content detection in online communication remains a significant challenge, with current solutions often inadvertently blocking valuable information, including medical terms and text related to minority groups. This paper presents a more nu-anced approach to identifying toxicity in Bulgarian text while preserving access to essential information. The research explores two distinct methodologies for detecting toxic content. The developed methodologies have po-tential applications across diverse online platforms and content moderation systems. First, we propose an ontology that models the potentially toxic words in Bulgarian language. Then, we compose a dataset that comprises 4,384 manually anno-tated sentences from Bulgarian online forums across four categories: toxic language, medical terminology, non-toxic lan-guage, and terms related to minority communities. We then train a BERT-based model for toxic language classification, which reaches a 0.89 F1 macro score. The trained model is directly applicable in a real environment and can be integrated as a com-ponent of toxic content detection systems.

analysis.tldr: 针对保加利亚语在线文本，提出本体论和BERT模型，实现毒性检测并避免误伤医疗和少数群体内容，F1达0.89。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有毒性检测常误屏蔽医疗术语和少数群体相关文本，需更精细的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在保加利亚语中准确识别毒性内容，同时保留医疗和少数群体相关的重要信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有系统对毒性文本的误判率高，尤其涉及专业术语和敏感群体时。
analysis.main_method: 构建保加利亚语毒性词本体，并基于4384条手动标注句子训练BERT分类模型。
analysis.key_experiments: 在保加利亚语论坛数据集上训练BERT，F1宏平均达0.89。
analysis.contributions: 提出保加利亚语毒性本体和标注数据集，以及高精度BERT分类器。
analysis.limitations: 数据集规模较小（4384句），可能限制泛化能力；仅针对保加利亚语。

papers.title: From BM25 to Corrective RAG: Benchmarking Retrieval Strategies for Text-and-Table Documents
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems critically depend on retrieval quality, yet no systematic comparison of modern retrieval methods exists for heterogeneous documents containing both text and tabular data. We benchmark ten retrieval strategies spanning sparse, dense, hybrid fusion, cross-encoder reranking, query expansion, index augmentation, and adaptive retrieval on a challenging financial QA benchmark of 23,088 queries over 7,318 documents with mixed text-and-table content. We evaluate retrieval quality via Recall@k, MRR, and nDCG, and end-to-end generation quality via Number Match, with paired bootstrap significance testing. Our results show that (1) a two-stage pipeline combining hybrid retrieval with neural reranking achieves Recall@5 of 0.816 and MRR@3 of 0.605, outperforming all single-stage methods by a large margin; (2) BM25 outperforms state-of-the-art dense retrieval on financial documents, challenging the common assumption that semantic search universally dominates; and (3) query expansion methods (HyDE, multi-query) and adaptive retrieval provide limited benefit for precise numerical queries, while contextual retrieval yields consistent gains. We provide ablation studies on fusion methods and reranker depth, actionable cost-accuracy recommendations, and release our full benchmark code.

analysis.tldr: 系统比较了十种检索策略在混合文本-表格文档上的表现，发现混合检索+重排序最优，BM25优于稠密检索，查询扩展对数值查询帮助有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG系统依赖检索质量，但缺乏针对混合文本和表格文档的现代检索方法系统比较。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估和比较不同检索策略在包含文本和表格的异构文档上的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: BM25在金融文档上优于最先进的稠密检索，挑战了语义搜索普遍占优的假设；查询扩展方法对精确数值查询收益有限。
analysis.main_method: 在包含23,088个查询和7,318个文档的金融QA基准上，对十种检索策略（稀疏、稠密、混合融合、交叉编码器重排序、查询扩展、索引增强、自适应检索）进行基准测试。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用Recall@k、MRR、nDCG评估检索质量，Number Match评估生成质量，并进行配对bootstrap显著性检验。
analysis.contributions: 提供了首个针对混合文本-表格文档的检索策略系统比较，揭示了BM25在金融领域的优势，并给出了成本-准确度建议。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对金融领域，可能不适用于其他领域；未深入分析表格结构对检索的影响。

papers.title: DDCL: Deep Dual Competitive Learning: A Differentiable End-to-End Framework for Unsupervised Prototype-Based Representation Learning
papers.abstract: A persistent structural weakness in deep clustering is the disconnect between feature learning and cluster assignment. Most architectures invoke an external clustering step, typically k-means, to produce pseudo-labels that guide training, preventing the backbone from directly optimising for cluster quality. This paper introduces Deep Dual Competitive Learning (DDCL), the first fully differentiable end-to-end framework for unsupervised prototype-based representation learning. The core contribution is architectural: the external k-means is replaced by an internal Dual Competitive Layer (DCL) that generates prototypes as native differentiable outputs of the network. This single inversion makes the complete pipeline, from backbone feature extraction through prototype generation to soft cluster assignment, trainable by backpropagation through a single unified loss, with no Lloyd iterations, no pseudo-label discretisation, and no external clustering step. To ground the framework theoretically, the paper derives an exact algebraic decomposition of the soft quantisation loss into a simplex-constrained reconstruction error and a non-negative weighted prototype variance term. This identity reveals a self-regulating mechanism built into the loss geometry: the gradient of the variance term acts as an implicit separation force that resists prototype collapse without any auxiliary objective, and leads to a global Lyapunov stability theorem for the reduced frozen-encoder system. Six blocks of controlled experiments validate each structural prediction. The decomposition identity holds with zero violations across more than one hundred thousand training epochs; the negative feedback cycle is confirmed with Pearson -0.98; with a jointly trained backbone, DDCL outperforms its non-differentiable ablation by 65% in clustering accuracy and DeepCluster end-to-end by 122%.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个全可微分的无监督原型表示学习框架DDCL，用内部竞争层替代外部k-means，实现端到端聚类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度聚类方法中特征学习与聚类分配脱节，通常依赖外部k-means生成伪标签，阻碍了骨干网络直接优化聚类质量。
analysis.problem: 解决深度聚类中特征学习与聚类分配之间的结构性断开问题，消除对外部聚类步骤的依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 软量化损失的代数分解揭示了损失几何中的自调节机制：方差项的梯度作为隐式分离力，无需辅助目标即可抵抗原型坍缩。
analysis.main_method: 设计双竞争层（DCL）作为网络的可微输出，生成原型并通过单一损失进行反向传播训练，替代Lloyd迭代和伪标签离散化。
analysis.key_experiments: 六组控制实验验证了分解恒等式零违规、负反馈循环（Pearson -0.98），联合训练下DDCL比不可微消融版本聚类准确率提升65%，比DeepCluster端到端提升122%。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出全可微分的无监督原型学习框架，推导出软量化损失的精确代数分解，并证明了全局Lyapunov稳定性。
analysis.limitations: 论文未明确讨论在大规模数据集上的计算效率或对高维数据的扩展性。

papers.title: MATA-Former & SIICU: Semantic Aware Temporal Alignment for High-Fidelity ICU Risk Prediction
papers.abstract: Forecasting evolving clinical risks relies on intrinsic pathological dependencies rather than mere chronological proximity, yet current methods struggle with coarse binary supervision and physical timestamps. To align predictive modeling with clinical logic, we propose the Medical-semantics Aware Time-ALiBi Transformer (MATA-Former), utilizing event semantics to dynamically parameterize attention weights to prioritize causal validity over time lags. Furthermore, we introduce Plateau-Gaussian Soft Labeling (PSL), reformulating binary classification into continuous multi-horizon regression for full-trajectory risk modeling. Evaluated on SIICU -- a newly constructed dataset featuring over 506k events with rigorous expert-verified, fine-grained annotations -- and the MIMIC-IV dataset, our framework demonstrates superior efficacy and robust generalization in capturing risks from text-intensive, irregular clinical time series.

analysis.tldr: 提出MATA-Former和PSL方法，利用事件语义动态调整注意力权重，将二分类转为连续多时间回归，提升ICU风险预测的临床逻辑一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖粗粒度二分类监督和物理时间戳，无法捕捉临床事件间的病理依赖关系，导致预测与临床逻辑脱节。
analysis.problem: 如何利用事件语义而非时间邻近性来对齐预测模型与临床逻辑，并实现全轨迹风险建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 临床风险演变依赖于内在病理依赖关系，而非简单的时间顺序，但现有模型忽视了语义因果性。
analysis.main_method: 提出MATA-Former，通过事件语义动态参数化注意力权重；引入Plateau-Gaussian Soft Labeling (PSL)，将二分类转化为连续多时间回归。
analysis.key_experiments: 在新建的SIICU数据集（50.6万事件，专家精细标注）和MIMIC-IV上评估，验证了模型在文本密集、不规则临床时间序列中的有效性和泛化性。
analysis.contributions: 提出了语义感知的时间对齐机制和软标签回归方法，显著提升了高风险预测的准确性和临床可解释性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖高质量语义标注，可能对标注噪声敏感；未在更多样化的ICU场景中验证。

papers.title: PRCCF: A Persona-guided Retrieval and Causal-aware Cognitive Filtering Framework for Emotional Support Conversation
papers.abstract: Emotional Support Conversation (ESC) aims to alleviate individual emotional distress by generating empathetic responses. However, existing methods face challenges in effectively supporting deep contextual understanding. To address this issue, we propose PRCCF, a Persona-guided Retrieval and Causality-aware Cognitive Filtering framework. Specifically, the framework incorporates a persona-guided retrieval mechanism that jointly models semantic compatibility and persona alignment to enhance response generation. Furthermore, it employs a causality-aware cognitive filtering module to prioritize causally relevant external knowledge, thereby improving contextual cognitive understanding for emotional reasoning. Extensive experiments on the ESConv dataset demonstrate that PRCCF outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on both automatic metrics and human evaluations. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/YancyLyx/PRCCF.

analysis.tldr: 提出PRCCF框架，通过角色引导检索和因果认知过滤提升情感支持对话的上下文理解与共情能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有情感支持对话方法在深层上下文理解上存在不足，难以有效缓解用户情绪困扰。
analysis.problem: 如何增强对话系统对上下文语义和因果关系的理解，以生成更共情、有效的支持性回复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 情感支持对话中，角色一致性和因果相关的外部知识对提升回复质量至关重要，但现有模型未充分建模。
analysis.main_method: 提出角色引导检索机制（联合语义兼容性与角色对齐）和因果感知认知过滤模块（优先选择因果相关外部知识）。
analysis.key_experiments: 在ESConv数据集上，与多个基线模型对比，使用自动评估和人工评估验证性能提升。
analysis.contributions: 首次将角色引导检索与因果认知过滤结合用于情感支持对话，显著提升上下文理解和共情推理。
analysis.limitations: 依赖外部知识库质量，且因果过滤可能引入噪声；未在跨领域或低资源场景下验证。

papers.title: Human-Guided Reasoning with Large Language Models for Vietnamese Speech Emotion Recognition
papers.abstract: Vietnamese Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) remains challenging due to ambiguous acoustic patterns and the lack of reliable annotated data, especially in real-world conditions where emotional boundaries are not clearly separable. To address this problem, this paper proposes a human-machine collaborative framework that integrates human knowledge into the learning process rather than relying solely on data-driven models. The proposed framework is centered around LLM-based reasoning, where acoustic feature-based models are used to provide auxiliary signals such as confidence and feature-level evidence. A confidence-based routing mechanism is introduced to distinguish between easy and ambiguous samples, allowing uncertain cases to be delegated to LLMs for deeper reasoning guided by structured rules derived from human annotation behavior. In addition, an iterative refinement strategy is employed to continuously improve system performance through error analysis and rule updates. Experiments are conducted on a Vietnamese speech dataset of 2,764 samples across three emotion classes (calm, angry, panic), with high inter-annotator agreement (Fleiss Kappa = 0.8574), ensuring reliable ground truth. The proposed method achieves strong performance, reaching up to 86.59% accuracy and Macro F1 around 0.85-0.86, demonstrating its effectiveness in handling ambiguous and hard-to-classify cases. Overall, this work highlights the importance of combining data-driven models with human reasoning, providing a robust and model-agnostic approach for speech emotion recognition in low-resource settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出人机协作框架，结合LLM推理与声学特征模型，提升越南语语音情感识别在模糊样本上的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 越南语语音情感识别面临声学模式模糊和标注数据不足的挑战，纯数据驱动模型难以处理边界不清的情感类别。
analysis.problem: 解决语音情感识别中模糊样本（如情感边界不清晰）的准确分类问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 情感声学特征存在歧义性，导致模型对困难样本的置信度低，而人类标注者通过结构化规则能更好区分模糊情感。
analysis.main_method: 构建基于LLM的推理框架，通过置信度路由机制将模糊样本分配给LLM，并利用人类标注行为导出的结构化规则进行深度推理，辅以迭代错误分析优化规则。
analysis.key_experiments: 在包含2764个样本（三类情感：平静、愤怒、恐慌）的越南语数据集上测试，标注者间一致性高（Fleiss Kappa=0.8574），达到86.59%准确率和0.85-0.86 Macro F1。
analysis.contributions: 提出模型无关的人机协作框架，有效结合数据驱动模型与人类推理，显著提升低资源场景下模糊样本的识别能力。
analysis.limitations: 依赖LLM的推理质量与规则设计的完备性，且实验仅针对三类情感，未验证多类或跨语言泛化性。

papers.title: Label Shift Estimation With Incremental Prior Update
papers.abstract: An assumption often made in supervised learning is that the training and testing sets have the same label distribution. However, in real-life scenarios, this assumption rarely holds. For example, medical diagnosis result distributions change over time and across locations; fraud detection models must adapt as patterns of fraudulent activity shift; the category distribution of social media posts changes based on trending topics and user demographics. In the task of label shift estimation, the goal is to estimate the changing label distribution $p_t(y)$ in the testing set, assuming the likelihood $p(x|y)$ does not change, implying no concept drift. In this paper, we propose a new approach for post-hoc label shift estimation, unlike previous methods that perform moment matching with confusion matrix estimated from a validation set or maximize the likelihood of the new data with an expectation-maximization algorithm. We aim to incrementally update the prior on each sample, adjusting each posterior for more accurate label shift estimation. The proposed method is based on intuitive assumptions on classifiers that are generally true for modern probabilistic classifiers. The proposed method relies on a weaker notion of calibration compared to other methods. As a post-hoc approach for label shift estimation, the proposed method is versatile and can be applied to any black-box probabilistic classifier. Experiments on CIFAR-10 and MNIST show that the proposed method consistently outperforms the current state-of-the-art maximum likelihood-based methods under different calibrations and varying intensities of label shift.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种增量更新先验的标签偏移估计方法，通过调整每个样本的后验概率，在CIFAR-10和MNIST上优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实场景中训练集和测试集的标签分布常不一致，需要估计测试集的标签分布变化。
analysis.problem: 在假设条件概率p(x|y)不变的情况下，估计测试集中变化的标签分布p_t(y)。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法依赖混淆矩阵或期望最大化，而新方法利用分类器的弱校准性质，通过增量更新先验更准确地估计标签偏移。
analysis.main_method: 提出一种后验标签偏移估计方法，基于分类器的直观假设，对每个样本增量更新先验以调整后验概率。
analysis.key_experiments: 在CIFAR-10和MNIST数据集上实验，在不同校准和标签偏移强度下，方法一致优于基于最大似然的现有方法。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种更通用、弱校准依赖的标签偏移估计方法，适用于任何黑盒概率分类器。
analysis.limitations: 依赖分类器的弱校准性质，可能不适用于非概率分类器或极端偏移场景。

papers.title: Cognitive Energy Modeling for Neuroadaptive Human-Machine Systems using EEG and WGAN-GP
papers.abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) provides a non-invasive insight into the brain's cognitive and emotional dynamics. However, modeling how these states evolve in real time and quantifying the energy required for such transitions remains a major challenge. The Schr\"odinger Bridge Problem (SBP) offers a principled probabilistic framework to model the most efficient evolution between the brain states, interpreted as a measure of cognitive energy cost. While generative models such as GANs have been widely used to augment EEG data, it remains unclear whether synthetic EEG preserves the underlying dynamical structure required for transition-based analysis. In this work, we address this gap by using SBP-derived transport cost as a metric to evaluate whether GAN-generated EEG retains the distributional geometry necessary for energy-based modeling of cognitive state transitions. We compare transition energies derived from real and synthetic EEG collected during Stroop tasks and demonstrate strong agreement across group and participant-level analyses. These results indicate that synthetic EEG preserves the transition structure required for SBP-based modeling, enabling its use in data-efficient neuroadaptive systems. We further present a framework in which SBP-derived cognitive energy serves as a control signal for adaptive human-machine systems, supporting real-time adjustment of system behavior in response to user cognitive and affective state.

analysis.tldr: 利用WGAN-GP生成EEG数据，通过薛定谔桥问题验证其保留认知状态转换的能量结构，支持神经自适应人机系统。
analysis.research_motivation: EEG能反映大脑认知动态，但实时建模状态演化及量化转换能量仍具挑战，且合成EEG是否保留动态结构未知。
analysis.problem: 如何评估生成式EEG数据是否保留认知状态转换所需的动态结构，并用于能量建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成EEG与真实EEG在Stroop任务中导出的转换能量高度一致，表明生成数据保留了分布几何结构。
analysis.main_method: 使用WGAN-GP生成EEG数据，以薛定谔桥问题导出的传输成本作为度量，比较真实与合成EEG的认知能量。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Stroop任务中收集EEG，进行群体和个体层面的转换能量分析，验证合成数据与真实数据的一致性。
analysis.contributions: 提出以SBP传输成本评估合成EEG动态结构的方法，并构建基于认知能量的自适应人机系统框架。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论其他生成模型（如VAE）的适用性，且实验仅基于Stroop任务，泛化性待验证。

papers.title: What Do Claim Verification Datasets Actually Test? A Reasoning Trace Analysis
papers.abstract: Despite rapid progress in claim verification, we lack a systematic understanding of what reasoning these benchmarks actually exercise. We generate structured reasoning traces for 24K claim-verification examples across 9 datasets using GPT-4o-mini and find that direct evidence extraction dominates, while multi-sentence synthesis and numerical reasoning are severely under-represented. A dataset-level breakdown reveals stark biases: some datasets almost exclusively test lexical matching, while others require information synthesis in roughly half of cases. Using a compact 1B-parameter reasoning verifier, we further characterize five error types and show that error profiles vary dramatically by domain -- general-domain verification is dominated by lexical overlap bias, scientific verification by overcautiousness, and mathematical verification by arithmetic reasoning failures. Our findings suggest that high benchmark scores primarily reflect retrieval-plus-entailment ability. We outline recommendations for building more challenging evaluation suites that better test the reasoning capabilities verification systems need.

analysis.tldr: 分析9个事实验证数据集发现，多数任务依赖直接证据提取，多句合成与数值推理不足，高基准分主要反映检索加蕴含能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前事实验证基准测试的推理能力缺乏系统理解，需揭示其实际测试的推理类型。
analysis.problem: 事实验证数据集主要测试何种推理能力，以及不同领域中的错误模式差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多数示例依赖直接证据提取，多句合成与数值推理严重不足；数据集间存在显著偏差，如通用领域偏词汇匹配，科学领域偏过度谨慎，数学领域偏算术错误。
analysis.main_method: 使用GPT-4o-mini生成24K示例的结构化推理轨迹，并用1B参数推理验证器分类五种错误类型。
analysis.key_experiments: 分析9个数据集（共24K示例）的推理轨迹，评估错误类型在通用、科学、数学领域的分布。
analysis.contributions: 揭示数据集推理偏差，指出高基准分主要反映检索加蕴含能力，并提出构建更具挑战性评估套件的建议。
analysis.limitations: 仅依赖GPT-4o-mini生成轨迹，可能引入模型自身偏差；未覆盖所有事实验证数据集。

papers.title: PRISM: Probability Reallocation with In-Span Masking for Knowledge-Sensitive Alignment
papers.abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with token-level hard labels can amplify overconfident imitation of factually unsupported targets, causing hallucinations that propagate in multi-sentence generation. We study an augmented SFT setting in which training instances include coarse sentence-level factuality risk labels and inter-sentence dependency annotations, providing structured signals about where factual commitments are weakly supported. We propose \textbf{PRISM}, a differentiable risk-gated framework that modifies learning only at fact-critical positions. PRISM augments standard SFT with a lightweight, model-aware probability reallocation objective that penalizes high-confidence predictions on risky target tokens, with its scope controlled by span-level risk weights and model-aware gating. Experiments on hallucination-sensitive factual benchmarks and general evaluations show that PRISM improves factual aggregates across backbones while maintaining a competitive overall capability profile. Ablations further show that the auxiliary signal is most effective when used conservatively, and that knowledge masking and model-aware reallocation play complementary roles in balancing factual correction and capability preservation.

analysis.tldr: 提出PRISM框架，通过概率重分配和跨度掩码，在微调中减少模型对事实风险位置的过度自信，提升事实准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准SFT使用硬标签可能导致模型对无事实支持的输出过度自信，产生幻觉，尤其在多句生成中传播。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲整体能力的前提下，减少SFT中模型对事实风险位置的错误高置信度预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在事实风险位置（如弱支持的句子）倾向于高置信度模仿错误目标，导致幻觉累积。
analysis.main_method: 提出PRISM，包含可微风险门控机制，在事实关键位置修改学习，通过概率重分配惩罚高风险目标的高置信度预测，并利用跨度级风险权重和模型感知门控控制范围。
analysis.key_experiments: 在幻觉敏感的事实基准和通用评估上实验，PRISM提升多个骨干模型的事实聚合指标，同时保持竞争力。消融实验显示辅助信号保守使用最有效，知识掩码和重分配互补。
analysis.contributions: 提出PRISM框架，结合风险标签和依赖注释，通过概率重分配和跨度掩码有效减少幻觉，平衡事实校正与能力保持。
analysis.limitations: 依赖粗粒度句子级风险标签和依赖注释，可能限制细粒度事实校正；实验仅在特定骨干模型上验证，泛化性需进一步探索。

papers.title: Coupled Query-Key Dynamics for Attention
papers.abstract: Standard scaled dot-product attention computes scores from static, independent projections of the input. We show that evolving queries and keys \emph{jointly} through shared learned dynamics before scoring - which we call \textbf{coupled QK dynamics} - improves language modeling perplexity and training stability. On WikiText-103 at 60M parameters, coupled dynamics achieves 22.55--22.62 perplexity vs.\ 24.22 for standard attention ($-$6.6--6.9\%), with only 0.11\% additional parameters (shared across both instantiations). A structural ablation isolates coupling as the active ingredient: a symplectic (Hamiltonian) and a non-symplectic (Euler) integrator perform identically when both couple Q and K, while an uncoupled MLP baseline of matched capacity reaches only 23.81 with 8$\times$ higher seed variance. The integration step count (1--7) is similarly irrelevant - a single coupled step suffices. A compute-matched comparison reveals that coupling is a \emph{sample-efficiency} mechanism: standard attention trained for 2.4$\times$ longer (matching wall-clock) reaches the same perplexity, but requires 2.4$\times$ more tokens. The advantage scales to 150M ($-$6.7\%) but narrows at 350M ($-$1.0\%), where Differential Attention (18.93) overtakes coupled dynamics (19.35). The benefit is corpus-dependent: coupling helps on domain-coherent text (WikiText-103 $-$6.6\%, PubMed $-$4.5\%) but degrades on heterogeneous web text ($+$10.3\%) and shows no benefit on GLUE. We characterize when coupling helps and when it does not, providing practical guidelines.

analysis.tldr: 提出耦合查询-键动态（Coupled QK Dynamics），通过共享动力学联合演化Q和K，在语言建模中降低困惑度6.6-6.9%，仅增加0.11%参数。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准注意力机制中查询和键的投影是静态且独立的，可能限制表示能力，探索通过共享动力学联合演化它们能否提升性能。
analysis.problem: 标准缩放点积注意力中查询和键的静态独立投影导致表示效率不足，尤其在语言建模中困惑度较高。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 耦合QK动态在领域一致文本（如WikiText-103）上显著提升，但在异构网络文本上性能下降，表明其效果依赖于数据一致性。
analysis.main_method: 在注意力评分前，通过共享可学习动力学（如辛或非辛积分器）联合演化查询和键，仅增加少量参数。
analysis.key_experiments: 在WikiText-103上60M参数模型，耦合动态达到22.55-22.62困惑度，优于标准注意力的24.22；计算匹配实验显示耦合是样本效率机制，需2.4倍训练时间才能匹配。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了耦合QK动态作为样本效率机制，在领域一致文本上显著提升语言建模，并提供了何时有效何时无效的实用指南。
analysis.limitations: 在异构网络文本和GLUE任务上无益甚至退化，且优势在350M参数规模缩小，被差分注意力超越。

papers.title: Fragile Reasoning: A Mechanistic Analysis of LLM Sensitivity to Meaning-Preserving Perturbations
papers.abstract: Large language models demonstrate strong performance on mathematical reasoning benchmarks, yet remain surprisingly fragile to meaning-preserving surface perturbations. We systematically evaluate three open-weight LLMs, Mistral-7B, Llama-3-8B, and Qwen2.5-7B, on 677 GSM8K problems paired with semantically equivalent variants generated through name substitution and number format paraphrasing. All three models exhibit substantial answer-flip rates (28.8%-45.1%), with number paraphrasing consistently more disruptive than name swaps. To trace the mechanistic basis of these failures, we introduce the Mechanistic Perturbation Diagnostics (MPD) framework, combining logit lens analysis, activation patching, component ablation, and the Cascading Amplification Index (CAI) into a unified diagnostic pipeline. CAI, a novel metric quantifying layer-wise divergence amplification, outperforms first divergence layer as a failure predictor for two of three architectures (AUC up to 0.679). Logit lens reveals that flipped samples diverge from correct predictions at significantly earlier layers than stable samples. Activation patching reveals a stark architectural divide in failure localizability: Llama-3 failures are recoverable by patching at specific layers (43/60 samples), while Mistral and Qwen failures are broadly distributed (3/60 and 0/60). Based on these diagnostic signals, we propose a mechanistic failure taxonomy (localized, distributed, and entangled) and validate it through targeted repair experiments: steering vectors and layer fine-tuning recover 12.2% of localized failures (Llama-3) but only 7.2% of entangled (Qwen) and 5.2% of distributed (Mistral) failures.

analysis.tldr: LLM在数学推理中对保持语义的表面扰动（如数字改写）表现出脆弱性，通过机制分析揭示了不同架构的失败模式差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管LLM在数学推理基准上表现优异，但对表面扰动的脆弱性尚未被充分理解，需要从机制层面探究原因。
analysis.problem: LLM在语义等价的扰动下（如名称替换、数字格式改写）出现答案翻转，且不同模型失败模式不同。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数字改写比名称替换更具破坏性，翻转样本在更早层偏离正确预测，且不同架构的失败可定位性差异显著。
analysis.main_method: 提出MPD框架，结合logit lens、激活修补、组件消融和CAI指标，对三种7B模型进行系统性机制分析。
analysis.key_experiments: 在677个GSM8K问题上测试三种模型，答案翻转率28.8%-45.1%；通过激活修补发现Llama-3失败可定位，Mistral和Qwen失败分布广泛。
analysis.contributions: 提出CAI指标预测失败，建立机制性失败分类（局部化、分布式、纠缠式），并通过修复实验验证分类有效性。
analysis.limitations: 仅测试7B规模模型，未探索更大模型或不同训练数据的影响；修复实验成功率有限（最高12.2%）。

papers.title: CRIT: Graph-Based Automatic Data Synthesis to Enhance Cross-Modal Multi-Hop Reasoning
papers.abstract: Real-world reasoning often requires combining information across modalities, connecting textual context with visual cues in a multi-hop process. Yet, most multimodal benchmarks fail to capture this ability: they typically rely on single images or set of images, where answers can be inferred from a single modality alone. This limitation is mirrored in the training data, where interleaved image-text content rarely enforces complementary, multi-hop reasoning. As a result, Vision-Language Models (VLMs) frequently hallucinate and produce reasoning traces poorly grounded in visual evidence. To address this gap, we introduce CRIT, a new dataset and benchmark built with a graph-based automatic pipeline for generating complex cross-modal reasoning tasks. CRIT consists of diverse domains ranging from natural images, videos, and text-rich sources, and includes a manually verified test set for reliable evaluation. Experiments on this benchmark reveal that even state-of-the-art models struggle on such reasoning tasks. Models trained on CRIT show significant gains in cross-modal multi-hop reasoning, including strong improvements on SPIQA and other standard multimodal benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出CRIT数据集和基准，通过图自动生成跨模态多跳推理任务，提升VLM的跨模态推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态基准和训练数据缺乏跨模态多跳推理能力，导致VLM产生幻觉和推理不准确。
analysis.problem: 解决VLM在跨模态多跳推理任务中表现不佳的问题，特别是需要结合文本和视觉线索的复杂推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前多模态基准多依赖单模态推理，训练数据中交错图文内容很少强制互补推理，导致VLM推理痕迹缺乏视觉证据。
analysis.main_method: 基于图的自动数据合成管道，生成跨模态多跳推理任务，涵盖自然图像、视频和文本丰富来源，并构建人工验证测试集。
analysis.key_experiments: 在CRIT基准上测试，显示最先进模型在此类推理任务上表现困难；在CRIT上训练的模型在SPIQA和其他多模态基准上显著提升。
analysis.contributions: 提出CRIT数据集和基准，填补跨模态多跳推理训练数据空白，并验证其提升VLM推理能力。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论数据合成管道的泛化性及对极端复杂场景的覆盖。

papers.title: Grounding AI-in-Education Development in Teachers' Voices: Findings from a National Survey in Indonesia
authors: Nurul Aisyah and Muhammad Dehan Al Kautsar and Arif Hidayat and Fajri Koto
papers.abstract: Despite emerging use in Indonesian classrooms, there is limited large-scale, teacher-centred evidence on how AI is used in practice and what support teachers need, hindering the development of context-appropriate AI systems and policies. To address this gap, we conduct a nationwide survey of 349 K-12 teachers across elementary, junior high, and senior high schools. We find increasing use of AI for pedagogy, content development, and teaching media, although adoption remains uneven. Elementary teachers report more consistent use, while senior high teachers engage less; mid-career teachers assign higher importance to AI, and teachers in Eastern Indonesia perceive greater value. Across levels, teachers primarily use AI to reduce instructional preparation workload (e.g., assessment, lesson planning, and material development). However, generic outputs, infrastructure constraints, and limited contextual alignment continue to hinder effective classroom integration.

analysis.tldr: 基于印尼全国349名K-12教师调查，揭示AI在教学中应用不均，主要减轻备课负担，但面临输出泛化、基础设施和情境适配等挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管AI在印尼课堂中逐渐使用，但缺乏大规模以教师为中心的实证证据，阻碍了情境化AI系统和政策的开发。
analysis.problem: AI在印尼K-12教育中的实际使用模式和支持需求不明确，导致系统与政策缺乏针对性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 小学教师使用AI更一致，高中教师参与较少；中期职业教师更重视AI，东印尼教师感知价值更高；AI主要用于减轻备课负担。
analysis.main_method: 对印尼349名K-12教师（涵盖小学、初中、高中）进行全国性调查，分析AI在教学、内容开发和教学媒体中的应用。
analysis.key_experiments: 调查了349名教师，覆盖不同教育阶段和地区，分析使用频率、重要性感知及障碍。
analysis.contributions: 提供了首个大规模教师中心证据，揭示AI使用不均和主要障碍，为情境化AI系统与政策制定提供依据。
analysis.limitations: 样本量有限（349人），可能未完全代表印尼多样性；依赖自我报告，存在主观偏差。

papers.title: Expert-Choice Routing Enables Adaptive Computation in Diffusion Language Models
papers.abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) enable parallel, non-autoregressive text generation, yet existing DLM mixture-of-experts (MoE) models inherit token-choice (TC) routing from autoregressive systems, leading to load imbalance and rigid computation allocation. We show that expert-choice (EC) routing is a better fit for DLMs: it provides deterministic load balancing by design, yielding higher throughput and faster convergence than TC. Building on the property that EC capacity is externally controllable, we introduce timestep-dependent expert capacity, which varies expert allocation according to the denoising step. We find that allocating more capacity to low-mask-ratio steps consistently achieves the best performance under matched FLOPs, and provide a mechanistic explanation: tokens in low-mask-ratio contexts exhibit an order-of-magnitude higher learning efficiency, so concentrating compute on these steps yields the largest marginal return. Finally, we show that existing pretrained TC DLMs can be retrofitted to EC by replacing only the router, achieving faster convergence and improved accuracy across diverse downstream tasks. Together, these results establish EC routing as a superior paradigm for DLM MoE models and demonstrate that computation in DLMs can be treated as an adaptive policy rather than a fixed architectural constant. Code is available at https://github.com/zhangshuibai/EC-DLM.

analysis.tldr: 提出专家选择路由替代令牌选择路由，用于扩散语言模型MoE，实现自适应计算分配，提升吞吐量和收敛速度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散语言模型MoE继承自回归系统的令牌选择路由，导致负载不均和计算分配僵化，需要更适合的路由机制。
analysis.problem: 扩散语言模型MoE中令牌选择路由导致负载不平衡和计算分配不灵活。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低掩码率步骤的令牌学习效率高出一个数量级，集中计算在这些步骤可获得最大边际收益。
analysis.main_method: 采用专家选择路由，通过设计确定性负载均衡和时步依赖的专家容量，动态分配计算资源。
analysis.key_experiments: 在匹配FLOPs条件下，低掩码率步骤分配更多容量取得最佳性能；预训练令牌选择模型可替换路由器为专家选择路由。
analysis.contributions: 证明专家选择路由是扩散语言模型MoE的优越范式，实现计算作为自适应策略而非固定架构常数。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论专家选择路由在极端低资源场景下的表现，以及大规模预训练模型的适配成本。

papers.title: Learning from the Right Rollouts: Data Attribution for PPO-based LLM Post-Training
papers.abstract: Traditional RL algorithms like Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) typically train on the entire rollout buffer, operating under the assumption that all generated episodes provide a beneficial optimization signal. However, these episodes frequently contain noisy or unfaithful reasoning, which can degrade model performance and slow down training. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Influence-Guided PPO (I-PPO)}, a novel framework that integrates data attribution into the RL post-training loop. By calculating an influence score for each episode using a gradient-based approximation, I-PPO identifies and eliminates episodes that are anti-aligned with a validation gradient. Our experiments demonstrate that I-PPO consistently outperforms SFT and PPO baselines. We show that our filtering process acts as an intrinsic early stopping mechanism, accelerating training efficiency while effectively reducing unfaithful CoT reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出I-PPO框架，通过梯度近似计算影响分数过滤有害轨迹，提升PPO后训练效率与推理质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统PPO假设所有轨迹有益，但实际包含噪声或错误推理，导致性能下降和训练缓慢。
analysis.problem: PPO训练中轨迹缓冲区的噪声和错误推理损害模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: PPO生成的轨迹常包含不忠实推理，这些反对齐样本会降低训练信号质量。
analysis.main_method: 基于梯度近似计算每个轨迹的影响分数，过滤与验证梯度反对齐的样本。
analysis.key_experiments: 在PPO后训练中对比I-PPO与SFT、PPO基线，验证过滤机制加速训练并减少不忠实推理。
analysis.contributions: 首次将数据归因引入RL后训练，提出内在早停机制提升效率与推理忠实性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖验证梯度质量，计算开销可能随轨迹数量增加。

papers.title: Optimizing EEG Graph Structure for Seizure Detection: An Information Bottleneck and Self-Supervised Learning Approach
papers.abstract: Seizure detection from EEG signals is highly challenging due to complex spatiotemporal dynamics and extreme inter-patient variability. To model them, recent methods construct dynamic graphs via statistical correlations, predefined similarity measures, or implicit learning, yet rarely account for EEG's noisy nature. Consequently, these graphs usually contain redundant or task-irrelevant connections, undermining model performance even with state-of-the-art architectures. In this paper, we present a new perspective for EEG seizure detection: jointly learning denoised dynamic graph structures and informative spatial-temporal representations guided by the Information Bottleneck (IB). Unlike prior approaches, our graph constructor explicitly accounts for the noisy characteristics of EEG data, producing compact and reliable connectivity patterns that better support downstream seizure detection. To further enhance representation learning, we employ a self-supervised Graph Masked AutoEncoder that reconstructs masked EEG signals based on dynamic graph context, promoting structure-aware and compact representations aligned with the IB principle. Bringing things together, we introduce Information Bottleneck-guided EEG SeizuRE DetectioN via SElf-Supervised Learning (IRENE), which explicitly learns dynamic graph structures and interpretable spatial-temporal EEG representations. IRENE addresses three core challenges: (i) Identifying the most informative nodes and edges; (ii) Explaining seizure propagation in the brain network; and (iii) Enhancing robustness against label scarcity and inter-patient variability. Extensive experiments on benchmark EEG datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in seizure detection and provides clinically meaningful insights into seizure dynamics. The source code is available at https://github.com/LabRAI/IRENE.

analysis.tldr: 提出IRENE方法，结合信息瓶颈与自监督学习优化EEG图结构，提升癫痫检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有EEG癫痫检测方法构建的图结构常包含冗余或任务无关连接，影响模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何从噪声EEG数据中学习紧凑、可靠的动态图结构以提升癫痫检测准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: EEG信号具有复杂时空动态和患者间差异，且噪声干扰导致传统图构建方法产生冗余连接。
analysis.main_method: 提出IRENE框架，利用信息瓶颈指导图结构学习，并采用自监督图掩码自编码器增强表示。
analysis.key_experiments: 在基准EEG数据集上对比多种基线，IRENE在癫痫检测任务中取得最优性能。
analysis.contributions: 首次将信息瓶颈与自监督学习结合用于EEG图结构优化，提供可解释的癫痫传播分析。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论计算复杂度及对极端噪声场景的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Random Coordinate Descent on the Wasserstein Space of Probability Measures
papers.abstract: Optimization over the space of probability measures endowed with the Wasserstein-2 geometry is central to modern machine learning and mean-field modeling. However, traditional methods relying on full Wasserstein gradients often suffer from high computational overhead in high-dimensional or ill-conditioned settings. We propose a randomized coordinate descent framework specifically designed for the Wasserstein manifold, introducing both Random Wasserstein Coordinate Descent (RWCD) and Random Wasserstein Coordinate Proximal{-Gradient} (RWCP) for composite objectives. By exploiting coordinate-wise structures, our methods adapt to anisotropic objective landscapes where full-gradient approaches typically struggle. We provide a rigorous convergence analysis across various landscape geometries, establishing guarantees under non-convex, Polyak-{\L}ojasiewicz, and geodesically convex conditions. Our theoretical results mirror the classic convergence properties found in Euclidean space, revealing a compelling symmetry between coordinate descent on vectors and on probability measures. The developed techniques are inherently adaptive to the Wasserstein geometry and offer a robust analytical template that can be extended to other optimization solvers within the space of measures. Numerical experiments on ill-conditioned energies demonstrate that our framework offers significant speedups over conventional full-gradient methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出随机坐标下降法用于Wasserstein流形上的概率测度优化，显著加速高维或病态问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统全梯度Wasserstein优化在高维或病态条件下计算开销大，需要更高效的替代方法。
analysis.problem: 解决Wasserstein空间中全梯度方法在目标函数各向异性时效率低下的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 坐标下降在欧氏空间中对病态问题有效，但Wasserstein几何中缺乏类似方法，且梯度方向可能被各向异性主导。
analysis.main_method: 提出随机Wasserstein坐标下降（RWCD）和随机Wasserstein坐标近端梯度（RWCP），利用坐标结构适应各向异性目标。
analysis.key_experiments: 在病态能量函数上测试，显示RWCD和RWCP相比全梯度方法显著加速。
analysis.contributions: 首次将坐标下降扩展到Wasserstein流形，提供非凸、PL和测地凸条件下的收敛保证。
analysis.limitations: 理论分析假设坐标选择策略为均匀随机，可能未覆盖自适应采样；实验仅验证了病态场景。

papers.title: Training In-Context and In-Weights Mixtures Via Contrastive Context Sampling
papers.abstract: We investigate training strategies that co-develop in-context learning (ICL) and in-weights learning (IWL), and the ability to switch between them based on context relevance. Although current LLMs exhibit both modes, standard task-specific fine-tuning often erodes ICL, motivating IC-Train - fine-tuning with in-context examples. Prior work has shown that emergence of ICL after IC-Train depends on factors such as task diversity and training duration. In this paper we show that the similarity structure between target inputs and context examples also plays an important role. Random context leads to loss of ICL and IWL dominance, while only similar examples in context causes ICL to degenerate to copying labels without regard to relevance. To address this, we propose a simple Contrastive-Context which enforces two types of contrasts: (1) mix of similar and random examples within a context to evolve a correct form of ICL, and (2) varying grades of similarity across contexts to evolve ICL-IWL mixtures. We present insights on the importance of such contrast with theoretical analysis of a minimal model. We validate with extensive empirical evaluation on four LLMs and several tasks. Diagnostic probes confirm that contrasted contexts yield stable ICL-IWL mixtures, avoiding collapse into pure ICL, IWL, or copying.

analysis.tldr: 提出对比上下文采样方法，通过混合相似与随机示例训练LLM，平衡上下文学习与权重学习，避免模式崩溃。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准微调会削弱LLM的上下文学习能力，现有IC-Train方法依赖任务多样性等因素，但上下文示例的相似性结构影响未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 如何通过训练策略同时发展上下文学习和权重学习，并使其能根据上下文相关性灵活切换，避免ICL退化为标签复制或IWL主导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机上下文导致ICL丧失和IWL主导，仅相似示例使ICL退化为无关标签复制，表明上下文示例的相似性结构对学习模式平衡至关重要。
analysis.main_method: 提出对比上下文采样，包含两种对比：上下文内混合相似与随机示例以演化正确ICL，上下文间变化相似度以演化ICL-IWL混合。
analysis.key_experiments: 在四个LLM和多个任务上验证，诊断探针确认对比上下文产生稳定的ICL-IWL混合，避免崩溃为纯ICL、IWL或复制。
analysis.contributions: 揭示上下文相似性结构对ICL-IWL平衡的关键作用，提出简单有效的对比上下文训练方法，理论分析最小模型提供见解。
analysis.limitations: 方法依赖人工设计的相似度分级，可能需针对不同任务调整；理论分析限于最小模型，实际LLM的泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Swift-SVD: Theoretical Optimality Meets Practical Efficiency in Low-Rank LLM Compression
papers.abstract: The deployment of Large Language Models is constrained by the memory and bandwidth demands of static weights and dynamic Key-Value cache. SVD-based compression provides a hardware-friendly solution to reduce these costs. However, existing methods suffer from two key limitations: some are suboptimal in reconstruction error, while others are theoretically optimal but practically inefficient. In this paper, we propose Swift-SVD, an activation-aware, closed-form compression framework that simultaneously guarantees theoretical optimum, practical efficiency and numerical stability. Swift-SVD incrementally aggregates covariance of output activations given a batch of inputs and performs a single eigenvalue decomposition after aggregation, enabling training-free, fast, and optimal layer-wise low-rank approximation. We employ effective rank to analyze local layer-wise compressibility and design a dynamic rank allocation strategy that jointly accounts for local reconstruction loss and end-to-end layer importance. Extensive experiments across six LLMs and eight datasets demonstrate that Swift-SVD outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving optimal compression accuracy while delivering 3-70X speedups in end-to-end compression time. Our code will be released upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: Swift-SVD 提出一种激活感知的闭式低秩压缩框架，兼顾理论最优性、实际效率和数值稳定性，在 LLM 压缩中实现 3-70 倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 SVD 压缩方法在重建误差最优性和实际效率之间存在权衡，需要一种同时满足理论最优和高效的方法。
analysis.problem: 解决 LLM 压缩中 SVD 方法要么重建误差次优，要么理论最优但实际效率低下的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 输出激活的协方差矩阵可通过增量聚合，单次特征分解即可实现最优低秩近似，且局部可压缩性可用有效秩分析。
analysis.main_method: 增量聚合输出激活协方差，执行单次特征分解实现无训练、快速、最优的逐层低秩近似，并基于有效秩设计动态秩分配策略。
analysis.key_experiments: 在六个 LLM 和八个数据集上评估，与 SOTA 基线对比，压缩精度最优且端到端压缩时间加速 3-70 倍。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个同时保证理论最优、实际高效和数值稳定的闭式低秩压缩框架，并引入有效秩驱动的动态秩分配。
analysis.limitations: 依赖批次输入进行协方差聚合，可能受批次大小影响；未讨论对超大规模模型（如万亿参数）的扩展性。

papers.title: Pseudo-Quantized Actor-Critic Algorithm for Robustness to Noisy Temporal Difference Error
papers.abstract: In reinforcement learning (RL), temporal difference (TD) errors are widely adopted for optimizing value and policy functions. However, since the TD error is defined by a bootstrap method, its computation tends to be noisy and destabilize learning. Heuristics to improve the accuracy of TD errors, such as target networks and ensemble models, have been introduced so far. While these are essential approaches for the current deep RL algorithms, they cause side effects like increased computational cost and reduced learning efficiency. Therefore, this paper revisits the TD learning algorithm based on control as inference, deriving a novel algorithm capable of robust learning against noisy TD errors. First, the distribution model of optimality, a binary random variable, is represented by a sigmoid function. Alongside forward and reverse Kullback-Leibler divergences, this new model derives a robust learning rule: when the sigmoid function saturates with a large TD error probably due to noise, the gradient vanishes, implicitly excluding it from learning. Furthermore, the two divergences exhibit distinct gradient-vanishing characteristics. Building on these analyses, the optimality is decomposed into multiple levels to achieve pseudo-quantization of TD errors, aiming for further noise reduction. Additionally, a Jensen-Shannon divergence-based approach is approximately derived to inherit the characteristics of both divergences. These benefits are verified through RL benchmarks, demonstrating stable learning even when heuristics are insufficient or rewards contain noise.

analysis.tldr: 提出伪量化演员-评论家算法，通过控制作为推断视角推导对噪声时序差分误差鲁棒的学习规则。
analysis.research_motivation: 时序差分误差在强化学习中广泛使用，但其自举计算易引入噪声，导致学习不稳定。现有启发式方法（如目标网络、集成模型）虽能提升精度，但带来计算成本增加和学习效率下降等副作用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖启发式方法的情况下，使强化学习算法对噪声时序差分误差具有鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最优性分布模型（二元随机变量）由sigmoid函数表示，当大TD误差（可能由噪声引起）导致sigmoid饱和时，梯度消失，从而隐式排除该样本的学习。前向和反向KL散度表现出不同的梯度消失特性。
analysis.main_method: 将最优性分解为多个层级实现TD误差的伪量化，进一步降低噪声；并近似推导基于Jensen-Shannon散度的方法以继承两种KL散度的特性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在强化学习基准测试中验证，即使启发式方法不足或奖励包含噪声，算法仍能稳定学习。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种无需额外启发式方法即可鲁棒学习的新算法，通过伪量化和JS散度融合两种KL散度的优势。
analysis.limitations: 伪量化层级的选择可能影响性能，且理论分析主要基于离散动作空间，连续动作空间需进一步验证。

papers.title: Variational LSTM with Augmented Inputs: Nonlinear Response History Metamodeling with Aleatoric and Epistemic Uncertainty
papers.abstract: Uncertainty propagation in high-dimensional nonlinear dynamic structural systems is pivotal in state-of-the-art performance-based design and risk assessment, where uncertainties from both excitations and structures, i.e., the aleatoric uncertainty, must be considered. This poses a significant challenge due to heavy computational demands. Machine learning techniques are thus introduced as metamodels to alleviate this burden. However, the "black box" nature of Machine learning models underscores the necessity of avoiding overly confident predictions, particularly when data and training efforts are insufficient. This creates a need, in addition to considering the aleatoric uncertainty, of estimating the uncertainty related to the prediction confidence, i.e., epistemic uncertainty, for machine learning-based metamodels. We developed a probabilistic metamodeling technique based on a variational long short-term memory (LSTM) with augmented inputs to simultaneously capture aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties. Key random system parameters are treated as augmented inputs alongside excitation series carrying record-to-record variability to capture the full range of aleatoric uncertainty. Meanwhile, epistemic uncertainty is effectively approximated via the Monte Carlo dropout scheme. Unlike computationally expensive full Bayesian approaches, this method incurs negligible additional training costs while enabling nearly cost-free uncertainty simulation. The proposed technique is demonstrated through multiple case studies involving stochastic seismic or wind excitations. Results show that the calibrated metamodels accurately reproduce nonlinear response time histories and provide confidence bounds indicating the associated epistemic uncertainty.

analysis.tldr: 提出变分LSTM增强输入方法，同时捕获非线性动力系统响应中的偶然与认知不确定性，实现高效元建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 高性能抗震设计需考虑激励与结构双重不确定性，但传统蒙特卡洛模拟计算成本过高，亟需高效元模型。
analysis.problem: 现有机器学习元模型无法同时量化偶然不确定性（激励/结构随机性）和认知不确定性（模型预测置信度），易产生过度自信预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高维非线性动力系统中，数据不足时黑箱模型预测置信度低，需区分不可约的偶然不确定性与可降低的认知不确定性。
analysis.main_method: 将关键随机系统参数作为增强输入与激励序列共同输入变分LSTM，通过蒙特卡洛dropout近似认知不确定性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在随机地震和风激励多个案例中验证，元模型准确复现非线性响应时程并提供置信区间。
analysis.contributions: 首次在LSTM元建模中同时捕获两类不确定性，且训练成本几乎不增加，不确定性模拟近乎零成本。
analysis.limitations: 仅验证了地震和风激励场景，未讨论其他非线性动力系统（如冲击载荷）的适用性。

papers.title: EXHIB: A Benchmark for Realistic and Diverse Evaluation of Function Similarity in the Wild
authors: and Carter Yagemann (1) ((1) The Ohio State University)
papers.abstract: Binary Function Similarity Detection (BFSD) is a core problem in software security, supporting tasks such as vulnerability analysis, malware classification, and patch provenance. In the past few decades, numerous models and tools have been developed for this application; however, due to the lack of a comprehensive universal benchmark in this field, researchers have struggled to compare different models effectively. Existing datasets are limited in scope, often focusing on a narrow set of transformations or types of binaries, and fail to reflect the full diversity of real-world applications. We introduce EXHIB, a benchmark comprising five realistic datasets collected from the wild, each highlighting a distinct aspect of the BFSD problem space. We evaluate 9 representative models spanning multiple BFSD paradigms on EXHIB and observe performance degradations of up to 30% on firmware and semantic datasets compared to standard settings, revealing substantial generalization gaps. Our results show that robustness to low- and mid-level binary variations does not generalize to high-level semantic differences, underscoring a critical blind spot in current BFSD evaluation practices.

analysis.tldr: 提出EXHIB基准，包含5个真实数据集，评估9种BFSD模型，发现固件和语义数据集性能下降达30%，揭示当前评估盲点。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有BFSD基准范围有限，无法反映真实世界的多样性，导致模型比较困难。
analysis.problem: 缺乏全面通用的基准来评估二进制函数相似性检测模型在真实场景中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型对低中级二进制变体的鲁棒性不能泛化到高级语义差异，存在显著泛化差距。
analysis.main_method: 构建包含5个真实数据集的EXHIB基准，覆盖不同BFSD问题空间，并评估9种代表性模型。
analysis.key_experiments: 在EXHIB上评估9种模型，观察到固件和语义数据集性能下降高达30%。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个涵盖真实多样性的BFSD基准，揭示当前评估实践中的关键盲点。
analysis.limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有BFSD场景，且模型评估限于9种，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: DeltaMem: Towards Agentic Memory Management via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Recent advances in persona-centric memory have revealed the powerful capability of multi-agent systems in managing persona memory, especially in conversational scenarios. However, these complex frameworks often suffer from information loss and are fragile across varying scenarios, resulting in suboptimal performance. In this paper, we propose DeltaMem, an agentic memory management system that formulates persona-centric memory management as an end-to-end task within a single-agent setting. To further improve the performance of our agentic memory manager, we draw inspiration from the evolution of human memory and synthesize a user-assistant dialogue dataset along with corresponding operation-level memory updating labels. Building on this, we introduce a novel Memory-based Levenshtein Distance to formalize the memory updating reward, and propose a tailored reinforcement learning framework to further enhance the management capabilities of DeltaMem. Extensive experiments show that both training-free and RL-trained DeltaMem outperform all product-level baselines across diverse long-term memory benchmarks, including LoCoMo, HaluMem, and PersonaMem.

analysis.tldr: 提出DeltaMem，将角色记忆管理建模为单智能体端到端任务，通过强化学习优化记忆更新，在多个基准上超越产品级基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有角色记忆系统在多智能体框架中常出现信息丢失和场景脆弱性问题，性能次优。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高效、鲁棒的角色记忆管理，避免信息丢失并适应多变场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类记忆演化过程启发记忆更新应具有操作级细粒度调整，而非简单存储。
analysis.main_method: 构建用户-助手对话数据集及操作级记忆更新标签，提出基于记忆的Levenshtein距离作为奖励，设计强化学习框架优化记忆管理器。
analysis.key_experiments: 在LoCoMo、HaluMem、PersonaMem等长期记忆基准上，训练自由和RL训练的DeltaMem均优于所有产品级基线。
analysis.contributions: 首次将角色记忆管理作为单智能体端到端任务，引入记忆Levenshtein距离和强化学习框架。
analysis.limitations: 依赖合成数据集，可能限制真实场景泛化；单智能体设置可能忽略多智能体协作优势。

papers.title: ZEUS: Accelerating Diffusion Models with Only Second-Order Predictor
papers.abstract: Denoising generative models deliver high-fidelity generation but remain bottlenecked by inference latency due to the many iterative denoiser calls required during sampling. Training-free acceleration methods reduce latency by either sparsifying the model architecture or shortening the sampling trajectory. Current training-free acceleration methods are more complex than necessary: higher-order predictors amplify error under aggressive speedups, and architectural modifications hinder deployment. Beyond 2x acceleration, step skipping creates structural scarcity -- at most one fresh evaluation per local window -- leaving the computed output and its backward difference as the only causally grounded information. Based on this, we propose ZEUS, an acceleration method that predicts reduced denoiser evaluations using a second-order predictor, and stabilizes aggressive consecutive skipping with an interleaved scheme that avoids back-to-back extrapolations. ZEUS adds essentially zero overhead, no feature caches, and no architectural modifications, and it is compatible with different backbones, prediction objectives, and solver choices. Across image and video generation, ZEUS consistently improves the speed-fidelity performance over recent training-free baselines, achieving up to 3.2x end-to-end speedup while maintaining perceptual quality. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Ting-Justin-Jiang/ZEUS.

analysis.tldr: 提出ZEUS方法，用二阶预测器加速扩散模型，无需训练或架构修改，实现3.2倍加速并保持质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型推理延迟高，现有加速方法复杂或效果有限，需更简洁高效的方案。
analysis.problem: 扩散模型采样需多次迭代去噪，导致推理瓶颈；现有加速方法在高速率下误差大或部署困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 超过2倍加速时，步跳过导致结构稀疏性，仅一次新评估和反向差分可用，二阶预测器可有效利用此信息。
analysis.main_method: 使用二阶预测器减少去噪评估次数，并通过交错方案避免连续外推，稳定激进跳步。
analysis.key_experiments: 在图像和视频生成任务上测试，与多种训练无关基线对比，实现最高3.2倍端到端加速且保持感知质量。
analysis.contributions: 提出零开销、无缓存、无架构修改的加速方法，兼容多种骨干网络和求解器。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论在极端加速比下的性能边界或对特定任务的适用性。

papers.title: Care-Conditioned Neuromodulation for Autonomy-Preserving Supportive Dialogue Agents
papers.abstract: Large language models deployed in supportive or advisory roles must balance helpfulness with preservation of user autonomy, yet standard alignment methods primarily optimize for helpfulness and harmlessness without explicitly modeling relational risks such as dependency reinforcement, overprotection, or coercive guidance. We introduce Care-Conditioned Neuromodulation (CCN), a state-dependent control framework in which a learned scalar signal derived from structured user state and dialogue context conditions response generation and candidate selection.
