We formalize this setting as an autonomy-preserving alignment problem and define a utility function that rewards autonomy support and helpfulness while penalizing dependency and coercion. We also construct a benchmark of relational failure modes in multi-turn dialogue, including reassurance dependence, manipulative care, overprotection, and boundary inconsistency. On this benchmark, care-conditioned candidate generation combined with utility-based reranking improves autonomy-preserving utility by +0.25 over supervised fine-tuning and +0.07 over preference optimization baselines while maintaining comparable supportiveness. Pilot human evaluation and zero-shot transfer to real emotional-support conversations show directional agreement with automated metrics. These results suggest that state-dependent control combined with utility-based selection is a practical approach to multi-objective alignment in autonomy-sensitive dialogue.

analysis.tldr: 提出护理条件神经调节（CCN）框架，通过状态依赖控制提升对话代理的自主性保护，在基准测试中优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对齐方法主要优化有用性和无害性，未明确建模依赖强化、过度保护等关系风险，需在支持性对话中平衡帮助与用户自主性。
analysis.problem: 标准对齐方法无法处理支持性对话中的自主性侵蚀问题，如依赖强化、强制指导等关系失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多轮对话中存在安慰依赖、操纵性关怀、过度保护和边界不一致等关系失败模式，传统方法未显式建模这些风险。
analysis.main_method: 提出CCN框架，从用户状态和对话上下文中学习标量信号，条件化响应生成和候选选择，并定义奖励自主支持与帮助、惩罚依赖与强制的效用函数。
analysis.key_experiments: 构建关系失败模式基准，CCN结合效用重排在自主保护效用上比SFT提升+0.25，比偏好优化提升+0.07，人工评估和零样本迁移验证了方向一致性。
analysis.contributions: 形式化自主保护对齐问题，提出CCN框架和关系失败模式基准，实验证明状态依赖控制与效用选择在多目标对齐中的有效性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖结构化用户状态表示，可能难以扩展到开放域；人工评估样本量有限，需更大规模验证。

papers.title: Read More, Think More: Revisiting Observation Reduction for Web Agents
papers.abstract: Web agents based on large language models (LLMs) rely on observations of web pages -- commonly represented as HTML -- as the basis for identifying available actions and planning subsequent steps. Prior work has treated the verbosity of HTML as an obstacle to performance and adopted observation reduction as a standard practice. We revisit this trend and demonstrate that the optimal observation representation depends on model capability and thinking token budget: (1) compact observations (accessibility trees) are preferable for lower-capability models, while detailed observations (HTML) are advantageous for higher-capability models; moreover, increasing thinking tokens further amplifies the benefit of HTML. (2) Our error analysis suggests that higher-capability models exploit layout information in HTML for better action grounding, while lower-capability models suffer from increased hallucination under longer inputs. We also find that incorporating observation history improves performance across most models and settings, and a diff-based representation offers a token-efficient alternative. Based on these findings, we suggest practical guidelines: adaptively select observation representations based on model capability and thinking token budget, and incorporate observation history using diff-based representations.

analysis.tldr: 重新审视Web智能体的观察缩减，发现高能力模型受益于详细HTML，低能力模型更适合紧凑表示，且增加思考令牌可放大HTML优势。
analysis.research_motivation: 先前研究将HTML的冗长视为障碍并普遍采用观察缩减，但未考虑模型能力差异，需要重新评估这一做法。
analysis.problem: Web智能体基于LLM的观察表示（如HTML或可访问性树）如何根据模型能力和思考令牌预算进行最优选择。
analysis.phenomenology_analysis: 高能力模型能利用HTML中的布局信息进行更好的动作定位，而低能力模型在长输入下更容易产生幻觉。
analysis.main_method: 通过对比实验分析不同观察表示（HTML vs. 可访问性树）在不同能力模型和思考令牌预算下的表现，并引入观察历史和差异表示。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个Web智能体基准上测试不同模型（如GPT-4、Llama）和观察表示，评估准确率和令牌效率。
analysis.contributions: 提出基于模型能力和思考令牌预算的自适应观察表示选择指南，并发现差异表示作为令牌高效的历史表示方法。
analysis.limitations: 实验可能局限于特定模型和基准，未充分探索其他观察表示（如视觉特征）或更复杂的动态环境。

papers.title: Learning ECG Image Representations via Dual Physiological-Aware Alignments
papers.abstract: Electrocardiograms (ECGs) are among the most widely used diagnostic tools for cardiovascular diseases, and a large amount of ECG data worldwide appears only in image form. However, most existing automated ECG analysis methods rely on access to raw signal recordings, limiting their applicability in real-world and resource-constrained settings. In this paper, we present ECG-Scan, a self-supervised framework for learning clinically generalized representations from ECG images through dual physiological-aware alignments: 1) Our approach optimizes image representation learning using multimodal contrastive alignment between image and gold-standard signal-text modalities. 2) We further integrate domain knowledge via soft-lead constraints, regularizing the reconstruction process and improving signal lead inter-consistency. Extensive benchmarking across multiple datasets and downstream tasks demonstrates that our image-based model achieves superior performance compared to existing image baselines and notably narrows the gap between ECG image and signal analysis. These results highlight the potential of self-supervised image modeling to unlock large-scale legacy ECG data and broaden access to automated cardiovascular diagnostics.

analysis.tldr: 提出ECG-Scan框架，通过双生理感知对齐从心电图像中学习临床通用表示，缩小图像与信号分析差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 大量ECG数据仅以图像形式存在，现有方法依赖原始信号，限制实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从ECG图像中学习临床有效的表示，无需原始信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ECG图像与信号之间存在模态差异，但图像中隐含生理结构信息可被对齐利用。
analysis.main_method: 采用多模态对比对齐（图像-信号文本）和软导联约束正则化重建，实现双生理感知对齐。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个数据集和下游任务上评估，图像模型优于现有图像基线，接近信号分析性能。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个自监督图像表示框架，利用双对齐缩小模态差距，解锁大规模历史ECG图像数据。
analysis.limitations: 依赖信号-文本对进行对齐，可能受限于数据可用性；软导联约束的泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Matching Accuracy, Different Geometry: Evolution Strategies vs GRPO in LLM Post-Training
papers.abstract: Evolution Strategies (ES) have emerged as a scalable gradient-free alternative to reinforcement learning based LLM fine-tuning, but it remains unclear whether comparable task performance implies comparable solutions in parameter space. We compare ES and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) across four tasks in both single-task and sequential continual-learning settings. ES matches or exceeds GRPO in single-task accuracy and remains competitive sequentially when its iteration budget is controlled. Despite this similarity in task performance, the two methods produce markedly different model updates: ES makes much larger changes and induces broader off-task KL drift, whereas GRPO makes smaller, more localized updates. Strikingly, the ES and GRPO solutions are linearly connected with no loss barrier, even though their update directions are nearly orthogonal. We develop an analytical theory of ES that explains all these phenomena within a unified framework, showing how ES can accumulate large off-task movement on weakly informative directions while still making enough progress on the task to match gradient-based RL in downstream accuracy. These results show that gradient-free and gradient-based fine-tuning can reach similarly accurate yet geometrically distinct solutions, with important consequences for forgetting and knowledge preservation. The source code is publicly available: https://github.com/Bhoy1/ESvsGRPO.

analysis.tldr: ES与GRPO在LLM后训练中任务性能相当，但参数更新几何差异显著：ES更新更大、KL漂移更广，而GRPO更局部化。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索进化策略（ES）在LLM微调中是否与基于梯度的GRPO产生本质不同的参数解，以理解其行为差异。
analysis.problem: ES和GRPO在任务性能相似时，参数空间中的解是否具有可比性？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ES和GRPO的更新方向近乎正交，但解之间线性连接无损失障碍，表明它们位于同一损失盆地但路径不同。
analysis.main_method: 在单任务和连续学习设置中对比ES与GRPO，并开发分析理论解释ES在弱信息方向上的大偏移与任务性能匹配现象。
analysis.key_experiments: 在四个任务上比较单任务准确率和连续学习性能，控制ES迭代预算，测量参数更新大小、KL散度和线性连接性。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了ES与GRPO在任务性能匹配时参数更新的几何差异，并提供了统一理论框架解释ES的大幅度离任务移动。
analysis.limitations: 未探讨更大规模模型或更复杂任务下的泛化性，且ES的迭代预算控制可能影响公平性。

papers.title: Beyond Logit Adjustment: A Residual Decomposition Framework for Long-Tailed Reranking
papers.abstract: Long-tailed classification, where a small number of frequent classes dominate many rare ones, remains challenging because models systematically favor frequent classes at inference time. Existing post-hoc methods such as logit adjustment address this by adding a fixed classwise offset to the base-model logits. However, the correction required to restore the relative ranking of two classes need not be constant across inputs, and a fixed offset cannot adapt to such variation. We study this problem through Bayes-optimal reranking on a base-model top-k shortlist. The gap between the optimal score and the base score, the residual correction, decomposes into a classwise component that is constant within each class, and a pairwise component that depends on the input and competing labels. When the residual is purely classwise, a fixed offset suffices to recover the Bayes-optimal ordering. We further show that when the same label pair induces incompatible ordering constraints across contexts, no fixed offset can achieve this recovery. This decomposition leads to testable predictions regarding when pairwise correction can improve performance and when cannot. We develop REPAIR (Reranking via Pairwise residual correction), a lightweight post-hoc reranker that combines a shrinkage-stabilized classwise term with a linear pairwise term driven by competition features on the shortlist. Experiments on five benchmarks spanning image classification, species recognition, scene recognition, and rare disease diagnosis confirm that the decomposition explains where pairwise correction helps and where classwise correction alone suffices.

analysis.tldr: 提出残差分解框架，将长尾分类的后处理校正分解为类内固定分量和输入相关的成对分量，并设计轻量级重排序方法 REPAIR。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有后处理方法（如 logit 调整）使用固定类别偏移，无法适应不同输入下类别间校正需求的变化，导致长尾分类性能受限。
analysis.problem: 长尾分类中，模型在推理时系统性偏向频繁类，固定偏移无法恢复最优类别排序，尤其当同一标签对在不同上下文中产生冲突排序约束时。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 贝叶斯最优重排序所需的残差校正可分解为类内常数分量和输入依赖的成对分量；当残差仅为类内分量时固定偏移有效，但成对分量存在时固定偏移失效。
analysis.main_method: 提出 REPAIR，一种轻量级后处理重排序方法，结合收缩稳定的类内项和基于短列表竞争特征的线性成对项。
analysis.key_experiments: 在图像分类、物种识别、场景识别和罕见病诊断五个基准上验证，分解解释了成对校正何时有效、何时仅需类内校正。
analysis.contributions: 理论揭示了固定偏移的局限性并给出可检验预测；提出 REPAIR 方法，在多个长尾任务上提升性能。
analysis.limitations: 成对校正依赖短列表质量，且线性模型可能无法捕捉复杂交互。
